title: USI-EH27-Firm Tax-L35-Consultant-Direct Tax
description: Consultant, Direct Tax – USI Firms TaxWe are looking for professionals with sound working knowledge in Indian domestic and international tax law matters. Work you’ll do  As a part of this team you will be expected to possess and demonstrate the following work skill-setsClear and concise written and verbal communication skillsSound understanding of financial accounting (income statements, balance sheets, cash flows) and financials.Experience in preparing General account schedules.Experience in preparing supporting work papers to support tax returns.Experience in handling tax compliancesData complying for tax auditsFilling of Form 3CD (Fair knowledge of all clauses of Form 3CD)Knowledge of data requirement of tax computationFilling of Income Tax returnsForm 26 AS reconciliation & AIS reconciliation.Preparation and filing of Monthly TDs payments & Quarterly return related activity for TDS.Drafting tax responses, submissions and representation before tax officeFair knowledge of e-filing Income tax portalMust have fair knowledge of Income tax law including international tax law.Knowledge of tax assessment and related activities including drafting of responses.Proficiency in MS Office (including advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills).Ability to work independently and collaborate with a team in a dynamic work environment. The team  This position is a part of the Deloitte US India Firms Tax team. This Deloitte US India Firms Tax team is responsible for ensuring entity level compliances for all the Deloitte US India companies, besides catering to the tax essentials and advise to the internal business and enabling functions ecosystems. The team consists of tax professionals with adequate expertise in handling tax matters. This team works in close coordination with the USI finance, legal and enabling teams besides business teams to ensure optimum tax health of the Deloitte US India companies.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM QualificationsRequired:CS/CMA/CA Inter or LLB with 3+ years of experience with a Large MNC or Big 4/consulting firm (preference would be a Big 4 or consulting firm) Candidates with work experience in mid-to-large sized CA firms specializing in corporate tax work with good communication and drafting skills Candidates with a work-based demonstrated affinity in pursuing a career in corporate and international tax. The candidate should demonstrate integrity and energy and possess independent working ability and have a collaborative mindset. Capability of interactions with government officials, and liasioning with tax advisors and consultants would be an added advantage Candidates should possess cool temperament and be flexible in managing priorities and adaptable to change in process with stringent timelines is required Good working experience on Microsoft Excel and Word shall be essential. The professional should be able to work with multiple teams and should be a strong team player. Working knowledge / exposure to SAP / other ERP is required.How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.  Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI-EH27 - TAX - UK GI3 R&D  -L45 - Senior Tax services - Bangalore
description: Tax Consultant/ Senior – Global Innovation and Investment Incentives (Gi3 UK)The OpportunityAre you interested to work with clients developing innovative and state-of-the-art technologies? Are you driven to contribute to the financing of new emerging technologies and applied sciences? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and have a significant impact to global initiatives?If the answer to above is “Yes,” come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited started operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP U.S. service lines and regions have been supported by Deloitte Tax in India. In very recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands or the United Kingdom have been supported within their tax practice by Deloitte Tax India practice.The UK government provides tax incentives to businesses performing R&D; Deloitte’s R&D tax services group is a market leader in helping clients secure these incentives and is the most experienced team in the UK. We are looking for an open minded Information Technology (IT) / Computer Science (CS) professionals with both technical and software development knowledge, coupled with excellent communication skills. Knowledge of the full development lifecycle is sought and an appreciation of the types of technical challenges encountered across this lifecycle.Work you’ll doAs a Senior within our team, you will be in a client-facing role from day one, managing engagements, engaging with financial and technical teams, undertaking detailed financial analyses, and utilising your communication skills to quickly understand client costing methodologies. You will review and prepare high-quality documentation to quantify eligible R&D expenditure for tax purposes. This will require you to draw on your existing financial and costing experience, applying it to various industries and R&D projects.You will work as part of a project team alongside tax practitioners to help companies prepare their claims. You will work on multiple projects in parallel and will therefore have to manage several competing demands on your time.Your day-to-day responsibilities will allow you to gain an understanding of the financial structures behind a wide variety of cutting-edge technologies across different industries. You’ll have the opportunity to take a different career route and to maintain exposure to/increase your knowledge of emerging areas of innovation from a financial perspective.To list some of those key responsibilities:• Conducting efficient financial interviews with clients’ finance teams to understand their R&D expenditure, cost allocation, and financial systems.• Working directly with clients, Deloitte Partners and Directors taking ownership of end-to-end engagement management of R&D tax claim projects.• Analysing financial documentation and data from clients to support the development of robust R&D claim methodologies and prepare detailed costing schedules.• Invest in, mentor and train a cohort of analysts.• Champion the one-team culture across our UK and offshore delivery teams.• Writing clear, compelling financial reports for appropriate authorities (typically HMRC), based on financial analysis to convey how a client’s R&D expenditure qualifies for tax relief.• Lead projects to ensure R&D claims are delivered to time and within budget.• Working effectively in diverse teams of tax technicians, costing specialists and technical personnel within an inclusive team culture where people are recognised for their contribution.• Coordinate data automation for multiple projects concurrently.• Develop expertise and aptitude towards innovation in financial quantification.The TeamOur “Global Investment and Innovation Incentives (Gi³)” service line is embedded within Deloitte’s T&L practice and focused on advising companies in their pursuit of the right incentives by developing and executing an effective incentives strategy for their specific needs. The large majority of our Gi³ team members are scientists and engineers. Gi³ team then offers specific related knowledge and added value consultancy. This expertise allows our clients to take advantage of various incentives and grants related to their priorities in terms of Research & Development [R&D], innovation and sustainability. Further development of their intellectual properties and R&D activities can then leverage on those governmental support.To assist our clients in dealing with those government incentives, our team based in the UK proposes the services of a multi-disciplinary team of over 100 specialists (Lawyers, Economists, Scientists, Engineers or IT-specialists) highly experienced in assisting companies with multi-jurisdictions compliance, dealing with the complexities of local regulations and procedures – such as communicating with local grant and tax authorities, setting up new registrations and preparation & filling of government incentives applications.We are principally a UK-based team with colleagues in the Deloitte USI at Bangalore and are looking to further build our Bangalore capability.What we’re looking forAs a senior you will be in a client-facing role from day one, managing projects, preparing R&D claims, delegating, and building the team. You will be working with a variety of team members from junior to senior grades and be the main point of contact for your clients.  Your responsibilities will include:• Lead projects being the main point of contact with a range of senior stakeholders such as financial controllers, finance directors and chief finance officers.• Taking ownership over design of costing methodology, and execution of R&D tax engagements through liaison with internal engagement team to deliver high quality work products under budget.• Build eminence in the market and look for opportunities to grow the practice.• Build an internal network within Deloitte and gain an understanding of the services the firm can offer to broaden client relationships and differentiate us in the market.• Work within a project team to ensure that robust R&D claims are prepared whilst building deep client relationships.• Preparing clear reports for submission to HMRC to explain how our clients R&D claims have been prepared.• Provide financial input into marketing and sales activity based on your area of costing and tax knowledge.• Work effectively in diverse teams within an inclusive team culture where people are recognised for their contribution.• Project managing a variety of projects at any given time and being able to delegate and work with the technical and finance team around you.Work Location - BangaloreShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate-Digital Identity -MZ Azure  Active Directory - Consultant
description: Consultant As a Consultant for Active Directory at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for delivering high-quality work products within defined timelines while supporting the stability, security, and efficiency of Active Directory and Entra ID operations. Depending on level, the role may include mentoring junior team members, coordinating onsite/offshore delivery, leading operational workstreams, and supporting focused implementation or enhancement efforts.This role supports both technical and business stakeholders and is responsible for operational excellence across directory services, IAM processes, automation, service management, incident resolution, and platform optimization.Work you'll doAs a Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Architecting, implementing, and supporting Active Directory, Entra ID, and LDAP directory solutions across hybrid environments Providing level 3 operational support for directory services and IAM platforms, including incident resolution, root cause analysis, change management, and compliance reporting Troubleshooting authentication, authorization, Domain Name System (DNS), replication, Group Policy Objects (GPOs), service accounts, and Active Directory object configuration issues Developing PowerShell automation, operational reports, and runbooks to improve service delivery, platform stability, and operational efficiency Collaborating with client, infrastructure, security, and application teams on enhancements, upgrades, migrations, and ongoing service operations The teamDeloitte's Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes: Managing Identity Lifecycle Security Operations Threat Intelligence Application Security Business Transformation Continuous Compliance Cyber Operate team focuses on efficiently running operations by enabling automation, reducing manual effort and adhering to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) based on the standards set by clients.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiShift Timings: 24x7 rotational shifts, including night, weekend, holiday, and on-call coverage based on project assignmentsQualificationsRequired: 3-6 years of experience in identity and access management, directory services, or managed services operations 4+ years of experience supporting Active Directory and Entra ID in an operations or managed services environment Experience providing level 3 support for Active Directory, including incident management, problem management, change management, and root cause analysis Experience developing PowerShell scripts for automation, reporting, or operational monitoring Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, service request, problem, and change management Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university Preferred: Experience with Microsoft Identity Manager, Radiant Logic, Semperis, ManageEngine, Quest, or Active Directory migration tools Experience supporting hybrid Active Directory and cloud directory environments Experience with Public Key Infrastructure operations and certificate lifecycle management Experience leading enhancement or implementation activities for directory services or IAM platforms ITIL or identity and access management certifications#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI-EH27 - TAX - UK Corporate Tax - Real Estate -L45 - Senior Tax services - Hyderabad/Bangalore
description: Tax Senior - UK Corporate TaxDo you have a passion to work for U.K.-based clients of Deloitte Tax to provide tax compliance services? Are you ready to take the next step in your career by focusing on providing business and individual tax return compliance? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn and support practice U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. In recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, etc. have obtained support in their tax related practice through the Deloitte Tax in India.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help clients excel globally.To list some of key responsibilities: -• Accurate preparation of low complexity UK Corporation Tax returns and computations across a range of industries using the standard procedures.• Identification and documentation of issues and preparation of client queries ✓ Working as part of a wider team to complete required volumes of work• Other UK Corporation Tax compliance-related processing activities as requiredThe TeamThe Deloitte UK team based in Hyderabad specializes in three core areas: UK corporation tax return preparation, electronic tagging and review of UK statutory financial statements, and governance and other support work for global tax outsourcing projects. On taking up a position with the UK team you will have the opportunity to focus on at least two of these core specialisms.Qualifications Required:• Full time master's in business administration (MBA) in Finance or equivalent from reputed University• At least 5-8 years of experience in experience in UK Corporate Tax returns• Excellent written and verbal communication skills• Strong accounting knowledge• Knowledge of Microsoft Office products — In particular, Excel and WordWork Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST | 2 PM to 11 PM IST

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate- SOAR + Anthropic - Manager
description: Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform their security posture. As a Manager at Deloitte Consulting, you will lead the design and delivery of enterprise-scale SOAR programs across a portfolio of client engagements. You will own technical strategy, manage multi-disciplinary teams, drive practice growth through pursuit support and offering development, and serve as a trusted advisor to senior client stakeholders. Your role spans engagement leadership, people development, intellectual property creation, and shaping how Deloitte brings AI-augmented security automation to market. Work you'll do As a Manager on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Leading end-to-end delivery of security orchestration, automation, and response (SOAR) engagements across client environments, including scope, timelines, quality, and risk management Defining SOAR architecture, operating models, and implementation roadmaps, including platform selection, integrations, playbook design, and operationalization Designing and implementing artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled security automation use cases, including large language model (LLM)-supported triage, incident summarization, and human-in-the-loop workflows Managing teams of consultants and analysts, including work planning, delivery oversight, coaching, and performance development Supporting practice growth through proposals, solution design, effort estimation, reusable assets, and intellectual property development The team Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes managing the identity lifecycle, security operations, threat intelligence, application security, business transformation, and ensuring continuous compliance. Services include Cyber-as-a-Service, Managed Application Security, and Managed Extended Detect & Respond (MXDR). Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Gurugram/Kolkata Shift Timings: 2:00 PM to 11:00 PM IST Qualifications Required: 8+ years of experience in cybersecurity 5+ years of experience in SOAR engineering, security automation, or security operations Experience leading enterprise SOAR programs, including architecture, integrations, playbook development, and operationalization Experience with one or more SOAR platforms, such as Cortex XSOAR, Splunk SOAR, Tines, Swimlane, Torq, or IBM Resilient Experience with security operations center operating models, security information and event management (SIEM), endpoint detection and response (EDR), incident response processes, and threat intelligence integrations Experience managing teams across client engagements, including resource planning, delivery oversight, and performance management Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cyber Security, Information Security, Engineering, Information Technology, or another technical field Preferred: Experience leading AI-enabled SOAR programs, including LLM-based playbook generation, agentic workflows, machine learning-based alert triage, and human-in-the-loop decisioning Experience with foundation model platforms, such as Anthropic Claude or OpenAI, for security automation use cases Experience defining governance and control frameworks for AI in security operations, including output validation, audit logging, and bounded-autonomy policies Experience leading security automation across Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Industry certifications such as Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM), or Global Information Assurance Certification (GIAC) Experience with regulatory and control frameworks such as National Institute of Standards and Technology Cybersecurity Framework (NIST CSF), NIS2, DORA, HIPAA, or PCI DSS#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI-EH27-MF Canada-L25 HIMS Cloud Admin-Analyst-Hyderabad
description: The Hybrid Infrastructure Management Services function is accountable for system administration, Cloud Infrastructure administration, server builds, virtualized application support, user support, application support, patching, troubleshooting, break fix, FCR etc. This function is responsible for working with Internal clients across the firm and works closely with other ITS teams.Work you'll doAs a HIMS Cloud Admin on the Hybrid Infrastructure Management Services team, you will be responsible for...Supporting day-to-day cloud and infrastructure operations, including ticket resolution, troubleshooting, monitoring, report analysis, and client support callsAdministering and patching Windows and Linux servers across in-house datacenters, AWS, and Azure environmentsProvisioning and supporting Windows and Linux environments in AWS, Azure, and VMware for development, sandbox, demo, and production use casesCoordinating with infrastructure, delivery, and partner teams to support service standards, operational stability, and project workstream deliverablesContributing to process improvement, technical documentation, and continual service improvement initiatives across a geographically distributed teamThe teamAt Deloitte, we’re all about collaboration. And nowhere is this more apparent than among our 2,000-strong internal services team. With our combined specialist skills, we provide all the essential support and advice our client-facing colleagues need, right across the firm. This enables them to focus all their efforts on delivering the best service possible to their clients. Covering seven distinct areas; Human Resources, Clients & Industries, Finance & Legal, Practice Support Services, Quality & Risk Services, IT Services, and Workplace Services & Real Estate, together we live, breathe and deliver the Deloitte experience.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: Rotational Shift (24x7x365) – 9PM-6AM, 5.30AM-2.30PM, 2PM-11PMQualificationsRequired:Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology1-2.6 years of experience in cloud administration, system administration, or infrastructure support within an enterprise environmentExperience administering Amazon Web Services and Microsoft Azure environments, including Identity and Access ManagementExperience using Terraform for infrastructure as codeExperience patching Linux and Windows servers across in-house datacenters and cloud platformsExperience provisioning and supporting Windows and Linux environments in Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, or VMwareExperience with Active Directory, Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol, Domain Name System, clustering, and certificate managementPreferred:ITIL V3 Foundation certificationAmazon Web Services Cloud Practitioner certificationMicrosoft Azure Administrator certificationExperience with load balancing technologies such as F5 or Network Load BalancingExperience supporting Microsoft SQL ServerExperience working in a 24x7 operational support environment

title: USI - EH27- L35 - TCII-. NET+ ML & AI/Gen AI - Tax Transformation Office - Hyderabad
description: Know your role in Deloitte About Deloitte “Deloitte” is the brand under which tens of thousands of dedicated professionals in independent firms throughout the world collaborate to provide audit, consulting, financial advisory, risk management, and tax services to selected clients. These firms are members of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited (DTTL), a UK private company limited by guarantee. Each member firm provides services in a particular geographic area and is subject to the laws and professional regulations of the particular country or countries in which it operates. DTTL and each DTTL member firm are separate and distinct legal entities. Each DTTL member firm is structured differently in accordance with national laws, regulations, customary practice, and other factors and may secure the provision of professional services in their territories through subsidiaries, affiliates, and/or other entities. In the United States, Deloitte LLP is the member firm of DTTL. Services are primarily provided by the subsidiaries of Deloitte LLP, including: ·   Deloitte & Touche LLP ·   Deloitte Consulting LLP ·   Deloitte Financial Advisory Services LLP ·   Deloitte Tax LLP In India, Deloitte LLP has the following indirect subsidiaries: Deloitte & Touche Assurance & Enterprise Risk Services India Private Limited, Deloitte Consulting India Private Limited, Deloitte Financial Advisory Services India Private Limited, Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited, and Deloitte Support Services India Private Limited. These entities primarily render services to their respective U.S.-based parents. U.S. India Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax Services India”) commenced operations in January 2002. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and region have developed their affiliations in India. Deloitte Tax offers you immense opportunities to learn and practice U.S. Taxation, a much sought after career option. Our Vision: To be the dominant global provider of tax services delivering unmatched value to our clients and our people through sustained relationships. U.S. India Tax — TTO Deloitte Tax LLP’s Tax Transformation (TTO) team is responsible for the design, development and deployment of tax tools for the US Tax Practice.  The professionals on the TTO team are focused on assisting Deloitte Tax in its efforts to deliver quality, comprehensive, value-added, and efficient client services using tax tools to our clients.  The team consults and executes on a wide range of initiatives involving tax technology management, tool development and implementation.  Job description Function Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited Service line TAX TTO Job level Consultant and Senior .NET Full stack Developer + ML & AI/Gen AI Specific skill set required ML & AI, Python, Gen AI, C#, .NET & .NET Core, ASP.Net Core, SQL Server, OOPS Concepts, ASP.NET Web API, Entity Framework 6 or above, Azure Graduation BE/B.Tech., M.C.A., M.Sc. Comp Sc., M.Tech. Professional qualification Work experience 3 - 5 years The key job responsibilities include the following: ·   Participate in requirements analysis. ·   Collaborate with US and Vendors’ teams to produce software design and architecture. ·   Write clean, scalable code using .NET and Python programming languages. ·   Test and deploy applications and systems. ·   Revise, update, refactor and debug code. ·   Develop, support and maintain applications and technology solutions. ·   Ensure that all development efforts meet or exceed client expectations. Applications should meet requirements of scope, functionality, and time and adhere to all defined and agreed upon standards. ·   Become familiar with all development tools, testing tools, methodologies and processes. ·   Become familiar with the project management methodology and processes. ·   Encourage collaborative efforts and camaraderie with on-shore and off-shore team members. ·   Demonstrate a strong working understanding of the industry best standards in software development and version controlling. ·   Ensure the quality and low bug rates of code released into production. ·   Work on agile projects, participate in daily SCRUM calls and provide task updates. ·   During design and key development phases, might need to work a staggered shift from 11am-8pm to ensure appropriate overlap of the India and US teams and project deliveries. Key skills required: ·   2+ years of Strong hands-on experience on Machine Learning (Data engineering, ML algorithms), Gen AI, Python, C#, SQL Server, OOPS Concepts. ·   At least one-year hands-on experience on .NET Core, ASP.NET Core Web API, SQL, Micro Services Architecture ·   Excellent Communication skills both oral & written. ·   Excellent troubleshooting and communication skills, ability to communicate clearly with US counterparts. Additional Information/Nice to Have: ·   Knowledge on Angular and Azure Devops Build/Release configuration. ·   Self-starter with solid analytical and problem-solving skills. ·   Willingness to work extra hours to meet deliverables. ·   Willingness to learn new skills / technologies#CA-HPN #CA-TG #TechnologyFY26

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate-Digital Identity - MS Azure Active Directory - Senior Consultant
description: Senior ConsultantAs a Senior Consultant for Active Directory at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for delivering high-quality work products within defined timelines while supporting the stability, security, and efficiency of Active Directory and Entra ID operations. Depending on level, the role may include mentoring junior team members, coordinating onsite/offshore delivery, leading operational workstreams, and supporting focused implementation or enhancement efforts.This role supports both technical and business stakeholders and is responsible for operational excellence across directory services, IAM processes, automation, service management, incident resolution, and platform optimization.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Architecting, implementing, and supporting Active Directory, Entra ID, and LDAP directory solutions across hybrid environments Leading day-to-day directory services and identity operations, including incident management, problem management, change management, root cause analysis, and compliance reporting Troubleshooting complex issues across authentication, authorization, Domain Name System (DNS), replication, Group Policy Objects (GPOs), service accounts, certificates, and Active Directory object configurations Developing PowerShell automation, operational reporting, and technical documentation to improve platform stability, service delivery, and operational efficiency Collaborating with client, infrastructure, security, and application teams on enhancements, upgrades, migrations, and ongoing managed services support The teamDeloitte's Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes: Managing Identity Lifecycle Security Operations Threat Intelligence Application Security Business Transformation Continuous Compliance Cyber Operate team focuses on efficiently running operations by enabling automation, reducing manual effort and adhering to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) based on the standards set by clients.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiShift Timings: 24x7 rotational shifts, including night, weekend, holiday, and on-call coverage based on project assignmentsQualificationsRequired: 6-9 years of experience in identity and access management, directory services, or managed services operations 5+ years of experience supporting Active Directory and Entra ID in an operations or managed services environment Experience providing level 3 support for Active Directory and identity platforms, including incident management, problem management, change management, and root cause analysis Experience leading support teams, mentoring junior professionals, or coordinating service delivery activities Experience developing PowerShell scripts for automation, reporting, or operational monitoring Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, service request, problem, and change management Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university Preferred: Experience with Microsoft Identity Manager, Radiant Logic, Semperis, ManageEngine, Quest, or Active Directory migration tools Experience supporting hybrid Active Directory and cloud directory environments Experience with Public Key Infrastructure operations and certificate lifecycle management Experience leading enhancement or implementation activities for directory services or identity and access management platforms ITIL or identity and access management certifications#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI - EH27 - Talent Experience - Specialist Analytics and Insights - Hyderabad
description: The Specialist, Analytics and Insights supports Talent leaders through reporting, dashboarding, and analytical insights that inform workforce decisions across the talent lifecycle. This role helps translate business needs into clear visualizations, reporting solutions, and actionable insights across People Analytics products and services. The role requires experience working with data, building dashboards, and preparing executive-ready materials in a dynamic, stakeholder-focused environment. Work you'll do As a Specialist, Analytics and Insights on the Talent Experience & Engagement People Analytics team, you will be responsible for: Support Talent leadership with strategic reporting, dashboarding, and insights to inform data-driven decision-making Create dashboards, visualizations, and presentation materials using tools such as Tableau, PowerPoint, and Excel Support strategic analyses and data requests from senior leaders across Talent priorities Collaborate with stakeholders across the talent lifecycle to design, build, test, and deliver data and visualization solutions Develop knowledge of Talent data, reporting, and analytics offerings to identify opportunities and advise stakeholders using data-backed insights The team The Talent Experience & Engagement People Analytics Team collaborates across Talent and the business to uncover data-driven insights to solve business challenges across the talent lifecycle and enable transformational change inside of Deloitte. Our teams (e.g., data science, surveys, candidate assessments, evaluation, strategic reporting, talent dashboards and storytelling) provide a holistic and client-centric approach that complements our wide range of analytical tools and methods to identify valuable workforce insights which, in turn, fuels the business. This role engages directly with Talent leadership/teams to deliver on requests across products and services People Analytics offers. We’re looking for a versatile professional to be a key player in our journey to deliver holistic data driven insights to our Talent leaders and teams. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Management, Statistics, or Data Analytics 3-5 years of experience in reporting, analytics, and data visualization Experience using data transformation or data modeling tools such as Tableau Prep or SQL Experience creating dashboards, visualizations, and presentation materials using Tableau, Microsoft Excel, and Microsoft PowerPoint Experience analyzing operational data to identify trends and insights Experience creating professional documentation using Microsoft Word and collaborating with stakeholders using Microsoft Teams Experience translating stakeholder needs into reporting or visualization solutions Preferred: Postgraduate degree in Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Management, Statistics, or Data Analytics Experience working with human resources or talent data Experience publishing and delivering content using Tableau Desktop or Tableau Server Experience using Databricks SQL or notebooks to build or maintain data pipelines and curated datasets for analytics and reporting

title: USI-EH27-Firm Tax-L40-Transfer Pricing
description: Assistant Manager, Direct Tax – Firm Tax (Transfer Pricing)We are looking for professionals with sound working knowledge in Indian transfer pricing regulations and international tax law matters.Work you’ll do  The primary area of focus for this position is ensuring transfer pricing compliances (amongst other corporate tax compliances as well), compiling information and drafting submissions for defending tax litigation for the group of entities, visiting income-tax department to represent before the transfer pricing officer in relation to any transfer pricing litigation matters, working on APA and other advisory related work. Responsibilities include compilation /preparation of transfer pricing report, transfer pricing documentation and any other transfer pricing compliance forms, drafting submissions, advisory memos and any other related transfer pricing and income-tax work.Compilation /preparation of transfer pricing report in Form 3CEBCo-management of preparation of TP Documentation including benchmarking study and any other transfer pricing compliancePreparing submissions/appeals/letters in relation to transfer pricing litigation, appearing before the tax authorities, preparation of supporting work papers for transfer pricing related mattersCoordinating with Auditors for Annual Statutory Audit / Tax Audit and other Internal Audit requirements.Compiling periodic MIS reports pertaining to various Tax compliance metrics for appropriate analysis.Supervising and controlling tax compliance activities, coordinating for the payment of taxes with finance team members, acting as a liaison person between Finance and Firms Tax team.Be available as a contact person for external stakeholders and for liaising Revenue authorities, external Counsels, Tax advisors, etc.Assist with training and knowledge sharing within the Firm Tax Team.Create and/or update process documentation as processes change.Perform other job-related duties as assigned. The team  The USI Firms Tax team is responsible for ensuring entity level tax compliances for all the US India companies, besides catering to the tax essentials and advise to USI companies’ business and enabling functions ecosystems. The team consists of tax professionals with adequate expertise in handling tax matters. This team works in close coordination with the USI finance, legal and enabling besides business teams to ensure optimum tax health of the USI companies named above. QualificationsRequired:M.Com/MBA with 6- 8 years of experienceCA with 2 to 4 years’ experience with a large MNC or Big 4/consulting firm (preference would be a Big 4 or consulting firm)Detailed understanding of transfer pricing provisions and regulationsKnowledge and working experience of transfer pricing compliances such as preparation of TP documentation, Form 3CEB and other compliance formsKnowledge and working experience about transfer pricing litigation matters such as preparation of submission, research on technical issues, representation before the transfer pricing authorities, etc.Ability to work independently and work together with a team in an energetic and dynamic work environmentProficiency in MS Office (including advanced Excel, Word and PowerPoint skills).A self-motivator, a team player cum individual contributor with knowledge of an ERP environmentGood Communication, analytical skills, multi-tasking, and ability to work under pressure.Must be detail-oriented with a commitment to accuracy and quality work.Possess strong problem-solving skills with the ability to follow a transaction from beginning to end through various systems and reports.Strong written and verbal communication skills Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 9 AM to 6 PMHow you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, worldclass learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India  Deloitte’s culture Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.  Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI-EH27- G&P-R&I-L35 - Specialist, Strategic Market Insights and Thought Leadership (CFS-Investment Management) - Mumbai
description: Specialist – Investment Management (IM) Research – Center for Financial ServicesThe Center for Financial Services is one of the industry teams within the Research & Insights (MI&I) group, focusing primarily on Banking and Capital Markets, Investment Management, Private Capital, Insurance and Real Estate. The Center's goals are to:Develop forward-looking insights that help financial services leaders anticipate and respond to what’s coming nextStrengthen Deloitte’s market positioning through high-quality thought-wareBring rigor to research by applying industry analysis, data science, survey advisory, editorial, and visualization capabilitiesShape market conversations by working with internal stakeholders and subject-matter leaders to deliver relevant, impactful campaignsLearn more about the Center and have a peek into our work here – (Link)This role involves contributing to thought leadership and research projects across the full lifecycle, from design to delivery, examining critical challenges and opportunities in IM sector. The Center’s IM research agenda covers major industry campaigns such as the annual investment management outlook, AI-enabled transformation, private markets and alternative investment growth, ETF and product innovation, regulatory change, and the future of investment management talent.The candidate will contribute to the Center’s research and thought-leadership agenda in the Investment Management sector, with a focus on investment managers, institutional investors, wealth platforms, and alternative investment firms. Coverage areas may include mutual funds, ETFs, hedge funds, private equity, private credit, real assets, and multi-asset strategies, alongside themes such as AI-enabled investment processes, portfolio construction innovation, private markets growth, retirement and wealth trends, investment data platforms, digital assets, regulation, talent trends, changing operating model, and the evolving resilience of global capital markets.These include whitepapers, in-depth research reports, case studies, articles, data-based research tools, client presentations, and collaterals for specific client accounts. These deliverables would integrate information from a range of primary and secondary sources, including Deloitte subject-matter experts, primary research (surveys), publicly available data, third-party research, analyst reports, presentations, industry commentaries, and news articles.Responsibilities:As a Specialist focused on developing thought leadership, you will be required to –:Work across diverse FSI – IM topics, quickly build subject-matter familiarity, synthesize complex information, and deliver high-quality research insights.Identify novel topics, areas and trends to focus on, based on extensive analysis of competition thought-ware/articles and importance of issues based on market studies, industry reports and tracking.Design research proposals, build consensus, and formulate a research plan.Interact with internal and external subject matter experts on industry topics and synthesize takeaways and findings into concise and well-structured narratives, assisting senior research leads to shape internal/external thought-leadership content and collaterals. Apply established research tools and methodologies to support business decision-making.Work on varied data sets (e.g.survey data, publicly available data sets) to derive data-driven insights.Identify and use the relevant data analysis methods and work with the relevant data science and analytics professionals to analyze voluminous and complex datasets.Demonstrate strong writing skills as required for thought leadership reportsDisplay strong consultative and engaging presentation skills.Support all aspects of engagement/project to ensure outcomes and meet deadlines.Assist senior researchers and practice leaders with internal briefings and external client meetings/webinars – by performing customized data analysis and presenting results and insights into client-ready briefing decks.Develop an understanding of Deloitte’s solutions, services, and offerings.   Requisite experience and skillsExperience 3-6 years of experience in supporting/managing research projects in IM topic areas. Business research and thought-leadership development experience in the Investment Management sector or related financial services industries is preferred. Knowledge of the investment management value chain—including product, portfolio management, distribution, servicing, and investment operations—across asset managers, wealth managers, institutional investors, and alternative investment firms will be an advantage. A broad understanding of the forces shaping the investment management industry—including market evolution, product innovation, investor preferences, regulatory developments, operating model transformation, and competitive dynamics across public and private markets—will be an advantage. Familiarity with the evolving role of intermediaries, platforms, custodians, data, and technology providers within the broader investment ecosystem will be beneficial. Experience working with US/global clients and teams is preferred. Since the job requires working closely with US-based colleagues, the ability to work across cultures is important. Industry/sector/subsector skillsTechnical skills Sound analytical skills with experience in one or more of the following research methods: Primary research (surveys), secondary research, academic research, and case study research. Strong data analysis skills with the ability to work with quantitative and qualitative data – interpret, analyze, visualize, and provide data-driven insights. Managing relations with internal stakeholders. Using advanced data science and survey advisory capabilities to strengthen the credibility of insights. qualifications: Specialist – Investment Management (IM) Research – Center for Financial ServicesThe Center for Financial Services is one of the industry teams within the Research & Insights (MI&I) group, focusing primarily on Banking and Capital Markets, Investment Management, Private Capital, Insurance and Real Estate. The Center's goals are to:Develop forward-looking insights that help financial services leaders anticipate and respond to what’s coming nextStrengthen Deloitte’s market positioning through high-quality thought-wareBring rigor to research by applying industry analysis, data science, survey advisory, editorial, and visualization capabilitiesShape market conversations by working with internal stakeholders and subject-matter leaders to deliver relevant, impactful campaignsLearn more about the Center and have a peek into our work here – (Link)This role involves contributing to thought leadership and research projects across the full lifecycle, from design to delivery, examining critical challenges and opportunities in IM sector. The Center’s IM research agenda covers major industry campaigns such as the annual investment management outlook, AI-enabled transformation, private markets and alternative investment growth, ETF and product innovation, regulatory change, and the future of investment management talent.The candidate will contribute to the Center’s research and thought-leadership agenda in the Investment Management sector, with a focus on investment managers, institutional investors, wealth platforms, and alternative investment firms. Coverage areas may include mutual funds, ETFs, hedge funds, private equity, private credit, real assets, and multi-asset strategies, alongside themes such as AI-enabled investment processes, portfolio construction innovation, private markets growth, retirement and wealth trends, investment data platforms, digital assets, regulation, talent trends, changing operating model, and the evolving resilience of global capital markets.These include whitepapers, in-depth research reports, case studies, articles, data-based research tools, client presentations, and collaterals for specific client accounts. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-VB.NET-Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationFinance TransformationWe are looking for motivated and talented VB.NET/C# developers to join us. Upon joining, you will be cross-skilled on OneStream through a structured training program. This role is designed for practitioners with a strong VB.NET/C# foundation who are eager to transition into EPM consulting and bring communication and client-facing skills. Prior OneStream experience is not required; technical aptitude, willingness to reskill, and a consulting mindset are key.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for: Supporting the design, configuration, testing, and deployment of OneStream solutions for financial consolidation, planning, and reporting engagements. Translating business and functional requirements into technical solutions using VB.NET, C#, .NET frameworks, and data integration approaches. Assisting with solution build activities including business rules, workflows, data loads, reports, and platform configurations. Collaborating with project teams across geographies to prepare deliverables, resolve defects, and support implementation milestones. Participating in structured OneStream training and certification activities to build delivery capability within the practice. The teamOur Finance Transformation team helps organizations improve finance operations, enterprise performance management, and reporting through a combination of process, technology, and industry knowledge. The team supports clients across transformation initiatives by bringing together functional understanding and technology delivery capabilities. In this role, you will work with practitioners focused on building scalable OneStream solutions for complex business needs.Location: Hyderabad / Bengaluru / PuneQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field 3-4 years of hands-on development experience using VB.NET and/or C# Experience applying object-oriented programming principles in application development Experience working with .NET libraries and frameworks Experience with relational databases such as SQL Server, Oracle, or equivalent Experience with application programming interfaces, data integration patterns, or extract, transform, load pipelines Experience working in client service, consulting, or project delivery environments Preferred: Experience with enterprise performance management, corporate performance management, or financial planning platforms such as OneStream, Anaplan, Hyperion, or TM1 Experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services, or Google Cloud Platform Experience with Python or SQL in support of application development or integration work Experience with financial consolidation, close processes, or management reporting OneStream training or certification Experience using artificial intelligence tools or generative artificial intelligence technologies

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-EP-SCNO-Critical Manufacturing-Consultant
description: Critical Manufacturing – Consultant, Technical TransformationDeloitte is seeking a Consultant, Technical Transformation to support Manufacturing Execution System (MES) transformation initiatives within its Supply Chain & Network Operations practice. In this role, you will help clients design, implement, and optimize Critical Manufacturing MES solutions to improve operational performance across complex manufacturing environments. The ideal candidate brings strong technical and functional experience across MES architecture, integrations, and deployment, along with the ability to translate business needs into scalable digital manufacturing solutions.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Technical Transformation on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for supporting clients through the design, implementation, and optimization of Critical Manufacturing MES solutions across manufacturing operations. Lead and support Critical Manufacturing MES implementations, including requirements gathering, functional design, prototyping, configuration, testing, training, and deployment. Serve as a technical and solution architect for manufacturing transformation initiatives spanning MES, plant systems, and enterprise integrations. Conduct client workshops to validate requirements, define solution design, and document future-state MES processes and data models. Design and develop integrations between Critical Manufacturing MES and enterprise or plant systems, including SAP, product lifecycle management, advanced planning systems, laboratory information management systems, and automation platforms. Collaborate with client stakeholders, plant users, and subject matter specialists to assess current-state environments and define scalable future-state solutions. Support practice growth through proposal development, thought leadership, and innovation in digital manufacturing and Industry 4.0-enabled MES offerings. The teamEnterprise PerformanceThe Enterprise Performance team leverages deep industry knowledge, strong analytical skills, and practical approaches to address clients’ toughest business challenges. Our professionals as part of the Supply Chain Network Operations (SCNO) service line within Enterprise Performance focus on helping organizations achieve sustainable competitive advantage throughout their operations, spanning product development, planning, sourcing, manufacturing, logistics, and distribution. We excel at translating strategic objectives into tangible, measurable outcomes at the operational level. By aligning high-level goals with frontline execution, we ensure our clients realize real value and improved performance across every stage of their supply chain and operations.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM IST, as per business requirementsQualificationsRequired: 3-6 years of experience with the Critical Manufacturing MES platform, including configuration, customization, and deployment in discrete manufacturing environments Experience using Critical Manufacturing MES DEE for custom development and Critical Manufacturing MES Connect for integrations Experience designing or supporting MES integrations using Hypertext Transfer Protocol application programming interfaces, web services, SECS/GEM, or OPC-UA Experience with C# .NET, JavaScript or TypeScript, SQL Server, and SQL stored procedures Knowledge of ISA-95 or ISA-88 standards and regulated manufacturing requirements, including GxP, GAMP, or 21 CFR Part 11 Experience working with MES functional areas such as quality management, work-in-process tracking, dispatch management, scheduling, genealogy or traceability, or maintenance management Ability to travel 20-40%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve. Preferred: Experience with cloud or Internet of Things-enabled MES reporting and intelligence solutions, including Azure or Amazon Web Services Experience with Mendix or other low-code platforms used in manufacturing environments Experience integrating MES with enterprise resource planning, product lifecycle management, laboratory information management systems, or advanced planning systems Experience in semiconductor, electronics, or discrete manufacturing environments Bachelor of Technology or Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical Engineering, or another engineering discipline Master of Computer Applications, Master of Technology, or Master of Science

title: USI-EH27- F&A-A&C-L45-Specialist Deputy Manager, Controllership - Hyderabad
description: Specialist Deputy Manager, Finance & Accounting, Controllership Deloitte’s Controllership function, within its Finance & Administration organization, provides stewardship over the US firms’ assets by monitoring business transactions and enforcing accounting policy that results in accurate and reliable financial statements. Controllership is a dynamic, highly collaborative group focused on overseeing and supporting the financial health of the U.S. member firm and each of its functional subsidiaries. Work you'll do As a Specialist Deputy Manager, Controllership on the Controllership team, you will be responsible for: Leading the period-end, quarter-end, and year-end close and consolidation process, and preparing journal entries, account reconciliations, and financial reports with accuracy, timeliness, and compliance. Coordinating the flow of financial information into the general ledger and communicating the status of close activities, key risks, issues, and recommended actions to management in a timely manner. Executing key controls and accounting processes, identifying and escalating system issues, and supporting compliance with new and existing accounting standards and firm policies. Developing dashboards and reporting outputs using tools such as Power BI and Tableau to translate accounting data into actionable business insights and support decision-making. Driving process improvement and transformation initiatives, and evaluating system functionality and technology enhancement opportunities to better support accounting processes, controls, and transformation efforts. Partnering cross-functionally with GFS, Financial Reporting, Controllership, Finance Transformation, and other stakeholders to support ad hoc projects and strategic initiatives, while exercising professional skepticism, judgment, and adherence to the code of ethics. The team Deloitte’s Controllership function, within its Finance & Administration organization, provides stewardship over the US firms’ assets by monitoring business transactions and enforcing accounting policy that results in accurate and reliable financial statements. Controllership is a dynamic, highly collaborative group focused on overseeing and supporting the financial health of the U.S. member firm and each of its functional subsidiaries. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or related subject 8-10 years of Finance or Accounting experience Familiarity with SAP, Analysis for Office (AO), Blackline, and other financial systems Strong communication skills, both written and verbal Ability to work independently and collaboratively across virtual teams and geographic boundaries Preferred: Big 4 experience, with a strong understanding of complex accounting and finance environments CPA and/or MBA Strong analytical skills Experience with technical accounting Financial close experience, including supporting close activities, reconciliations, and issue resolution, with the ability to work effectively across day-to-day accounting processes Data visualization and reporting skills, including experience building dashboards Strong Excel and database skills, including VLOOKUPs, pivot tables, and macros, along with proficiency in Microsoft Office applications
qualifications: Specialist Deputy Manager, Finance & Accounting, Controllership Deloitte’s Controllership function, within its Finance & Administration organization, provides stewardship over the US firms’ assets by monitoring business transactions and enforcing accounting policy that results in accurate and reliable financial statements. Controllership is a dynamic, highly collaborative group focused on overseeing and supporting the financial health of the U.S. member firm and each of its functional subsidiaries. Work you'll do As a Specialist Deputy Manager, Controllership on the Controllership team, you will be responsible for: Leading the period-end, quarter-end, and year-end close and consolidation process, and preparing journal entries, account reconciliations, and financial reports with accuracy, timeliness, and compliance. Coordinating the flow of financial information into the general ledger and communicating the status of close activities, key risks, issues, and recommended actions to management in a timely manner. Executing key controls and accounting processes, identifying and escalating system issues, and supporting compliance with new and existing accounting standards and firm policies. Developing dashboards and reporting outputs using tools such as Power BI and Tableau to translate accounting data into actionable business insights and support decision-making. Driving process improvement and transformation initiatives, and evaluating system functionality and technology enhancement opportunities to better support accounting processes, controls, and transformation efforts. Partnering cross-functionally with GFS, Financial Reporting, Controllership, Finance Transformation, and other stakeholders to support ad hoc projects and strategic initiatives, while exercising professional skepticism, judgment, and adherence to the code of ethics. title: USI-EH-FY27- L45 - NSE TAX ERP- Product Innovation SAP MM - Senior, Tax Technology Services
description: Product Innovation SAP MM - Senior, Tax Technology ServicesDo you have a passion to work for large multinational clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is "Yes," come join Tax Technology Consulting group in Deloitte India. Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. Work you’ll do Increasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally. Key responsibilities - ·       Senior SAP SD-MM Certified consultant with over 4 + years of SAP SD/MM Functional Experience +Indirect Tax/India GST emphasizes in configuration, implementation, and support of S4/HANA SD Module experience. ·       Min 3 Full Lifecycle Implementation experience with successful teamwork. ·       Experience in Global Template Preparation and Rollouts. ·       Hands on experience on customer master, delivery processing, Shipping & Transportation. Configuration of the Billing Procedures - Individual Billing, Collective Billing, Invoice Split Processing and Inter-company billing and credit management. ·       Configured Pricing, Pricing procedure, Condition types, Condition tables, and Access sequences, Condition Records, Condition Exclusions and Condition Supplements. Thorough understanding of various pricing techniques. ·       Hands on experience on Collecting requirements, Business Analysis, Gap Analysis, Configuration, customizing interface objects, Testing, User training, Conducting workshops, Performance, Pre, and Post Implementation Support. ·       Strong understanding of the SD module's integration with MM / PP and FI/CO modules. Qualification and Experience Required - ·       Experience of SAP Functional specification document for tax enhancements, and configuration document. ·       Experience of SAP O2C & P2P scenarios testing and setting up required MDs. ·       Experience of creating and preparing demos and ad-hoc slides for a range of audiences at clients. ·       Strong analytical and communication skills. Preferred - ·       Managing Major and Minor changes and enhancements efficiently as per the business requirement. ·       Good experience in the configuration, defect management, testing, documentation, and end-user support phase of the project cycle. ·       Proficient with enhancements and modifications of the existing functions. ·       Experience with or having had exposure to (Indirect) Tax Reporting in SAP is a plus.

title: USI - EH27 - Infrastructure - Fullstack Python AI Engineer - Infrastructure Specialist Engineer II
description: Infrastructure Specialist Engineer II - Full stack Developer Python AI Engineer     Work you will do.We’re looking for talented engineers with background automation experience in developing end-to-end automation solutions onto cloud infrastructure using scripting and various orchestration tools. Involves developing, implementing, and maintaining AI-driven solutions to automate and optimize various aspects of IT operations, including monitoring, incident management, and performance analysis. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in both IT operations and AI/ML technologies, with a focus on improving efficiency, reducing downtime, and enhancing the overall performance of IT systems.For this role, we are looking for a candidate that demonstrates strong proficiency in scripting and the candidate should be skilled in working with clients to identify if tasks can be automated and implementing automation solution for the same. You will be working mainly on providing end to end automation solutions including creation of frontend UI for the Tasks which falls with the scope of cloud infrastructure including but not limited to provisioning. Decommissioning, maintenance of resources using Scripting, orchestration tools. You would be extensively working on integration of other tools using APIs as part of developing automation in the respective areas. Being an Automation expert you should have skills to provide solution for ticketing automation. Also experience working on CAM team that focused on application-level monitoring, code level debugging, self-healing via automation and root cause analysis. Your daily tasks will include the following:    Role Specific Responsibilities·       Programming Languages: Extensive experience in PowerShell, Python,Java and Bash other relevant programming languages. ·       Machine Learning Frameworks: Proficiency with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Scikit-learn, or similar frameworks. ·       Front-End Technologies: Extensive experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and front-end frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js. ·       Back-End Technologies: Extensive experience in server-side languages such as Node.js, Python, Java, or similar.·       API Development: Experience in designing and implementing RESTful APIs.  ·       Data Management: Strong understanding of databases (SQL, NoSQL), data pipelines, and ETL processes. ·       Cloud Platforms: Manages the evaluation of Cloud Automation IaC tools (Ansible, Terraform, PowerShell DSC) and recommend those that best meet the organization's requirements and Responsible for managing the configuration of all IaaS assets across the platforms (Azure, AWS & GCP)·       Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to work with complex datasets and derive insights.·       Proficiency in AI/ML model development, training, and deployment.·       Proven experience in designing and implementing AIOps solutions in large-scale environments; strong expertise as an Automation Engineer with a focus on AIOps, Generative AI, and Conversational AI.·       Familiarity with observability tools (e.g., Dynatrace, Datadog New Relic) and ITSM tools (e.g., ServiceNowTotal Experience: Min 7+ years (L4)Location: Hyderabad.Timings: 2 to 11 PMWorking Model: Hybrid – 3 days’ work from Office as of now (will have to resume back completely based on firm’s guidance)QualificationsRequired: 7+ years of experience in the IT field.·       Minimum of 5+ years direct, hands-on experience with any of the scripting/programming languages (Python, Java, Bash, etc.).·       Minimum 5+ Years of experience in developing automation solutions like ticket automations using orchestration tools like (e.g., Ansible, Puppet, Terraform, Chef etc) and Experience working with DevOps including but not limited to container technologies like Docker & Kubernetes·       Minimum 3 years of experience developing webpages using pHp, or similar Back-End Technologies·       Minimum 5+ years’ experience in APIs, web services, and integration technologies (e.g., FastAPI, REST, GraphQL, Kafka) through scripting.·       4+ years direct, hands-on experience with automated cloud provisioning and management on any of the Cloud Platforms – Azure, AWS, GCP (Must Have)·       Strong knowledge of AI/ML techniques applied to IT operations.·       Strong background in machine learning and deep learning algorithms. - Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, scikit-learn, for developing AI models·       AI/ML Solution Development: Design, develop, and implement AI/ML models and algorithms to automate IT operations tasks such as anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, and incident response.·       Proven experience in designing and implementing AIOps solutions in large-scale environments; strong expertise as an Automation Engineer with a focus on AIOps, Generative AI, and Conversational AI.·       Familiarity with observability tools (e.g., Dynatrace, New Relic) and ITSM tools (e.g., ServiceNow)·       Exceptional communication skills and the ability to communicate appropriately with business and technical teams.·       Good understanding of the principles and best practices of Software Cloud Automation and Monitoring in Agile, Scrum.·       Good Knowledge in Administration of Production, Development and Test environments carrying different operating system platforms like Windows, Ubuntu, Red Hat Linux, SUSE Linux, Centos.Experience with data analysis and visualization tools such as Python, R, SQL, Tableau, etc.How you will growAt Deloitte, we have invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources, including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. Deloitte University (DU): The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, is an extension of the DU in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center inIndia.BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Disclaimer: Please note that this description is subject to change basis business/engagement requirementsand at the discretion of the management.

strong expertise as an Automation Engineer with a focus on AIOps, Generative AI, and Conversational AI.·       Familiarity with observability tools (e.g., Dynatrace, Datadog New Relic) and ITSM tools (e.g., ServiceNowTotal Experience: Min 7+ years (L4)Location: Hyderabad.Timings: 2 to 11 PMWorking Model: Hybrid – 3 days’ work from Office as of now (will have to resume back completely based on firm’s guidance)QualificationsRequired: 7+ years of experience in the IT field.·       Minimum of 5+ years direct, hands-on experience with any of the scripting/programming languages (Python, Java, Bash, etc.).·       Minimum 5+ Years of experience in developing automation solutions like ticket automations using orchestration tools like (e.g., Ansible, Puppet, Terraform, Chef etc) and Experience working with DevOps including but not limited to container technologies like Docker & Kubernetes·       Minimum 3 years of experience developing webpages using pHp, or similar Back-End Technologies·       Minimum 5+ years’ experience in APIs, web services, and integration technologies (e.g., FastAPI, REST, GraphQL, Kafka) through scripting.·       4+ years direct, hands-on experience with automated cloud provisioning and management on any of the Cloud Platforms – Azure, AWS, GCP (Must Have)·       Strong knowledge of AI/ML techniques applied to IT operations.·       Strong background in machine learning and deep learning algorithms. - Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, scikit-learn, for developing AI models·       AI/ML Solution Development: Design, develop, and implement AI/ML models and algorithms to automate IT operations tasks such as anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, and incident response.·       Proven experience in designing and implementing AIOps solutions in large-scale environments; strong expertise as an Automation Engineer with a focus on AIOps, Generative AI, and Conversational AI.·       Familiarity with observability tools (e.g., Dynatrace, New Relic) and ITSM tools (e.g., ServiceNow)·       Exceptional communication skills and the ability to communicate appropriately with business and technical teams.·       Good understanding of the principles and best practices of Software Cloud Automation and Monitoring in Agile, Scrum.·       Good Knowledge in Administration of Production, Development and Test environments carrying different operating system platforms like Windows, Ubuntu, Red Hat Linux, SUSE Linux, Centos.Experience with data analysis and visualization tools such as Python, R, SQL, Tableau, etc.How you will growAt Deloitte, we have invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources, including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. Deloitte University (DU): The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, is an extension of the DU in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware.
