title: USI - EH27 - Talent Experience - Project - Services Associate - Data Preparation and Reporting
description: We’re looking for a Data Visualization Analyst to be responsible for developing quality Tableau dashboards from end-to-end, from data preparation and transformation through dashboard development, testing, and ongoing maintenance, ensuring final products are accurate, performant, and polished, as well as maintaining and enhancing existing Tableau dashboards. Work you'll do As a Project - Services Associate, Data Preparation and Reporting on the Client & Reporting Solutions team, you will be responsible for… Build and maintain Tableau solutions from approved wireframes and requirements, delivering accurate and performant dashboards on schedule Prepare, clean, transform, format, and validate data for Tableau dashboard development and refreshes Develop Tableau dashboards and Tableau Prep flows to automate reporting and analytics processes with reduced manual intervention Partner with internal stakeholders to gather requirements, assess feasibility, propose visualization designs, and perform testing and defect resolution Manage multiple dashboard builds and enhancement requests while supporting ongoing maintenance of existing reporting solutions The team Client & Reporting Solutions collaborates across Talent and the business to uncover data-driven insights to solve business challenges across the talent lifecycle and enable transformational change. Our teams provide a holistic and client-centric approach that complements our wide range of analytical tools and methods to identify valuable workforce insights which, in turn, fuels the business. The Data Visualization Team within the Client & Reporting Solutions team uses Talent data to address key business questions and employs best practices in data visualization to provide actionable insights in support of Talent priorities. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree or postgraduate degree in Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Management, Statistics, or Data Analytics 2-3 years of experience in Tableau dashboard development using large data sets Experience using Tableau Desktop, Tableau Cloud, and Tableau Prep to develop new dashboards or enhance existing dashboards Experience connecting Tableau solutions to data warehouses or server-based data sources Experience with Microsoft Office applications, including PowerPoint, Excel, OneNote, Word, and Teams Preferred: Tableau certification Experience managing multiple dashboard projects concurrently Experience gathering requirements from internal stakeholders for dashboard builds and enhancements Experience in dashboard testing, bug resolution, and ongoing maintenance Experience supporting Talent data and reporting

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate-Digital Identity - SailPoint IIQ - Senior Consultant
description: CyberDeloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform finance.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Providing engineering and production support for SailPoint IdentityIQ (IIQ) and Identity Security Cloud (ISC), including incident resolution, root cause analysis, and defect remediation Troubleshooting provisioning, aggregation, certifications, workflows, rules, connectors, and integration issues across Active Directory, Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP), Azure Active Directory, databases, and enterprise applications Performing configuration updates, enhancements, production fixes, patching, upgrade support, and custom development using workflows, scripts, application programming interfaces (APIs), and integrations Supporting identity lifecycle management processes, including Joiner-Mover-Leaver (JML), access requests, role-based access control (RBAC), access certifications, and change execution in line with governance processes Preparing operational documentation, audit evidence, key performance indicator (KPI) dashboards, service reports, ad hoc database queries, and technical guidance for support teams and stakeholders The teamDeloitte's Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes: Managing Identity Lifecycle Security Operations Threat Intelligence Application Security Business Transformation Continuous Compliance. Cyber Operate team focuses on efficiently running operations by enabling automation, reducing manual effort and adhering to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) based on the standards set by clientsLocation: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, ChennaiShift Timings: 24*7 rotational shifts; flexibility for night, weekend, and holiday coverage is essential; on-call support required based on project assignmentQualificationsRequired: 6-10 years of experience in SailPoint operations and engineering and Identity and Access Management (IAM) Experience with SailPoint IdentityIQ (IIQ) and/or Identity Security Cloud (ISC) Experience with SailPoint configuration, troubleshooting, upgrades, patching, and production support Experience with rules using BeanShell and/or Java, workflows, custom development, application programming interfaces (APIs), Extensible Markup Language (XML), and Structured Query Language (SQL) Experience with identity lifecycle management, provisioning, role-based access control (RBAC), certifications, governance processes, and incident/change/problem management workflows Experience with connectors and integrations for Active Directory, Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP), Azure Active Directory, databases, and enterprise applications Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university Preferred: SailPoint certifications Experience in large-scale enterprise IAM environments Experience with Privileged Access Management (PAM), single sign-on (SSO), multi-factor authentication (MFA), access management (AM), or customer identity and access management (CIAM) Experience with Representational State Transfer (REST), Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP), System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM), and enterprise platforms such as Workday, Salesforce, or Oracle Experience in team coordination or technical leadership roles#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI FY27 | Cyber - Consultant - FDE
description: Cyber Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Deloitte’s Cyber team helps our clients navigate the ever-changing threat landscape. We simplify complexity, and enable businesses to operate with resilience, grow with confidence, and proactively manage their security posture.The Team:Deloitte’s Cyber Engineering is a new team that is spearheading the buildout of Cybersecurity technology that will underpin the next generation of our Cybersecurity services. Join us as we work with technologies shaping the future of Cybersecurity to build future capabilities today. Position SummaryAs a Cyber Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE), you will work at the intersection of client engagement and hands-on engineering, embedding directly with client engagement teams to design, build, and deliver high-quality cybersecurity and AI-enabled solutions. You will support end-to-end technical delivery while contributing to solution shaping, influencing product direction, and providing appropriate support when needed for clients’ post-deployment. Must-have skillsCore Engineering & Architecture·       5-8+ years of hands-on experience in full stack development across frontend and backend technologies.·       Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Next.js).·       Backend expertise in Node.js, Python (Django/Flask), or Java (Spring Boot). ·       Experience with relational (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Redis).·       Experience building and integrating REST APIs, microservices, and serverless architectures.·       Experience deploying applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP.·       Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and development lifecycle tools (e.g., Git, Azure DevOps).AI / GenAI Capabilities·       1+ years of hands-on experience building and deploying Agentic AI/GenAI/LLM-powered solutions in client or production environments·       1+ years of experience with one of the following Frontier Gen AI Platforms: Anthropic, Google or Open AI, including hands on experience with one of the following key platforms/products; Claude API, Claude for Enterprise, Claude Code, Gemini API, Vertex AI Agent Builder, Grounding, Google Workspace integration, GPT-4o, Assistants API, Responses API, OpenAI Agents SDK·       Understanding of AI system architectures and ability to align application pipelines to support them.Client-Facing & Delivery Ownership·       Ability to independently own defined scope end-to-end with consistent, high-quality output.·       Experience working directly with business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions.·       Strong communication skills with the ability to articulate technical concepts, risks, and trade-offs.·       Strong accountability and ownership mindset in achieving client outcomes.Good-to-Have Skills Familiarity with cybersecurity domains (e.g., application security, cloud security, identity, detection engineering). Familiarity with product engineering environments Experience with DevSecOps practices and secure software development lifecycle. Exposure to search/analytics platforms (Elasticsearch/OpenSearch) or graph databases (Neo4j). Knowledge of Kubernetes, GitOps, or advanced cloud-native patterns. Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP). Basic familiarity with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch). Work you will do:1. Solution Delivery & Engineering Translate business and cybersecurity needs into high-quality technical solutions (including AI/GenAI-enabled capabilities where applicable), and deploy them for clients in alignment with their requirements and architecture Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues within scope 2. Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Shaping Partner with stakeholders to help shape technical solutions during pursuits, including leading demos/POCs/prototypes Contribute to solution design, ensuring alignment between client needs and delivery feasibility. 3. Product Feedback & Continuous Improvement Capture and translate delivery learnings into actionable product or platform improvements, distinguishing reusable enhancements from client-specific needs. Enable client teams through structured knowledge transfer, clear documentation, and practical runbooks. Education Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
qualifications: Cyber Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Deloitte’s Cyber team helps our clients navigate the ever-changing threat landscape. We simplify complexity, and enable businesses to operate with resilience, grow with confidence, and proactively manage their security posture.The Team:Deloitte’s Cyber Engineering is a new team that is spearheading the buildout of Cybersecurity technology that will underpin the next generation of our Cybersecurity services. Join us as we work with technologies shaping the future of Cybersecurity to build future capabilities today. Position SummaryAs a Cyber Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE), you will work at the intersection of client engagement and hands-on engineering, embedding directly with client engagement teams to design, build, and deliver high-quality cybersecurity and AI-enabled solutions. You will support end-to-end technical delivery while contributing to solution shaping, influencing product direction, and providing appropriate support when needed for clients’ post-deployment. Must-have skillsCore Engineering & Architecture·       5-8+ years of hands-on experience in full stack development across frontend and backend technologies.·       Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Next.js).·       Backend expertise in Node.js, Python (Django/Flask), or Java (Spring Boot). ·       Experience with relational (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Redis).·       Experience building and integrating REST APIs, microservices, and serverless architectures.·       Experience deploying applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP.·       Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and development lifecycle tools (e.g., Git, Azure DevOps).AI / GenAI Capabilities·       1+ years of hands-on experience building and deploying Agentic AI/GenAI/LLM-powered solutions in client or production environments·       1+ years of experience with one of the following Frontier Gen AI Platforms: Anthropic, Google or Open AI, including hands on experience with one of the following key platforms/products; Claude API, Claude for Enterprise, Claude Code, Gemini API, Vertex AI Agent Builder, Grounding, Google Workspace integration, GPT-4o, Assistants API, Responses API, OpenAI Agents SDK·       Understanding of AI system architectures and ability to align application pipelines to support them.Client-Facing & Delivery Ownership·       Ability to independently own defined scope end-to-end with consistent, high-quality output.·       Experience working directly with business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions.·       Strong communication skills with the ability to articulate technical concepts, risks, and trade-offs.·       Strong accountability and ownership mindset in achieving client outcomes.Good-to-Have Skills Familiarity with cybersecurity domains (e.g., application security, cloud security, identity, detection engineering). Familiarity with product engineering environments Experience with DevSecOps practices and secure software development lifecycle. Exposure to search/analytics platforms (Elasticsearch/OpenSearch) or graph databases (Neo4j). Knowledge of Kubernetes, GitOps, or advanced cloud-native patterns. Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP). Basic familiarity with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch). Work you will do:1. Solution Delivery & Engineering Translate business and cybersecurity needs into high-quality technical solutions (including AI/GenAI-enabled capabilities where applicable), and deploy them for clients in alignment with their requirements and architecture Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues within scope 2. Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Shaping Partner with stakeholders to help shape technical solutions during pursuits, including leading demos/POCs/prototypes Contribute to solution design, ensuring alignment between client needs and delivery feasibility. 3. Product Feedback & Continuous Improvement Capture and translate delivery learnings into actionable product or platform improvements, distinguishing reusable enhancements from client-specific needs. Enable client teams through structured knowledge transfer, clear documentation, and practical runbooks. Education Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.

title: USI-EH-FY27- L55 - NSE TAX ERP- Oracle Fusion - Manager, Tax Technology
description: Oracle Fusion - Manager, Tax TechnologyDeloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn and support U.S. and other countries (such as the Netherlands, United Kingdom etc.) taxation practice, a popular career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doWe are looking for dynamic professionals that are looking to broaden their careers in Tax and Oracle. As you build your career with us in Oracle within our Tax ERP team, you will be helping our clients to design, develop and implement systems architecture that best meets their business needs, in the rapidly changing tax and legal landscape.You will be working alongside an experienced and growing team, to support our clients in ensuring that they have the right data, business processes and systems set-up for the future. You would be required to coordinate with the UK engagement leaders and clients to implement ERP Tax solutions in Oracle.To be successful in this role, you should be able to align the global Tax and Legal landscape with the business’ activities and proposed wider business processes. You will be the lynchpin between the Tax Function and IT Function, ensuring that we build the best Oracle design for Tax for the client. This will require the ability to explain complex terms to a variety of different stakeholders, and in a way that is relevant to each stakeholder group.Your service line: Tax Technology Consulting – NSE USI Tax ERPWithin Tax Technology Consulting sits our NSE USI Tax ERP team who specialize in implementing tax requirements within finance transformation programmes or system remediation programmes. We are a fast-growing team with a super-growth ambition. We undertake Oracle Cloud implementations in ERP, and these need a combination of Tax knowledge and Oracle solution design capabilities. Tax in Finance Transformations is a key differentiator for our practice globally.As a Tax-focused Oracle Consultant, you will be part of the tax workstream on our engagements. You will have plenty of opportunities to work on large-scale projects as part of complex business transformations. You will work with a wide range of colleagues and clients around the world, exposing you to cutting edge tax technology work in a strategic, commercial, and business context. You will find opportunities to apply an impressive range of broad consulting and functional skills that will enhance your career.Key responsibilitiesYour professional experiencePreferredOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact.Our inclusive cultureAt Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our latest accolades.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world?class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Recruiting tipsFrom developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.#CA-SRV#CA-SI#CA-SN

As you build your career with us in Oracle within our Tax ERP team, you will be helping our clients to design, develop and implement systems architecture that best meets their business needs, in the rapidly changing tax and legal landscape.You will be working alongside an experienced and growing team, to support our clients in ensuring that they have the right data, business processes and systems set-up for the future. title: USI-EH-27- UK TAX- RE - L-55  Manager - TAX Services Hyderabad/Bangalore
description: UK TAX - Manager - Tax Services - Hyderabad/BangaloreDo you have a passion to work for U.K.-based clients of Deloitte Tax to provide tax compliance services? Are you ready to take the next step in your career by focusing on providing business and individual tax return compliance? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn and support practice U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. In recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, etc. have obtained support in their tax related practice through the Deloitte Tax in India.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help clients excel globally.To list some of key responsibilities: -• Accurate preparation of low complexity UK Corporation Tax returns and computations across a range of industries using the standard procedures.• Identification and documentation of issues and preparation of client queries ✓ Working as part of a wider team to complete required volumes of work• Other UK Corporation Tax compliance-related processing activities as requiredThe TeamThe Deloitte UK team based in Hyderabad specializes in three core areas: UK corporation tax return preparation, electronic tagging and review of UK statutory financial statements, and governance and other support work for global tax outsourcing projects. On taking up a position with the UK team you will have the opportunity to focus on at least two of these core specialisms.Qualifications Required:• Full time master's in business administration (MBA) in Finance or equivalent from reputed University• At least 3 - 5 years of experience in experience in real estate UK Corporate Tax returns• Excellent written and verbal communication skills• Strong accounting knowledge• Knowledge of Microsoft Office products — In particular, Excel and WordWork Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST | 2 PM to 11 PM IST #UKTax

title: USI-EH-FY27- L35 - NSE TAX ERP- SAP Business AI (Joule and Basic ABAP) - Tax Technology Services Consultant II
description: SAP Business AI (Joule and Basic ABAP) - Tax Technology Services Consultant II Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll do We are looking for an innovative Technical SAP ABAP on HANA, CDS, OData, RAP Plus Gen AI develop and implement systems architecture that meet business needs, along with ensuring that our clients’ can keep pace with the changing tax and legal landscape. Design, build, and support performance SAP S/4HANA extensions and services using ABAP on HANA, RESTful ABAP Programming Model (RAP), Core Data Services (CDS), and OData to enable modern Fiori/UI and integration scenarios. To be successful in this role, you should be able to align the global Tax and Legal landscape with the business’ activities and proposed wider business processes. You will be the lynchpin between the Tax Function and IT Function, ensuring that we build the best SAP Tax design for the client. This will require the ability to explain complex terms to a variety of different stakeholders, and in a way that is relevant to each stakeholder group. You will also need to continually assess the SAP product suite and development roadmap to integrate any updated specifications and requirements into SAP system architecture. You will also need to integrate with the wider client project team (whether that is delivered by Deloitte Consulting or another Systems Integration partner). This will involve an understanding of how the tax design interacts with other process flows and also the inter-personal skills to build the required relationships.Key responsibilities -ü  Develop and enhance ABAP solutions on SAP S/4HANA using clean, modular, and testable patterns. ü  Build Gen AI applications and AI Agents.ü  Code Python is a plus.ü  Ability to navigate fragmented landscapes through API-calls and MCP- servers is key.ü  Build end-to-end RAP artifacts (behavior definitions/implementations, validations, determinations, actions, draft handling, locking, authorization concepts). ü  Create and optimize CDS views (interface/consumption views, associations, annotations) with strong focus on pushdown and performance. ü  Design, expose, and support OData services (preferably OData V4 via RAP; maintain OData V4 where required). ü  Implement Fiori-enablement via CDS annotations and support UI integration with SAP Fiori elements (as applicable). ü  Integrate with SAP and non-SAP systems using SAP-recommended patterns (e.g., APIs, events, messaging where applicable). ü  Apply performance tuning (SQL optimization, buffering strategy, ST05/SAT/SQLM analysis, CDS performance best practices). ü  Follow SAP extensibility guidelines (in-app/extensibility, key-user vs developer extensibility, released APIs, clean-core approach where applicable). ü  Produce technical designs, code documentation, unit tests, and participate in code reviews. ü  Support testing cycles, defect triage, hyper care, and production support with strong root-cause analysisQualification and Experience Required -ü  Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience). ü  2-5 years of Experience in SAP or SAP4HANA.ü  Hands-on experience in building Gen AI applications, AI Agents.ü  SAP Business AI certification is a plus.ü  SAP certifications (ABAP for S/4HANA, RAP, BTP) are a plus.ü  Strong hands-on experience with ABAP in SAP S/4HANA / ABAP on HANA environments.ü  Proven delivery experience with: ü  RAP (managed/unmanaged as needed, behavior implementation, draft, authorization)ü  CDS (views, annotations, associations, table functions if needed)   ü  OData service exposure and troubleshooting (RAP/OData V4 strongly preferred)ü  Strong understanding of HANA-optimized development: SQL/CDS pushdown, avoiding SELECT-in-loops, efficient joins, pagination, etc.ü  Familiarity with modern ABAP practices (e.g., ABAP OO, clean code, exception handling, unit testing mindset).ü  Experience working in Agile delivery (user stories, estimation, sprint ceremonies).ü  Preferred / Nice to Haveü  SAP BTP exposure (e.g., Integration Suite, API Management, Event Mesh, ABAP environment/Steampunk—if relevant).Preferred - ü BTP, Joule and SAP business AI certification. ü Proven knowledge of Tax touchpoints within SAP.How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal in creating a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. [1] Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India. Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent post graduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director or partner or principal.Deloitte’s culture Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. [2] Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. [3] Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.ReferencesVisible links1. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/inclusion-leadership-development.html2. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html3. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/deloitte-community-involvement.html

No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. [1] Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India. Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent post graduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director or partner or principal.Deloitte’s culture Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. [2] Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. [3] Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.ReferencesVisible links1. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/inclusion-leadership-development.html2. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html3. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/deloitte-community-involvement.html

title: USI - EH27 - Cyber Security- Data Scientist- Assistant Manager
description: Join Deloitte’s Cyber Engineering organization as a Data Scientist, Assistant Manager, Cyber Engineering supporting the US Attack Surface Management team. In this role, you will help transform cyber and operational data into meaningful insights that inform risk-based decisions, improve remediation outcomes, and strengthen visibility across the attack surface. You will work across metrics, reporting, automation, and analytics to support leaders and technical stakeholders with clear, actionable intelligence. This role is well suited for a professional with deep experience in data analytics and cybersecurity reporting who can turn complex data into practical business value.Work you'll doAs a Data Scientist, Assistant Manager, Cyber Engineering on the US Attack Surface Management team, you will be responsible for: Own and develop the metrics, dashboards, and recurring reporting portfolio for the US Attack Surface Management team, including leadership, operational, stakeholder, and service-level reporting. Design and maintain data models, reporting logic, analytical views, scripts, and automation supporting data ingestion, transformation, validation, and recurring analysis. Apply statistical analysis, predictive modeling, anomaly detection, clustering, classification, and other data science techniques to identify trends, anomalies, and risk signals across attack surface management data. Translate complex cyber and operational data into concise narratives, visualizations, and recommendations that help stakeholders prioritize remediation and measure risk reduction outcomes. Partner with cybersecurity, infrastructure, business, and data platform teams to improve data quality, resolve reporting issues, and continuously enhance key performance indicators, key risk indicators, data definitions, data lineage, playbooks, and runbooks. The teamAt Deloitte, we’re all about collaboration. And nowhere is this more apparent than among our 2,000-strong internal services team. With our combined specialist skills, we provide all the essential support and advice our client-facing colleagues need, right across the firm. This enables them to focus all of their efforts on delivering the best service possible to their clients. Covering seven distinct areas; Human Resources, Clients & Industries, Finance & Legal, Practice Support Services, Quality & Risk Services, IT Services, and Workplace Services & Real Estate, together we live, breathe and deliver the Deloitte experience.Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Chennai, PuneShift Timings: 9:00 AM to 11:00 PM ISTQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, Cybersecurity, or another quantitative field 10+ years of experience in data analytics, data science, data engineering, cybersecurity analytics, application development, or information security Experience developing metrics, dashboards, and recurring reporting for cybersecurity, technology, or risk programs Experience using Python and SQL for data analysis, automation, and reporting Experience building dashboards and visualizations in Power BI, Tableau, or similar platforms Experience supporting data pipelines, extract, transform, load or extract, load, transform processes, application programming interfaces, data ingestion, validation, and data quality controls Experience defining and maintaining data definitions, data lineage, metric logic, quality controls, playbooks, and runbooks Preferred: Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, or Cybersecurity Certification in data analytics, data science, cybersecurity, or cloud technology Experience applying predictive modeling, anomaly detection, clustering, or classification techniques Experience with cloud services or cloud data platforms Experience analyzing vulnerability, asset, exposure, ownership, or remediation data Experience supporting executive reporting, audit requests, or urgent cyber response reporting

title: USI-EH27-Consulting- Product Developer (Python & Gen AI) - Zora - Software Engineer II
description: National Consulting Services The National Office, a key Strategic Enabler in our new model, is comprised of professionals with various areas of focus that collectively provide mission critical services to support Deloitte’s overall success. Whether focused on project financial, quality and risk management, methods and tools, sales excellence, talent, leadership support, or other activities these professionals ensure that our Firm operates efficiently, and our people are able to effectively serve clients every day. Join Deloitte’s Innovation and Technology organization and help build AI-enabled products that shape how businesses operate. As a Software Engineer II, you will contribute to the design, development, and scaling of agentic artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions that address complex business challenges. This role offers the opportunity to work across product development, generative artificial intelligence application design, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced, innovation-focused environment.Work you'll doAs a Software Engineer II on the Innovation and Technology team, you will be responsible for: Analyze business use cases and support the design of agentic artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions for client and product needs Build proofs of concept and evaluate solution feasibility through data exploration, experimentation, and prototyping Develop and implement generative artificial intelligence applications using large language models, agent frameworks, and application programming interfaces in Python Contribute to the ideation, incubation, and scaling of AI-enabled products aligned to business goals and user needs Collaborate with data scientists, engineers, and team leaders across geographies while providing technical guidance and supporting knowledge sharing The teamAt Deloitte Innovation and Technology is one of the key drivers for our successful business growth. We are fully committed to deliver best class products and solution strategies. One such product is ZORA AI by Deloitte which is a AgenticAI platform that offers a suite of ready-to-deploy agents that perceive, reason and act, autonomously, executing complex business functions with speed and accuracy to help clients augment their workforce, boost productivity and efficiency, and drive new ways of working.Location: Bengaluru/ Hyderabad/ Pune/ ChennaiShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Engineering, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or another quantitative field 4+ years of experience in machine learning, artificial intelligence, or statistical solution development 3+ years of experience building artificial intelligence or machine learning products for business use cases 3-4 years of programming experience in Python Experience developing generative artificial intelligence applications using large language models such as GPT, Claude, Cohere, Llama, or BERT Experience with agent development frameworks such as LangGraph or LangChain, vector databases, and retrieval-augmented generation Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL and NoSQL databases Preferred: Experience with prompt engineering and prompt optimization Experience with pre-training or fine-tuning models Experience with Model Context Protocol and agent-to-agent patterns Experience with cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, or Microsoft Azure Experience with Docker and Kubernetes

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate-Digital Identity - BeyondTrust - Senior Consultant
description: CyberDeloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform finance.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Performing advanced administration and operational support for BeyondTrust Password Safe. Leading onboarding of applications, servers, and privileged accounts into BeyondTrust Password Safe across supported platforms. Configuring and managing Smart Rules, Discovery, Assets, Directory Queries, Access Policies, Password Policies, session recording, and logging. Troubleshooting IAM and PAM issues, supporting incident, problem, and change activities, and coordinating with internal teams and vendors on defect resolution. Supporting integrations, application programming interface (API)-based enhancements, releases, upgrades, patches, hotfixes, operational reporting, and documentation. The teamDeloitte's Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes: Managing Identity Lifecycle Security Operations Threat Intelligence Application Security Business Transformation Continuous Compliance. Cyber Operate team focuses on efficiently running operations by enabling automation, reducing manual effort and adhering to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) based on the standards set by clientsLocation: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, ChennaiShift Timings: 24*7 rotational shifts; flexibility for night, weekend, and holiday coverage is essential; on-call support required based on project assignmentQualificationsRequired: 5+ years of experience implementing and managing BeyondTrust Password Safe Experience onboarding applications, servers, and privileged accounts across Linux/Unix, Windows, databases, and ESXi into BeyondTrust Password Safe Experience configuring Smart Rules, Discovery, Assets, Directory Queries, Access Policies, Password Policies, session recording, and logging in BeyondTrust Password Safe Experience troubleshooting IAM and PAM issues, including incident, problem, and change management activities Experience applying upgrades, patches, hotfixes, and supporting appliance deployment or migration activities Experience with Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP), Structured Query Language (SQL), Active Directory, Domain Name System (DNS), firewalls, virtual private network (VPN), and public key infrastructure (PKI) Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university Preferred: BeyondTrust Certified Implementation Engineer (BCIE) certification Experience with Privileged Remote Access (PRA), PowerBroker, Endpoint Privilege Management (EPM), or other BeyondTrust products Project Management Professional (PMP) or Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP) certification Experience configuring Jump technology for vendor access to internal systems Experience with audit support and compliance documentation Experience creating standard operating procedures, runbooks, knowledge base articles, and onboarding documentation#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI- EH27- UK DTS- L 35 - Tax -Software Engineer consultant  II- Hyderabad
description: UK DTS-  Tax -Software Engineer consultant  II- Hyderabad Do you have a passion to work for clients based in the U.S. and provide tax compliance services? Are you ready to take the next step in your career by focusing on providing tax services international clients of Deloitte? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact on global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join us! Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited ("Deloitte Tax in India") commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn, support and practice taxation, a much sought-after career option. In recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, etc. have obtained support in their tax practices through the Deloitte Tax in India. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. Work you’ll do Design, develop, debug, test, deploy modern web applications and support custom applications and modules as per business requirements using technologies like ASP.net MVC, Angular, HMTL5 and bootstrap. You will perform data intensive tasks and be skilled to organize the data for reporting requirement. It is a unique opportunity to be a part of growing USI UK DTS team that develops priority applications for the marketplace. You will develop and demonstrate good understanding and working knowledge of business and services. Key Responsibilities: · Design, program & debug enterprise class web applications using following technologies and tools: ¾ ASP.NET MVC ¾ Dot Net Framework and Dot net Core ¾ Restful Web API Services ¾ Angular, JavaScript ¾ Bootstrap ¾ HTML5, CSS3 and Advanced Java Script ¾ SQL Server 2012+ ¾ C# ¾ Visual Studio 2017+ · Designing responsive webpages using HTML5 and Bootstrap · Organize analyze complex data sets in MS SQL, MS Access, and MS Excel A successful candidate should: · Knowledge of security standards and techniques for web applications · Experience in Cloud technologies (Azure/AWS) is a bonus · Ability to team across multiple time zones · Be proactive, strong minded, quick thinker and assertive · Mature professional who is self-motivated and enthusiastic · Excellent communicator and have influencing and negotiation skills · Ability to think analytically and should be a problem solver · Ability to communicate effectively with individuals at all levels of the organization · Ability to work in a complex deadline-oriented environment · Ability to multi-task with little supervision · Flexible and prioritize work and tasks under pressure · Capable of building sustainable relationships with colleagues and key individuals · Creativity and ability to think outside-the-box while defining sound and practical solutions Qualifications & Skills: · Bachelor’s Degree in Information Systems or Computer Science or related discipline · Prefer certifications and specialized degrees in development technologies · 3+ years’ experience in software development with working knowledge in .Net and SQL · Required knowledge of requirements gathering and analysis, produce technical designs, design and conduct unit testing and provide production support for issues · Require experience working with third party authentication · Require experience with source control systems such as GIT/VSTS · Require knowledge of application architecture, database design and/or computing platforms · Require Knowledge of security standards and techniques for web applications · Solid understanding browser specific compatibility issues · Require experience in using analytical tools and instruments E.g., MS Excel, Microsoft Access Required Experience: 2 to 5 years Work location: Hyderabad Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST Our purpose Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. [1] Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact. Our inclusive culture At Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our [2] [3] latest accolades. Professional development At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. [4] Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India. Benefits to help you thrive At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. [5] Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you. Recruiting tips From developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. [6] Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters. #CA-RK1 #CA-SRV ReferencesVisible links1. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/join-deloitte-our-purpose.html2. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/awards-and-recognition.html3. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/awards-and-recognition.html4. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/inclusion-leadership-development.html5. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html6. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/topics/recruitingtips.html

title: USI-EH-FY27-Enabling Areas-GFS-French- Expense Compliance- Services Support Associate II- Analyst
description: Services Support Associate II, Finance Services- HyderabadDo you have strong knowledge on Expense Compliance and Corporate card industry, reconciliations and expense reimbursements? If so, you may be a good fit. At Deloitte, we provide client services and develop new products and services to sustain competitive advantage, while they consolidate and standardize a diverse collection of systems, processes, and functions. Work you’ll doThis role includes accurate and timely auditing of expenses and responding to Expense Compliance queries. Work closely with internal employees, Executive and Administrative Assistants (EAs/AAs) who support the Firm’s Partners, Principals, and Directors (PPDs). Resolve expense compliance, and reimbursement matters by ensuring employees’ compliance/adherence to Firm’s expense and reimbursement policies.Job Responsibilities: Serve as the primary French-language support channel for expense compliance questions (email/phone)Comprehensive knowledge and understanding of Firm’s Expense and Reimbursement Policies Gain greater understanding of the end to end business and work independently Identify instances of non-compliance, spending patterns, unusual data trends, and potential fraud/abuse Research discrepancies identified during audit, determine an appropriate course of action for resolving issues based on results of the audit Provide timely report and metrics to Management as required Communicate effectively with the employees and PPMD’s and highlight findings and bring open issues to closure Follow-up on results of review and analysis; develop draft reports as needed; develop recommendations for improving policy and/or procedure Prioritize important time-based tasks (both primary and team’s tasks) and continuously strive to improve review processes to ensure appropriate level of coverage is completed in an efficient manner Interact with respective Team Leads and Managers to resolve issues of a highly confidential or sensitive nature Own and deliver responsibilities with quality and within required timelines Timely response to customer queries related to expense complianceManage Corporate card delinquency and cancelationsThe team Our team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative and seek on-the-job learning opportunities. Our professionals are committed to excellence and to enhancing the trust of our clients. Quality is our top priority, and by focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on quality and deliver greater value to our clients. Qualifications Canadian French speaking and writing proficiency  Graduate in Commerce 1 to 3 years of experience; experience in audit will be an added advantage / preferred Excellent written and verbal communication skills Strong decision making and analytical ability High on Integrity to able to deal with sensitive and confidential data Experience in Concur, firm financial systems and intermediate Microsoft Office skills would be an advantage Demonstrated flexibility in changing processes and procedures to meet team goals and responsibilitiesWork Location •             Hyderabad Work Timing2:00 PM to 11:00 PM

title: USI-EH-FY27- L35 - NSE TAX ERP-CPI/Middleware - Tax Technology Services Consultant II
description: CPI/Middleware - Tax Technology Services Consultant IIJoin Deloitte’s Tax Technology Services practice and help clients modernize tax operations through SAP-enabled transformation. In this role, you will support SAP Cloud Platform Integration and S/4HANA tax efforts by connecting tax, technology, and business processes across complex environments. You will work with cross-functional teams to build scalable integrations between SAP and non-SAP systems and help deliver technology solutions that support client business needs.Work you'll doAs a Senior, Tax Technology Services on the Tax Technology Services team, you will be responsible for designing, building, and supporting SAP integration solutions that enable tax transformation initiatives.Design and develop end-to-end integration scenarios, integration flows, and interfaces between SAP and non-SAP applications using SAP Integration Suite.Configure adapters, message mappings, connectivity, and security settings across integration solutions, including Secure File Transfer Protocol (SFTP), Representational State Transfer (REST), Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP), and OData.Collaborate with business analysts, functional consultants, and stakeholders to translate business and tax requirements into technical designs.Design, expose, test, and support OData services and application programming interfaces (APIs), including work with SAP API Management where applicable.Monitor integrations, troubleshoot issues, provide Level 2 and Level 3 support, and maintain technical documentation, design artifacts, and support guides.The teamThe Tax Technology Services team helps clients improve tax operations by combining tax domain knowledge with technology-enabled solutions. Professionals on this team work across tax, finance, and information technology stakeholders to design and deliver scalable solutions that support compliance, reporting, and process efficiency. This role supports SAP integration and tax transformation efforts in a collaborative, project-based environment.Location: All LocationsShift Timings: Regular shiftQualificationsRequired:Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience5-8 years of experience with SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or SAP Integration SuiteExperience building integrations between SAP and non-SAP applicationsExperience with Representational State Transfer (REST), Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP), OData, and Secure File Transfer Protocol (SFTP)Experience with JavaScript Object Notation (JSON), Extensible Markup Language (XML), and Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations (XSLT)Experience with Groovy scriptingExperience with SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), including Integration Suite and SAP API ManagementPreferred:SAP certification in Cloud Platform IntegrationExperience designing or supporting OData V4 servicesExperience with SAP S/4HANA tax processes or tax-related integration requirementsExperience with ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) or other SAP Business Technology Platform services

title: USI-EH27-MFSWEDEN-GENAI-L45-HYD
description: Lead AI and data science initiatives that support business priorities through applied analytics, model development, and data-driven problem solving. This role focuses on translating business needs into analytical approaches, developing scalable solutions, and partnering with cross-functional stakeholders to drive measurable outcomes. The Specialist Assistant Manager, AI and Data Science will contribute across the lifecycle of data science work, from problem framing and data analysis to model deployment support and performance monitoring.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Deputy Manager, AI and Data Science on the AI and data science team, you will be responsible for…Designing and developing artificial intelligence and data science solutions aligned to business and operational requirementsAnalyzing structured and unstructured data to identify trends, patterns, and opportunities for decision-makingBuilding, validating, and refining statistical, machine learning, and predictive models using approved tools and methodsPartnering with business, technology, and analytics stakeholders to define use cases, success metrics, and implementation requirementsPreparing analysis outputs, model results, and documentation to support governance, operationalization, and stakeholder adoptionThe teamThe team supports business priorities through artificial intelligence, advanced analytics, and data science solutions. It works across functions to frame business problems, develop analytical approaches, and deliver insights and models that support decision-making. The team also collaborates with technology and business stakeholders to help scale solutions and improve adoption across the organization.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 12:00 PM to 09:00 PM / 08:30 AM to 05:30 PMQualificationsRequired:Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related quantitative field6 to 10 years of experience in data science, machine learning, statistical modeling, or artificial intelligenceExperience developing models using Python, R, or SQLExperience working with machine learning, statistical analysis, and data visualization toolsExperience translating business requirements into analytical approaches and technical deliverablesExperience preparing documentation for models, analysis, and implementation activitiesPreferred:Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related quantitative fieldExperience with cloud-based analytics or machine learning platformsExperience supporting deployment or operationalization of machine learning modelsExperience working with large-scale structured and unstructured datasetsExperience in stakeholder-facing analytics or consulting environments#mfnseitref#ESG-TECH27

title: USI-EH27-MFUK-CYBER ASSURANCE-L25-HYD
description: Analyst, Technology Controls AdvisoryWork you'll doSupport business lines and project teams in embedding globally mandated SSDLC requirements for new services/systems and material changes.Attend discovery calls and support completion of the initial intake questionnaire for new requests and projects as needed.Working with technical teams to facilitate the execution of penetration testing.Help the business understand and address applicable security controls from a cybersecurity perspective during early-stage discussions.Review incoming tickets, understand the requirements documented in them, and perform triage to determine whether the ticket should be retained within cybersecurity or routed to the relevant team.Monitor and manage the cybersecurity assurance queue, ensuring tickets are tracked, prioritized, and progressed in line with agreed timelines.Support change management activities by reviewing change requests, identifying cybersecurity impact areas, and preparing for discussions in CAB meetings.Attend CAB forums to understand planned changes, incoming demand, and required assurance actions; escalate risks or concerns to senior team members as appropriate.Support and coordinate with stakeholders across business, project teams for Project Assurance and Annual Assurance activities.Assist in reviewing BAU and project processes to identify basic control gaps, process inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.The teamCISO team is a world class operation with extensive knowledge and experience where you interface with business and technical teams and bring about change and influence across the whole world of Deloitte. As a CyberSecurity Specialist (Assurance) you will support Business Lines/Project teams through the Globally mandated Secure Service Development Lifecycle (SSDLC) when introducing new services and systems, or changes to existing services and systems, whilst also providing relevant information security control requirementsLocation: HyderabadShift Timings: 02:00 PM to 11:00 PMQualificationsRequired:Good understanding of the Secure System Delivery Lifecycle (SSDLC) and how it applies across new implementations and Change initiatives.Basic to intermediate experience in information security governance, risk, and compliance (GRC), including supporting risk assessments, assurance activities, and documentation.Understand the differences between different security testing and how they are conducted in an organization and the overall functioning of the CISO’s office and programs.Understanding of Queue management, including reviewing tickets, understanding requirements captured in the ticket, triggering appropriately, routing to the right team where needed, or retaining the ticket if it falls within cybersecurity scope.Understanding of Change management processes and ability to attend CAB meetings to review upcoming changes, understand incoming tickets, and prepare for cybersecurity assurance activities.Good understanding of the business requirements and identify key metrics to provide a clear assessment of the deliverable and measurable outcomes.Understanding of the Technology Operating Model (TOM) Annual Assurance process and ability to support planning, tracking, and follow-up activities.Ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders for Project Assurance and Annual Assurance activities.Good communication skills across technical and non-technical stakeholders.Ability to multitask and work effectively in a fast-paced environment with guidance from senior team members where required.Understanding of core cloud concepts, including the shared responsibility model, regions/availability zones, elasticity, and service models (IaaS/PaaS/SaaS).Demonstrated grasp of security fundamentals and best practices supporting confidentiality, integrity, and availability (CIA).Fair understanding of project management principles (planning, dependency management, risk/issue tracking, and stakeholder coordination).Self-starter with strong problem-solving skills, able to identify issues and propose viable solution options with minimal oversight.Proficiency with Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel.Any full-time Graduation in Computer Science / Information Security / Engineering or related discipline.3 to 5 years of relevant experience in Cyber Security, IT Risk, Technology Audit, Security Controls, Compliance, or Cyber Assurance.Preferred:ITIL V4 FoundationCloud fundamentals (Azure, AWS or GCP)CISMP or any relevant Cyber Security foundation ceritificationsISO27001/ ISO 31000 or equivalent (good to have)#mfnseitref

title: USI - EH27 - G&P- Strategic Growth Markets - L40 - Specialist Assistant Manager, Analytics and Insights - Leadership Support- Hyderabad
description: The SGM Shared services team within the US Firm’s Growth & Purpose organization is seeking a Deputy Manager (USI) to support the Leadership Support team on a full-time basis. In partnership with SGM Leadership and the SGM Program Office, this role will lead day-to-day Leadership Support activities, driving execution across key workstreams including process optimization, technology integration, governance, and stakeholder management. The Deputy Manager will be responsible for owning multiple workstreams, driving project delivery against strategic milestones, and delivering scalable efficiencies across SGMs through automation and AI-led solutions.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Assistant Manager, Analytics and Insights on the Leadership Support team, you will be responsible for: Leading execution of strategic deliverables and SGM stand-up initiatives across priority workstreams Driving process transformation, automation initiatives, and scalable operating models to improve delivery efficiency Managing ad hoc leadership requests, reporting, insights generation, and executive-ready materials across finance, operations, and governance Overseeing PMO activities including dashboards, milestone tracking, risk management, and status reporting for strategic initiatives Managing stakeholder coordination across Strategic Growth Markets, shared services, and enabling areas while supporting cross-market collaboration and knowledge sharing Leading junior team members and supporting strategic investment operations, Business of Tomorrow initiatives, and leadership decision-making The teamStrategic Growth Markets invest in a portfolio of markets that are disrupted, emerging or 'new to us' to drive the next wave of purposeful cross-business growth for the US Firm, in alignment with the Growth & Purpose strategy. Leadership Support is a cross-functional team within SGM Shared Services responsible for translating strategy into execution for SGM leaders, chiefs, and their supporting teams.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Master’s degree in business administration or equivalent 7-9 years of experience in consulting, operations, program management office, or analytics roles Experience developing reports, dashboards, data analyses, and executive-level presentations Experience using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and Word Experience using Power BI or Tableau and working knowledge of Power Apps and Power Automate Experience supporting enterprise transformation programs, automation initiatives, or process re-engineering projects Experience working with senior stakeholders and managing multiple workstreams in a fast-paced environment Preferred: Experience using Python, SQL, or R Experience using Alteryx or Snowflake Experience supporting strategic programs, governance, or operating model initiatives Experience leading team members or coordinating project delivery across cross-functional teamsHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.   Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte. Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

The Deputy Manager will be responsible for owning multiple workstreams, driving project delivery against strategic milestones, and delivering scalable efficiencies across SGMs through automation and AI-led solutions.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Assistant Manager, Analytics and Insights on the Leadership Support team, you will be responsible for: Leading execution of strategic deliverables and SGM stand-up initiatives across priority workstreams Driving process transformation, automation initiatives, and scalable operating models to improve delivery efficiency Managing ad hoc leadership requests, reporting, insights generation, and executive-ready materials across finance, operations, and governance Overseeing PMO activities including dashboards, milestone tracking, risk management, and status reporting for strategic initiatives Managing stakeholder coordination across Strategic Growth Markets, shared services, and enabling areas while supporting cross-market collaboration and knowledge sharing Leading junior team members and supporting strategic investment operations, Business of Tomorrow initiatives, and leadership decision-making The teamStrategic Growth Markets invest in a portfolio of markets that are disrupted, emerging or 'new to us' to drive the next wave of purposeful cross-business growth for the US Firm, in alignment with the Growth & Purpose strategy. Leadership Support is a cross-functional team within SGM Shared Services responsible for translating strategy into execution for SGM leaders, chiefs, and their supporting teams.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Master’s degree in business administration or equivalent 7-9 years of experience in consulting, operations, program management office, or analytics roles Experience developing reports, dashboards, data analyses, and executive-level presentations Experience using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and Word Experience using Power BI or Tableau and working knowledge of Power Apps and Power Automate Experience supporting enterprise transformation programs, automation initiatives, or process re-engineering projects Experience working with senior stakeholders and managing multiple workstreams in a fast-paced environment Preferred: Experience using Python, SQL, or R Experience using Alteryx or Snowflake Experience supporting strategic programs, governance, or operating model initiatives Experience leading team members or coordinating project delivery across cross-functional teamsHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.   Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte. Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.
