title: USI-EH-FY27-ES-EFA-L35-Services Specialist
description: Services Specialist, Account and Engagement Finance ServicesAs a Services Specialist within Account and Engagement Finance Services, you will own the financial analysis,reconciliation, and engagement management controls for one or more project teams—preparing budgets andforecasts, advising project leadership, and keeping engagements financially healthy from initiation through close. Work you’ll do  As a Services Specialist, Account and Engagement Finance Services, you will be responsible for supporting one ormore engagement teams through successful management of the financial analysis and reconciliation processesand the implementation of engagement management controls. In addition, in this role you will:Support one or more project/engagement teams through successful management of the financial analysis and reconciliation process and the implementation of project management control.Prepare budgets and forecasts to project and track financial metrics such as revenue, expense, etc.Interact periodically with senior-level internal, and sometimes external, clients to present various analyses, discuss recommendations, and provide project financial advice.Track expenditures and perform the client bill and receivable collection functions.Perform and manage Project Management Office (PMO) functional tasks and perform day-to-day contract management activities.Understand and utilize standard processes for project management, quality management, and risk management.Contribute to the growth and development of the overall team through active involvement in one or more practice initiatives.The team  Our Account and Engagement Finance Services team works with clients to define project needs and deliverymethods. We use advanced financial and forecasting tools to give precise cost estimates. This helps us manageproject budgets and keep projects on track and within budget. QualificationsRequired: 4 – 8 years of experienceB.A. / B.S. majoring in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or Business ManagementMinimum of 2 years of experience with the entire Microsoft Office Suite, including intermediate to advanced Excel and PowerPoint skillsExperience summarizing results and producing management reportsStrong oral and written communication skills, including excellent presentation skillsOutstanding attention to detail and adherence to project deadlinesAbility to work effectively, both independently and as a member of a teamAbility to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment Preferred:Experience working with a variety of contracting types (e.g., time and materials, fixed price) and billing scenariosExperience in a professional services firmExperience with MS Access and MS Project applicationsLifestyle / Travel Guidelines:Account and Engagement Finance Services professionals work a minimum of 45 hours per week, and can often work in excess of that depending on need.At Deloitte, we have adopted a Hybrid Working Model. We expect that the majority of our professionals will reside within a commutable distance of their assigned office location in order to leverage the office facilities for project meetings, coaching and training sessions, collaboration, or working from the office when necessary.All candidates must be willing and able to travel as needed for their clients; however, depending on staffing needs, most positions are in-office-based with limited travel requiredWork Location: Hyderabad (3 days in office for the first 6 months of joining; from the 7th month, 2 days in office)Shift Timing: 2 PM to 11 PM How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, worldclass learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India  Deloitte’s culture Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.  Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI-EH-FY27- L45 - NSE TAX ERP- ABAP + BTP - Senior, Tax Technology Services
description: ABAP + BTP - Senior, Tax Technology Services  Do you have a passion to work for large multinational clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join Tax Technology Consulting group in Deloitte India. Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. Work you’ll do Increasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally. Key responsibilities -  * Minimum of 3+ years of experience in SAP Datasphere with experience in SAP Data ware-housing /Analytics.  * Strong experience in integrating data from various sources and optimizing data flows.  * Proven expertise in SAP Datasphere and related technologies.  * Experience in Integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud / SAP on-premise Source systems / Non -SAP source systems with SAP Datasphere and external systems using APIs.  * knowledge/expertise in ABAP RAP, CDS views, Fiori/UI5, OData, and API Management.  * Experience in SAP HANA database modeling (calculation views, data modeling, SQL scripting, and performance optimization).  * Experience in any of the earlier SAP BW/BI versions with sound knowledge in ETL process. Location- Hyderabad Our purpose Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. [1] Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact. Our inclusive culture At Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our [2] latest accolades. Professional development At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. [3] Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India. Benefits to help you thrive At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. [4] Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you. Recruiting tips From developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. [5] Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters. #CA-SN #CA-SI #CA-SRV#TechnologyFY26 ReferencesVisible links1. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/join-deloitte-our-purpose.html2. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/awards-and-recognition.html3. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/inclusion-leadership-development.html4. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html5. https://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/topics/recruitingtips.html

title: USI-EH-FY27-L35-NSE TAX ERP-SAP FI-DRC-Tax Technology Services Consultant II
description: SAP FI-DRC - Tax Technology Services Consultant IIJoin Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting practice and help organizations modernize tax operations through SAP-enabled transformation. As part of Deloitte Tax in India, you will work with multinational clients to address statutory reporting, e-invoicing, and finance process requirements in an evolving global tax environment. This role offers the opportunity to support complex implementations, collaborate across stakeholders, and contribute to large-scale tax technology initiatives. Work you'll do As a Tax Technology Services Consultant II on the Tax Technology Consulting team, you will be responsible for: Supporting the implementation of statutory reporting solutions in SAP environments Supporting the implementation of e-invoicing solutions for client tax and finance operations Gathering business and functional requirements from clients and translating them into implementation support activities Coordinating with cross-functional stakeholders to support solution design, testing, and deployment Contributing to SAP finance transformation initiatives involving financial posting processes and tax-related operational requirements The team Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting team helps organizations align tax, finance, and technology to support operational efficiency and regulatory compliance. The team works with clients to design and implement technology-enabled solutions across tax reporting, process transformation, and SAP-led modernization initiatives. Professionals in this practice collaborate across tax, finance, and technology functions to help clients address complex business and compliance needs. Location: All Locations Shift Timings: Regular hours Qualifications Required: 3+ years of experience with SAP S/4HANA, or participation in 3 full lifecycle SAP implementations Experience supporting global template preparation and rollout activities Experience configuring or supporting SAP Finance (FI) processes including General Ledger, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Asset Accounting, Electronic Bank Statement, Cost Center Accounting, Profit Center Accounting, and Internal Orders Experience supporting Procure to Pay, Record to Report, and Order to Cash processes Experience working with SAP Finance (FI), Controlling (CO), and integration with Sales and Distribution (SD) and Materials Management (MM) Knowledge of generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) Experience supporting change requests, enhancements, or functional improvements in SAP Finance and Controlling environments Preferred: Experience with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) solutions Experience with statutory reporting and e-invoicing implementations Experience with European Union tax business processes Experience gathering business requirements and working with multiple stakeholder groups Experience supporting SAP Finance and Controlling initiatives as an individual contributor or team lead

title: USI-EH-FY27- L45 - NSE TAX ERP- SAP PMO - Senior, Tax Technology Services
description: SAP S/4HANA PMO - Senior, Tax Technology ServicesDo you have a passion to work for large multinational clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join Tax Technology Consulting group in Deloitte India.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax technology transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doWe are seeking an experienced SAP S/4HANA PMO professional to support large- and medium-scale transformation programs focused on tax, compliance, and statutory reporting processes. This role will lead program governance, planning, execution tracking, risk management, stakeholder coordination, and delivery oversight across business, tax, finance, compliance, and technology workstreams. The ideal candidate brings strong PMO discipline along with a practical understanding of SAP S/4HANA business processes, localization requirements, compliance obligations, and reporting needs. This role requires close collaboration with SAP functional teams, subject matter experts, system integrator partners, and business stakeholders to ensure timely, coordinated, and compliant delivery.Key responsibilities -? Establish and manage integrated project plans, milestones, dependencies, and deliverables across tax, finance, procurement, order-to-cash, and IT teams.? Coordinate cross-functional teams to ensure design, build, testing, cutover, and deployment activities are delivered on schedule.? Track and govern key program artifacts including RAID logs, status reporting, issue escalation, decision logs, action trackers, and governance decks.? Support planning and execution of country-specific e-invoicing and statutory compliance requirements within the global SAP template and rollout model.? Work with tax and SAP teams to monitor progress on tax determination configuration, tax code design, condition records, integrations, and compliance controls.? Coordinate implementation activities related to SAP DRC, including statutory reporting, electronic document processing, and integration with tax authority platforms where applicable.? Manage dependencies between SAP functional areas such as FI, SD, MM, procurement, billing, and tax engines/tools.? Facilitate steering committee meetings, working sessions, and stakeholder reviews; prepare concise executive-level updates on scope, risks, and decisions.? Ensure strong change control and scope management, particularly where regulatory, localization, or compliance requirements affect timelines or design.? Support test strategy and readiness tracking for SIT, UAT, regression, and country compliance testing.? Coordinate cutover planning and deployment readiness for tax and compliance-related capabilities.? Drive collaboration between internal teams, external implementation partners, and business stakeholders across regions.? Maintain focus on regulatory timelines, auditability, and business continuity during transformation.Qualification and Experience Required – ? Bachelor’s degree in information systems, Finance, Accounting, Tax, Business, or related field.? 4-7 years of PMO, program management, or project management experience in SAP transformation programs.? Experience supporting SAP S/4HANA implementations or rollouts in a PMO or delivery governance capacity.? Good understanding of indirect tax / VAT / GST processes, tax determination, and statutory compliance requirements in ERP programs.? Exposure to e-invoicing, digital tax reporting, and/or SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC).? Strong experience in project planning, risk/issue management, stakeholder management, governance, and executive reporting.? Ability to manage multiple workstreams, competing priorities, and cross-functional dependencies in fast-paced environments.? Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to translate detailed delivery issues into clear leadership updates.? Experience working with global teams and third-party system integrators.Preferred Qualifications? Experience with SAP tax-related design and delivery, including collaboration with tax engines or localisation solutions.? Knowledge of global or regional e-invoicing mandates and continuous transaction controls.? Familiarity with SAP modules such as FI, SD, MM, and procurement/billing processes that impact tax determination and compliance reporting.? PMP, PRINCE2, SAP certification, or equivalent project/program management credential.? Experience in template-based global rollouts and country deployments.? Understanding of audit, controls, and compliance implications for tax technology programs.Key Skills? SAP S/4HANA Program Management Office (PMO)? Tax Determination? e-Invoicing / Statutory Reporting? Governance and Status Reporting? RAID Management? Integrated Planning and Dependency Management? Stakeholder and Vendor Management? Test / Cutover Readiness Tracking? Executive CommunicationSuccess Measures? On-time delivery of tax and compliance milestones? Effective management of risks, issues, and cross-workstream dependencies? Readiness for country go-lives and regulatory deadlines? Clear governance, reporting, and decision-making cadence? Stable deployment of tax determination, legal reporting capabilitiesThe TeamTax Technology Consulting (TTC) – Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting Team (TTC) has a market leading reputation; bringing together a unique blend of consulting, technology, tax technical and tax reporting experience to help businesses meet the challenges of multi-jurisdictional tax operations, including compliance, reporting, tax technology and tax risk management.Within TTC, sits our Tax ERP Value Proposition, with a fast-growing team and a super-growth ambition. We are undertaking an unprecedented wave of ERP implementations and these require specialist Tax Technology and Systems knowledge as a blended hybrid skillset. This proposition is uniquely positioned to be a key differentiator for the firm-wide ERP-enabled business transformation practice across EMEA. You will find opportunities to apply an impressive range of broad consulting and functional skills that will enhance your career.Our purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact.Our inclusive cultureAt Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our latest accolades.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-S&S-Zuora Billing- Manager, Technical Transformation
description: Customer & Marketing – Sales & Services – Zuora Billing - Manager, Technical TransformationPosition SummaryLevel: Manager,Technical TransformationWe are looking for Project Manager with Zuora implementation experience to lead cross-functional delivery of subscription billing initiatives. You will plan and run the project end to end—aligning stakeholders, managing scope and risk, and ensuring high-quality delivery across business, product, and technology teams.Work you’ll do:Lead and Architect Zuora programs and projects from initiation through go-live and stabilization (hypercare).Build and manage the integrated project plan, RAID log (risks, assumptions, issues, dependencies), budget tracking (if applicable), and status reporting.Partner with business owners to confirm requirements across the subscription lifecycle (quoting to cash, billing, invoicing, payments, dunning, credits/refunds, renewals, amendments, proration).Coordinate solution delivery across internal teams and vendors (functional, technical, QA, data, and release management).Drive governance and decision-making: run working sessions, steering updates, and executive readouts.Manage integrations and dependencies (for example, CRM/CPQ, ERP/GL, tax, payments, reporting) in partnership with architecture and engineering.Plan and execute testing cycles (SIT/UAT), cutover, and go-live readiness.Ensure delivery meets agreed quality, controls, and documentation expectations (for example, requirements, process flows, test evidence, runbooks).The Team:The Sales & Service Offering Portfolio integrates our most differentiated, globally recognized Sales & service businesses. It focuses on owning the commercial agenda through growth strategy, enhanced user experiences, and engagement through the entire customer lifecycle. From our core strengths in creative design, to strategy, platforms and solutions, as well as our continued growth through acquisitions, we are specifically positioned to bring fully integrated solutions to our clients.We are all consumers and personal marketers. This reality is what makes the Sales & Service Offering Portfolio so exciting. What we deliver in the market each and every day directly impacts who we are as customers. We are able to deliver on outcomes for the very products and services that we have the privilege of engaging with ourselves.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:9+ years of leading experience delivery of enterprise SaaS or ERP/finance systems.6+ years of hands-on experience delivering Zuora projectsProven track record delivering enterprise-scale Lead-to-Cash or Quote-to-Cash programs (multi-cloud preferred). Strong understanding of subscription billing concepts and order-to-cash processes.Demonstrated ability to manage cross-functional teams, competing priorities, and senior stakeholders and able to own end-to-end architecture for Zuora implementations, including integration with Sales &CPQ Cloud along with ERP, and external systems. Experience with delivery methods such as Agile, hybrid Agile, or Waterfall (as appropriate for the program).Strong written and verbal communication skills; comfortable presenting status, risks, and options.Mentor junior architects and consultants, fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation. Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Experience with one or more: Salesforce (Sales Cloud/CPQ), NetSuite, Workday Financials, SAP, Oracle, Avalara, payment gateways, data warehouse/BI tools.Experience with data migration and reconciliation (customers, subscriptions, invoices, accounting entries).Education : BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university .Location : Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering DnA- SAP HANA. ADB Data Engineer – Software Specialist Engineer II
description: SAP HANA. ADB Data Engineer – Software Specialist Engineer IIRole Overview: As a Data Analytics Engineer, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands-on approach to multiple high-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high-quality, outcome-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.Key Responsibilities:Outcome-Driven Accountability: Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high-quality, lean designs and implementations. Technical Leadership and Advocacy: Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support. Engineering Craftsmanship: Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands-on, self-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks. Create technical specifications, and write high-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.Customer-Centric Engineering: Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.Incremental and Iterative Delivery: Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions. Cross-Functional Collaboration and Integration: Work collaboratively with empowered, cross-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.Advanced Technical Proficiency: Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement, and learning.Domain Expertise: Quickly acquire domain-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and data designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.Effective Communication and Influence: Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well-structured arguments and trade-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.Engagement and Collaborative Co-Creation: Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:§  A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Strong data engineering foundation with deep understanding of data-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, etc.§  5+ years proven experience with data ETL and ELT tools (such as ADF, Databricks, Alteryx, cloud-native tools), data warehousing tools (such as SAP HANA, Snowflake, ADLS, Amazon Redshift, Google Cloud BigQuery).§  5+ years of experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  Strong understanding of methodologies & tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.§  Strong preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML and GenAI.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.

title: USI-EH-FY27- L45 -NSE TAX ERP-SAP FI-DRC - Senior, Tax Technology Services
description: SAP FI-DRC - Senior, Tax Technology ServicesJoin Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting practice and help organizations modernize tax operations through SAP-enabled transformation. As part of Deloitte Tax in India, you will work with multinational clients to address statutory reporting, e-invoicing, and finance process requirements in an evolving global tax environment. This role offers the opportunity to support complex implementations, collaborate across stakeholders, and contribute to large-scale tax technology initiatives.Work you'll doAs a Senior, Tax Technology Services on the Tax Technology Consulting team, you will be responsible for:Supporting the implementation of statutory reporting solutions in SAP environmentsSupporting the implementation of e-invoicing solutions for client tax and finance operationsGathering business and functional requirements from clients and translating them into implementation support activitiesCoordinating with cross-functional stakeholders to support solution design, testing, and deploymentContributing to SAP finance transformation initiatives involving financial posting processes and tax-related operational requirementsThe teamDeloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting team helps organizations align tax, finance, and technology to support operational efficiency and regulatory compliance. The team works with clients to design and implement technology-enabled solutions across tax reporting, process transformation, and SAP-led modernization initiatives. Professionals in this practice collaborate across tax, finance, and technology functions to help clients address complex business and compliance needs.Location: All LocationsShift Timings: Regular hoursQualificationsRequired:6+ years of experience with SAP S/4HANA, or participation in 3 full lifecycle SAP implementationsExperience supporting global template preparation and rollout activitiesExperience configuring or supporting SAP Finance (FI) processes including General Ledger, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Asset Accounting, Electronic Bank Statement, Cost Center Accounting, Profit Center Accounting, and Internal OrdersExperience supporting Procure to Pay, Record to Report, and Order to Cash processesExperience working with SAP Finance (FI), Controlling (CO), and integration with Sales and Distribution (SD) and Materials Management (MM)Knowledge of generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP)Experience supporting change requests, enhancements, or functional improvements in SAP Finance and Controlling environmentsPreferred:Experience with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) solutionsExperience with statutory reporting and e-invoicing implementationsExperience with European Union tax business processesExperience gathering business requirements and working with multiple stakeholder groupsExperience supporting SAP Finance and Controlling initiatives as an individual contributor or team lead

title: USI-EH27-F&A-A&C- L10-Services Support Associate II- Contracts Lifecycle Mgmt (R&C) - Hyderabad
description: Services Support Associate II, Contracts Lifecycle ManagementDo you have an aptitude for Contract review, AI, data analytics and creating positive user experiences? If so, you may be a good fit for this role. At Deloitte, we provide client services and develop new products and services to sustain competitive advantage, while managing a diverse collection of systems, processes, and functions. As a Records & Contracts (R&C) Services Support Associate II, you’ll help facilitate compliance with policies and practices related to records and contracts management by providing technology, tools and processes tailored to meet customer needs. Work you'll do As a Services Support Associate II, Firm Risk, Compliance, and Governance Services on the R&C team, you will be responsible for: Interpret contract conditions, review contract specifications, and identify potential risks. Utilize AI for trend analysis, contract review, and extraction of insights from contract data, including transforming contract-related business questions into actionable, repeatable generative artificial intelligence prompts. Participate in technology upgrade and enhancement projects and perform user acceptance testing. Coordinate and manage assigned processes, projects, technologies, and initiatives, including identifying required actions and improvements and working with the R&C team to support compliance. Execute research, data analysis, queries, and report generation within contracts management and related systems, while maintaining project documentation and standard operating procedures. The team The R&C team consists of an integrated, cross-functional group of team members, with every role critical to our successful project delivery. R&C partners with each Deloitte business to facilitate compliance with policies and practices related to records and contracts by providing technology, tools and processes tailored to meet their needs. We also play a key role in coordinating with the Office of General Counsel for document preservation requests. The team works closely with stakeholders in developing new processes and collaborates to enhance existing operations. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree 1-3 years of work experience Advanced Microsoft Office skills English language proficiency, written and verbal Experience providing customer service support Ability to collaborate with team members in India and the United States Attention to detail for accuracy in work output Preferred: Experience analyzing contract data and using AI to support reporting and strategic insights

As a Records & Contracts (R&C) Services Support Associate II, you’ll help facilitate compliance with policies and practices related to records and contracts management by providing technology, tools and processes tailored to meet customer needs. Work you'll do As a Services Support Associate II, Firm Risk, Compliance, and Governance Services on the R&C team, you will be responsible for: Interpret contract conditions, review contract specifications, and identify potential risks. Utilize AI for trend analysis, contract review, and extraction of insights from contract data, including transforming contract-related business questions into actionable, repeatable generative artificial intelligence prompts. Participate in technology upgrade and enhancement projects and perform user acceptance testing. Coordinate and manage assigned processes, projects, technologies, and initiatives, including identifying required actions and improvements and working with the R&C team to support compliance. Execute research, data analysis, queries, and report generation within contracts management and related systems, while maintaining project documentation and standard operating procedures. The team The R&C team consists of an integrated, cross-functional group of team members, with every role critical to our successful project delivery. R&C partners with each Deloitte business to facilitate compliance with policies and practices related to records and contracts by providing technology, tools and processes tailored to meet their needs. We also play a key role in coordinating with the Office of General Counsel for document preservation requests. The team works closely with stakeholders in developing new processes and collaborates to enhance existing operations. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree 1-3 years of work experience Advanced Microsoft Office skills English language proficiency, written and verbal Experience providing customer service support Ability to collaborate with team members in India and the United States Attention to detail for accuracy in work output Preferred: Experience analyzing contract data and using AI to support reporting and strategic insights

title: USI-EH27-Global S&I-Assistant Manager, Strategy, Growth, and Transformation-Bengaluru, Mumbai
description: Assistant Manager, Strategy, Growth, and Transformation We are looking for a passionate, high energy, and self-motivated individual who is accustomed to working independently and collaboratively on small and large projects in a close-knit team. We are seeking a person with at least 7 years of strategy experience, of which a minimum of 5 years should be post-MBA, in the internal or external consulting space with strong research, analytical and writing skills, combined with excellent command of the English language.  Work you'll do Your role will encompass: Own and manage discrete tasks and deliverables: Contribute to developing go-to-market strategies for activating technology across global S&I-related client issues, including: Gathering, analysing, and interpreting qualitative market research Conducting quantitative analysis of sales and pipeline data to identify and validate tech opportunities Developing logically structured PowerPoint presentations to support internal discussions Using AI tools to accelerate and enhance work products, and sharing best practices with teammates Apply solid project management skills: Effectively manage multiple tasks and switch effectively across competing priorities. Demonstrate structured problem-solving: Draw logical conclusions and develop clear, actionable, and relevant recommendations. Shape and communicate effectively: Develop and present powerful, data-driven PowerPoint presentations for senior Deloitte executives Drive global collaboration: Develop and maintain strong working relationships with counterparts to foster a seamless, innovative, and highly effective global team  The team The Sustainability & Infrastructure (S&I) team is part of the global firm. The team is at the core of the Firm's strategy, working with industries and practice areas to orchestrate the sustainability efforts and solve the most complex challenges in more cohesive, consistent, and exponentially powerful ways. To know more about Deloitte’s Sustainability & Infrastructure practice, click here.  Location Bengaluru; Hybrid work environment with two days in office Mumbai location for internal Mumbai-based candidates only  Shift Timings 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM  Qualifications Technical fluency: Advanced proficiency in PowerPoint and Excel, with working knowledge of AI tools to improve productivity Executive communication: Strong storytelling and presentation skills, with the ability to tailor messages for senior stakeholders Strategy frameworks: Solid understanding of strategy and go-to-market frameworks, with sound judgment in application Project management: Ability to manage multiple priorities, stay organized, and work effectively in a fast-paced environment Collaboration and adaptability: Strong team player with the flexibility to work across global teams, time zones, and changing priorities Professionalism and integrity: High attention to detail, accountability, and consistent follow-through Experience: Academic qualification: Master’s Degree or MBA from a top tier institute Work experience: 7 years, with at least 2 years of post-MBA experience; title: USI-EH-27-Tax-UK Tax Compliance-UK Employment Tax-L45 - Senior, Tax Services-Kolkata
description: This opportunity is with Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) in Kolkata, supporting the UK Employment Taxes practice. As a Senior, Tax Services, you will contribute to employment tax compliance, reporting, technical research, and client delivery activities for a leading UK practice. The role offers exposure to client-facing work, global coordination, and technology-enabled tax processes in a growing team environment.Work you'll doAs a Senior, Tax Services on the Kolkata Reward team, you will be responsible for… Preparation and submission of UK Forms P11D, including calculations of benefit in kind values according to the UK tax legislation Preparation and submission of UK Construction Industry Scheme Forms (CIS300) following a standardized approach Preparation and submission of UK PAYE Settlement Agreements (PSA), including carrying out data analysis in excel and using Deloitte’s in-house software Preparation of employment taxes technical advice, including tax technical research and drafting advice emails Joining calls with our clients to deliver employment taxes advice Assistance with coordinating global employment taxes projects, including liaison with employment taxes colleagues globally; monitoring client information, including client work status and client contact details; and assistance with management of client accounts, take on procedures and billing analysis The teamDeloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service offerings have obtained support services through the USI Tax teams. USI Tax offers you opportunities to learn and support U.S. and other countries (such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom) taxation practice, a popular career option.We are looking for a tax consultant to join our successful and expanding Kolkata Reward team to support our UK Employment Taxes practice, which is the largest of its kind in the UK.Location: KolkataShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Full time master’s degree in finance or equivalent from reputed University 3-5 years of experience of working in a corporate environment A high level of IT user ability Specifically, a high level of experience with Microsoft Excel, including use of formulae such as ‘VLOOKUP’ A good working knowledge of Microsoft Office and PowerPoint Excellent administration and organizational skills, with the ability to work unsupervised within agreed processes, multi-task and prioritize workload to ensure deadlines are met Pro-active and able to take ownership of delivering projects Preferred: Excellent written and verbal communications skills at the business and technical level Solid analytical aptitude, critical thinking and problem-solving skills Good personal organizational skills and commitment to customer service Aptitude for learning technology, systems and processes Ability to exercise effective judgement and decision making Existing tax qualifications (including ATT and/or CTA qualifications) is highly desirable

title: USI FY27 | OSH - Cyber Operate - Pre Sales - Senior Consultant
description: As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you’ll work as Cyber Solution Specialist within the Operate Solution Hub, you will be responsible for coordinating the design of large and complex managed cybersecurity deals during the pursuits. The Solution Hub is designed to drive an optimum process for solutioning and pricing cross-cyber-domain managed security deals, reducing friction for cross-Offering Portfolio pursuits and optimizing review. By providing services such as inputs for deal qualifications, cyber benchmarks/effort estimation, and solution/pricing review, the Cyber Operate Solution Hub will be a focused space to increase win rates and profitability. Work you'll do As a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Solution Hub team, you will be responsible for solution design and architecture activities. Support cyber solution analysis, business case development, and pricing model reviews across Infrastructure Security, Identity and Access Management, Security Operations Center services, Governance Risk and Compliance, and Vulnerability Management Assist Solution and Capability Architects in shaping managed cybersecurity offerings, including service tiers, cost structures, and pricing strategies Contribute to estimation frameworks and pricing models for cyber managed services, incorporating cross-domain dependencies and cost drivers Support preparation of client-facing materials and pursuit activities, including presentations, client discussions, orals, and due diligence Collaborate with pursuit stakeholders to refine solution designs, address service level agreement considerations, and align estimates with client requirements The team Cyber Operate Practice is focused on helping our clients identify and manage the cyber risks arising from their association with third parties or service providers. We help our clients to define their overall third-party cyber risk strategy, design and implement enterprise-wide programs and technology that focus on identifying and reducing risks; help them evaluate their objectives, priorities, strengths and weaknesses and roll out large scale organizational changes to achieve goals. Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai Qualifications Required: 7+ years of experience in information security, cybersecurity, or technology engineering support Experience supporting solutioning for enterprise cybersecurity services across Infrastructure Security, Identity and Access Management, Security Operations Center services, Governance Risk and Compliance, and Vulnerability Management Experience developing business cases, estimation approaches, or pricing inputs for technology or managed service pursuits Experience contributing to cybersecurity managed service solution design across multiple security domains Experience working in matrixed teams during deal pursuits with changing requirements and timelines Advanced Microsoft Excel skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cyber Security, Information Security, Engineering, Information Technology, or equivalent Preferred: Master of Business Administration (MBA)#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI - EH26 - Product Engineering DnA- SAP HANA, ETL Data Engineer- Software Engineer II
description: Data Analytics Engineer – Software Engineer IIRole Overview: As a Data Analytics Engineer, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands-on approach to multiple high-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high-quality, outcome-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.Key Responsibilities:Outcome-Driven Accountability: Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high-quality, lean designs and implementations. Technical Leadership and Advocacy: Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support. Engineering Craftsmanship: Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands-on, self-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks. Create technical specifications, and write high-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.Customer-Centric Engineering: Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.Incremental and Iterative Delivery: Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions. Cross-Functional Collaboration and Integration: Work collaboratively with empowered, cross-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.Advanced Technical Proficiency: Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement, and learning.Domain Expertise: Quickly acquire domain-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and data designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.Effective Communication and Influence: Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well-structured arguments and trade-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.Engagement and Collaborative Co-Creation: Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:§  A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Strong data engineering foundation with deep understanding of data-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, data warehousing, architecture etc.§  3+ years proven experience with data ETL and ELT tools (such as ADF, SAP BODS, Glue, cloud-native tools), data warehousing tools (such as SAP HANA) - Mandatory§  Experience with DataBricks, Data Factory and Python§  3+ years of experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  Strong understanding of methodologies & tools like XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.§  Reporting Tools - Qlik  or Tableau or Power BI§  Strong preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML and GenAI.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.

title: USI- EH27 -L45- MTS - Senior –AI & Power Platform Engineer  - Hyderabad
description: Do you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join MTS group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doTax Technology professionals at Deloitte combine insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally. We are looking for driven individuals having a passion for technology - whether its programming applications, automation or datacenter operational excellence. If you like to figure out how to make the new technologies work in a corporate environment, then our teams might be a fit for you.The Team  The MDT group is focused on delivering differentiated service offerings through the use of new technologies such as Data Wrangling, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence (BI), Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Optical Character Recognition (OCR), and Machine Learning. This group enables the Multi-state Tax Services (MTS) practice to drive profitability and growth, through application of emerging and existing technologies and enhanced utilization of Tax tools and software. We support MTS teams by assessing and addressing their data and technology challenges on client engagements, internal processes and data intensive projects to help achieve efficiencies, win clients and create differentiated services. With the exponential growth of accessible data, there is an increasing need to bring data and technology capabilities to help address client needs and support Deloitte MTS engagements and solutions.Work Location: HyderabadTime - 11 am- 8pmKey ResponsibilitiesBuild, customize, and maintain applications using Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI).Design and develop AI-powered business solutions using Azure OpenAI, emphasizing prompt engineering and solution integration.Write, test, and deploy robust Python scripts for data processing and system integration.Design, optimize, and manage SQL and/or NoSQL databases to support cloud-based and on-premises applications.Translate business requirements into scalable, technical prototypes and production-ready solutions.Identify challenges quickly and formulate effective, innovative solutions leveraging AI, automation, and cloud services.Qualifications & Experience4+ years of professional experience in technology roles (software engineering, data engineering, solution architecture, etc.).Minimum 3 years of hands-on work in Azure OpenAI/AI engineering and Power Platform (including Power Apps).Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience with: Azure OpenAI and LLM-based solution engineering, including prompt design. Microsoft Power Platform—with deep expertise in Power Apps.Strong Python programming skills for scripting and automation. Familiarity with additional Azure services (e.g., Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Cosmos DB, API Management).Proven expertise in SQL and/or NoSQL database design, management, and optimization.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills; strong team collaborator.

title: USI-EH-27- UK Corporate Tax - L35-Tax Consultant II - Hyderabad/Bangalore
description: Tax Consultant II - UK Corporate TaxDo you have a passion to work for U.K.-based clients of Deloitte Tax to provide tax compliance services? Are you ready to take the next step in your career by focusing on providing business and individual tax return compliance? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn and support practice U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option. In recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, etc. have obtained support in their tax related practice through the Deloitte Tax in India.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help clients excel globally.To list some of key responsibilities: -• Accurate preparation of low complexity UK Corporation Tax returns and computations across a range of industries using the standard procedures.• Identification and documentation of issues and preparation of client queries ✓ Working as part of a wider team to complete required volumes of work• Other UK Corporation Tax compliance-related processing activities as requiredThe TeamThe Deloitte UK team based in Hyderabad specializes in three core areas: UK corporation tax return preparation, electronic tagging and review of UK statutory financial statements, and governance and other support work for global tax outsourcing projects. On taking up a position with the UK team you will have the opportunity to focus on at least two of these core specialisms.Qualifications Required:• Full time master's in business administration (MBA) in Finance or equivalent from reputed University• At least 3 - 5 years of experience in experience in UK Corporate Tax returns• Excellent written and verbal communication skills• Strong accounting knowledge• Knowledge of Microsoft Office products — In particular, Excel and WordWork Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST | 2 PM to 11 PM IST

title: USI-EH27- BO&I-BO&I Operate- L55-Specialist Executive Manager - Data Analytics Engineering-Hyderabad
description: Specialist Executive Manager, Data Engineering (Analytics)Are you passionate about leveraging analytics to solve real business problems and enable impactful decision-making at the highest levels? Deloitte invites you to take on a pivotal role as a Data Analytics Engineer to lead the design and delivery of new analytics solutions / capabilities for a multi-billion Operate business. This is not a traditional analytics engineering role. Your focus will be on rapid development of working prototypes and production pilots—building on a local or cloud PostgreSQL environment, not waiting for enterprise infrastructure approvals—producing outputs that get used in real decisions within days/weeks, not months. When solutions earn business buy-in, they will graduate to enterprise platforms. title: USI-EH27- F&A-A&C-L10- Services Support Associate II-India Payroll - Hyderabad
description: Services Support Associate II, Payroll– India Payroll Accounting activities We are looking for professionals with relevant experience in Payroll Accounting, Reconciliations, Accruals, Amortizations, and Audit, who are looking forward to enhancing career in the Finance field. Work you'll do As a Services Support Associate II, Payroll on the India Payroll and Personnel Solutions team, you will be responsible for… Preparing and recording payroll entries for regular payroll and full and final settlement activities in SAP Reconciling reimbursement payments, preparing periodic accruals and amortizations, and supporting monthly payroll accounting close activities Analyzing payroll transactions for classification, accounting treatment, and compliance with payroll policies and accounting standards Supporting audit, tax compliance, financial reporting, and payroll-related documentation and process improvement activities Coordinating with stakeholders to validate inputs, address payroll inquiries, prepare ad hoc and leadership reports, and maintain compliance with PII guidelines The team This position is a part of Deloitte Consulting India Pvt Ltd, within the Financial Services Group – Payroll and Personnel Solutions service line. In the India paying team, the responsibilities assigned are in support of India Payroll activities of the Deloitte India offices across four locations - Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bengaluru and Gurgaon. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Graduate or postgraduate degree in Accounting 1-3 years of experience in India payroll processing, payroll accounting, data maintenance, and regulatory compliance Experience in US payroll accounting Experience preparing payroll entries, reconciliations, accruals, amortizations, and audit support Advanced Microsoft Excel skills and proficiency in Microsoft Office applications Knowledge of India tax and statutory compliances, and basic auditing and internal control standards Typing speed of 45-50 words per minute with data entry capability of 7000 KSPH with 5% or fewer errors Preferred: Experience with SAP S/4 HANA Experience supporting payroll and benefits accounting in SAP ledgers Experience preparing periodic reporting for leadership and stakeholders Experience handling payroll inquiries from employees and business stakeholders Experience creating process documentation for accounting or compliance activities

title: USI-EH27- BO&I-BO&I Operate-L45-Specialist, Deputy Manager- Data Analytics Engineering-Hyderabad
description: Are you passionate about leveraging analytics to solve real business problems and enable impactful decision-making at the highest levels? Deloitte invites you to take on a pivotal role as a Analytics Engineer solving complex business problems and building new capabilities for a multi-billion Operate business. This is not a traditional analytics engineering role. Your focus will be on rapid development of working prototypes and production pilots—building on a local or cloud PostgreSQL environment, not waiting for enterprise infrastructure approvals—developing outputs that get used in real decisions within days/weeks, not months. When solutions earn business buy-in, they will graduate to enterprise platforms. You will support the design and delivery of analytics solutions, creating key proof cases and prototypes. This role will work closely with the Senior Analytics Engineer to build and maintain core analytics capabilities, including data ingestion, transformation, dashboard development, and data quality processes. The role requires strong execution, attention to detail, ability to prototype and iterate quickly, while effectively collaborating across teams and time zones. Work you'll do As a Specialist Deputy Manager, Data Engineering on the BO&I, US Operate – USI team, you will be responsible for: Loading and preparing structured data from sources such as CSV, Excel, and JSON for use in the analytics environment Building SQL transformations, joins, aggregations, and analysis-ready tables to support prototype and pilot analytics solutions Developing, updating, testing, and validating dashboards and reports in Tableau, Power BI, or similar tools Monitoring data quality, identifying issues and anomalies, and supporting traceability from source data to reporting outputs Documenting data sources, refresh schedules, transformation logic, metric definitions, and runbooks while maintaining version-controlled code and materials These responsibilities are drawn from the uploaded JD’s data engineering, SQL transformation, analytics/visualization, and documentation sections The team You will join a cross-business Operate team, focused on developing / innovating key measures of business performance and building dashboards and operational reporting that inform decisions and serve as foundation for new capabilities, key to US Operate business high growth. We operate with startup-speed mindset inside a large enterprise: prototype first, document second, and scale after proving the concept works. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2:00 PM to 11:00 PM IST Qualifications Required: 8+ years of experience in analytics, data analysis, analytics engineering, or data engineering roles Experience working with SQL and relational databases Experience building dashboards or reports in Tableau, Power BI, or similar tools Working proficiency in PostgreSQL Experience using Python for data processing, data manipulation, or automation Understanding of data modeling concepts, including fact and dimension tables Experience with Git or similar version control tools Preferred: Experience in a management consulting or client-facing analytics environment Experience with dbt or similar transformation tools Understanding of statistics and data visualization best practices Knowledge of dimensional modeling concepts

title: USI-EH27-Tax-CBC-USBT-L45 - Senior-Hyderabad
description: Do you want to build a career serving U.S.-based clients while growing your experience in U.S. taxation? As part of Deloitte Tax in India, this role supports tax compliance and advisory work for financial services clients, with a focus on U.S. partnership, trust, and related tax matters. You will work with experienced professionals across the Caribbean and Bermuda region while contributing to complex client engagements and broader global initiatives. This role offers the opportunity to deepen technical tax knowledge, expand your network across the firm, and support high-quality client service in a dynamic environment.Work you'll doAs a Senior, Tax Services on the US Business Tax team, you will be responsible for… Reviewing tax workpapers, allocations, and U.S. federal, state, and local partnership and trust tax returns and computations for financial services clients. Supporting U.S. tax compliance engagements by preparing materials and research for compliance and consulting projects, including tax planning work. Requesting, gathering, and organizing tax information from clients and third parties. Communicating with clients regarding tax return positions, filing requirements, and payment instructions. Training, mentoring, and supervising junior team members. The teamDeloitte India (Offices of the Caribbean and Bermuda Countries [CBC]) US Tax Compliance Group based in Hyderabad specializes in three core areas: US partnership federal, state, and local tax return preparation, electronic filing of the returns and research and writing tax technical memorandums on a range of topics related to US partnership taxation in an international context. On taking up a position with the US team, you will have the opportunity to focus on at least two of these core specialties.The Caribbean and Bermuda Countries member firm tax professionals who work in the US business tax practice are based in Bermuda, the Cayman Islands, and the Virgin Islands. This team of 30+ permanent professionals ranges in grades from Partner to new tax consultant who are trained as US Certified Public Accountants, IRS Enrolled Agents, bar-admitted lawyers and/or master’s degree graduates, and serves a client base consisting of a range of financial services industry clients, including hedge funds, private equity funds, fund-of-funds, and insurance companies.Location: HyderabadQualifications Required: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or other business-related field 4+ years of experience in US partnership tax compliance, including knowledge of, and experience using, US income tax software and standard US tax research tools Enrolled Agent (EA) certification (or in the process of pursuing) Strong accounting knowledge and interest in US tax, including extensive US partnership experience related to hedge funds. Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills, including strong written and verbal communication Experience with managing projects, including scheduling, budgeting, client correspondence, billing, team development, and mentoring High level of attention to detail, organizational skills, and analytical problem-solving abilities Can work under pressure and meet tight deadlines Knowledge of Microsoft Office products — in particular, Excel, Word, and Sharepoint Preferred: Experience reviewing U.S. partnership or trust tax returns Experience supporting multinational tax compliance engagements Experience preparing tax technical memoranda

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-EMEA-Germany Payroll-L35 - Tax Consultant II-Hyderabad
description: Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (Deloitte Tax in India) offers professionals the opportunity to support U.S. and other international taxation practices, including Germany, while working in a dynamic and evolving global environment. As a Tax Consultant II, you will support German payroll, employee tax, and benefits processes, with a focus on accurate payroll delivery, compliance, and client service. This role is well suited for professionals with end-to-end German payroll experience who want to build deeper expertise in payroll operations and stakeholder support. Work you'll do As a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Services team, you will be responsible for supporting end-to-end German payroll activities and related stakeholder coordination. Handle end-to-end German payroll processing for multiple clients, including payroll data, overtime, bonuses, and deductions. Stay updated on German payroll legislation and support compliance with applicable payroll requirements. Interact with clients to gather payroll-related information, address queries, and provide live support through chat, phone, and email. Maintain employee records and payroll data, perform audits, and investigate payroll discrepancies and issues. Generate payroll reports, analyze payroll data for trends and discrepancies, and collaborate with internal teams to resolve payroll-related challenges. The team Deloitte's Global Employer Services (GES) practice based in London provides practical and creative solutions to clients. The GES practice is made up of several specialist groups, including Payroll Service delivery (PSD) team. This entails collating Payroll data from various predefined sources, preparing payroll instructions and providing these to the client’s payroll provide. On completion of the payroll processing, Deloitte will complete reconciliation checks and then produce management information reports to the clients. PSD services are delivered to agreed timetables under client Service Level Agreements (SLAs). The payroll team also supports new client implementations and the set-up of the payroll technology platform to facilitate the delivery of BAU services. Location: Hyderabad Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Commerce, Business Administration, or Business Management; or master’s degree in Human Resources, International Business, Finance, Accounting, or Economics with German language capability 3-4 years of experience in end-to-end German payroll Experience identifying and implementing process improvement and best practices Experience supporting payroll queries, client support activities, and resource allocation across client accounts Experience performing and reviewing client work deliverables for German payroll processes Experience identifying day-to-day issues and escalating issues when required Experience training team members on process and technical matters Preferred: Experience with country-specific payroll legislation Experience using Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Visio Experience working in a technology-focused payroll environment Experience generating payroll reports and analyzing payroll data German language capability VBA knowledge
