title: USI-EH27-ES-MF-UK-Leadership Support Services- Assistant Manager
description: Services Assistant Manager, Administrative AssistantDo you enjoy team management? Does service delivery along with people management seem like a role you are cut out for? Then this may be the perfect opportunity for you! The Assistant Manager will work with the USI Service Delivery Owner to provide local management support to the team.  The Assistant Manager will lead the USI EA team to deliver agreed administrative and transactional services to the MF Firm and will assume responsibility for the quality and service delivery produced by the USI EA team.  The USI EA Assistant Manager will be accountable for the service delivery of several key processes, requiring a high degree of engagement with the USI EA team members; effective team management, people management skills and the ability to build strong relationships with the stakeholders. Join our team of dedicated enabling area professionals in Deloitte US’ organization in India (USI) who support global teams. The Central Business Services (CBS) organisation in the member firm receive support from the Extended Delivery Centre (EDC) in USI.We are looking to recruit outstanding individuals to become a pivotal part of our Leadership Support Team within Business Support Services in our Hyderabad office. The role will be of interest to those who have a positive attitude, willingness to learn and good organisational skills. Ingenuity, resilience, and integrity, with an ability to use your own initiative to resolve problems quickly will be key to success in this role. This Assistant Manager role will be responsible for the day-to-day deployment of a team of Executive Assistants within the LSC, Business Support, including supporting the implementation of a support strategy, recruitment, performance coaching, building community, learning & development.Ideal candidates will be looking to start a career in Business Support Services or Executive Assistants that are looking for a new challenge. You will have access to a comprehensive support and training package designed to equip you with the skills and competence that will be invaluable to you if you wish to explore a career as either an Executive Assistant or other roles within Deloitte.Work you’ll do As an Assistant Manager, you will be responsible for: Ensuring that all the deliverables are dealt in line with the terms and SLAs as agreed with the member firm stakeholders Day-to-day deployment of the team, including supporting the performance management responsibility Proactively managing business demand, reviewing resource allocations accordingly and ensuring smooth service transition of additional work Acting as first point of escalation to resolve difficult issues or where senior intervention is required Conflict resolution and ability to influence & negotiate with senior stakeholders Building strong relationships with key client EAs alongside clients, Partners, Directors and staff Ad hoc projects/tasks for Senior Directors Enhancing and championing national working policies and practices Understanding business needs to effectively deploy resources Coaching and mentoring the team members to create a high performing team to serve the business effectively and efficiently Working with the onshore Senior Manager to operate seamlessly as one leadership support team Evaluating, developing and implementing productivity metrics for the business clearly outlining the individual and team utilisation Provide workflow and utilisation support to the management team on a timely basis Proactively discuss with the stakeholders of the highs and lows of the productivity cycle and provide suggestions to effectively manage the same Quality of the deliverables. Work very closely with the stakeholders to deliver high quality deliverable and working with the member firm Management team and the USI EDC Service Delivery Owner to resolve service issues, whilst identifying long term solutions to prevent reoccurrence Demonstrates a strong knowledge of the services offered, supported and the functional capabilities Making decisions for the efficient delivery of daily operations. Reporting and management of potential key issues for our client, identification of risks and making relevant recommendations to address them Managing attrition and planning for contingencies Client Management: Work with the Member firm team to understand and align local strategy & overall Deloitte strategy Advise the Stakeholders about USI policies and procedures Be responsible for building relationships with stakeholders in USI and Member firm Service Delivery: Responsible for ensuring that the required service levels are monitored and achieved by the USI team Ensure work is appropriately allocated and completed in an accurate and timely manner Responsible for gaining a thorough understanding of the customer requirements and all operational service delivery processes relating to the team’s services Work with the relevant areas to implement agreed improvements to prevent recurrence of issues Identify process issues/opportunities for improvement and consult with the USI Service Delivery Manager to gain agreement from the stakeholders to implement solutions utilising CSI methodology and create a team culture of continuous service improvement Team Management: Will be responsible for the day-to-day activities and the workflow management of the USI team Will be responsible to ensure that the relevant local and member firm compliance trainings are completed within agreed timelines, when/where applicable Provide guidance and support to team members to work in a cohesive manner Guide and ensure that the team members enter their time accurately in DTE and other trackers as applicable Process requests for leave/flexibility in conjunction with the USI management team to minimise service delivery impact Comply with the USI Rewards and Recognition policy, processes, procedures, support in timely recognition of team members and coordinate with the line manager Actively manage and support the USI team on a day-to-day basis including providing one to one coaching, identify training and development opportunities, management of timekeeping, leaves, organisation of shift patterns, resource planning whilst ensuring service level agreements and targets are always met Effectively manage and resolve conflict and cultivate a culture built upon respect and inclusion Communication: Demonstrate and create a culture of open, proactive, transparent communication between the USI teams/management and the stakeholders Take an active role in resolving escalations received in relation to processes owned by the USI team by reviewing action taken and offering up recommendations for improvement to the USI Service Delivery Manager for discussion with the Member firm Delivery Manager Proactively identify & raise potential issues to the USI Service Delivery Owner for discussion with the member firm Service Delivery Manager and lead team to take the necessary agreed cascaded actions Co-ordinate and chair team briefings and teambuilding activities Other Responsibilities: Assist the USI service Delivery Manager with recruitment. Work with the recruitment team for logistics related to conducting interviews. Coordinating for logistics i.e., seating, IT, accesses etc. Take responsibility for keeping up to date with relevant policy, legislative and process developments; ensuring that knowledge and experience is shared with the team to increase their knowledge, skill and competence within the role The key skills required:·       Experience in the allocation, deployment and management of Executive Assistants Strong team management, people management and performance management skills are essential within an Executive Assistant domain 6 to 8 years of relevant experience, with minimum of 2 years in people management Strong relationship building skills Strong communication skills and the ability to interact with professionals at various levels Experience of handling large number of direct reports from different work streams and coordinating with various teams to deliver exceptional results Manage conflicting priorities and support a culture of change and continuous improvement Proven success as a high-performing team leader with ability to manage multiple activities simultaneously Strong mentoring and coaching skills] Ability to anticipate and understand client issues and needs Previous working experience in Executive Assistants domain is desirable Experience of working in highly effective service delivery model Conflict resolution Strong matrix/data management with good analytical skills ·       Demonstrable organisational skills, managing multiple team members and stakeholders. QualificationsRequired: Any Graduate with 6-9 years of experience in Admin assistant roles ·       Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams). Strong written and verbal communication skills; ability to draft own correspondence Work Location: HyderabadWork Timings: 2 Pm to 11 PM

You will have access to a comprehensive support and training package designed to equip you with the skills and competence that will be invaluable to you if you wish to explore a career as either an Executive Assistant or other roles within Deloitte.Work you’ll do As an Assistant Manager, you will be responsible for: Ensuring that all the deliverables are dealt in line with the terms and SLAs as agreed with the member firm stakeholders Day-to-day deployment of the team, including supporting the performance management responsibility Proactively managing business demand, reviewing resource allocations accordingly and ensuring smooth service transition of additional work Acting as first point of escalation to resolve difficult issues or where senior intervention is required Conflict resolution and ability to influence & negotiate with senior stakeholders Building strong relationships with key client EAs alongside clients, Partners, Directors and staff Ad hoc projects/tasks for Senior Directors Enhancing and championing national working policies and practices Understanding business needs to effectively deploy resources Coaching and mentoring the team members to create a high performing team to serve the business effectively and efficiently Working with the onshore Senior Manager to operate seamlessly as one leadership support team Evaluating, developing and implementing productivity metrics for the business clearly outlining the individual and team utilisation Provide workflow and utilisation support to the management team on a timely basis Proactively discuss with the stakeholders of the highs and lows of the productivity cycle and provide suggestions to effectively manage the same Quality of the deliverables. Work very closely with the stakeholders to deliver high quality deliverable and working with the member firm Management team and the USI EDC Service Delivery Owner to resolve service issues, whilst identifying long term solutions to prevent reoccurrence Demonstrates a strong knowledge of the services offered, supported and the functional capabilities Making decisions for the efficient delivery of daily operations. Reporting and management of potential key issues for our client, identification of risks and making relevant recommendations to address them Managing attrition and planning for contingencies Client Management: Work with the Member firm team to understand and align local strategy & overall Deloitte strategy Advise the Stakeholders about USI policies and procedures Be responsible for building relationships with stakeholders in USI and Member firm Service Delivery: Responsible for ensuring that the required service levels are monitored and achieved by the USI team Ensure work is appropriately allocated and completed in an accurate and timely manner Responsible for gaining a thorough understanding of the customer requirements and all operational service delivery processes relating to the team’s services Work with the relevant areas to implement agreed improvements to prevent recurrence of issues Identify process issues/opportunities for improvement and consult with the USI Service Delivery Manager to gain agreement from the stakeholders to implement solutions utilising CSI methodology and create a team culture of continuous service improvement Team Management: Will be responsible for the day-to-day activities and the workflow management of the USI team Will be responsible to ensure that the relevant local and member firm compliance trainings are completed within coaching, identify training and development opportunities, management of timekeeping, leaves, organisation of shift patterns, resource planning whilst ensuring service level agreements and targets are title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-EaaS-Managed Services-Senior Manager
description: As a Senior Manager at Deloitte Consulting, you will play the role of for managing large complex managed services engagements that includes the A-Z of delivering support engagements, including but not limited to, quality management, risk mitigation, disruptive innovations, service excellence, project onboarding, day-to-day operations, incident and change management, meeting contractual SLAs, and continuous operational improvement. A process driven mindset focused on client satisfaction and continuous optimization. You will lead and guide multidisciplinary, global teams and serve as a senior mentor to managers and junior staff. You will partner closely with clients and internal stakeholders to align solution strategies with business goals, contribute to sales and proposal development, and ensure rigorous management of end-to-end project delivery, including scoping, estimation, and executive reporting for successful project outcomes. Work you'll do As a Senior Manager/AVP on the Engineering as a Service team, you will be responsible for leading complex managed services engagements and driving delivery outcomes aligned to client and business objectives. Lead end-to-end managed services delivery across onboarding, steady-state operations, incident management, problem management, change management, and continuous improvement. Manage multidisciplinary and multi-vendor teams to deliver against contractual service-level agreements, quality standards, budgets, and timelines. Partner with client and internal stakeholders to define delivery strategy, govern risks and issues, and provide executive-level status reporting. Oversee delivery processes across Agile or Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe), release management, quality engineering, and compliance with software development life cycle controls. Support business development by contributing to proposals, solutioning, estimations, and transition planning for new managed services opportunities. The team Engineering as a Service provides complete design, implementation, and technology operations, leveraging our core engineering expertise. We transform engineering teams, modernize technology, and maintain and sustain client business critical applications. Our flexible delivery models—traditional teams, pools, or pods—are tailored to each client’s needs, offering engineering-led advisory, implementation, and operational capabilities to accelerate innovation. Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad Qualifications Required: 18+ years of software engineering experience, including delivery leadership for large-scale managed services engagements. Experience leading multi-team, multi-vendor managed services engagements with ownership of scope, planning, RAID, budgets, and executive stakeholder management. Experience with ITIL service management processes across incident, problem, change, and service operations. Experience with Java and at least one cloud platform: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google Cloud Platform (GCP), or Microsoft Azure. Experience implementing Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) use cases in support operations, including preventive or predictive maintenance, with governance and measurable outcomes. Experience leading delivery using Agile or Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe), quality engineering, release management, change management, and risk or compliance controls. Bachelor of Engineering (BE), Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), Master of Computer Applications (MCA), Master of Science in Computer Science, Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.), Master of Technology (M.Tech), or equivalent degree from an accredited university. Preferred: ITIL certification. Experience in sector or subsector business use cases applicable to managed services environments. Experience mentoring senior teams and driving technical excellence across large-scale programs. #FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI- FY27-DDTL - DT- GPS(Tax) - Full Stack Developer - AM - Hyderabad
description: Software Engineer III We are seeking a Level 4 Technical Lead – Full Stack Developer with 6–9 years of professional experience in building and delivering enterprise-scale solutions. This role requires strong hands-on expertise in Angular UI development and .NET-based backend systems, along with exposure to Azure and AWS cloud platforms. The individual will play a key role in solution design, technical ownership, and mentoring within Deloitte’s AI & Engineering and Technology & Transformation practices. Work you'll do As a Software Engineer III on the AI & Engineering and Technology & Transformation team, you will be responsible for: Lead end-to-end design and development of scalable, secure, and high-performance full stack applications using Angular and .NET / .NET Core Provide technical leadership and guidance to development teams, ensuring adherence to Deloitte engineering standards, SSDLC, and best practices Architect and implement RESTful APIs, microservices, and backend services with a focus on reliability, security, and maintainability Collaborate with UX designers, product owners, business analysts, QA, and DevOps teams in Agile delivery environments Drive code quality through design reviews, pull request reviews, automated testing, and static code analysis Mentor junior developers and contribute to capability building, knowledge sharing, and continuous improvement initiatives The team The AI & Engineering and Technology & Transformation teams support clients in designing, building, and modernizing technology solutions aligned to business priorities. Professionals on this team work across engineering, architecture, cloud, and delivery disciplines to develop scalable, secure, and maintainable products. The team partners with cross-functional stakeholders to deliver quality outcomes and drive technology innovation. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: 6-9 years of experience in full stack application development using Angular and .NET technologies Experience leading technical components or modules within enterprise application programs Experience developing RESTful APIs, microservices, and backend services using .NET / .NET Core and ASP.NET Core Experience working in Agile or Scrum delivery environments and DevOps-driven delivery models Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a technical field Experience using SQL Server or another relational database management system and Object Relational Mapping frameworks such as Entity Framework Preferred: Experience working with global, cross-functional teams Experience with Microsoft Azure and Amazon Web Services in production environments Experience with Docker and Kubernetes Experience with performance optimization and application security testing, including static application security testing and dynamic application security testing Cloud or technology certifications

title: USI EH27 | Cyber Operate - SAP Security - Senior Consultant
description: Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform finance. Work you'll do As a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate Application Security team, you will be responsible for: Driving continuous improvement through ongoing discussions with clients and internal teams on service delivery and service-level agreement performance Serving as a subject matter specialist in SAP Application Security and SAP Governance, Risk, and Compliance Access Control while managing incidents, service requests, and change tickets through Information Technology Service Management tools Performing root-cause analysis and problem management for recurring incidents and escalating risks, service-level agreement breaches, and recurring issues to leadership Leading support activities including ticket triage, queue management, service quality, and governance reporting on incident and service-level agreement metrics Supporting proposal development and contributing to team management and practice-level training efforts The team Deloitte's Cyber Risk Services help our clients build a secure and resilient digital foundation. As part of the Cyber Operate Application Security team, you will join our Cyber practice and be responsible for delivering SAP security support and assessments. Your responsibilities will include ongoing support of end-user security, internal automated controls, and Segregation of Duties (SoD) analyses on the SAP platform. Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai Shift Timings: 24*7 rotational shifts; night, weekend, holiday, and on-call coverage based on project assignment Qualifications Required: 6 -10 years of experience in SAP Security, SAP Governance, Risk, and Compliance 10.x/12.x Access Control, and SAP S/4HANA in application managed services or support environments Experience in SAP S/4HANA or SAP ECC security assessments, design, and ongoing support Experience with incident, problem, change, and service request management aligned to Information Technology Infrastructure Library practices Experience using ServiceNow, BMC Remedy, or Jira Experience providing recommendations on SAP security role design and ongoing support Experience with segregation of duties remediation and periodic access reviews Bachelor of Technology, Master of Technology, or Master of Science degree Preferred: Experience with SAP Fiori, SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Identity Authentication Service/Identity Provisioning Service, SAP Business Intelligence, Supplier Relationship Management, Customer Relationship Management, Supply Chain Management, Master Data Governance, and Human Resources security support Certified Information Systems Security Professional, Certified Information Security Manager, or Certified Information Systems Auditor certification ITIL v4 Foundation certification Experience in Big Four application managed services or managed services delivery#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering - EPS - GenAI Engineer - Senior Analyst
description: GenAI Engineer – Software Engineer IIRole Overview: As a GenAI Engineer, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands-on approach to multiple high-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive GenAI & engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high-quality, outcome-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.Key Responsibilities:Outcome-Driven Accountability: Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high-quality, lean designs and implementations. Technical Leadership and Advocacy: Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support. Engineering Craftsmanship: Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands-on, self-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks with significant focus on infusing AI/ML/GenAI where possible/appropriate. Create technical specifications, and write high-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.Customer-Centric Engineering: Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.Incremental and Iterative Delivery: Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions. Cross-Functional Collaboration and Integration: Work collaboratively with empowered, cross-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.Advanced Technical Proficiency: Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including AI/ML/GenAI, Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement and learning.Domain Expertise: Quickly acquire domain-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and UX/UI designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.Effective Communication and Influence: Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well-structured arguments and trade-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.Engagement and Collaborative Co-Creation: Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:§  A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Strong software engineering foundation with deep understanding of OOPs, data-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, beautiful coding practices etc.§  3+ years of experience with AI/ML, with last 2 years focused on GenAI as well as technologies like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain, Agents, Vector databases, and approaches like Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning, etc. §  Proven experience in: Python, R, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Julia, ML libraries, NLP, etc.§  Proven experience with big data technologies, Angular, React, NodeJS, Python, C#, .NET Core, Java, Golang, SQL/NoSQL.§  Proven experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  Strong understanding of methodologies & tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.#ProductEngineeringFY26
qualifications: GenAI Engineer – Software Engineer IIRole Overview: As a GenAI Engineer, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands-on approach to multiple high-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive GenAI & engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high-quality, outcome-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.Key Responsibilities:Outcome-Driven Accountability: Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high-quality, lean designs and implementations. Technical Leadership and Advocacy: Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support. Engineering Craftsmanship: Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands-on, self-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks with significant focus on infusing AI/ML/GenAI where possible/appropriate. Create technical specifications, and write high-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.Customer-Centric Engineering: Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.Incremental and Iterative Delivery: Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions. Cross-Functional Collaboration and Integration: Work collaboratively with empowered, cross-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.Advanced Technical Proficiency: Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including AI/ML/GenAI, Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement and learning.Domain Expertise: Quickly acquire domain-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and UX/UI designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.Effective Communication and Influence: Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well-structured arguments and trade-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.Engagement and Collaborative Co-Creation: Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:§  A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Strong software engineering foundation with deep understanding of OOPs, data-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, beautiful coding practices etc.§  3+ years of experience with AI/ML, with last 2 years focused on GenAI as well as technologies like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain, Agents, Vector databases, and approaches like Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning, etc. §  Proven experience in: Python, R, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Julia, ML libraries, NLP, etc.§  Proven experience with big data technologies, Angular, React, NodeJS, Python, C#, .NET Core, Java, Golang, SQL/NoSQL.§  Proven experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  Strong understanding of methodologies & tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.#ProductEngineeringFY26

title: USI EH | FY27 | Cyber| DT&P | IAM - CyberArk - Consultant - L35
description: Join Deloitte’s Cyber & Strategic Risk practice and help organizations strengthen privileged access management in complex, evolving technology environments. As part of our Risk & Financial Advisory business, you will work with global clients to design and implement CyberArk solutions that protect critical assets, support business objectives, and improve enterprise resilience. This role offers exposure to large-scale transformation programs, cross-functional delivery teams, and leading identity and access management technologies.Work you'll doAs a Consultant - CyberArk on the Cyber & Strategic Risk team, you will be responsible for: Architect, design, and implement CyberArk and privileged access management solutions for enterprise environments Gather requirements, lead design workshops, and develop solution documentation across onsite and offshore delivery models Configure, customize, and integrate CyberArk solutions with applications, ticketing platforms, and adjacent security technologies Troubleshoot platform and integration issues, perform root-cause analysis, and coordinate resolution with technology vendors Support strategy, delivery, and practice growth through solution road maps, reusable assets, proposals, and eminence activities The teamCyber & Strategic RiskThe cyber risk services—IAM practice helps organizations in designing, developing, and implementing industry-leading IAM solutions to protect their information and confidential data, as well as help them build their businesses and supporting technologies to be more secure, vigilant, and resilient. The cyber risk services—IAM team delivers service to clients through following key areas of IAM:Application OnboardingLifecycle ManagerCompliance ManagerPassword ManagementAutomated ProvisioningRoles ManagementITSM tools IntegrationAdvanced Authentication MethodsStrategy and Road MapLocation: HYD/BLR/CHN/PunShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, technology, science, or business administration 3-6 years of experience in identity and access management or privileged access management 3+ years of experience implementing CyberArk solutions Experience delivering at least 2 privileged access management implementations across requirements gathering, design, development, testing, deployment, and application support Experience integrating CyberArk with ticketing platforms and security information and event management tools Experience developing Privileged Session Manager AutoIt scripts and Central Policy Manager connectors Experience with CyberArk Disaster Recovery, DNA, Privileged Session Manager Proxy, Application Identity Manager, Endpoint Privilege Manager, and Viewfinity Preferred: CyberArk or other identity and access management technology certifications Project Management Professional or Certified Information Systems Security Professional certification Experience supporting work across additional security domains beyond identity and access management and privileged access management#Cyber_Digital Trust & Privacy

title: USI-EH27-ES-MF Canada-L25 - Services Associate - Mid Markets account management- Hyderabad
description: Support portfolio account activities that help strengthen account management, reporting, and business development efforts across assigned account clusters. In this role, you will help drive operational efficiency, develop account insights, and support strategic activities that help position Deloitte with key stakeholders. You will work across reporting, research, pipeline management, and workshop support in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.Work you'll doAs a Services Associate, Business Development and Account Enablement on the Portfolio Accounts team, you will be responsible for…Prepare meeting agendas and supporting materials in coordination with Program Leads, including financial data, pipeline updates, recent wins, and relationship prioritiesProduce monthly portfolio and account performance reports and maintain reporting accuracy and timelinessAnalyze portfolio account data, client interviews, and survey inputs to develop program-level insights for business stakeholdersManage assigned projects, including stakeholder communications, pipeline tracking, prioritization, and delivery coordinationConduct company, sector, and industry research and support account planning workshops through pre-read development, workshop logistics, and note captureLocation: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired:1-3 years of experience in account management, business development support, sales support, or portfolio reportingExperience preparing reports, dashboards, or presentation materials using Microsoft Excel and Microsoft PowerPointExperience analyzing data to identify trends, correlations, and patternsExperience supporting stakeholder communications, pipeline management, and project coordinationExperience conducting secondary research on companies, sectors, and industriesExperience using AI tools or AI-enabled processes to support analysis or work executionPreferred:Experience supporting account planning workshops or business review meetingsExperience producing monthly portfolio or account performance reportingExperience working with offshore teams across multiple time zonesExperience developing pre-read materials, meeting notes, or marketing collateral

title: USI FY27 | Cyber | Digital Trust & Privacy | Data Encryption-Hashicorp - L45
description: Deloitte Cyber helps organizations navigate the evolving threat landscape with greater confidence and resilience. As an Encryption Security Engineer, you will help clients strengthen secrets management, enterprise encryption, and public key infrastructure (PKI) capabilities across complex environments. This role combines technical delivery, solution architecture, and client advisory support, with a strong emphasis on HashiCorp Vault.Work you'll doAs an Encryption Security Engineer on the Data and Digital Trust team, you will be responsible for… Architecting, implementing, and enhancing HashiCorp Vault, encryption, and PKI solutions for client environments Supporting configuration, upgrades, administration, and integration of Vault and other encryption platforms and security tools Advising clients on secrets management, data protection requirements, security architecture, and encryption strategy Managing technical escalations and supporting delivery against project and operational objectives Leading client discussions, workshops, and project status reviews to drive execution and alignment The teamData and Digital Trust practice is primarily focused on helping our clients to do effective utilization of data while safeguarding privacy and security. D&DT solutions prioritize transparency, privacy, and the ethical use of data, assisting organizations in driving sustainable digital transformation. Our solutions assist organizations in meeting the shifting expectations of consumers and create unprecedented business opportunities. We help our clients to define their overall Data protection and Privacy strategy, design global, pan-enterprise programs that focus on mitigating threats, evaluate their objectives, priorities, strengths and weaknesses and roll out large scale organizational changes to achieve goals. Our services capture work across advice, implement, and operate solutions. The Data and Digital Trust team delivers services to clients through following key areas:Privacy Governance & ComplianceData Protection & ComplianceDigital Trust & Online ProtectionRisk & Controls EnablementTechnology & ImplementationOur Data and Digital Trust solutions are designed to allow organizations to address requirements stemming from the ever-changing regulatory landscape, consumer expectations, and technological transformations and advancements.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM, 2 PM to 11 PM, 5 PM to 2 AM ISTQualificationsRequired: 7-9 years of experience in encryption, secrets management, or PKI architecture and implementation Experience implementing and supporting HashiCorp Vault for secrets management, encryption, key management, or PKI use cases 7+ years of experience implementing and securing encryption solutions Experience with tools such as HashiCorp Vault, DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager, Vormetric, Venafi, Keyfactor, AppViewX, Azure Key Vault, SandboxAQ, or hardware security modules Experience configuring, upgrading, and supporting encryption and PKI technologies in client environments Experience with Unix or Linux environments Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university Preferred: Certified Information Systems Security Professional, advanced cryptography certification, or public key infrastructure certification Experience with automation or scripting

title: USI27-EH-DTTL-R&BP-Specialist Assistant Manager - Data Protection Assessor
description: Specialist Assistant Manager - Data Protection Assessor - Deloitte Support Services India Private Limited • Do you have experience in stakeholder management? • Do you have experience in privacy, risk, confidentiality, or data protection? • Do you have experience in privacy by design techniques and principles? • Do you have experience in data risk assessments? • Do you have attention to detail and an ability to ask questions to find out more? Work you’ll do: In this unique and interesting role, you will provide specialized support and guidance for Deloitte Global’s Office of Confidentiality and Privacy by: • Assessing and advising on data risk elements of Deloitte Global business processes, services, and technologies • Assisting business and technology teams with incorporating data/privacy by design techniques and principles into business processes and technologies • Acting as a trusted advisor with business and technology teams, as well as member firm stakeholders, to provide data risk consult and guidance • Manage ongoing privacy compliance and consultative activities with an eye towards creating process efficiencies wherever possible • Documenting assessments (e.g., Data Protection Impact Assessments, Legitimate Interest Assessments, Record of Processing Activities) used by stakeholders to understand and inform data risk management strategies • Assisting service teams to identify appropriate risk treatment options and providing meticulous record keeping of risks in the Risk Management Log that were flagged throughout the privacy by design assessment lifecycle • Assisting with tracking and management of issue and question resolution and transferring risk documentation to the Technology Risk Management team at the end of a privacy by design assessment • Working with a supporting team with experience in the fields of risk, privacy, confidentiality, and technology • Managing a portfolio of assessments or consultations with competing demands and project deadlines • Helping to prepare guidance documents on privacy matters regarding processes and technology You will be expected to collaborate with Deloitte firms, business leaders, and various stakeholders to conduct data risk assessments and provide guidance for business processes, services and technologies across Deloitte Global. You will bring strategic, operational, and relationship management skills, as well as subject matter expertise of privacy by design and data risk principles. What you’ll be part of—our Deloitte Global culture: At Deloitte, we expect results. Incredible—tangible—results. And Deloitte Global professionals play a unique role in delivering those results. We reach across disciplines and borders to serve our global organization. We are the engine of Deloitte. We develop and lead global strategies and provide programs and services that unite our network. In Deloitte Global, everyone has an opportunity to lead. We see the importance of your perspective and your ability to create value. We want you to fit in—with an inclusive culture, focus on work-life fit and well-being, and a supportive, connected environment; but we also want you to stand out—with opportunities to have a strategic impact, innovate, and take the risks necessary to make your mark. Deloitte Global supports our talented professionals in answering the question: What impact will you make? Who you’ll work with: Global Risk and Brand Protection develops programs, processes, and resources to preserve, protect, and enhance the Deloitte brand around the world. We identify new and emerging risks that might impact the network, mitigate threats as they are identified, proactively engage with regulators and key stakeholders to develop identification and mitigation regulations and procedures, and build a clear voice around select policy topics. How you'll grow: Deloitte Global inspires our people at every level. We believe in investing in you, helping you at every step of your career, and helping you identify and hone your unique strengths. We encourage you to grow by providing formal and informal development programs, coaching, and mentoring. We want you to ask questions, take chances, and explore the possible. Benefits you'll receive: Deloitte’s Total Rewards program reflects our continued commitment to lead from the front in everything we do — that’s why we take pride in offering a comprehensive variety of programs and resources to support your health and well-being needs. We provide the benefits, competitive compensation, and recognition to help sustain your efforts in making an impact that matters. Corporate Citizenship: Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Qualifications To be considered for this role, there are certain skills you should ideally have. • At least five (5) years of related experience with relevant or transferable knowledge • Experience documenting related privacy assessments (e.g., Data Protection Impact Assessments, Legitimate Interest Assessments, Record of Processing Activities) • Ability to build credibility and trust across all stakeholder groups • Excellent English written/verbal communication skills • An ability to question, analyze and interpret information of a business or technical nature • High-level understanding of technology and security issues impacting privacy programs • Successful prioritization and navigation of sometimes challenging deadlines • Excellent program management skills: proven ability to help drive issues to resolution, strong independent judgement, and ability to evaluate risk • Detailed understanding of data privacy regulations • Can demonstrate a curiosity of technology and latest technology trends (e.g., Artificial Intelligence) • Demonstrable command of the MS Office Suite • Excellent organizational and time management skills • Good people management skills, can build relationships, networks and influence others • Attention to details in terms of record keeping, follow up and tracking progress of issues and queries • Analytical and problem-solving skills • Like working in an international environment working with global stakeholders • Keen to continue learning through self-study and knowledge sharing Education and experience: • Bachelor’s degree • Privacy experience required. Compliance, Risk, Client Confidentiality, Audit, Legal and/or Technology is also helpful, but not a prerequisite • Experience and strong understanding of privacy by design concepts, tools, and methodologies • Knowledge of GDPR and similar constructs of privacy and data protection • Experience in conducting assessments (e.g., PIAs, DPIAs) on data assets and business processes • Privacy certification desirable (e.g., CIPP/E, CIPT, CIPM) • Experience working with risk frameworks and risk evaluation is desirable • Knowledge of DevOps, SAFe Agile, Project Management desirable

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering Leadership - Product Architect - Manager
description: Manager - Product ArchitectRole Overview: As a Product Architect, you will actively engage in your software architecture craft, taking a hands-on approach to multiple high-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive engineering craftsmanship and advanced proficiency across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your exemplary track record in delivering high-quality, outcome-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a role model and engineering mentor, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.Key Responsibilities:Outcome-Driven Accountability: Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high-quality, lean designs and implementations.Technical Leadership and Advocacy: Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring architectural integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals, NFRs, and applicable architecture and engineering standards—being responsible for product architecture blueprints, high-level architecture designs (e.g., “4+1 model” or relevant others), and integration architecture into the technical landscape and technology stack.Engineering Craftsmanship: Possess passion and experience as an individual contributor, responsible for the engineering designs and technical feasibility of solutions, being hands-on with design, configuration and code part of the time, contributing to team velocity. Actively get engaged with engineers to ensure architecture is understood and can be implemented, working with them closely during sprints, helping resolve any technical issues through to production operations: reviewing code, actively driving technology debt reduction, and helping drive engineering quality. Be self-driven to learn new technologies, experiment with engineers, and inspire the team to learn and drive application of those new technologies.Customer-Centric Engineering: Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams to deliver the right architectural solution for the product in the right way at the right time.Incremental and Iterative Delivery: Exhibit a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a leaning-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions.Cross-Functional Collaboration and Integration: Work collaboratively with empowered, cross-functional teams including product management, experience, delivery, infrastructure, and security. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.Advanced Technical Proficiency: Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including OOD/OOP, Agile methodologies, DevSecOps, Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment, deployment techniques like Blue-Green, Canary to minimize down-time and enable A/B testing approaches. Act as a Role-Model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery, ensuring high-quality outcomes with minimal waste. Demonstrate proficiency in product development, from conceptualization and design to implementation and scaling, with a focus on continuous improvement and learning.Domain Expertise: Quickly acquire domain-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs and UX/UI designs into technical requirements and designs. Navigate various enterprise functions such as business and enabling areas as well as product, experience, delivery, infrastructure, and security to drive product value and feasibility as well as alignment with organizational goals.Effective Communication and Influence: Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence stakeholders at all levels through well-structured arguments and trade-offs supported by evidence, evaluations, and research. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.Engagement and Collaborative Co-Creation: Engage and collaborate with stakeholders at all organizational levels, from team members to senior executives. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:§  A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Excellent software engineering and product architecture/design foundation with deep understanding of Business Context Diagrams (BCD), sequence/activity/state/ER/DFD diagrams, OOP/OOD, data-structures, algorithms, code instrumentations, etc.§  10+ years proven experience with programming languages like Angular, React, NodeJS, Python, Streamlit, C#, .NET Core, Golang, SQL/NoSQL, unit testing frameworks with 5 years’ experience in architecting enterprise solutions.§  5+ years of hands-on experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  3+ years of experience with AI/ML and GenAI is preferred.§  Deep understanding of methodologies & tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc. to deliver high quality products rapidly.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.#CAL-BMT#CA-PS#CAL-PD#pxeengineering

Experience is the most relevant factor.§  Excellent software engineering and product architecture/design foundation with deep understanding of Business Context Diagrams (BCD), sequence/activity/state/ER/DFD diagrams, OOP/OOD, data-structures, algorithms, code instrumentations, etc.§  10+ years proven experience with programming languages like Angular, React, NodeJS, Python, Streamlit, C#, .NET Core, Golang, SQL/NoSQL, unit testing frameworks with 5 years’ experience in architecting enterprise solutions.§  5+ years of hands-on experience with cloud-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro-services on cloud hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.§  3+ years of experience with AI/ML and GenAI is preferred.§  Deep understanding of methodologies & tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc. to deliver high quality products rapidly.§  Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.#CAL-BMT#CA-PS#CAL-PD#pxeengineering
hiring_organization: Deloitte | India Offices of the US

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-Belgium-Accounting & Reporting-L55 - Manager-Hyderabad
description: Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) offers professionals the opportunity to support U.S. and other international tax practices while building experience in a complex global reporting environment. In this role, you will work closely with Belgium-based teams across accounting, reporting, and financial administration activities. You will contribute to annual financial statement support, reporting processes, and data analysis in a fast-changing landscape shaped by tax legislation, financial processes, and digitalization. Deloitte Tax combines technology and tax technical resources to help clients meet reporting requirements, uncover insights, and navigate complexity. Work you'll do As a Manager, Tax Services on the Belgium Accounting & Reporting team, you will support our Belgian teams through the fast-changing landscape of tax legislation, financial processes, and digitalization. You’ll be responsible for your portfolio of engagements. You will take care of their financial administration, processing invoices, etc., and assist on any queries relating to their questions about preparing their annual financial statements. Through your work with our diverse Belgian teams, you’ll get an opportunity to build your confidence and understanding of the critical importance of reporting. You will gain practical hands-on experience in aspects of financial statements and tax reporting and provide insights through reporting. Building your experience and confidence in the tools and techniques as tax accounting & reporting specialist. You will perform in-depth analysis of journals, trial balance, reconciliation & other financial data. Eventually, you’ll grow in a more senior role taking on other tasks such as review work. The team Our multidisciplinary team, based in Belgium, supports companies in their day-to-day business and empowers them to tackle challenging issues. Join our team and you will learn about financial processes and how to apply them in practice, develop your task management and tax technical skills. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Understand that business insights gained from financial reporting drive better decision making. Analytical ability to analyze and possess problem-solving aptitude to provide insights. Ability to work both independently and as part of team with professionals at all levels. Hold a master’s or bachelor’s degree in economics, accountancy, or another financial orientation. Fluency in English language. French and Dutch language skills (optional - but definitely will help) Attention to detail & critical mindset for self-review of work.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-AI&E-EaaS-Gen AI Architect- Senior Manager
description: As a Senior Manager/Specialist leader at Deloitte Consulting, you will play the role of strategic architect who creates and(or) reviews enterprise grade architectures and also provides best practices for technical delivery for complex, enterprise-solutions. You will lead and guide multidisciplinary, global teams and serve as a senior mentor to managers and junior staff. You will partner closely with clients and internal stakeholders to align solution strategies with business goals, contribute to sales and proposal development, and ensure rigorous management of end-to-end project delivery, including scoping, estimation, and executive reporting for successful project outcomes. Work you'll do As an Associate Vice President, Architecture on the AI & Engineering team, you will be responsible for shaping enterprise artificial intelligence and generative artificial intelligence solution strategies, leading complex architecture decisions, and guiding technical delivery across large-scale transformation programs. Define and review enterprise architecture solutions for artificial intelligence and generative artificial intelligence platforms, ensuring alignment with business objectives, delivery standards, and enterprise technology strategies Lead multidisciplinary teams across architecture, engineering, data, and delivery functions to design, implement, and operationalize scalable artificial intelligence solutions for complex business processes Establish and apply architecture patterns for retrieval-augmented generation, agentic orchestration, tool calling, model integration, observability, and platform governance Guide end-to-end delivery activities including scope definition, effort estimation, risk management, executive reporting, and technical quality oversight across programs Contribute to business development by supporting proposals, shaping solution approaches, and presenting architecture recommendations to internal and client stakeholders The team Engineering as a Service provides complete design, implementation, and technology operations, leveraging our core engineering expertise. We transform engineering teams, modernize technology, and deliver complex programs with a product engineering approach. Our flexible delivery models—traditional teams, pools, or pods—are tailored to each client’s needs, offering engineering-led advisory, implementation, and operational capabilities to accelerate innovation. Location: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Kolkata Shift Timings: As per business needs Qualifications Required: 18+ years of experience in software engineering or architecture, including recent experience with artificial intelligence and generative artificial intelligence platforms in enterprise environments Experience designing and implementing multi-agent or workflow-based artificial intelligence solutions in production environments for business processes Experience defining architecture patterns for retrieval-augmented generation, agentic orchestration, function or tool calling, prompt and response schemas, guardrails, evaluation, and observability Experience designing end-to-end platforms spanning data ingestion, vector databases, model gateways, orchestration layers, application programming interfaces, user interfaces, monitoring, and cost controls Experience integrating artificial intelligence solutions with enterprise platforms such as enterprise resource planning, customer relationship management, information technology service management, or data platforms through application programming interfaces or event-based integration One or more certifications in Amazon Web Services Solutions Architect, Google Professional Cloud Architect, or Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert, plus one architecture certification such as TOGAF or SABSA Ability to travel 30-40%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve. Preferred: Experience with identity and access management, privacy controls, model risk controls, prompt injection defenses, and human-in-the-loop escalation in artificial intelligence solution design Experience with machine learning operations or large language model operations including continuous integration and continuous delivery, version governance, observability, reliability design, and cost optimization Experience developing reusable accelerators, reference architectures, or scalable artificial intelligence delivery assets Contributions to thought leadership through patents, publications, speaking engagements, or technical blogs Experience mentoring senior technical teams across large-scale engineering or transformation programs Experience applying enterprise architecture frameworks and artificial intelligence governance practices #FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-AI&E-EaaS-Mainframe Modernization-Senior Manager
description: As a Senior Manager/Specialist leader at Deloitte Consulting, you will play the role of Mainframe Modernization expert who leads technical delivery for complex, enterprise-wide modernization of legacy systems. You will lead and guide multidisciplinary, global teams and serve as a senior mentor to managers and junior staff. You will partner closely with clients and internal stakeholders to align solution strategies with business goals, contribute to sales and proposal development, and ensure rigorous management of end-to-end project delivery, including scoping, estimation, and executive reporting for successful project outcomes. Work you'll do As a Senior Manager/AVP on the Engineering as a Service team, you will be responsible for leading large-scale mainframe modernization programs and guiding engineering teams through complex transformation initiatives. Lead end-to-end delivery of mainframe modernization programs, from assessment and solution design through migration, cutover, and stabilization. Define target-state architecture, integration patterns, resiliency requirements, and modernization roadmaps aligned to business and technology objectives. Provide technical leadership across mainframe and distributed engineering teams working with COBOL, CICS, IMS, Db2, JCL, VSAM, Java, Python, APIs, and cloud platforms. Oversee program governance across scope, estimates, budgets, RAID management, quality, release planning, and executive stakeholder reporting. Support business development efforts by contributing to proposals, solutioning, and client discussions related to mainframe modernization and AI-enabled engineering transformation. The team Engineering as a Service provides complete design, implementation, and technology operations, leveraging our core engineering expertise. We transform engineering teams, modernize technology, and deliver complex programs with a product engineering approach. Our flexible delivery models—traditional teams, pools, or pods—are tailored to each client’s needs, offering engineering-led advisory, implementation, and operational capabilities to accelerate innovation. Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Kolkata Qualifications Required: 18+ years of software engineering experience, including delivery leadership for large-scale enterprise programs. Experience leading mainframe modernization programs using replatform, refactor, replace, or strangler approaches from assessment through cutover and stabilization. Hands-on experience with COBOL and mainframe technologies including CICS, IMS, Db2, JCL, and VSAM. Hands-on experience with Java, Python, microservices, application programming interfaces, continuous integration/continuous deployment, and test automation. Experience leading multi-team, multi-vendor engineering engagements with responsibility for scope, plans, RAID logs, budgets, and executive stakeholder reporting. Experience implementing Generative Artificial Intelligence-assisted software development lifecycle use cases, including code modernization, test generation, documentation, or defect triage, with measurable outcomes and governance. Experience with Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, or Microsoft Azure; experience defining target-state architecture, integration patterns, data and messaging design, resiliency, and non-functional requirements; and at least one certification such as AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Professional Cloud Architect, Azure Solutions Architect Expert, or TOGAF. Preferred: Experience publishing, presenting, or applying research-led approaches in mainframe modernization, Generative Artificial Intelligence, or agentic Artificial Intelligence. Experience supporting technology solutions for a defined industry sector or sub-sector. Experience mentoring senior engineering teams and driving technical delivery across large-scale programs. Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, Master of Technology, Ph.D, or equivalent degree from an accredited university.#FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI | EH27 | Specialist Manager - Growth & Development (DLHP) - [Culture, Experience, Belonging (CEB), Total Rewards, Empowered Wellbeing (EWB)] - Hyderabad
description: The chief purpose of Growth and Development (G&D) is to bring out the best of every person and the best of every team, so that we can deliver the best of our Firm to our clients. The G&D team delivers business-focused, efficient, and innovative learning and development programs and experiences thoughtfully designed to help our professionals best serve at every stage of their career. Through the work of this team, development at Deloitte is not just about education – development is a vital part of Deloitte’s leadership culture.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Manager, Talent Development on the Deloitte Leadership and Human Potential team, you will be responsible for: Driving the DLHP Culture, Experience, Belonging, Total Rewards, and Empowered Wellbeing learning portfolio in alignment with learning and talent development strategy. Managing portfolio operations, including demand analysis, budgeting, faculty strategy, delivery management, communications, reporting, evaluation, content evolution, and vendor coordination. Designing and developing learner-centered solutions that translate research, skill needs, and business priorities into scalable development experiences. Collaborating with DLHP team members, subject matter experts, academic partners, and program teams across geographies to execute curriculum strategy and annual development plans. Using learner feedback, dashboards, and portfolio data to assess performance, support continuous improvement, and drive execution across multiple priorities. The teamDeloitte Leadership and Human Potential (DLHP): DLHP addresses skills development to enable business performance and the growth of our professionals’ human potential. DLHP is in the business of enabling human-oriented leaders to bring their best selves to work, life, and community.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree 12+ years of experience in learning and development, talent development, instructional design, or learning program management Experience designing and delivering learning programs for enterprise or professional services organizations Experience managing multiple concurrent workstreams in a matrixed organization Experience partnering with cross-functional stakeholders, subject matter experts, and program teams across geographies Experience managing budgets, forecasts, reporting, or learning portfolio operations Experience using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Teams for analysis, presentations, written communications, and collaboration Preferred: Experience in a consulting or professional services environment Experience supporting learning programs in culture, employee experience, total rewards, or wellbeing domains

Collaborating with DLHP team members, subject matter experts, academic partners, and program teams across geographies to execute curriculum strategy and annual development plans. Using learner feedback, dashboards, and portfolio data to assess performance, support continuous improvement, and drive execution across multiple priorities. The teamDeloitte Leadership and Human Potential (DLHP): DLHP addresses skills development to enable business performance and the growth of our professionals’ human potential. DLHP is in the business of enabling human-oriented leaders to bring their best selves to work, life, and community.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree 12+ years of experience in learning and development, talent development, instructional design, or learning program management Experience designing and delivering learning programs for enterprise or professional services organizations Experience managing multiple concurrent workstreams in a matrixed organization Experience partnering with cross-functional stakeholders, subject matter experts, and program teams across geographies Experience managing budgets, forecasts, reporting, or learning portfolio operations Experience using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Teams for analysis, presentations, written communications, and collaboration Preferred: Experience in a consulting or professional services environment Experience supporting learning programs in culture, employee experience, total rewards, or wellbeing domains
