title: USI - EH27 - CoRe Knowledge Services - Assistant Manager – KS Practitioner Engagement- Hyderabad/Bengaluru
description: Specialist Assistant Manager, Communications CoRe Knowledge Services part of Deloitte’s global shared services organization serves Deloitte’s member firms worldwide. It enables our professionals to leverage the full breadth of Deloitte’s global capabilities in service to our clients. KS professionals connect people to knowledge, focusing on essential knowledge management activities such as: managing intellectual property, curating project experiences, capturing and connecting expertise, sustaining networks within and across teams, and enabling the leverage of third-party content. Practitioner Engagement team drives awareness of the knowledge platform and services to cultivate knowledge sharing culture within the organization that empowers professionals to make use of Deloitte’s collective experience in serving their clients. We are looking for a passionate, strategic, results-oriented individual who will work towards developing and executing internal marketing and communications campaigns in support of the CoRe KS global practitioner engagement strategy. The role requires strong oral and written communication skills, program and project management skills, and marketing expertise. Work you'll do As a Specialist Assistant Manager, Communications on the Practitioner Engagement team, you will be responsible for: Leading and coaching Analyst(s) and Senior Analyst(s), including performance management, feedback, and quality oversight Managing the lifecycle of internal marketing and communications initiatives in coordination with onshore leadership and stakeholders Developing, writing, and publishing communications across channels such as newsletters, email campaigns, intranet pages, presentations, event materials, and other engagement assets Analyzing campaign, adoption, and feedback data to prepare executive summaries, reports, KPI insights, and recommendations Partnering with Member Firm Knowledge Managers and Strategic Relationship Managers to execute and track programs that embed knowledge offerings into business and geography processes Maintaining playbooks, process documentation, quality assurance methods, and periodic content audits to support consistent delivery The team CoRe Knowledge Services part of Deloitte’s global shared services organization serves Deloitte’s member firms worldwide. It enables our professionals to leverage the full breadth of Deloitte’s global capabilities in service to our clients. KS professionals connect people to knowledge, focusing on essential knowledge management activities such as: managing intellectual property, curating project experiences, capturing and connecting expertise, sustaining networks within and across teams, and enabling the leverage of third-party content. Practitioner Engagement team drives awareness of the knowledge platform and services to cultivate knowledge sharing culture within the organization that empowers professionals to make use of Deloitte’s collective experience in serving their clients. Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Marketing, Business Administration, Journalism, English, or Knowledge Management 6-8 years of experience in communications, marketing, practitioner engagement, or knowledge management Experience developing and executing internal marketing and communications campaigns Experience writing content for multiple formats, including newsletters, email communications, presentations, case studies, and event materials Experience analyzing quantitative and qualitative metrics to assess campaign performance and prepare reports or recommendations Experience managing projects and working with cross-functional stakeholders Experience leading, coaching, or reviewing the work of analysts or senior analysts Preferred: Master’s degree in Communications, Marketing, Business Administration, Journalism, English, or Knowledge Management Certification in project management, change management, communications, analytics, or digital marketing Experience with SharePoint or other knowledge management platforms Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau

title: USI EH | FY27 | Cyber| Digital Trust & Privacy | IAM-Active Directory- Senior Consultant - L45
description: Deloitte’s Cyber Risk professionals help organizations address complex information and technology risks in a rapidly evolving threat landscape. Within Cyber Risk Services, the Identity and Access Management (IAM) practice delivers end-to-end solutions that help clients protect enterprise systems, strengthen access controls, and support secure business operations. As a Senior Consultant, you will work on large-scale IAM and directory services engagements, helping clients design, implement, and enhance solutions that are secure, scalable, and aligned to business needs.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Risk Services—IAM team, you will be responsible for: Lead the architecture, design, and implementation of LDAP directory and IAM solutions using leading platforms and technologies. Lead directory services implementations and migrations, including customization, configuration, replication design, and solution integrations. Conduct requirements workshops, prepare design documentation, and drive delivery across onsite and offshore project teams. Manage client interactions, project deliverables, project risks, and vendor coordination across multiple IAM engagements. Support business development and eminence activities, including proposals, reusable assets, process compliance initiatives, and whitepapers on IAM technologies. The teamThe cyber risk services—IAM practice helps organizations in designing, developing, and implementing industry-leading IAM solutions to protect their information and confidential data, as well as help them build their businesses and supporting technologies to be more secure, vigilant, and resilient. The cyber risk services—IAM team delivers service to clients through following key areas of IAM: LDAP Directory services User provisioning Privilege Identity Management Access certification Access management and federation Entitlements management Role management Strategy and road map for Identity & Access Management Strong authentication Location: HYD/BLR/CHN/PUNShift Timings: General shiftQualificationsRequired: B.Tech, M.Tech, or MS degree 5-10 years of experience in identity and access management Experience designing and implementing enterprise directory services and IAM solutions using platforms such as Active Directory, Oracle, IBM, SailPoint, or CA Experience leading IAM or LDAP/Active Directory engagements across requirements gathering, analysis, design, development, testing, deployment, and support Experience with directory replication topology, directory migrations, or Active Directory consolidation for medium or large enterprises Experience developing or configuring standard or custom IAM integrations using Java, .NET, or scripting languages Experience with IAM solution architecture in identity lifecycle management, access request workflows, single sign-on, federation, adaptive access management, or step-up authentication Preferred: Experience setting up Azure Active Directory for an organization IAM technology certifications Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP) certification Project Management Professional (PMP) certification Experience in security domains beyond identity and access management#Cyber_Digital Trust & Privacy#CA-TD

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI-L45 -Senior - AI Engineer
description: AI Engineer – Senior ConsultantAs you start your career, are you ready to take the next step to learn methods and process to provide business and individual tax return compliance support to Deloitte Tax? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and create an impact that matters? If the answer to the above is “Yes,” then come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support services through the teams in USI Tax teams.Deloitte Tax is leading its clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace, offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to comply with reporting requirements, uncover insights and deploy smarter approaches for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doWe are seeking an experienced AI Engineer – Senior Consultant to join our USI Tax Technology team. In this role, you will design, build, and deploy enterprise-grade AI and LLM-powered solutions that directly support Deloitte Tax professionals and clients. This is an opportunity to work at the intersection of cutting-edge AI technology and large-scale enterprise systems, making a tangible impact on how tax services are delivered globally..As an AI Engineer, you will assist and support Deloitte Tax in the following areas:As an AI Engineer, you will take end-to-end ownership of AI solutions, from conception through production deployment. Your key responsibilities will include:·       Design and develop production-grade LLM-powered applications and Generative AI solutions that address complex business and tax-related challenges.·       Build and integrate AI capabilities — including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, agentic workflows, and prompt engineering frameworks — into enterprise applications and services.·       Help Architect and implement scalable AI integrations across cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP), ensuring reliability, performance, and security.·       Develop, train, evaluate, and optimize machine learning models using structured and unstructured data, applying techniques such as supervised and unsupervised learning, NLP, and fine-tuning of large language models.·       Own MLOps practices including model versioning, CI/CD pipelines, performance monitoring, bias detection, data drift management, and model retraining workflows.·       Collaborate closely with data scientists, software engineers, business analysts, and tax professionals to translate complex requirements into scalable, maintainable AI solutions.·       Lead technical design discussions and contribute to architectural decisions, code reviews, and engineering best practices across the team.·       Produce comprehensive documentation covering AI architectures, data sources, model design, API specifications, and deployment processes.·       Champion responsible AI principles, ensuring adherence to data privacy, security, and regulatory compliance standards throughout the development lifecycle.·       Stay current with the rapidly evolving landscape of AI technologies, LLM frameworks, and industry best practices, bringing relevant innovations to the team.Qualifications and Requirements for assistance and support to Deloitte Tax:Education·       Full-time Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) or equivalent degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or Artificial Intelligence with a minimum of 60% or equivalent CGPA.Experience·       4  - 6+ years of hands-on professional experience in AI/ML engineering, with a strong focus on LLM applications and enterprise AI integration.Technical Skills·       Demonstrated experience building and deploying LLM-based applications, including prompt engineering, RAG architectures, and agentic systems using frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex.·       Proficiency in Python as a primary development language, with strong software engineering practices including modular design, testing, and version control (Git).·       Hands-on experience with cloud platforms — Azure, AWS, and/or GCP — including managed AI/ML services (e.g., Azure OpenAI Service, AWS Bedrock, Vertex AI).·       Solid understanding of machine learning theory and techniques, including NLP, supervised and unsupervised learning, and model evaluation methodologies.·       Strong command of database technologies, including relational databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB).·       Experience with MLOps tooling and practices, including experiment tracking (MLflow, Weights & Biases), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines.·       Familiarity with REST API design and development for integrating AI models into enterprise applications and workflows.·       Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver results in a fast-paced environment.·       Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly present technical concepts and findings to non-technical stakeholders.·       Demonstrated ability to work independently and collaboratively within cross-functional teams at all levels.·       Proactive in seeking clarification, raising risks early, and continuously improving processes and solutions.Work Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Kolkata/Gurgaon/MumbaiShift Timings:ü Depending on Project Assignment the shift might varyOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.Our people and cultureOur inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Recruiting tipsFrom developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or protected veteran status, or any other legally protected basis, in accordance with applicable law. Deloitte is committed to providing equal opportunity and reasonable accommodation for people with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete an application, interview, or otherwise participate in the recruiting process, contact your recruiter or Talent Relations at USTalentCICInbox@deloitte.com.About DeloitteDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touché Tohmatsu Limited, a U.K. private company limited by guarantee (“DTTL”), its network of member firms, and their related entities. DTTL and each of its member firms are legally separate and independent entities. DTTL (also referred to as “Deloitte Global”) does not provide services to clients. In the United States, Deloitte refers to one or more of the U.S. member firms of DTTL, their related entities that operate using the “Deloitte” name in the United States and their respective affiliates. Certain services may not be available to attest clients under the rules and regulations of public accounting. Please see www.deloitte.com/about to learn more about our global network of member firms.This communication and any attachment to it is for internal distribution among personnel of Deloitte Touché Tohmatsu Limited (“DTTL”), its global network of member firms and their related entities (collectively, the “Deloitte organization”). It may contain confidential information and is intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to whom it is addressed. experience_requirements: AI Engineer – Senior ConsultantAs you start your career, are you ready to take the next step to learn methods and process to provide business and individual tax return compliance support to Deloitte Tax? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and create an impact that matters? If the answer to the above is “Yes,” then come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support services through the teams in USI Tax teams.Deloitte Tax is leading its clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace, offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to comply with reporting requirements, uncover insights and deploy smarter approaches for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doWe are seeking an experienced AI Engineer – Senior Consultant to join our USI Tax Technology team. In this role, you will design, build, and deploy enterprise-grade AI and LLM-powered solutions that directly support Deloitte Tax professionals and clients. This is an opportunity to work at the intersection of cutting-edge AI technology and large-scale enterprise systems, making a tangible impact on how tax services are delivered globally..As an AI Engineer, you will assist and support Deloitte Tax in the following areas:As an AI Engineer, you will take end-to-end ownership of AI solutions, from conception through production deployment. Your key responsibilities will include:·       Design and develop production-grade LLM-powered applications and Generative AI solutions that address complex business and tax-related challenges.·       Build and integrate AI capabilities — including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, agentic workflows, and prompt engineering frameworks — into enterprise applications and services.·       Help Architect and implement scalable AI integrations across cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP), ensuring reliability, performance, and security.·       Develop, train, evaluate, and optimize machine learning models using structured and unstructured data, applying techniques such as supervised and unsupervised learning, NLP, and fine-tuning of large language models.·       Own MLOps practices including model versioning, CI/CD pipelines, performance monitoring, bias detection, data drift management, and model retraining workflows.·       Collaborate closely with data scientists, software engineers, business analysts, and tax professionals to translate complex requirements into scalable, maintainable AI solutions.·       Lead technical design discussions and contribute to architectural decisions, code reviews, and engineering best practices across the team.·       Produce comprehensive documentation covering AI architectures, data sources, model design, API specifications, and deployment processes.·       Champion responsible AI principles, ensuring adherence to data privacy, security, and regulatory compliance standards throughout the development lifecycle.·       Stay current with the rapidly evolving landscape of AI technologies, LLM frameworks, and industry best practices, bringing relevant innovations to the team.Qualifications and Requirements for assistance and support to Deloitte Tax:Education·       Full-time Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) or equivalent degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or Artificial Intelligence with a minimum of 60% or equivalent CGPA.Experience·       4  - 6+ years of hands-on professional experience in AI/ML engineering, with a strong focus on LLM applications and enterprise AI integration.Technical Skills·       Demonstrated experience building and deploying LLM-based applications, including prompt engineering, RAG architectures, and agentic systems using frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex.·       Proficiency in Python as a primary development language, with strong software engineering practices including modular design, testing, and version control (Git).·       Hands-on experience with cloud platforms — Azure, AWS, and/or GCP — including managed AI/ML services (e.g., Azure OpenAI Service, AWS Bedrock, Vertex AI).·       Solid understanding of machine learning theory and techniques, including NLP, supervised and unsupervised learning, and model evaluation methodologies.·       Strong command of database technologies, including relational databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB).·       Experience with MLOps tooling and practices, including experiment tracking (MLflow, Weights & Biases), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines.·       Familiarity with REST API design and development for integrating AI models into enterprise applications and workflows.·       Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver results in a fast-paced environment.·       Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly present technical concepts and findings to non-technical stakeholders.·       Demonstrated ability to work independently and collaboratively within cross-functional teams at all levels.·       Proactive in seeking clarification, raising risks early, and continuously improving processes and solutions.Work Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Kolkata/Gurgaon/MumbaiShift Timings:ü Depending on Project Assignment the shift might varyOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact title: USI-EH27-Tax-LBS - Legal Entity Management (LEM) -L35 - Tax Consultant 2-Hyderabad/Pune
description: Legal Business Associate II,Legal Entity Management, Legal Business ServicesMultinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) assists clients with all aspects of reporting and process for business as usual, as well as triggering and regulatory events. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now! Work you’ll doAs an Associate II in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will provide corporate legal business services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. Services include focusing on corporate document assessments, annual compliance and management of corporate data, leading the review of governance structures, corporate changes, legal entity simplification, as well as central coordination combined with local, on the ground experience with jurisdictions around the world. You will be working with Deloitte Seniors of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will assist in preparing the governance structures, assembly of corporate documents and management of corporate data. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring the high-quality delivery of the work to the leads.  As a part of the services, you will pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution. You should be a self- starter who works well within a team, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include-·       Work with the lead to support in successful delivery of corporate legal business services to Deloitte clients·       Work on reports with Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and metrics·       Compile, analyze and document facts·       Assist the leads with engagement administration: document collection, data entry, tracking, document review and coordinating client logistics·       Organize Board of Directors’ and stockholders’ meetings under the guidance of the seniors·       Participate in supporting counsel in their privilege review and/or perform quality control·       Draft reports and findings, including the preparation of tables, exhibits, and charts under counsel supervision·       Research technical and industry-specific issues·       Draft proposals·       Communicate effectively to all levels of engagement management·       Balance multiple projects and responsibilitiesDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.                       The TeamLegal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that spans many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life event legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex, cross-border issues.QualificationsRequired:  Legal training or Bachelor’s degree in Business, or Cost Accounting or Company Secretarial or other business-related fields·       2-4 years of relevant legal experience or alternative legal service industry experience·       Level of familiarity with legal technology and its application in the legal entity management space or in the contract lifecycle management fieldGood Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Excel, PPT, Visio, Power BI and TableauExperience with legal services RFPsFamiliarity with commercial agreement types, such as NDAs, SOWs, MSAs, distribution agreements and license agreementsAdept at working virtuallyPreferred:·       Aptitude and commitment to continue to learn various IT platforms and additional software skills·       Experience with commercial contract law, i.e. key contract clauses/issues such as indemnification, limitation of liability, warranties, etc. ·       Relevant legal/legal entity management experience, corporate legal secretarial experience, or alternative legal service industry experience·       Good interpersonal skills·       Good communication and collaboration skills·       Good presentation skills·       Attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment·       Good analytical and reporting skills·       At least one of the following accreditations:Contract & Commercial Management (CCM) Certification ProgramCertified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP)Project Management Program (PMP)Enrolled Agent (EA)Lean Six SigmaWork Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact.Our inclusive cultureAt Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our latest accolades.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Recruiting tipsFrom developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: USI - EH27 - Cyber Security-Cyber Design Studio- Sr. Analyst- Hyderabad
description: Help protect our company brand and reputation by assisting with risk management activities that ensure new and updated information technology solutions are secure.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Cyber Engineering on the Cyber Security team, you will evaluate cyber risk, assess security controls, and support compliance with policies and standards across technology solutions. Review assessment questionnaires and interview project teams to validate responses and identify cyber risks. Coordinate risk management activities, including vulnerability scanning, dynamic scanning, and confidentiality and privacy reviews. Prepare assessment reports and supporting evidence for management review and approval. Evaluate technology solutions, architectures, and controls for compliance with company, regulatory, and legal requirements. Guide project and technology teams on secure design, cloud security practices, remediation actions, and governance expectations. The teamThe Cyber Security team works behind the scenes to protect Deloitte practitioners as well as information assets at Deloitte. We take this protective role very seriously, while simultaneously ensuring Deloitte meets client, legal, and regulatory requirements. This team works closely with project/technology teams to assess and remediation risks related to the implementation of information technology solutions. This team is also responsible for guiding project teams through risk evaluation and risk treatment processes. The team uses knowledge of cyber security risk management methodologies to determine other risk management activities that should be performed.Location: HyderabadQualificationsRequired: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Systems, or equivalent education and/or professional experience 3+ years of experience in IT infrastructure, systems engineering, information security, or systems administration Experience reviewing assessment questionnaires and interviewing project teams to validate responses Experience preparing assessment reports and documenting findings for management review Experience evaluating privacy, confidentiality, and security controls against company, regulatory, and legal requirements Preferred: Experience with Microsoft Azure and/or Amazon Web Services security Experience supporting the development of security architecture designs One or more of the following certifications: Certified Information Security Manager, Certified Information Systems Security Professional, Associate of ISC2, Certified Ethical Hacker, or Certified Cloud Security Professional Experience with identity and access management, encryption, multi-factor authentication, and security information and event management Knowledge of cyber security standards and frameworks such as ISO 27001 or National Institute of Standards and Technology frameworks

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-LBS-L55 - Manager- Legal Management Services (LMS)
description: Legal Business Associate Manager, Legal Management Services (LMS)Multinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) assists clients with all aspects of reporting and process for business as usual, as well as triggering and regulatory events. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now!Work you’ll do:As a Senior in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will provide corporate business legal services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. Services include assisting supervising counsel with their business as usual contracting and negotiations; and review, , and remediation services in response to regulatory and corporate triggering events; assisting in calendaring, statutory filings, workflow coordination, information and records management. You will interact mainly with US and global team members, as applicable and will contribute directly to delivering first class service to our clients. You will be working with Deloitte Senior Managers and Managers of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring the high-quality delivery of the work to the leads. As a part of the services, you will pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution. You should be a self- starter who works well within a team, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include:·       Deliver legal business engagements for Deloitte clients – Assisting in drafting and negotiating playbooks-based buy side and sales side commercial contracts such as MSA, NDAs, SoWs, Work Orders, Change Notes·       Transitioning and setting up operate delivery teams·       Identify process and operational efficiencies within corporate business legal services clients’ contracting function·       Institute KPIs and metrics to govern, measure, and track client engagements·       Report against KPIs and metrics·       Review with the preparation of proposals·       Assist in executing engagement administration: document collection, data entry, tracking, records organization, contract review, and coordinating client logistics·       Review and project manage the entire contracting process i.e., coordinating with various stakeholders such as finance, legal, commercial, business, delivery and incorporating their feedback in the contract and assisting in closing the contract·       Review in researching technical and industry-specific issues·       Communicate effectively to all levels of engagement management and clients·       Ability to balance multiple projects and responsibilities·       Lead and deliver the CLM engagements end to end·       Prior experience of leading a team of 3-5 people is a must·       Assist in hiring, training and onboarding new hires on a client engagementDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.The Team:Legal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that spans many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life event legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex, cross-border issues.Qualifications Required:·       Legal training (LL.B/BA.LLB or equivalent)·       Strong substantive understanding the inhouse contracting process with various CLM tools·       8-10 years of relevant legal experience or alternative legal service industry experience·       Level of familiarity with legal technology and its application in the contract lifecycle management field·       Strong Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Word, Excel and PPT.·       Experience in moderate complexity commercial contract drafting and negotiation skills·       Experience with legal services RFPs·       Familiarity with commercial agreement types such as NDAs, SOWs, MSAs, distribution agreements and license agreements·       Adept at working virtuallyPreferred:·       Aptitude and commitment to continue to learn various IT platforms and additional software skills·       Lean Six-Sigma and/or Project Management Professional certification·       Excellent interpersonal and people management skills·       Good communication (to both internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Excellent client presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environmentWork Location: Hyderabad, Pune, Bangalore, GurgaonShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTOur purpose Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our latest accolades. Professional development At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI- L35 - Consultant - AI Engineer
description: AI Engineer –ConsultantAs you start your career, are you ready to take the next step to learn methods and process to provide business and individual tax return compliance support to Deloitte Tax? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and create an impact that matters? If the answer to the above is “Yes,” then come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support services through the teams in USI Tax teams.Deloitte Tax is leading its clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace, offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to comply with reporting requirements, uncover insights and deploy smarter approaches for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doWe are seeking an experienced AI Engineer – Consultant to join our USI Tax Technology team. In this role, you will design, build, and deploy enterprise-grade AI and LLM-powered solutions that directly support Deloitte Tax professionals and clients. title: USI-EH-27-Tax -ETI - Dev -L45 -Senior - Provision & Compliance
description: Senior Consultant - Tax Transformation Consulting – Provision & ComplianceDo you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join Tax Transformation Consulting group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally.Key responsibilities will be: -Support and lead tax provision and compliance engagements, with a focus on ASC 740 processes and controls.workflows.to identify process gaps, improve accuracy, and drive efficiency in reporting and compliance activities.Partner with tax, finance, and technology teams to design and implement scalable tax process improvements.Translate business requirements into practical automation and system solutions.Prepare and manage client‑ready documentation, status updates, and detailed process materials.and contribute as a strong team player in a fast-paced environment.Qualification and Experience Required –5 to 8 years of experience.Full time Masters/Bachelors in Finance/Accounts or equivalent from reputed University or MBA or Chartered Accountant with experience in Finance, Accounting, Taxation and AuditingExperience in tax provision and compliance, including strong knowledge of ASC 740.Proven ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and organizational skills.Execute data intensive tasks and facilitate organization of data for reporting requirementsProficiency in MS Office applications, specifically Excel, Word and PowerPointRelentless focus on quality of work products while adhering to completing deliverables on timeMotivated to learn new technologies through self-study and work to develop prototypes and solve technical problemsPreferred experience in one or more of the areas below:Provision software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Tax Provision, ONESOURCE Dataflow, Longview, SAP Direct Tax, Oracle FCCS and Oracle TRCSUS tax compliance software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Income Tax (Federal and International) and ONESOURCE State ApportionmentExperience in completing U.S. tax returnsExperience in completing provisions – quarterly and year endExperience in Blueprinting, Chart of Accounts DesignExperience in automation/analytical tools such as:Data wrangling tools - Alteryx, Power Query or othersAnalytical tools – Power BI, Tableau, or othersKnowledge of business and tax processes, creating functional specifications, identifying and developing requirements for new reports and providing user training and supportThe TeamTax Transformation Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and, above all, focused on creating value for the business, while closely aligned with clients’ core business strategy.The TTC group helps tax departments pursue a streamlined, transparent and efficient tax function that addresses compliance and planning issues while expanding its strategic support of the broader business enterprise. Our services are focused on tax-sensitized data acquisition, efficient process design and deployment, enterprise and tax-specific software implementation, and organizational design.Deloitte's TTC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the digitization of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TTC group. Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centred, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Our purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. qualifications: Senior Consultant - Tax Transformation Consulting – Provision & ComplianceDo you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join Tax Transformation Consulting group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally.Key responsibilities will be: -Support and lead tax provision and compliance engagements, with a focus on ASC 740 processes and controls.workflows.to identify process gaps, improve accuracy, and drive efficiency in reporting and compliance activities.Partner with tax, finance, and technology teams to design and implement scalable tax process improvements.Translate business requirements into practical automation and system solutions.Prepare and manage client‑ready documentation, status updates, and detailed process materials.and contribute as a strong team player in a fast-paced environment.Qualification and Experience Required –5 to 8 years of experience.Full time Masters/Bachelors in Finance/Accounts or equivalent from reputed University or MBA or Chartered Accountant with experience in Finance, Accounting, Taxation and AuditingExperience in tax provision and compliance, including strong knowledge of ASC 740.Proven ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and organizational skills.Execute data intensive tasks and facilitate organization of data for reporting requirementsProficiency in MS Office applications, specifically Excel, Word and PowerPointRelentless focus on quality of work products while adhering to completing deliverables on timeMotivated to learn new technologies through self-study and work to develop prototypes and solve technical problemsPreferred experience in one or more of the areas below:Provision software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Tax Provision, ONESOURCE Dataflow, Longview, SAP Direct Tax, Oracle FCCS and Oracle TRCSUS tax compliance software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Income Tax (Federal and International) and ONESOURCE State ApportionmentExperience in completing U.S. tax returnsExperience in completing provisions – quarterly and year endExperience in Blueprinting, Chart of Accounts DesignExperience in automation/analytical tools such as:Data wrangling tools - Alteryx, Power Query or othersAnalytical tools – Power BI, Tableau, or othersKnowledge of business and tax processes, creating functional specifications, identifying and developing requirements for new reports and providing user training and supportThe TeamTax Transformation Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and, above all, focused on creating value for the business, while closely aligned with clients’ core business strategy.The TTC group helps tax departments pursue a streamlined, transparent and efficient tax function that addresses compliance and planning issues while expanding its strategic support of the broader business enterprise. Our services are focused on tax-sensitized data acquisition, efficient process design and deployment, enterprise and tax-specific software implementation, and organizational design.Deloitte's TTC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the digitization of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TTC group. Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centred, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. title: USI-EH-27-Tax-LBS-L45 - Tax Senior - Legal Entity Management- Hyderabad/Pune
description: Legal Business Associate Senior, Legal Entity Management, Legal Business ServicesMultinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) assists clients with all aspects of reporting and process for business as usual, as well as triggering and regulatory events. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now!Work you’ll do:As a Senior in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will provide corporate legal business services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. Services include focusing on corporate document assessments, annual compliance and management of corporate data, leading the review of governance structures, corporate changes, legal entity simplification, as well as central coordination combined with local, on the ground experience with jurisdictions around the world. You will interact mainly with US and global team members, as applicable and will contribute directly to delivering first class service to our clients. You will be working with Deloitte Senior Managers and Managers of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will review the governance structures, assembly of corporate documents and management of corporate data. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring the high-quality delivery of the work to the leads.  As a part of the services, you will pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution. You should be a self- starter who works well within a team, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include:·       Assist leads in delivering corporate legal business services to Deloitte clients – assisting with formation, maintenance, and dissolution of legal entities, including legal entity corporate compliance activities, such as annual meetings, appointment of directors and officers, powers of attorney, annual reports, document preparation, etc.·       Identify process and operational efficiencies within corporate legal business services function·       Assist with corporate secretarial management, public notary and maintenance of corporate records, including minute books and Board resolutions·       Assist with planning and preparation for Board of Directors’ and stockholders’ meetings.·       Assist with developing eminence and thought leadership materials in the field of Legal Entity Management and, more broadly, legal innovation·       Monitor the performance of LEM associates·       Institute KPIs and metrics to govern, measure, and track client engagements·       Report against KPIs and metrics·       Read and assist with drafting proposals·       Assist with compiling, analyzing, and documenting facts·       Assist in executing engagement administration: document collection, data entry, tracking, records organization, document review, and coordinating client logistics·       Review the draft reports and findings, including the preparation of tables, exhibits, and charts under counsel supervision·       Review in researching technical and industry-specific issues·       Communicate effectively to all levels of engagement management and clients and communicate the importance of accurate and timely reporting.·       Ability to balance multiple projects and responsibilitiesDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.The Team:Legal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that spans many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life event legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex, cross-border issues.QualificationsRequired:Legal training or Bachelor’s degree in Business, or Cost Accounting or Company Secretarial or other business-related fields·       5-8 years of relevant legal experience or alternative legal service industry experience·       Understand legal technology and its application in the legal entity management space or in the contract lifecycle management fieldStrong Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Excel, PPT, Visio, Power BI and TableauExperience with legal services RFPsFamiliarity with commercial agreement types such as NDAs, SOWs, MSAs, distribution agreements and license agreementsAdept at working virtuallyPreferred:·       Aptitude and commitment to continue to learn various IT platforms and additional software skills·       Experience with commercial contract law, i.e. key contract clauses/issues such as indemnification, limitation of liability, warranties, etc. ·       Relevant legal/legal entity management experience, corporate legal secretarial experience, or alternative legal service industry experience·       Excellent interpersonal and people management skills·       Good communication (to both internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Superior presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment·       Strong analytical and reporting skillsOne of the following accreditations may give you an advantage:Contract & Commercial Management (CCM) Certification ProgramCertified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP)Project Management Program (PMP)Enrolled Agent (EA)Or other similar accreditationsWork Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, GurugramShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and in our communities. We are creating trust and confidence in a more equitable society. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. We are focusing our collective efforts to advance sustainability, equity, and trust that come to life through our core commitments. Learn more about Deloitte’s purpose, commitments, and impact.Our inclusive cultureAt Deloitte, we value our people and work to build an inclusive culture, where our people are encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work. Our commitment has led to outstanding results in terms of attracting, retaining, and advancing a diverse workforce. We drive multiple efforts focused on intentional hiring, increasing awareness and sensitization, and ensuring a safe work environment for all professionals. We are regularly recognized as an employer of choice across a range of aspects, including inclusion, well-being, innovation, leadership, and a place to start your career. To learn more, check out our latest accolades.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning center in the Hyderabad office, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Recruiting tipsFrom developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

experience_requirements: Legal Business Associate Senior, Legal Entity Management, Legal Business ServicesMultinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) assists clients with all aspects of reporting and process for business as usual, as well as triggering and regulatory events. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now!Work you’ll do:As a Senior in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will provide corporate legal business services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. Services include focusing on corporate document assessments, annual compliance and management of corporate data, leading the review of governance structures, corporate changes, legal entity simplification, as well as central coordination combined with local, on the ground experience with jurisdictions around the world. You will interact mainly with US and global team members, as applicable and will contribute directly to delivering first class service to our clients. You will be working with Deloitte Senior Managers and Managers of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will review the governance structures, assembly of corporate documents and management of corporate data. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring the high-quality delivery of the work to the leads.  As a part of the services, you will pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution. You should be a self- starter who works well within a team, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include:·       Assist leads in delivering corporate legal business services to Deloitte clients – assisting with formation, maintenance, and dissolution of legal entities, including legal entity corporate compliance activities, such as annual meetings, appointment of directors and officers, powers of attorney, annual reports, document preparation, etc.·       Identify process and operational efficiencies within corporate legal business services function·       Assist with corporate secretarial management, public notary and maintenance of corporate records, including minute books and Board resolutions·       Assist with planning and preparation for Board of Directors’ and stockholders’ meetings.·       Assist with developing eminence and thought leadership materials in the field of Legal Entity Management and, more broadly, legal innovation·       Monitor the performance of LEM associates·       Institute KPIs and metrics to govern, measure, and track client engagements·       Report against KPIs and metrics·       Read and assist with drafting proposals·       Assist with compiling, analyzing, and documenting facts·       Assist in executing engagement administration: document collection, data entry, tracking, records organization, document review, and coordinating client logistics·       Review the draft reports and findings, including the preparation of tables, exhibits, and charts under counsel supervision·       Review in researching technical and industry-specific issues·       Communicate effectively to all levels of engagement management and clients and communicate the importance of accurate and timely reporting.·       Ability to balance multiple projects and responsibilitiesDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.The Team:Legal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that spans many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life event legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex, cross-border issues.QualificationsRequired:Legal training or Bachelor’s degree in Business, or Cost Accounting or Company Secretarial or other business-related fields·       5-8 years of relevant legal experience or alternative legal service industry experience·       Understand legal technology and its application in the legal entity management space or in the contract lifecycle management fieldStrong Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Excel, PPT, Visio, Power BI and TableauExperience with legal services RFPsFamiliarity with commercial agreement types such as NDAs, SOWs, MSAs, distribution agreements and license agreementsAdept at working virtuallyPreferred:·       Aptitude and commitment to continue to learn various IT platforms and additional software skills·       Experience with commercial contract law, i.e. key contract clauses/issues such as indemnification, limitation of liability, warranties, etc. ·       Relevant legal/legal entity management experience, corporate legal secretarial experience, or alternative legal service industry experience·       Excellent interpersonal and people management skills·       Good communication (to both internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Superior presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment·       Strong analytical and reporting skillsOne of the following accreditations may give you an advantage:Contract & Commercial Management (CCM) Certification ProgramCertified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP)Project Management Program (PMP)Enrolled Agent (EA)Or other similar accreditationsWork Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, GurugramShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTOur purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, title: USI | FY27 | National Office | EH | ESC - CS - Analyst | L30 - Associate Senior Assistant
description: Audit & Assurance – ESC Independence – Analyst - HyderabadAs an Analyst of the ISESC, you will be responsible for assisting the audit team with permissibility of services, reviewing engagement letters & analyzing scope of services raised by the members firms to ensure that the services are as per the provisions of AICPA, SEC, PCAOB and firm specific independence policies and monitoring approved services for compliance with regulatory rules and Deloitte independence policies. This also includes ensuring clients do not result in an Independence conflict.Work you'll doAs an Associate Senior Assistant, Engagement Services on the ISESC team, you will be responsible for: Reviewing engagement letters and scope of services to evaluate permissibility under AICPA, SEC, PCAOB, and Deloitte independence policies Processing assigned work and delivering outputs in line with quality standards and established deadlines Coordinating with member firms and onshore/offshore teams to support implementation of independence policies and client acceptance procedures Performing conflict checks and background checks required as part of client acceptance activities Communicating status updates, findings, and next steps to U.S. engagement teams and internal stakeholders The teamEngagement Service Centers (ESCs) is a shared services group that provides dedicated administrative support to the Audit function. The group serve as hubs of highly skilled, dedicated resources that are available to support engagement teams and perform work in a variety of specific areas. Some of the services provided by ESC include Engagement Letter ESC (ELESC), Client Acceptance ESC (CAESC) and Independence Support ESC (ISESC). These activities, though non-audit in nature but are essential for completion of audit.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 9 AM to 6 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) or Master of Commerce (M.Com) Company Secretary qualification with internship experience 0-2 years of experience in compliance, regulatory review, independence procedures, or a professional or financial services environment Experience reviewing financial statements, engagement letters, or client documentation Experience using Microsoft Word and Excel Preferred: Experience supporting independence, risk, or compliance processes Familiarity with securities market regulations Familiarity with Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB) requirements
