title: USI-EH-27-Tax-LBS-L55 - Tax Manager- Legal Management Consulting (LMC) - Hyderabad/Pune/Bangalore/Mumbai/Gurugram
description: Legal Business Associate Manager, Legal Management Consulting,Legal Business ServicesMultinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) is expanding its Legal Management Consulting (LMC) and Legal Managed Services (LMS) business to assist our multinational corporate legal department clients with all aspects of legal department consulting, technology, operations, managed services, transformation and efficiency projects. We intend to position Deloitte Legal Management Consulting as the clear market leader. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now!Work you’ll do:As a  Manager in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will play a key role as part of a growing team,  delivering best in class legal management consulting services and Legal Operations in a dynamic environment, with a focus on operation model transformation and efficiency improvements of legal departments. You will play key role in recommending solutions for client financial legal spend management, eBilling management, data wrangling and analysis. You will provide corporate business legal services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. You will be working with both US and global teams, as applicable, and will contribute directly to delivering first class service to our clients. You will be working with Deloitte Partners, Principals, Managing Directors, of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. As a part of the services, you will proactively identify, pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution and eye for detail. You should be a self-starter who works well within a team environment, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include:·       Deliver corporate business legal engagements for Deloitte clients – primarily focusing on identification of process improvement and operational efficiencies within legal departments ranging from operating model review and redesign through legal department transformation.·       Lead projects or workstreams as part of larger programs to deliver legal department assessments, Spend Analysis and Management, redesign and transformation strategy for Legal Departments.Experience in financial reporting and analysis preferably in a global organizationUnderstands  and has knowledge of one or more legal Billing tools (Ex: Legal Tracker, Brightflag, HighQ etc).Report complex financial information to project leadership and provide clear and concise analysis of the data.Advises senior client stakeholders on strategic decisions based on financial / legal analyses to manage risk, increase productivity, and reduce inefficiencies, while enabling the organization to achieve its overall objectives·       Help develop eminence and thought leadership materials·       Monitor the performance of engagement delivery teams·       Institute Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and metrics to govern, measure, and track client engagements·       Report to the USI lead against KPIs and metrics·       Deliver level appropriate training to the LBS- LMC professionals.·       Ability to review, draft and assist with proposalsDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.The Team:Legal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that span many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life events, legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex cross-border issues.QualificationsRequired:At least one of the following accreditations:Certified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP)Project Management Program (PMP)Or other similar accreditationsExcellent understanding of the challenges and requirements of an in-house legal department, of diagnostic tools for legal departments and management methodologies for driving operational improvement and efficiency.·       10+ years of relevant experience shaping and managing complex services for legal departments with demonstrated experience in legal operations and spend optimization projects·       Level of familiarity with common legal technologies including eBilling, matter management and workflow·       Expertise in a wide range of methodologies and project types including spend reviews, strategy reviews, target operating model redesigns and process reengineering·       Expertise in financial reporting, billing, invoice review and financial management when providing legal operations services to the clients·       Responsible for the financial management of contracts throughout the engagement lifecycle and people management skills·       Strong Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Excel, PPT, Visio, Power BI and TableauPreferred:·       Lean Six-Sigma and/or Project Management Professional certification·       Understanding and working knowledge of 1 or more legal e-billing tools.·       Excellent interpersonal and people management skills·       Exceptional communication (to both internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Superior client presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment·       Strong analytical and reporting skills Work Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help sharpen skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world.  From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career.  Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Center.BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Deloitte’s cultureWe take pride in our culture and celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness.  As a commitment to our people, we offer well-being programs and provide our professional’s opportunities for support and flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware.  This supportive culture helps enable our people to do their best work every day. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Recruiter tipsWe want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Superior client presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment·       Strong analytical and reporting skills Work Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTHow title: USI-EH-27-Tax-ETI - Dev- L35 - Consultant - Provision & Compliance
description: Consultant - Tax Transformation Consulting – Provision & ComplianceDo you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join Tax Transformation Consulting group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally.Key responsibilities will be: -Support tax provision and compliance engagements, with a focus on ASC 740 processes and controls.Assist in the implementation, enhancement, and automation of various Tax software for provision and compliance workflows.to identify process gaps, improve accuracy, and drive efficiency in reporting and compliance activities., redesigning client tax departments and evaluating automation opportunities.Prepare client‑ready documentation, status updates, and detailed process materials.Work on design and development of tax solutionsApply technology skills in areas like implementing the application, data wrangling and analytics.Qualification and Experience Required –3 to 5 years of experience.Full time Masters/Bachelors in Finance/Accounts or equivalent from reputed University or MBA or Chartered Accountant with experience in Finance, Accounting, Taxation and AuditingExperience in tax provision and compliance, including strong knowledge of ASC 740.Execute data intensive tasks and facilitate organization of data for reporting requirementsProficiency in MS Office applications, specifically Excel, Word and PowerPointMotivated to learn new technologies through self-study and work to develop prototypes and solve technical problemsPreferred experience in one or more of the areas below:Provision software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Tax Provision, ONESOURCE Dataflow, Longview, SAP Direct Tax, Oracle FCCS and Oracle TRCSUS tax compliance software – Corptax, ONESOURCE Income Tax (Federal and International) and ONESOURCE State ApportionmentExperience in completing U.S. tax returnsExperience in completing provisions – quarterly and year endExperience in Blueprinting, Chart of Accounts DesignExperience in automation/analytical tools such as:Data wrangling tools - Alteryx, Power Query or othersAnalytical tools – Power BI, Tableau, or othersKnowledge of business and tax processes, creating functional specifications, identifying and developing requirements for new reports and providing user training and supportThe TeamTax Transformation Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and, above all, focused on creating value for the business, while closely aligned with clients’ core business strategy.The TTC group helps tax departments pursue a streamlined, transparent and efficient tax function that addresses compliance and planning issues while expanding its strategic support of the broader business enterprise. Our services are focused on tax-sensitized data acquisition, efficient process design and deployment, enterprise and tax-specific software implementation, and organizational design.Deloitte's TTC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the digitization of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TTC group. Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centred, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Our purposeDeloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities. Our people and cultureOur inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage diverse ways of thinking, ideas, and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Recruiting tipsFrom developing a standout resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: FY27 USI Audit | EH |Audit |CE&M - SA | L35 - Consultant, Strategic Relationship Management
description: Consultant, Strategic Relationship ManagementWe are seeking a high-performing senior analyst to support the career development and professional growth of our A&A leaders (Partners, Principals, Managing Directors, and Leader levels) and select high-talent professionals. The ideal candidate will help create impactful leadership experiences while operating in a fast-paced, hybrid environment. The individual will collaborate with multiple stakeholders, manage multiple deadlines, and contribute to the successful delivery of leadership development programs and strategic projectsWork you'll doAs a Consultant, Strategic Relationship Management in the OCEO and Clients team, you will be an integral part of the team, providing support to leadership development programs, transition labs, and other projects. You will work both as an individual contributor and as a team player.You’ll be expected to:Directly support US Managers and Senior Managers, primarily through leadership development programs:Analyzing confidential data to assist in the selection process for identifying program participantsActively supporting the planning process, including coordinating administrative logistics with Meeting & Event Services, assisting with budgeting, contributing to content development, and preparing materials for sessionsAssisting in the post-session evaluation of success and identify insights and opportunities for continuous improvementSupport other projects as needed, including transition lab preparation and lab deliverablesConsistently develop high quality materials and deliverables with diligent attention to detail, accuracy, and good judgment and surface questions for discussion in a timely manner Work with minimum supervision from USI team leaders Adhere to and communicate recommended innovative improvements to the processes, protocols, materials, and tools to support all activitiesAnalyze and interpret diverse data sets Manage extremely confidential dataCoordinate and communicate with onshore/offshore teams and provide stakeholders with regular updatesThe TeamOur team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative and seek on-the-job learning opportunities. Our professionals are committed to excellence and to enhancing the trust of our stakeholders. Creative thinking and independence are keys to success and are welcomed by leadership. Quality is our top priority, and by focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on quality and deliver greater value to our clientsLocation: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired:Master’s degree in business management4-5 years of prior relevant experience working in a fast-paced, team environmentStrong project management and organizational capabilitiesStrong collaboration skills and ability to work effectively and cohesively with peers, US team, and leadersStrong data analysis and interpretation skillsDemonstrate strong presentation and networking skills; ability to actively contribute to and independently lead meetingsDemonstrate advanced level of proficiency in MS Office tools particularly with PowerPoint and ExcelHands-on experience using AI tools to complete tasks efficiently; demonstrate strong interest and initiative to search for new use cases and evolving capabilities to drive continuous improvements Strong ability to perform data management, data cleansing, and data validation tasksProficient in data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)Curious and willing to learn about new ideas and approachesStrong written and verbal communication skillsStrong service orientation and commitment to excellenceFlexible and adaptable in a rapidly changing environmentHighly organized and results- and detail-orientedProvide day-to-day guidance to junior team members and also be able to delegate tasks with clear expectations and timelinesBe the subject matter expert within assigned areas and help senior members with reviews of deliverables for accuracy, completeness, and alignment to US team requirementsStrong analytical skills, problem/issue identification, and resolution skillsInterest in developing a greater understanding of the A&A strategy High degree of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality, as we deal with highly confidential personal information

You will work both as an individual contributor and as a team player.You’ll be expected to:Directly support US Managers and Senior Managers, primarily through leadership development programs:Analyzing confidential data to assist in the selection process for identifying program participantsActively supporting the planning process, including coordinating administrative logistics with Meeting & Event Services, assisting with budgeting, contributing to content development, and preparing materials for sessionsAssisting in the post-session evaluation of success and identify insights and opportunities for continuous improvementSupport other projects as needed, including transition lab preparation and lab deliverablesConsistently develop high quality materials and deliverables with diligent attention to detail, accuracy, and good judgment and surface questions for discussion in a timely manner Work with minimum supervision from USI team leaders Adhere to and communicate recommended innovative improvements to the processes, protocols, materials, and tools to support all activitiesAnalyze and interpret diverse data sets Manage extremely confidential dataCoordinate and communicate with onshore/offshore teams and provide stakeholders with regular updatesThe TeamOur team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative and seek on-the-job learning opportunities. Our professionals are committed to excellence and to enhancing the trust of our stakeholders. Creative thinking and independence are keys to success and are welcomed by leadership. Quality is our top priority, and by focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on quality and deliver greater value to our clientsLocation: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired:Master’s degree in business management4-5 years of prior relevant experience working in a fast-paced, team environmentStrong project management and organizational capabilitiesStrong collaboration skills and ability to work effectively and cohesively with peers, US team, and leadersStrong data analysis and interpretation skillsDemonstrate strong presentation and networking skills; ability to actively contribute to and independently lead meetingsDemonstrate advanced level of proficiency in MS Office tools particularly with PowerPoint and ExcelHands-on experience using AI tools to complete tasks efficiently; demonstrate strong interest and initiative to search for new use cases and evolving capabilities to drive continuous improvements Strong ability to perform data management, data cleansing, and data validation tasksProficient in data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)Curious and willing to learn about new ideas and approachesStrong written and verbal communication skillsStrong service orientation and commitment to excellenceFlexible and adaptable in a rapidly changing environmentHighly organized and results- and detail-orientedProvide day-to-day guidance to junior team members and also be able to delegate tasks with clear expectations and timelinesBe the subject matter expert within assigned areas and help senior members with reviews of deliverables for accuracy, completeness, and alignment to US team requirementsStrong analytical skills, problem/issue identification, and resolution skillsInterest in developing a greater understanding of the A&A strategy High degree of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality, as we deal with highly confidential personal information

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-LBS- L45 - Tax Senior - Legal Management Services (LMS)- Hyderabad/Bengaluru/Gurugram/Pune/Mumbai
description: Legal Business Associate Senior, Legal Management Service (LMS)Multinational organizations need personnel who can provide legal business services support in their full lifecycle of process and subject matter challenges and opportunities. Deloitte Legal Business Services (“LBS”) assists clients with all aspects of reporting and process for business as usual, as well as triggering and regulatory events. Bring your expertise and client service skills to Deloitte and click “apply” now!Work you’ll do:As a Senior in Deloitte’s Legal Business Services function for Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”), you will provide corporate business legal services support on engagements for our clients’ large and complex organizations. Services include assisting supervising counsel with their business as usual contracting and negotiations; and review, , and remediation services in response to regulatory and corporate triggering events; assisting in calendaring, statutory filings, workflow coordination, information and records management. You will interact mainly with US and global team members, as applicable and will contribute directly to delivering first class service to our clients. You will be working with Deloitte Senior Managers and Managers of Legal Business Services (“LBS”) projects and engagements. You will support the engagement lifecycle from opportunity pursuit through service delivery and identification of expansion opportunities to continue to deliver benefits to our clients. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring the high-quality delivery of the work to the leads. As a part of the services, you will pursue and execute continuous service improvements through technology and process improvements. You need to consistently strive for excellence, taking pride in carrying out responsibilities efficiently and with impeccable execution. You should be a self- starter who works well within a team, is energized by a continuous learning environment, and possesses an ability to work well with deadlines.Responsibilities will include:·       Deliver legal business engagements for Deloitte clients – Assisting in drafting and negotiating playbooks-based buy side and sales side commercial contracts such as MSA, NDAs, SoWs, Work Orders, Change Notes·       Transitioning and setting up operate delivery teams·       Identify process and operational efficiencies within corporate business legal services clients’ contracting function·       Institute KPIs and metrics to govern, measure, and track client engagements·       Report against KPIs and metrics·       Review with the preparation of proposals·       Assist in executing engagement administration: document collection, data entry, tracking, records organization, contract review, and coordinating client logistics·       Review and project manage the entire contracting process i.e., coordinating with various stakeholders such as finance, legal, commercial, business, delivery and incorporating their feedback in the contract and assisting in closing the contract·       Review in researching technical and industry-specific issues·       Communicate effectively to all levels of engagement management and clients·       Ability to balance multiple projects and responsibilitiesDisclaimer: Deloitte Tax in India and its affiliates in the United States and India do not practice law or provide legal advice.The Team:Legal Business Services is a service line within Deloitte Tax in India that collaborates and works closely with other Deloitte business units, including Deloitte Advisory and Deloitte Consulting. As a part of the Deloitte network of member firms that spans many countries with thousands of professionals, Deloitte brings global perspectives and deep market and industry knowledge. Today’s multinational organizations need personnel who can support them with day-to-day and life event legal business services, across a multidisciplinary skillset. Deloitte has a long-standing reputation for helping clients navigate complex, cross-border issues.Qualifications Required:·       Legal training (LL.B/BA.LLB or equivalent)·       Strong substantive understanding the inhouse contracting process with various CLM tools·       5-8 years of relevant legal experience or alternative legal service industry experience·       Level of familiarity with legal technology and its application in the contract lifecycle management field·       Strong Microsoft Office and other technology skills such as Word, Excel and PPT.·       Experience in moderate complexity commercial contract drafting and negotiation skills·       Experience with legal services RFPs·       Familiarity with commercial agreement types such as NDAs, SOWs, MSAs, distribution agreements and license agreements·       Adept at working virtuallyPreferred:·       Aptitude and commitment to continue to learn various IT platforms and additional software skills·       Lean Six-Sigma and/or Project Management Professional certification·       Excellent interpersonal and people management skills·       Good communication (to both internal and external stakeholders) and collaboration skills·       Excellent client presentation skills·       High level of attention to detail, outstanding organization skills and well-developed critical thinking skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environmentShift Timings: US Shift timing : 6:00 PM to 3:00 AM or 9:00 PM to 3:00 AMShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM ISTHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help sharpen skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Center.BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Deloitte’s cultureWe take pride in our culture and celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness. As a commitment to our people, we offer well-being programs and provide our professional’s opportunities for support and flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. This supportive culture helps enable our people to do their best work every day. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Recruiter tipsWe want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-DFO&I- Java- Managed Services Engineer II- Project Specific 123
description: #DFO&I2027CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Managed Services Engineer II or equivalentAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do:·       Develop frontend components and user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and React.js·       Implement backend services and APIs using Java, Spring Framework, Spring Boot Microservices·       Familiarity with RESTful APIs and experience in integrating frontend to backend services.·       Manage database systems (SQL and/or NoSQL) and ensure data integrity, security, and performance.·       Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and performance.·       Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices and coding standards.·       Strong in Spring Boot Microservices concepts, architecture and Design PatternsThe team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:3-6 years of relevant experience.·       JavaScript (ES6+): Strong understanding of JavaScript fundamentals, including ES6 features, DOM manipulation, and asynchronous programming.·       React.js: Component-based library for building user interfaces.·       State Management: Knowledge of state management libraries such as Redux.·       Responsive Design: Ability to create responsive layouts using frameworks like Bootstrap or through custom media queries.·       CSS Frameworks: Familiarity with CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Materialize CSS, or Foundation.·       Server-side Languages and Frameworks: Java: Enterprise-level language with frameworks like Spring or Hibernate.·       API Design and Development: Experience in designing and implementing RESTful APIs and understanding of GraphQL is a plus.·       SQL: Proficiency in relational databases like Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, or SQL Server.·       NoSQL: Familiarity with non-relational databases such as MongoDB or Redis.·       ORM (Object-Relational Mapping): Experience with ORM libraries like Hibernate (for Java).·       Authentication and Authorization: Knowledge of authentication mechanisms such as JWT (JSON Web Tokens)·       Proficiency in Git for managing codebase and collaboration with team members. ·       A platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers, useful for creating consistent development and deployment environments.·       Unit Testing: Proficiency in writing unit tests using frameworks like Jest (for JavaScript/React), JUnit (for Java), etc.·       Familiarity with debugging tools such as Chrome DevTools, Postman, or Swagger for API testing along with any IDE, Maven/Gradle, Sonarqube·       Understanding of web security best practices, including HTTPS, CORS, CSRF protection, etc.Good to Have Skills/Project qualifications: #DFO&I2027CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Managed Services Engineer II or equivalentAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do:·       Develop frontend components and user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and React.js·       Implement backend services and APIs using Java, Spring Framework, Spring Boot Microservices·       Familiarity with RESTful APIs and experience in integrating frontend to backend services.·       Manage database systems (SQL and/or NoSQL) and ensure data integrity, security, and performance.·       Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and performance.·       Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices and coding standards.·       Strong in Spring Boot Microservices concepts, architecture and Design PatternsThe team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:3-6 years of relevant experience.·       JavaScript (ES6+): Strong understanding of JavaScript fundamentals, including ES6 features, DOM manipulation, and asynchronous programming.·       React.js: Component-based library for building user interfaces.·       State Management: Knowledge of state management libraries such as Redux.·       Responsive Design: Ability to create responsive layouts using frameworks like Bootstrap or through custom media queries.·       CSS Frameworks: Familiarity with CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Materialize CSS, or Foundation.·       Server-side Languages and Frameworks: Java: Enterprise-level language with frameworks like Spring or Hibernate.·       API Design and Development: Experience in designing and implementing RESTful APIs and understanding of GraphQL is a plus.·       SQL: Proficiency in relational databases like Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, or SQL Server.·       NoSQL: Familiarity with non-relational databases such as MongoDB or Redis.·       ORM (Object-Relational Mapping): Experience with ORM libraries like Hibernate (for Java).·       Authentication and Authorization: Knowledge of authentication mechanisms such as JWT (JSON Web Tokens)·       Proficiency in Git for managing codebase and collaboration with team members. ·       A platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers, useful for creating consistent development and deployment environments.·       Unit Testing: Proficiency in writing unit tests using frameworks like Jest (for JavaScript/React), JUnit (for Java), etc.·       Familiarity with debugging tools such as Chrome DevTools, Postman, or Swagger for API testing along with any IDE, Maven/Gradle, Sonarqube·       Understanding of web security best practices, including HTTPS, CORS, CSRF protection, etc.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Clear and effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams, stakeholders, and clients. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to troubleshoot issues and find efficient solutions.Education:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: FY27 USI Audit | EH |Audit |CE&M - Analyst | L30 - Associate Consultant, Strategic Relationship Management
description: Associate Consultant, Client Excellence TeamAre you a detail-oriented, inquisitive individual who excels at teaming to develop innovative solutions? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment, working in hybrid settings to deliver results? If so, you may be a good fit to join our CE&M team. As we continue to grow, the organization's business development models have become increasingly important. Our ability to measure performance, glean insights, and optimize business development tools and strategies helps Deloitte’s Audit & Assurance (A&A) business identify and build relationships with prospective clients.Work you’ll doAs a Associate Consultant, you will be an integral part of the team by providing competitive intelligence, relationship-development and business development support to the US based CE&M team. You will report to the USI assistant manager. You will support by conducting extensive secondary research on target companies, market/industry research, various communications and relationship development projects among other responsibilities.The ideal candidate for this role is someone who thrives working on a wide range of tasks, demonstrates diligence and initiative, is eager to learn, can adapt to ambiguous or challenging situations, makes immediate adjustments based on feedback, and devises solutions. Candidate would leverage strong research, presentation skills and should be adept at working collaboratively as well as independently.You’ll be expected to:· Develop and create insightful industry, market and company research and share in a presentable format to aid in relationship development processes.· Uncover company data and insights to be used in key target, cross board analysis, and executive reports utilized by audit practitioners.· Prepare reports, analyze data, identify trends, and conduct required follow-up.· Develop and maintain targeting database, create frameworks and templates for research representation.· Develop internal and external communications, marketing collaterals and pursuit materials to propagate Deloitte’s services.· Provide innovative approaches, share and leverage best practices.· Collaborate across the organization to uncover company data and possible organization connections.· Adhere to the processes, protocols, reference material, and tools to support deliverables.· Develop an understanding of our business, industry, marketplace priorities, and the competitive landscape leveraging both internal tools and external sources to develop a point of view and share insights.· Perform secondary market research by searching databases and provide information in a systematic and logical manner.· Team with counterparts throughout the organization to leverage programs and deliverables and share best practices.· Develop high quality deliverables with attention to detail and executive summaries for US stakeholders with minimum supervision from USI team leadersThe teamOur team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative and seek on-the-job learning opportunities. Our professionals are committed to excellence and to enhancing the trust of our stakeholders. Creative thinking and independence are key to success and are welcomed by leadership. Quality is our top priority, and by focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on quality and deliver greater value to our clients.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired:· Master’s degree in business management (MBA, PGDBM), preferably in Finance or Marketing.· 6 months to 2 years of prior relevant experience (e.g., Secondary Research, Marketing operations).· Exposure to secondary research databases such as Factiva, OneSource, Hoovers, Thomson, BoardEx, S&P Capital IQ, Pitchbook, Bloomberg, IBIS World etc.· Ability to assimilate research findings and industry trends to showcase logical thought flow and storyboarding skills.· Advanced proficiency in Microsoft suite—PowerPoint, Word and Excel.· Knowledge of business development practices in a professional services firm.· Understanding of company structure and preferably knowledge of the audit practice.· Willingness to learn new systems, processes, and tasks at a quick pace.· Excellent communication skills that include reading comprehension and the ability to articulate messages in written and spoken form.· Ability to see the big picture and quickly adapt to changing business priorities in a matrixed organization.· Proven ability to take initiative, solve problems, and work under tight deadlines.· Team-oriented individual with ability to work on multiple initiatives and prioritize projects.

title: USI - EH27- EOX CoAE - L25 - Services Associate, Business Development and Account Enablement  - Hyderabad
description: Deloitte is looking for Web Developer the role will support the delivery of numerous Websites on SharePoint and other internal platforms. Deloitte Services LP is currently searching for a Web developer who will join our EOX CoAE to deliver the best-in-class web experience for the intranet sites. A designer who can also code, build and deploy digital marketing experiences Work you'll do As a(n) Services Associate, Business Development and Account Enablement on the EOX CoAE team, you will be responsible for… Developing, customizing, and maintaining web pages and web applications for SharePoint and other internal enterprise platforms Building responsive, cross-browser, and cross-platform solutions using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, jQuery, and TypeScript Integrating web solutions with application programming interfaces, backend services, and content management systems Troubleshooting, debugging, and optimizing web applications for performance, stability, and usability Supporting deployments, enhancements, and ongoing maintenance while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver technical solutions The team EOX CoAE professionals assist client leaders in strengthening how we serve our most important clients. EOX CoAE Professionals execute internal account operations, such that the account leaders can focus on delivering value for our clients. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Master of Computer Applications, or equivalent experience 2-3 years of experience in web development Experience developing web solutions using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and jQuery Experience building responsive and cross-browser web applications Experience working with web content management systems Experience using TypeScript Experience supporting application maintenance, troubleshooting, and deployment activities Preferred: Experience developing or supporting SharePoint-based web solutions Experience integrating web applications with application programming interfaces and backend services Experience working in an agile delivery environment Experience optimizing web applications for performance and stability Experience creating reusable front-end components or templates Knowledge of artificial intelligence tools or use cases in digital experience developmentHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, worldclass learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.   Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte. Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-ETI - Dev-L55 -Manager- Provision & Compliance
description: Manager - Tax Transformation Consulting – Provision & ComplianceDo you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join Tax Transformation Consulting group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centred, confident, and aware. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities. Our people and cultureOur inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage diverse ways of thinking, ideas, and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.Professional developmentAt Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Benefits to help you thriveAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-DFO&I- Java- Managed Services Engineer III- Project Specific123
description: DFO&I2027CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Managed Services Engineer III or equivalentAs an experienced Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do:·  Lead the frontend development lifecycle, from planning and design to implementation, testing, and deployment.·       Develop frontend components and user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and React.js·      Design and implement backend services and APIs using server-side languages and frameworks such as Java, Spring etc.·       Familiarity with RESTful APIs and experience in integrating frontend to backend services.·       Manage database systems (SQL and/or NoSQL) and ensure data integrity, security, and performance.·      Collaborate with UX/UI designers to implement design mockups into responsive and user-friendly interfaces.·      Work closely with DevOps engineers to deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) using containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines.·       Strong in Spring Boot Microservices concepts, architecture and Design Patterns.·       Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices and coding standards.·       Strong understanding of web security principles and best practices.·     Staying Updated: Stay updated on emerging technologies/industry trends and apply them into operations and activitiesThe team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:6-9 years of relevant experience.HTML/CSS: Proficiency in writing semantic HTML and styling with CSS, including preprocessors like Sass or Less.JavaScript (ES6+): Strong understanding of JavaScript fundamentals, including ES6 features, DOM manipulation, and asynchronous programming.React.js: Component-based library for building user interfaces.State Management: Knowledge of state management libraries such as Redux (for React)Responsive Design: Ability to create responsive layouts using frameworks like Bootstrap or through custom media queries.CSS Frameworks: Familiarity with CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Materialize CSS, or Foundation.Server-side Languages and Frameworks: Java: Enterprise-level language with frameworks like Spring or Hibernate.API Design and Development: Experience in designing and implementing RESTful APIs and understanding of GraphQL is a plus.SQL: Proficiency in relational databases like Oracle MySQL, PostgreSQL, or SQL Server.NoSQL: Familiarity with non-relational databases such as MongoDB or Redis.ORM (Object-Relational Mapping): Experience with ORM libraries like Hibernate (for Java).Authentication and Authorization: Knowledge of authentication mechanisms such as JWT (JSON Web Tokens), OAuth, and OAuth2.Version Control: Proficiency in Git for managing codebase and collaboration with team members.DevOps and CI/CD: Docker: A platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers, useful for creating consistent development and deployment environments.Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment (CI/CD): Tools like Jenkins, Travis CI, or GitHub Actions can automate testing, building, and deploying React applications.Cloud Platforms: Experience deploying applications on cloud platforms such as AWS (Amazon Web Services), Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.Testing and Debugging: Unit Testing: Proficiency in writing unit tests using frameworks like Jest (for JavaScript/React), JUnit (for Java), etc.Debugging Tools: Familiarity with debugging tools such as Chrome DevTools, Postman, or Swagger for API testing.Security Best Practices: Understanding of web security best practices, including HTTPS, CORS, CSRF protection, etc.Agile Methodologies: Experience working in Agile development environments, including Scrum or Kanban methodologies.Documentation: Ability to document code and projects effectively for knowledge sharing and future maintenance. Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:·       Communication: Clear and effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams, stakeholders, and clients.·       Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to troubleshoot issues and find efficient solutions.·       Adaptability: Ability to adapt to changing requirements and technologies in a dynamic work environment.·       Time Management: Good organizational skills to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines effectively.·       Node.js: Runtime environment for executing JavaScript server-side.·       GraphQL: A query language for APIs and runtime for executing those queries. It can be used with React to fetch data more efficiently.Education:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-Tax-Global Employer Services-CTDT-SQL Developer - L35 - TC II-Hyderabad
description: Deloitte’s Global Employer Solutions (GES) Client Technology Delivery Team (CTDT) is seeking a System Developer to help deliver Deloitte’s GES technology enabled mobility services to meet Global Client business objectives.Work you'll doAs a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Solutions Client Technology Delivery Team, you will be responsible for designing, building, and supporting technology solutions that enable mobility service delivery and help meet client business objectives. Design, build, and deploy data integration solutions based on business and client requirements. Translate requirements into technical designs, code, stored procedures, and SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS) packages. Develop reporting solutions using SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS) and data visualization tools to support client delivery and operational needs. Monitor production processes, troubleshoot defects and performance issues, and provide ongoing support for regular client deliverables. Follow development standards for testing, documentation, version control, and continuous improvement in an Agile Scrum environment. The teamThe Global Employer Solutions Client Technology Delivery Team supports technology-enabled mobility services for Deloitte’s tax practice. The team works across product, architecture, business analysis, testing, and delivery to build and maintain solutions that support client service and operational effectiveness. This is placeholder content for your review and can be tailored further to better reflect the team’s scope.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM; 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering or equivalent 3+ years of experience in SQL development, including T-SQL and query tuning 3+ years of experience designing and building extract, transform, load processes using SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS) Experience developing reports using SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS) or comparable data visualization tools Experience writing database queries, stored procedures, and debugging deployments using SQL Server Data Tools (SSDT) Experience working with XML and JSON Experience working in an Agile Scrum delivery environment Preferred: Experience with operational data store, staging, or data warehousing solutions Experience performing data quality analysis and issue resolution Experience with Qlik Experience with C# or VB.NET Experience with web services Experience with Active Batch workload automation

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI-L45 -Senior - Oracle GTM
description: Oracle Global Trade Management (GTM)Role Title : Senior Oracle Global Trade Management (GTM) Lead / Solution LeadRole SummaryLead the end-to-end delivery of Oracle Global Trade Management (GTM) programs, owning solution design, compliance controls, integrations, and governance to enable compliant and efficient cross-border trade. This role drives business outcomes (shipment release, auditability, duty optimization where applicable) by translating global trade policy into scalable Oracle GTM configuration, operating processes, and measurable controls.Key ResponsibilitiesProgram & Workstream LeadershipOwn the Oracle GTM workstream across discover → design → build → test → deploy → hypercare.Lead a cross-functional team (functional, technical, data, testing) and manage day-to-day priorities, dependencies, and delivery quality.Drive scope, RAID, estimates, and status reporting; align stakeholders across Trade Compliance, Logistics, Customer Service, Finance, Legal, and IT.Establish design authorities/guardrails (standards, reusable patterns, naming conventions, control objectives).Solution Architecture & Design AuthorityDefine the end-to-end trade architecture: Oracle GTM plus ERP/OMS/WMS/TMS, master data, and broker/filing providers (as applicable).Translate policy and regulatory requirements into enforceable GTM controls and workflows with audit-ready traceability.Make design decisions on rule strategy, performance implications, and global rollout patterns (template vs localization).Oracle GTM Configuration & Rule Design (hands-on leadership)Own design and oversight (and configure where needed) for:Restricted Party Screening (RPS): matching strategy, escalation/holds, queue design, false-positive reduction, audit trailEmbargo/sanctions and export controls: policy-to-rule mapping, country/product/end-use controlsClassification & product trade attributes: HS/HTS, ECCN concepts, origin, valuation attributes, PGA/agency data where relevantLicense management: determination, decrementation logic, usage tracking, alerts, exception handlingFTA / Preference programs: qualification approach, solicitation/data collection strategy, claim governanceTrade documentation & filing readiness: document sets, transaction completeness checks, handoff to brokers/providersLanded cost/duty & tax estimation (if in scope)Workflow/approvals/holds and exception queue managementEnsure global design supports multi-entity, multi-country operations, and aligns to compliance operating model.Integrations, Data, and ControlsLead integration design with ERP/SCM (often Oracle), OMS, WMS/TMS, PIM/PLM, and external screening/filing partners.Set data governance for trade-critical master data (item, party, country, classification, license) including stewardship and quality metrics.Define reconciliation, monitoring, and control evidence (logging, audit reporting, SOX-type controls where applicable).Testing, Cutover, and Hypercare LeadershipOwn end-to-end testing strategy: compliance scenarios, negative testing, performance/volume tests (as needed).Lead UAT with compliance and operations; define entry/exit criteria and sign-offs.Drive cutover planning (holds strategy, fallback, business continuity) and lead hypercare stabilization and transition to run support.Change Management & EnablementPartner with change leads to deliver training, SOPs, and role-based enablement for compliance and operations teams.Define operating model elements: RACI, exception handling SLAs, governance cadence, and KPIs.Required Qualifications8–12+ years experience in global trade/compliance technology delivery, with 3–6+ years in Oracle GTM implementation leadership (or equivalent depth).Demonstrated leadership of at least one full lifecycle Oracle GTM implementation or major transformation (multi-region preferred).Strong domain knowledge across several areas:Restricted party screening, sanctions/embargo controlsImport/export compliance concepts; export controls (ECCN/dual-use concepts)HS/HTS classification, origin, valuation basics, documentation requirementsLicensing and decrementation controlsFTA/preference concepts and claim governanceStrong stakeholder leadership and decision facilitation; comfortable translating legal/compliance policy into system rules.Delivery rigor: estimates, RAID, quality gates, and executive-ready communication.Technical / Tooling Expectations (for a Lead)Integration design literacy (APIs/flat files/middleware), mapping, error handling, monitoring, and reconciliation.Data migration/conversion leadership and validation approach.Working knowledge of adjacent Oracle ecosystem (ERP/SCM/OTM/OIC) is strongly preferred.SQL/data analysis capability is a plus.Nice-to-HaveBroker/filing provider integration experience and customs data handoff patterns.Experience building a global template with localized compliance extensions.Audit support experience (internal controls, evidence, traceability).Prior consulting lead experience (multi-client or multi-program delivery).Typical DeliverablesGTM solution blueprint, rule matrix, and workflow/holds designIntegration architecture and interface specificationsMaster data governance model and data quality KPIsTest strategy, UAT scripts, sign-off packs, defect triage governanceCutover/hypercare plan and operational runbookTraining/SOPs and compliance control evidence packKPIs / Success MeasuresReduced shipment holds and improved on-time release rateReduced screening false positives and faster exception resolutionImproved classification/origin/license coverage and audit traceabilityStable integrations (low error rate, fast recovery, strong monitoring)Duty optimization outcomes (where preference programs are in scope)

title: USI - EH27 - Tax - GESTC - R&A (Work force solutions) - L35 - Consultant - Hyderabad
description: As a consultant in the workforce solution/Technology team, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining data integration and reporting solutions with a strong focus on SQL Server and SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services). You will work closely with business stakeholders and technical teams to deliver scalable data pipelines, ETL processes, and reporting solutions that enable data-driven decision-making. This role requires strong technical expertise in SQL development and ETL processes, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.Work you'll doAs a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) team, you will be responsible for: Designing, developing, and maintaining ETL workflows using SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services) Writing, optimizing, and maintaining SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and views in SQL Server Performing data extraction, transformation, loading, validation, and quality checks to support reliable data pipelines Developing and supporting reporting solutions using SSRS or similar reporting tools, and assisting with enhancements or migration activities Collaborating with business stakeholders and technical teams to gather requirements, troubleshoot data issues, support deployments, and maintain process documentation The teamDeloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India.We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC)Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: 2-3 years of experience in SQL development, data engineering, or ETL development Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field Experience with SQL Server and T-SQL development Experience with SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services) for ETL development Experience writing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and views Experience with data warehousing concepts, including fact tables, dimension tables, and star schema Experience with SSRS or similar reporting tools Preferred: Experience with Azure Data Factory or AWS ETL tools Experience with AWS cloud services and PostgreSQL Experience with Python or scripting for automation Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control tools, including Azure DevOps or Git Experience in database performance tuning and query optimization Experience working in Agile development environments#CA-GSD#CA-HPN

Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India.We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC)Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: 2-3 years of experience in SQL development, data engineering, or ETL development Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field Experience with SQL Server and T-SQL development Experience with SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services) for ETL development Experience writing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and views Experience with data warehousing concepts, including fact tables, dimension tables, and star schema Experience with SSRS or similar reporting tools Preferred: Experience with Azure Data Factory or AWS ETL tools Experience with AWS cloud services and PostgreSQL Experience with Python or scripting for automation Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control tools, including Azure DevOps or Git Experience in database performance tuning and query optimization Experience working in Agile development environments#CA-GSD#CA-HPN
