description: Data Engineer - Senior ConsultantAs you start your career, are you ready to take the next step to learn methods and process to provide business and individual tax return compliance support to Deloitte Tax? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and create an impact that matters? If the answer to the above is “Yes,” then come join us!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support services through the teams in USI Tax teams.Deloitte Tax is leading its clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace, offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to comply with reporting requirements, uncover insights and deploy smarter approaches for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doTax Technology professionals at USI Tax combine insight and innovation with business and industry knowledge to support in serving Deloitte Tax clients excel globally. We are looking for individuals who have a passion for technology to support Deloitte Tax - whether it’s data analysis, building predictive models, automating workflows, or enhancing processing capabilities. If you would like to learn how to make technologies work in a corporate environment, then our team might be a fit for you.Key Responsibilities as a Data Engineer. You may assist and support Deloitte Tax in:ü  Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data from various sources to prepare it for analysis.ü  Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) to identify trends, patterns, and insights using statistical techniques.ü  Assist in building, testing, and validating basic predictive models and machine learning algorithms under supervision.ü  Generate data visualizations (charts, graphs, dashboards) to communicate findings to team members and stakeholders.ü  Support the development and maintenance of data pipelines and workflows for ongoing analytics projects.ü  Document data sources, methodologies, and analytical processes to ensure transparency and reproducibility.ü  Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., business analysts, IT, data engineers) to understand project requirements and deliver actionable insights.ü  Prepare and present summary reports of analytical results to both technical and non-technical audiences.ü  Stay updated with emerging data science tools, techniques, and best practices through continuous learning.ü  Ensure data privacy and security standards are maintained throughout all analytical processes.ü  Leverage automation, cognitive and AI based solutions to manage data, predict scenarios and prescribe actionsQualifications and Requirements for assistance and support to Deloitte Tax:ü Full-time Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) or equivalent in Computer Science (CSE) or Data Science or Artificial Intelligence with minimum of 60% or equivalent CGPA in the results notified as on date of application.ü  Knowledge of data science theory, techniques and tools and experience working with large disparate data sets.ü 4+ years of hands-on experience in DBMS concepts, SQL, and PL/SQL with good knowledge of Snowflake and/or Databricks.ü  Awareness of big data technologies (Databricks, Snowflake,Spark) and/or computer clustersü  Awareness of standard analytical tech stacks (Jupyter Notebooks, Azure, AWS, PyTorch, R, etc.)ü Strong programming skills in one or more languages commonly used in data science, such as Python, and a solid understanding of database concepts (e.g., SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB).ü Strong communication skills and the ability to present findings in an understandable manner to a non-technical audience ü Clearly explain thought processes and understand instructions, while actively seeking clarification when neededü Knowledge about the applications of statistics, analytical methods, and large language models (LLMs) and AI would be considered a plusü Ability to perform data intensive tasks and be skilled in organizing the data for reporting requirementsü Ability to work independently and as part of a team with professionals at all levelWork Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Kolkata/Mumbai/GurgaonShift Timings:ü Depending title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI- L35 - Consultant - Oracle GTM Techno - Hyderabad/Bengaluru/Mumbai/Pune/Gurugram/Chennai/Kolkata
description: Oracle Global Trade Management (GTM)Role Title: Oracle GTM  Techno - Functional ConsultantRole SummaryResponsible for designing, implementing, and supporting Oracle Global Trade Management (GTM) solutions to enable compliant, efficient cross-border trade. This role translates global trade compliance and logistics requirements into Oracle GTM configuration and integrations, ensuring accurate classification, screening, licensing, duty/tax determination, documentation, and reporting across regions.Key Responsibilities1) Discovery & RequirementsLead workshops with Trade Compliance, Customs, Logistics, Order Management, Finance, and IT.Document end-to-end trade processes: import/export, FTAs, restricted party screening, embargo controls, licensing, customs filings support, and landed cost.Define business rules for product classification (HS/HTS), ECCN/dual-use, origin, valuation, preference, and trade document needs.Create functional specs, user stories, process maps, test scenarios, and traceability.2) Oracle GTM Solution Design & ConfigurationConfigure Oracle GTM objects and business rules, including (as applicable):Trade Item/Product Master trade attributes (HS, ECCN, origin, PGA attributes, etc.)Restricted Party Screening (RPS): party matching rules, escalation/holds, audit trailTrade compliance controls: embargo/sanctions, denied party, license determination, controls by country/product/end useLicense management: license types, decrements, usage tracking, expiry alertsFTA / Preference programs: qualification rules, supplier solicitations (if used), calculations, certificatesCustoms and filing readiness: declaration data prep, document sets, filing packets (where supported/required)Landed cost / duty & tax estimation and allocation (when in scope)Workflow, holds, approvals, notifications, and exception handlingDefine role-based access, compliance audit requirements, and retention needs.3) Integrations & DataDesign/validate integrations between Oracle GTM and enterprise systems, such as:ERP/Order-to-Cash (often Oracle EBS/Cloud ERP), OMS, WMS/TMS, PLM/PIM, broker/filing providersCollaborate with technical teams on:Interface mappings, canonical models, error handling, retries, monitoring, and reconciliationMaster data governance for item, party, country, and classification dataSupport data conversion/migration for items, parties, licenses, and historical transactions (as required).4) Testing, Cutover, and HypercarePlan and execute SIT/UAT, performance testing (if needed), and compliance scenario testing.Resolve defects, manage configuration iterations, and support cutover planning (controls, holds, and contingency plans).Provide hypercare support and transition to steady-state operations.5) Change Management & TrainingDevelop SOPs, work instructions, training materials, and end-user training for compliance and operational teams.Support operating model design (RACI), exception queues, and compliance governance.6) Reporting & Audit SupportDefine and validate trade compliance reporting needs: screening results, license usage, classification coverage, preference claims, audit logs.Support internal/external audits by ensuring traceability and control title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI-L45 -Senior - NetSuite/Workday/INFOR
description: Workday/INFOR/NetSuite - Senior ConsultantWorkday, NetSuite, Zuora and Salesforce are some of the rising SaaS ERP technologies that are revolutionizing how tax is managed and how tax departments around the globe operate. If you are someone who thrives in navigating the growing tax landscape through a technology lens and partnering with passionate professionals to help companies achieve their tax objectives; then we would like to get to know you. Apply now!What you’ll do:As a professional in Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) team, you will be a part of a team that provides an integrated approach to technology implementations that help tax departments maximize the strategic value to the organization. You will deliver services for companies that are implementing tax solutions related to enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems and tax applications.As a Senior you will contribute to the growth and success of Deloitte Tax LLP in a variety of ways, including:• Client Management: Participate in the day-to-day interactions with client’s project team members and Deloitte project leadership members• Delivery: Deliver components of Workday, INFOR and/or NetSuite, Integration, Supply Chain, HCM or third-party tax software implementations including designing, configuring, testing and training of the solution.• Solutions: With an emphasis on tax processes, identify business requirements, requirements management, functional design, prototyping, process design (including scenario design, flow mapping), testing, training, defining support procedures and supporting implementations.• Cross Functional Teaming: Understand and articulate the broader Tax practice and Deloitte overall. Maintain relationships and serve clients holistically.• People Development: Participate in the development of team members.• Business Development: Participate in and contribute to pursuit teams.QualificationsRequired:• 5+ years’ experience in implementation of ERPs or tax software that include but not limited to experience with tax requirements for direct tax such as corporate income tax, operational transfer pricing, state income taxation and indirect tax such as sales & use tax, VAT, GST, property tax, or withholding tax solutions including but not limited to using native Workday, INFOR and/or NetSuite functionality, ONESOURCE Indirect Determination, Vertex, Avalara, SOVOS, Taxware• Bachelor’s degree in accounting, computer science or related field Workday, INFOR, NetSuite, SAP, Oracle, ONESOURCE, Vertex, CPA, Enrolled Agent, or other technology related certification (either in process or able/willing to obtain)• Travel up to 50% (While 50% of travel is a requirement of the role, due to COVID-19, non-essential travel has been suspended until further notice.)Preferred:• Experience with a Big 4 firm, large ERP/consulting organization, or a large IT department of a multinational company with tax related experience• Other leading Cloud based SaaS financial application implementation experience (i.e.: Fusion Intact, PeopleSoft, Oracle, SAP, Lawson)The teamAt Deloitte Tax LLP, our Tax Management Consulting (TMC) practice helps tax departments pursue a streamlined, transparent, and efficient tax function that enhances the core responsibilities of compliance, reporting and planning, while also positioning tax as a strategic business advisor for the digital era. We specialize in tax and can effectively address a corporate tax function’s unique needs, requirements and obligations. As technology specialists, we help clients make appropriate technology choices for both direct and indirect taxes across all business cycles that have a tax impact. Our team, the largest of its type, offers the necessary combination of skills, methodology and practical experience to help clients with a successful ERP implementation.Deloitte TMC professionals are aligned across our global network of member firms to support our clients’ objectives and address their challenges. Our team’s multi-disciplinary approach combines tax technical and technology skillsets, enabling greater impact and efficiency within our client’s organization. TMC’s business services help clients with operating model evaluation, roadmap development for a desired future state, data management solutions, automation opportunities, tax portal, cloud for enterprise systems, agile resourcing models, risk, provision and compliance. Learn more about Deloitte Tax Management Consulting.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help sharpen skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Center.BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Recruiter tipsWe want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering - Product Manager - SNOW- Assistant /Deputy Manager
description: A Lead Product Analyst (Assistant Manager) is a mid-level individual contributor responsible for ensuring a product’s value and viability within a product line. This role involves leading empowered, cross-functional product teams to solve customer problems that align with business needs. Being a mid-level product management role, you will have the opportunity to own products of lesser complexity that drive business value. The Lead Product Analyst, like any of our product managers, is accountable for the product’s success, from vision to execution, and collaborates closely with various functions and stakeholders to deliver valuable, viable, usable, and feasible solutions. Work you'll do As a Product Management Specialist II on the product management team, you will be responsible for: Defining and advancing product vision, strategy, and roadmap priorities aligned with business objectives and customer needs Establishing, monitoring, and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess product performance and inform decisions Partnering with business, engineering, experience, and delivery stakeholders to translate priorities into actionable product plans Conducting user research, stakeholder engagement, and competitive analysis to identify opportunities and shape solutions Driving continuous improvement by removing obstacles, supporting experimentation, and sharing product management practices across the team The team You will join a cross-functional team focused on delivering product solutions that address business priorities and improve user outcomes. The team collaborates closely across business, engineering, experience, and delivery to shape strategy, evaluate opportunities, and bring scalable solutions to market. This environment emphasizes evidence-based decision-making, continuous learning, and shared ownership of product outcomes. Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field 5-8+ years of experience in product management, product analysis, product owner, or similar roles Experience defining product vision, roadmap, backlog priorities, or release plans for a product or product capability Experience establishing, tracking, and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product outcomes Experience working with business stakeholders, engineering, user experience, and delivery teams in a cross-functional environment Experience conducting user research, market analysis, or competitive analysis to support product decisions Experience supporting product value, viability, and business objectives, including profit and loss (P&L) measures Preferred: Experience working in Agile, Scrum, or Kanban delivery environments Experience using product management and collaboration tools such as Jira, Azure DevOps, or Confluence Experience using reporting or analytics tools such as Tableau or Power BI Experience facilitating roadmap reviews, backlog refinement, or stakeholder workshops Experience working across enterprise platforms or multiple business domains

Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field 5-8+ years of experience in product management, product analysis, product owner, or similar roles Experience defining product vision, roadmap, backlog priorities, or release plans for a product or product capability Experience establishing, tracking, and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product outcomes Experience working with business stakeholders, engineering, user experience, and delivery teams in a cross-functional environment Experience conducting user research, market analysis, or competitive analysis to support product decisions Experience supporting product value, viability, and business objectives, including profit and loss (P&L) measures Preferred: Experience working in Agile, Scrum, or Kanban delivery environments Experience using product management and collaboration tools such as Jira, Azure DevOps, or Confluence Experience using reporting or analytics tools such as Tableau or Power BI Experience facilitating roadmap reviews, backlog refinement, or stakeholder workshops Experience working across enterprise platforms or multiple business domains
experience_requirements: A Lead Product Analyst (Assistant Manager) is a mid-level individual contributor responsible for ensuring a product’s value and viability within a product line. This role involves leading empowered, cross-functional product teams to solve customer problems that align with business needs. Being a mid-level product management role, you will have the opportunity to own products of lesser complexity that drive business value. The Lead Product Analyst, like any of our product managers, is accountable for the product’s success, from vision to execution, and collaborates closely with various functions and stakeholders to deliver valuable, viable, usable, and feasible solutions. Work you'll do As a Product Management Specialist II on the product management team, you will be responsible for: Defining and advancing product vision, strategy, and roadmap priorities aligned with business objectives and customer needs Establishing, monitoring, and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess product performance and inform decisions Partnering with business, engineering, experience, and delivery stakeholders to translate priorities into actionable product plans Conducting user research, stakeholder engagement, and competitive analysis to identify opportunities and shape solutions Driving continuous improvement by removing obstacles, supporting experimentation, and sharing product management practices across the team The team You will join a cross-functional team focused on delivering product solutions that address business priorities and improve user outcomes. The team collaborates closely across business, engineering, experience, and delivery to shape strategy, evaluate opportunities, and bring scalable solutions to market. This environment emphasizes evidence-based decision-making, continuous learning, and shared ownership of product outcomes. Location: Hyderabad, Bengaluru Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field 5-8+ years of experience in product management, product analysis, product owner, or similar roles Experience defining product vision, roadmap, backlog priorities, or release plans for a product or product capability Experience establishing, tracking, and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product outcomes Experience working with business stakeholders, engineering, user experience, and delivery teams in a cross-functional environment Experience conducting user research, market analysis, or competitive analysis to support product decisions Experience supporting product value, viability, and business objectives, including profit and loss (P&L) measures Preferred: Experience working in Agile, Scrum, or Kanban delivery environments Experience using product management and collaboration tools such as Jira, Azure DevOps, or Confluence Experience using reporting or analytics tools such as Tableau or Power BI Experience facilitating roadmap reviews, backlog refinement, or stakeholder workshops Experience working across enterprise platforms or multiple business domains

title: USI - EH27 - Talent Services - Learning Operations - Services Support Associate I
description: Are you an individual who is customer service oriented and enjoy providing service to internal clients in different countries? The Learning Operations team in the US India office is a team of individuals that provide end to end learning administrative and backend operations support for Deloitte Member Firms across the globe. At Deloitte, you’ll gain exposure to a variety of industries and business models, helping your career growth and professional development. Work you'll do As a Services Support Associate I, Talent Processes and Business Support on the Learning Operations team, you will be responsible for: Supporting training planning and delivery activities for offshore clients, including administrative tasks, data entry, and system updates Communicating with stakeholders and team leadership to coordinate requests, provide status updates, and support day-to-day operations Completing assigned activities accurately, on time, and in accordance with process requirements Performing quality checks on deliverables before submission to internal clients Contributing to team initiatives, collaborating across the team, and managing workload priorities effectively The team At Deloitte, our team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiatives and seek on-the-job learning opportunities. title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-AI&E-EaaS-SWE-Software Engineer II-Java/Mainframe/Pega/QA-NYL
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, driving innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.Position SummarySoftware Engineer II supports the design, development, and delivery of scalable technology solutions that help clients modernize platforms and improve business outcomes. In this role, you will contribute high-quality software development across Java, Spring Boot, microservices, and React-based applications while working within established timelines and quality standards. You will also support innovation, automation, and continuous improvement efforts across delivery teams.Work you'll doAs a Software Engineer II on the Engineering as a Service team, you will be responsible for:Develop, enhance, and maintain backend services, microservices, and RESTful APIs using Java, J2EE, and Spring Boot.Build and support React-based applications integrated with backend services to deliver scalable, secure, and reliable solutions.Contribute to application design, database access, debugging, performance optimization, and code quality across the software development lifecycle.Adapt to project tools, delivery methods, and client environments while maintaining project documentation, delivery metrics, and compliance requirements.Support process improvement, automation, knowledge sharing, and development of tools, accelerators, and innovative solutions across engagements.The TeamEngineering as a Service provides complete design, implementation, and technology operations, leveraging our core engineering expertise. We transform engineering teams, modernize technology, and deliver complex programs with a product engineering approach. Our flexible delivery models—traditional teams, pools, or pods—are tailored to each client’s needs, offering engineering-led advisory, implementation, and operational capabilities to accelerate innovation.Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university    Location: Bengaluru/HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM IST as per business title: USI - EH27 - Global Operate -Pricing - Specialist Assistant Manager
description: Deloitte - Global Operate -Pricing - Specialist Assistant ManagerDo you thrive on developing creative and innovative insights to solve complex challenges? Want to work on next- generation, cutting-edge products and services that deliver outstanding value and that are global in vision and scope? Work with premiere thought leaders in your field? Work for a world-class organization that provides an exceptional career experience with an inclusive and collaborative culture?Want to make an impact that matters? Consider Deloitte Global.Work you’ll do:In this role, you would be a member of the Global Operate team, working with Global businesses (Consulting, Tax & Legal, Cyber and Financial Advisory) and various Deloitte Firms. You will provide project management expertise and develop deliverables for a variety of internal audiences, including Global Businesses, Deloitte Firms, and the Global Operate Council to engage, inspire and motivate people to embrace the significant changes that are required to achieve our ambition. You must demonstrate a deep understanding of project management best practices and apply them effectively in a global, complex environment. Strong writing abilities, high attention to detail and ability to juggle multiple projects is a must. Key responsibilities may include:Partner with business & Deloitte firm leaders to drive global alignment around strategic initiativesCollaborate across the firm to assess and prioritize strategic projects to best align with Deloitte’s Operate strategy and growth objectives.Loading and extracting data from pricing tools. Developing visualization according to businesses, portfolios and offerings.Closely work with USI team in India location on pricing, solutioning & contracting.Develop data automation and workflows. Maintaining project documentation, including but not limited to project plans, meeting minutes, status reports, dashboards.Developing current or former proficiency in Advanced Data Analytics and/or modelling. Excel being key skill.Coordinate activities across different workstreams and stakeholders, ensuring that timelines are met. Monitor project progress and identify potential risks and issues that may impact the project's success. Proactively track and work with teams to address themConnect with business leaders to gather updates, prepare & present specific updates during sessions with Operate leadersCreate executive level documents such as presentations, excel reports, tableau dashboards etc. for senior leadershipDrive onboarding standardization for businesses across workstreams. Define baseline and post onboard activitiesAssist with the management of project budgets and resources, including tracking project expensesConduct research and analysis to support the development of project strategies and solutionsMaintain content on Global Operate intranet site and on the knowledge management siteOrganize meetings and gather information to be presented during monthly check-ins with leaders and teamsAdditional responsibilities may include:Contribute to cross-functional projects, working alongside Sales, Learning and Development, Shared Services and CoRe Knowledge Services and liaise with other workstreamsSupporting adaption or evolution of the Operate strategy over timeImplementing strategic initiatives and projects, as requested What you’ll be part of—our Deloitte Global culture:At Deloitte, we expect results. Incredible—tangible—results. And Deloitte Global professionals play a unique role in delivering those results. We reach across disciplines and borders to serve our global organization. We are the engine of Deloitte. We develop and lead global strategies and provide programs and services that unite our network.In Deloitte Global, everyone has an opportunity to lead. We see the importance of your perspective and your ability to create value. title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI-L55 -Manager- SAP FICO/SD/MM Integration with Direct or Indirect Tax experience
description: Manager – Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) - SAP FIOC/MM/SD integration with Direct or Indirect Tax experienceDo you like to be hands on with technology while leading teams with your strong project manager skills? We need entrepreneurial and passionate professionals to play active role in this world and lead implementations.What you will do:As a Manager/Senior Manager, you will contribute to the growth and development of Deloitte Tax India Pvt Ltd in a variety of ways, including:• Business Development: Develop and maintain contact with top decision makers at key clients; organize and lead pursuit teams; participate and lead aspects of the proposal development process; contribute to the development of proposal pricing strategies.• Client Management: Manage the day-to-day interactions with executive clients and sponsors.• Engagement Management: Lead engagement planning and budgeting; mobilize and manage engagement teams; define deliverable structure and content; facilitate buy-in of proposed solutions from top management levels at the client; direct on-time, quality delivery of work products; manage engagement economics; and manage engagement risk.• Practice Development & Eminence: Develop practical solutions and methodologies; develop "thought-ware" and "point-of-view" documents; participate in public speaking events; get published in industry periodicals.• People Development: Perform role of counselor and coach; provide input and guidance into the staffing process; actively participate in staff recruitment and retention activities; provide leadership and support for delivery teams and staff in local offices.The team:Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) group helps our clients’ tax departments improve their operations by developing new technology-enabled, cutting-edge methods and processes. Deloitte TTC professionals are aligned across our global network of member firms to address our clients’ objectives in a seamless fashion. Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who help connect our clients’ global strategies and the options that exist to turn theory into an executable plan.TTC’s Enterprise Tax Integration (ETI) professionals provide an integrated approach to process improvement that can help the tax department maximize its strategic value to the organization. Companies that have already implemented or are considering implementing an enterprise resource planning (ERP) system often overlook the tax benefits these systems can provide or underestimate the impact on the tax department. To be most effective from a tax perspective, a successful ERP implementation requires professionals who specialize in tax and can effectively address a corporate tax function’s unique needs, requirements, and obligations. Our ETI team, the largest of its type, offers the necessary combination of skills, methodology and practical experience to help clients avoid the pitfalls of an ERP implementation.Experience Required –• 8 to 15+ years of total experience.• 5+ years of Implementation experience in SAP ECC 6.0 & S4 HANA with focus on Tax integration with SAP FICO/MM/SD integration with direct or indirect tax experience.• Experience with tax technology applications i.e., ONESOURCE /Global NEXT Integration, Vertex/Accelerator & Chain flow Accelerator Integration, Avalara, Sovos• Expert in Direct and Indirect Tax configuration, Withholding Taxes, local country indirect tax localizations, VAT customizations and Reporting.• Experience with User Exits, preparing functional specifications, executing test cycles, cutovers, go-live and Hypercare, providing user training and documentation.• Expert in cross functional integration of modules - SD-FI & MM-FI• Strong in project management, leadership abilities, and has tendency to independently execute project cycles and deliverables.• Relentless focus on quality of work products while adhering to completing deliverables on time.• Effective communications and strong presentation and team building skills. Initiative-taking participates in firm-based activities and owns his/her career.• Strong analytical skills in business process design and requirements preparationPreferred Skills:• SAP MM or SD (ECC or S4 HANA) Certified• SAP DRC, Central Finance with Tax integration, Transfer Pricing, BRIM• Experience with New GL, Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, Intercompany, Materials Management, Logistics Invoice Verification, Asset Accounting implementation.• Experience with Ariba, Coupa, Hybris, Open Text, Read soft Integration with ERP.The TeamTax Technology Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and, above all, focused on creating value for the business.Deloitte's TTC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the next generation of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TTC group. Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent postgraduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director or partner or principal.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.#TechnologyFY26

Deloitte TTC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent postgraduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director or partner or principal.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.#TechnologyFY26

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-AI&E-EaaS-SWE-Software Engineer II-Java-NYL
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, driving innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.Position SummarySoftware Engineer II supports the design, development, and delivery of scalable technology solutions that help clients modernize platforms and improve business outcomes. In this role, you will contribute high-quality software development across Java, Spring Boot, microservices, and React-based applications while working within established timelines and quality standards. You will also support innovation, automation, and continuous improvement efforts across delivery teams.Work you'll doAs a Software Engineer II on the Engineering as a Service team, you will be responsible for:Develop, enhance, and maintain backend services, microservices, and RESTful APIs using Java, J2EE, and Spring Boot.Build and support React-based applications integrated with backend services to deliver scalable, secure, and reliable solutions.Contribute to application design, database access, debugging, performance optimization, and code quality across the software development lifecycle.Adapt to project tools, delivery methods, and client environments while maintaining project documentation, delivery metrics, and compliance requirements.Support process improvement, automation, knowledge sharing, and development of tools, accelerators, and innovative solutions across engagements.The TeamEngineering as a Service provides complete design, implementation, and technology operations, leveraging our core engineering expertise. We transform engineering teams, modernize technology, and deliver complex programs with a product engineering approach. Our flexible delivery models—traditional teams, pools, or pods—are tailored to each client’s needs, offering engineering-led advisory, implementation, and operational capabilities to accelerate innovation.Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university    Location: Bengaluru/HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM IST as per business requirementsQualifications:Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:3 - 6 years of hands-on experience in Java, J2EE, Springboot, MicroservicesHas built scalable, reliable, and secure backend services and APIs using Java and Spring BootExperienced in developing high-performing React applications integrated with Spring Boot microservicesGood understanding of Object-Oriented Programming conceptsShould be able to provide correct definitions of Object-Oriented Programming Concepts and able to differentiate between them.Able to come up with class structure in adherence with object-oriented conceptsAble to identify mistakes / deviation from object-oriented principles in a given scenario or piece of codeGood theoretical understanding on Java 8+ concepts and hands on experienceWell versed with: Exception Handling, Collections Framework, Threads, Streams, Lambdas etc.Ability to write working code for given scenarios in Core Java(Java 8+)Should be able to predict correct output of code snippetsAble to write impeccable code for the given scenario, should be able to consider performance and security aspects while writing code and justify the logic he/ she has writtenGiven multiple ways to fix a problem, should be able to select the best one and justify the sameGood understanding of Micro Services conceptsDevelop and maintain RESTful APIs for various applications and services.Familiarity with SOAP servicesExplain best practicesAble to ensure effective inter-service communication and data consistencyGiven a scenario, should be able to come up with high level design of micro servicesGood theoretical and hands-on knowledge of Spring framework and Springboot.Able to build simple projects and write working code without handholding.Able to explain important annotationsAble to explain design principles in Spring and SpringbootAble to explain bean creation processAble to explain transaction managementAble to explain database accessExtensive experience with Spring Security, Spring CloudAware of cross cutting concerns and how to address those using Spring frameworkGood understanding of RDBMS and SQL concepts, should be able to understand, troubleshoot and write complex SQL queriesUnderstanding of forms of Normalization. Able to do table design in accordance with standards.Expertise in any of the ORM frameworks(e.g. Hibernate) and JPA.Should be able to write JPA queriesShould be able to design entity data model for a given scenarioExpertise in transaction management and performance optimization of ORM based codeUnderstanding NoSQL concepts, familiarity with any of NOSQL databases. Able to explain prominent features of NOSQL databases.Should be able to write Junit test cases and ensure code coverage.Strong theoretical understanding and hands-on experience in basic advanced aspects of React concepts - Hooks, Context API, Redux, Router, performance optimization.Good understanding of cloud computing and any of the cloud providers (AWS, Azure, GCP etc.).Familiar with deployment in cloud and containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes)Good grasp of asynchronous communication and its standard implementationsHands-on experience with version control systems like Git. Able to explain version control process and best practices.Expertise in build-tools like MAVEN and Gradle. Able to address issues like vulnerability fixes.Expertise in CI/CD concepts and tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions). Should be able to explain the build process and its stages.Able to suggest appropriate design pattern for a given scenario and write code in accordance with it.Good grasp of AI concepts and recent trends:Able to explain concepts related to Natural Language Processing (NLP), Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision etc.Able to think about practical project ideas and suggest implementation strategiesShould have worked with Agile methodology and aware of best practices:Awareness of core principles, and application in projectsAble to compare between traditional models with Agile and justify Agile adaptationExplain important Agile Metrics -  velocity, cycle time, burndown charts etc. and usage of the same for process improvementAble to explain Sprint ceremonies and estimation process followed in the current projectShould be able to explain the business impact of the project he is currently working onStrong have good communication skills, experienced with direct client interactionsFor a given scenario, ability to come up with the right questions to be asked to the client to remove ambiguityUsage of right wordsShould be able to explain the key concepts, challenges and trends in the industry aligned to current project and have understanding of technology disruptors specific to the industryTroubleshooting & Debugging: Identify, diagnose, and resolve bugs and performance bottlenecks within the application with minimal hand-holding. Should be able to provide directionally correct answers to questions based on error scenarios.Experienced with integrating Java applications with external APIs, data sources, and databases using web services (RESTful) and other protocols.Should be a good team player. Able to work closely with other developers, designers, project managers, and cross-functional teams to deliver integrated solutions.Certification:Oracle Certified Associate (Java 8 or above)Oracle Certified Professional (Java 8 or above)Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:·       Hands-on experience with any of the cloud providers·       Hands-on experience in AI – Basic understanding of concepts related to Machine Learning (ML), Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision etc·       Awareness / hands-on experience on the following tools/ frameworks:·       Python, TensorFlow and PyTorch, Scikit-learn, NLP Libraries·       Foundational, developer and architect level certification with any of the cloud providers:·       AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner / Microsoft Azure Fundamentals / GCP Foundational certification·       AWS Certified Developer – Associate, Microsoft Azure Developer Associate, GCP Associate certification·       Awareness of recent industry specific events and able to explain their impact on the work that he has been doing

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering - Delivery Leader - AVP
description: Delivery LeaderJob DescriptionOverview: As a Delivery Leader at Deloitte, you will own the delivery for multiple products across our portfolio, ensuring a cohesive strategy and seamless execution across various segments. Your extensive experience in program management and project leadership will be pivotal in driving strategic alignment, inspiring cross-functional teams, and delivering enterprise IT solutions that meet organizational goals. With a strong focus on operational excellence, customer-centric problem-solving, innovation and continuous improvement, you will guide teams to achieve peak performance and deliver high-quality outcomes on time and within budget. The ideal candidate will be a visionary leader and mentor, committed to driving success for Deloitte's clients and business investments.Responsibilities: Lead large-scale implementations, develop and articulate vision and objectives, and ensure alignment with business strategies. Demonstrating strategic vision evolution through continuous learning. Inspire product engineering teams, advocate for discovery and delivery practices, and educate the organization on product engineering models. Promote continuous improvement and spread knowledge through community sessions. Drive complex programs, define and measure product engineering maturity, and achieve Objectives/KPIs. Ensure tools and reports are available to track progress. Conduct quality audits and engage hands-on with delivery and team growth. Learn and experiment with new techniques/tools like GenAI. Coach delivery managers to develop strong capabilities. Advise on discovery and delivery methodologies, share learnings through evangelism, and provide examples of people development. Drive process optimization, quality and risk management, capacity planning, and resource utilization and drive operational excellence. Focus on addressing critical customer issues and aligning teams with business objectives. Engage cross-functional teams to achieve peak outcomes through continuous learning and collaboration. Identify inefficiencies, build problem-solving capabilities, and enhance the product engineering model to be lean and adaptable. Guide the organization to embrace lean principles and foster innovation. Influence decision-making processes, ensure effective communication, and resolve conflicts. Foster close collaboration within the product community. Establish risk management processes, identify and mitigate risks, and focus on early learning and fast feedback. Proactively solve problems and plan contingencies.The TeamUS Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary product development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. We develop and deploy cutting-edge go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Qualifications 15+ years of experience in product management or project leadership, managing enterprise IT solutions across multiple teams, with demonstrated experience in strategic product management and leading multiple teams.Strong skills in developing and implementing strategic plans to meet organizational goals.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to engage and manage stakeholders. Extensive knowledge of project management methodologies and tools, with a track record of delivering projects on time and within budget.Deep understanding of industry trends, market dynamics, and competitive landscape to drive business growth and innovation.Strong leadership capabilities with Customer-centric mindset. How You will Grow: At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world- class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India

Coach delivery managers to develop strong capabilities. Advise on discovery and delivery methodologies, share learnings through evangelism, and provide examples of people development. Drive process optimization, quality and risk management, capacity planning, and resource utilization and drive operational excellence. Focus on addressing critical customer issues and aligning teams with business objectives. Engage cross-functional teams to achieve peak outcomes through continuous learning and collaboration. Identify inefficiencies, build problem-solving capabilities, and enhance the product engineering model to be lean and adaptable. Guide the organization to embrace lean principles and foster innovation. Influence decision-making processes, ensure effective communication, and resolve conflicts. Foster close collaboration within the product community. Establish risk management processes, identify and mitigate risks, and focus on early learning and fast feedback. Proactively solve problems and plan contingencies.The TeamUS Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary product development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. We develop and deploy cutting-edge go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Qualifications 15+ years of experience in product management or project leadership, managing enterprise IT solutions across multiple teams, with demonstrated experience in strategic product management and leading multiple teams.Strong skills in developing and implementing strategic plans to meet organizational goals.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to engage and manage stakeholders. Extensive knowledge of project management methodologies and tools, with a track record of delivering projects on time and within budget.Deep understanding of industry trends, market dynamics, and competitive landscape to drive business growth and innovation.Strong leadership capabilities with Customer-centric mindset. How You will Grow: At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world- class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India
hiring_organization: Deloitte | India Offices of the US

title: USI-EH27-OCIO-Strategy Manager-HYD
description: Manager – Strategic Design & Delivery - DT-US OCIO - HyderabadDT-US | DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY | OCIO STRATEGYPosition summaryAbout the role:Are you a design-obsessed professional who finds satisfaction in transforming complex, information-dense content into visually compelling stories? As a Manager - Strategic Design & Delivery within the Deloitte Technology-US (DT-US) Office of the CIO (OCIO) Strategy team, you will play a critical role in producing executive-ready deliverables that inform and influence senior technology and business leaders. The ideal candidate combines exceptional design skills across Microsoft Office and graphic design tools (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite) with a strong eye for detail, business acumen, storytelling, and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced, high-stakes environment.The work you'll do• Own end-to-end design and production of high-stakes executive deliverables across a variety of formats• Bring complex ideas to life visually by translating dense and/or scattered data into clear and compelling narratives• Apply your full design toolkit (e.g., Microsoft Office, Adobe Creative Suite) to produce outputs that reinforce DT-US’s strategic ambitions• Leverage AI-powered tools to accelerate deliverable production, enhance quality, and continuously elevate what the team can deliver• Partner with US- and India-based DT-US professionals as creative thought partners to shape how ideas are structured, visualized, and communicated• Develop and refine strategic communications for diverse audiences (e.g., executive stakeholders, large practitioner groups)• Promote a high level of stakeholder satisfaction by meeting deadlines, managing expectations, and communicating risks and issues effectively• Craft compelling visual narratives that translate strategic priorities into stories that resonate with executive leaders and broad audiences• Create and maintain a library of complex and customized templates (e.g., graphics, PowerPoint slides)Qualifications required• Design or visual communications professional with 10+ years of relevant experience in a corporate, professional services, or technology environment• Expert-level proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint, Word, and Excel — including custom layouts, executive presentation design, charting, data visualization, and slide master management• Demonstrated experience producing materials for executive or C-suite audiences, with a portfolio of high-quality, executive-ready deliverables• Proven success applying visual design principles — layout, hierarchy, color theory, typography, and information architecture — to complex business content• Demonstrated ability to support strategic communications for diverse audiences — from executive stakeholders to broader practitioner groups — adapting tone, format, and visual complexity to suit the channel and audience level• Solid organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to independently prioritize and deliver across multiple projects under overnight turnaround commitments• Strong executive presence and comfort interpreting ambiguous briefs, with the ability to produce high-quality outputs with minimal rework• Detail-oriented with exceptional follow-through; consistently delivers polished work that meets or exceeds stakeholder expectations• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills, including the ability to clearly articulate design decisions and incorporate feedback during daily syncs with US-based colleagues• Ability to work effectively in a matrixed, cross-functional, and virtual team environment; experience in large complex multinational organizations a plus• Proficient in Microsoft 365 collaboration tools including Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, and co-authoring workflows• Demonstrated experience using graphic design tools (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) to create polished graphics, infographics, icons, and executive-ready visual assets• Experience in consulting and/or technology industry strongly preferred• Graduate or post-graduate degree, preferably in Graphic Design, Visual Communications, Business, or a related field

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Finance AI- Analytics and Insights Engineer II
description: Finance TransformationWe are seeking a highly motivated Finance & AI Specialist with 3+ years of experience who brings together deep business finance expertise and hands-on artificial intelligence capabilities. This role sits at the intersection of financial strategy and emerging technology, enabling the organization to unlock new value through intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and AI-driven decision support.The ideal candidate will be equally comfortable building financial models and designing AI pipelines — translating complex financial requirements into scalable, intelligent solutions. You will serve as a bridge between the Finance function and the Data & Technology organization, driving transformation initiatives that improve speed, accuracy, and strategic insight across the business.Work you'll doAs an Analytics and Insights Engineer II on the Finance AI team, you will be responsible for:• Analyze finance and business requirements and translate them into conceptual, logical, and technical AI-enabled solutions • Collaborate with finance stakeholders, business analysts, data architects, and technology teams to define and deliver scalable solutions • Design, develop, and deploy artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions for finance use cases such as anomaly detection, cash flow prediction, forecasting, and expense classification • Develop generative AI, natural language processing, prompt library, retrieval-augmented generation, and multi-agent solutions to support finance planning, reporting, audit, and decision support activities • Build and maintain data pipelines and API-based integrations across cloud and data platforms, including AWS, Databricks, and Snowflake • Support AI governance, model risk, and explainability practices, and provide guidance to team members on AI tools, agentic AI, and prompt engineeringThe teamThe Finance AI team helps finance organizations apply data, analytics, and artificial intelligence to improve decision-making, automation, and business insight. The team works across finance, data, and technology stakeholders to design scalable solutions that support planning, reporting, and operational efficiency. This role contributes to the delivery of intelligent solutions that combine finance domain knowledge with emerging technology capabilities.Location: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, ChennaiQualificationsRequired:• Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance, or a related field • 3+ years of experience building AI or machine learning solutions in enterprise environments • 3+ years of experience supporting finance processes such as financial planning and analysis, controllership, commercial finance, reporting, or forecasting • Experience developing solutions using Python, SQL, and data libraries such as Pandas or NumPy • Experience building generative AI, agent-based, natural language processing, or retrieval-augmented generation solutions • Experience integrating data from platforms such as AWS, Databricks, Snowflake, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform • Experience translating business requirements into technical solution designs and production-ready implementationsPreferred:• Experience with FastAPI, Node.js, or ReactJS • Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, or vector database tools • Experience with AWS services such as Bedrock, SageMaker, Amazon EC2, or API Gateway • Experience with data modeling • Experience working in Agile delivery environments#FY27_FT_Business Finance_Finance AI

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Profitability & Cost Management-Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance Transformation As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for leading Oracle EPCM solution delivery across finance transformation engagements. Lead the design and development of Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management applications based on business and functional requirements. Design allocation rules, custom calculations, and Groovy business rules to support profitability, cost management, and financial performance analysis. Architect and implement data integration processes using Data Management to load data from Oracle Fusion General Ledger and other Oracle Enterprise Performance Management applications. Design and deliver customized reports, dashboards, and Excel-based financial models; perform data validation, reconciliation, and integration with other Oracle Enterprise Performance Management modules. Contribute across all project phases from requirements gathering through Hypercare, including end-user training, system performance monitoring, troubleshooting, and mentoring junior team members. The teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) or equivalent from an accredited university. 8+ years of experience implementing Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management or Profitability and Cost Management Cloud Service solutions. Experience designing and developing allocation rules, data models, and workflows to support financial performance analysis. Experience developing data integration processes using Data Management to load data from Oracle Fusion General Ledger and other Oracle Enterprise Performance Management applications. Experience building allocation and custom calculations and developing Groovy business rules in Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management. Experience designing customized reports and dashboards, developing Excel-based financial models, and performing data validation, reconciliation, and integration with Oracle Enterprise Performance Management modules including Financial Consolidation and Close Service and Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service. Experience supporting end-user training, monitoring system performance, troubleshooting issues, applying updates, and delivering work across project phases from requirements gathering through Hypercare. Experience mentoring junior team members and working independently with technical and functional direction from leads. Preferred: Experience with Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management Agent. Experience using generative artificial intelligence tools or integrated features, including Intelligent Performance Management Insights. Experience with financial planning or cost allocation tools in addition to Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management. Oracle certification in Enterprise Performance Management Cloud, Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management, or a comparable Oracle certification. #FY27_FT_BF  #FinanceTransformation   #FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-DFO&I- AEP & AJO- Senior Consultant, Managed Services
description: #DFO&I2027CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Senior Consultant, Managed ServicesWe are seeking an Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) and Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO) Developer to build and operationalize marketing analytics and activation solutions. This role partners with Marketing, Product, and Data teams to deliver trusted customer data pipelines, identity resolution, segmentation, and cross-channel journey orchestration, supported by strong engineering fundamentals in SQL, ETL, Python, cloud platforms, and data visualization.Work you’ll do: AEP / AJO deliveryDesign, develop, and maintain AEP schemas, datasets, dataflows, and data governance-aligned configurations to support marketing analytics and activation.Implement and optimize AJO journeys, message templates, and channel configurations (e.g., email/push/SMS, as applicable).Build and manage audience segmentation and support activation use cases (e.g., lifecycle, churn prevention, propensity-driven journeys).Partner with stakeholders to translate marketing measurement needs into AEP/AJO technical designs (events, attributes, profile enablement, and downstream consumption).Data engineering (SQL / ETL / Python)Develop and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest and transform data from sources such as CRM, web/app analytics, ad platforms, and transactional systems into AEP and analytics layers.Write high-quality SQL for profiling, transformation, validation, and performance tuning across warehouses/lakes.Use Python for orchestration, automation, data quality checks, API integrations, and lightweight services/utilities supporting marketing data operations.Establish data quality controls: reconciliation, anomaly detection, lineage documentation, and runbook procedures.Cloud & platform operationsBuild and operate solutions on cloud ecosystems (e.g., AWS/Azure/GCP), leveraging managed services for compute, storage, orchestration, and monitoring.Implement secure data handling practices (PII controls, encryption, access management) and support audit/compliance requirements.Monitor and troubleshoot pipelines and journey execution; drive continuous improvements for reliability, scalability, and cost efficiency.Analytics enablement & visualizationCreate curated datasets (semantic layers/marts) for marketing performance reporting and experimentation measurement.Build dashboards and automated reporting in tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Looker, enabling self-service insights for marketers and executives.Define and support KPI frameworks (e.g., conversion, retention, LTV, attribution inputs), ensuring metric consistency across teams.The team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:6 - 10 years of hands-marketing data engineering, martech development, or marketing analytics engineering roles.Hands-on experience with Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) and Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO) implementations in production environments.Strong SQL skills (complex joins, window functions, performance tuning, data modeling).Strong ETL/ELT experience (batch and/or streaming), including data validation and observability.Proficiency in Python for data workflows and automation.Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) and modern data stacks (data lake/warehouse concepts, orchestration, CI/CD).Experience delivering dashboards and analytical datasets for marketing and product stakeholders.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Familiarity with customer identity resolution, event-based data modeling, and customer 360/profile concepts.Experience with real-time/event streaming (e.g., Kafka/Kinesis/PubSub) and/or API-driven integrations. Knowledge of marketing measurement approaches (incrementality/experimentation, attribution concepts, funnel analytics). Exposure to data governance frameworks and marketing consent/privacy requirements.Experience implementing CI/CD, automated testing, and infrastructure-as-code (tooling varies). Technical skills (explicit) AEP/AJO: schemas/datasets/dataflows, segmentation, profiles, journey configuration, activation troubleshooting SQL: advanced querying, optimization, dimensional/behavioral modeling ETL/ELT: pipeline design, orchestration, data quality/observability Python: automation, APIs, transformations, validation Cloud: AWS/Azure/GCP services for data & analytics workloads; monitoring/logging Data visualization: Tableau / Power BI / Looker; KPI definitions and executive-ready dashboards Success measures (example outcomes) Reduced time-to-activate audiences and launch journeys through reliable, documented pipelines. Improved marketing reporting trust via automated data quality checks and reconciliations. Increased adoption of dashboards and self-service datasets across Marketing Analytics stakeholders.Education:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university  Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai
