title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI-L55 -Manager- Oracle EBS
description: Manager–Tax Technology Consulting – Oracle EBSDo you have a passion to work for US-based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact on global initiatives? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join the Tax Technology Consulting group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to gain experience U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you will doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally.Key responsibilities will be: -ü  Conduct Client workshopsü  Gather and document tax requirements for business and performing system fit and gap analysisü  Advising clients on Tax department strategy/policy including Tax assessment from a people, process, technology, and governance point of viewü  Process improvements, redesigning client tax departments and evaluating automation opportunitiesü  Work on design and development of tax solutionsü  Conduct user acceptance testing to compile comprehensive test scenarios and identify flaws as well as improvements to newly built systems and processesQualification and Experience Required –ü  Full time Masters/Bachelor’s in Engineering/Finance/Accounts or equivalent from reputed Universityü  MBA or Chartered Accountant with experience in Finance, Accounting, Taxation and Auditingü  8- 11years of experience Oracle EBS finance modules or Oracle Financials Cloud modules that impact tax.ü  Preferred experience with the following Oracle modules:o    E-Business Tax/Oracle ERP cloud tax module, (Withholding Tax application)o    Trading Community Architectureo    Order Management / iStoreo    Accounts Receivableso    Purchasing / iExpenseo    Accounts Payable, (Withholding Tax application)o    Supplier Master / iSupplier Portalo    Fixed Assetso    Project Accountingo    General Ledgero    Oracle BIü  Financial consolidation processes and applications (e.g., Hyperion applications)ü  Proficiency in MS Office applications, specifically Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Accessü  Effective communication with strong relationship management skillsü  Team player, adhering to the timelines for finishing deliverablesü  Strong project management and leadership abilitiesü  Relentless focus on quality of work products while adhering to completing deliverables on timePreferred:ü  Knowledge of business and tax processes, creating functional specifications, identifying, and developing requirements for new reports, preparing test scripts, and providing user training and supportü  Indirect Tax (VAT, Sales/Use) and/or Direct tax (income, provision), withholding tax experienceü  Knowledge of country specific localization capabilities of Oracle EBS and Oracle fusion applicationsü  Experience with third party tax software like Vertex, ONESOURCE, SOVOS (Taxware), Avalara etc.ü  Basic or advanced knowledge of PL/SQLThe TeamTax Technology Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and focused on creating value for the business.Deloitte's TMC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the next generation of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TMC group. Deloitte TMC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you will growAt Deloitte, we have invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent postgraduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director, partner, or principal.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.#CA-PA#CA-HPN#TechnologyFY26#CA-DS1

solutionsü  Conduct user acceptance testing to compile comprehensive test scenarios and identify flaws as well as improvements to newly built systems and processesQualification and Experience Required –ü  Full time Masters/Bachelor’s in Engineering/Finance/Accounts or equivalent from reputed Universityü  MBA or Chartered Accountant with experience in Finance, Accounting, Taxation and Auditingü  8- 11years of experience Oracle EBS finance modules or Oracle Financials Cloud modules that impact tax.ü  Preferred experience with the following Oracle modules:o    E-Business Tax/Oracle ERP cloud tax module, (Withholding Tax application)o    Trading Community Architectureo    Order Management / iStoreo    Accounts Receivableso    Purchasing / iExpenseo    Accounts Payable, (Withholding Tax application)o    Supplier Master / iSupplier Portalo    Fixed Assetso    Project Accountingo    General Ledgero    Oracle BIü  Financial consolidation processes and applications (e.g., Hyperion applications)ü  Proficiency in MS Office applications, specifically Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Accessü  Effective communication with strong relationship management skillsü  Team player, adhering to the timelines for finishing deliverablesü  Strong project management and leadership abilitiesü  Relentless focus on quality of work products while adhering to completing deliverables on timePreferred:ü  Knowledge of business and tax processes, creating functional specifications, identifying, and developing requirements for new reports, preparing test scripts, and providing user training and supportü  Indirect Tax (VAT, Sales/Use) and/or Direct tax (income, provision), withholding tax experienceü  Knowledge of country specific localization capabilities of Oracle EBS and Oracle fusion applicationsü  Experience with third party tax software like Vertex, ONESOURCE, SOVOS (Taxware), Avalara etc.ü  Basic or advanced knowledge of PL/SQLThe TeamTax Technology Consulting (TTC) - Ever expanding regulations and increasing scrutiny on multinational corporations has made it necessary for leading-edge tax departments to serve a critical role in the risk management and overall performance of the enterprise. This has resulted in an opportunity for Deloitte to provide even greater value through our tax services, in helping develop tax departments of the future that are strategic, agile, and focused on creating value for the business.Deloitte's TMC group helps our clients’ tax department move forward from their current state to the next generation of tax functions and is dedicated to finding new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations. Deloitte Tax LLP professionals are aligned worldwide to serve our clients’ needs through the TMC group. Deloitte TMC teams include industry, tax, organizational change, technology, and co-sourcing specialists who can help make the necessary connections between our clients’ global strategies and the many options for carrying them out in the tax function.How you will growAt Deloitte, we have invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team- based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.Deloitte supports your progression through a well-defined career path by providing challenging assignments, mentoring, and targeted trainings. Recent postgraduates begin as a consultant. The career path from there is to senior consultant, then manager, senior manager and onto a path to director, partner, or principal.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.#CA-PA#CA-HPN#TechnologyFY26#CA-DS1

title: USI - EH27 - OCIO- Data Engineer - Sr Analyst
description: Sr. Analyst – Data Engineer – Deloitte Support Services India Private LimitedWork you’ll do:We are seeking a seasoned Data Engineer to design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines and curated datasets that power analytics, reporting, and data products. This role requires strong hands-on data engineering, data modeling, and data architecture experience in cloud environments (preferably GCP) and Python. Collaborate with cross-functional agile team of analytics engineers, human centered designers, web developers and dev-ops engineers to launch innovative AI-driven Data and Analytics products. Experience with Azure and AWS data engineering tools is a plusResponsibilities:─ Build and maintain batch and/or streaming data pipelines to ingest, transform, and serve data for analytics and AI use cases─ Enhance data collection procedures while upholding data security and privacy norms and obligations to gather most relevant data─ Develop reusable Python components for data processing, automation, and orchestration.─ Design and implement logical and physical data models to support BI, analytics and AI consumption.─ Contribute to data architecture decisions: source-to-target design, layering (raw/curated/semantic), integration patterns, and scalability considerations.─ Implement data quality checks, validation, monitoring/alerting, and production support processes.─ Optimize performance and cost (query tuning, partitioning/clustering, pipeline efficiency).─ Support AI-driven analytics products by enabling feature-ready datasets, metadata, lineage, and reproducible data inputs for model training/inference─ Participate in code reviews, design reviews, documentation, and knowledge sharing.─ Develop an understanding of the core business functions of the client, and bring innovative analytics solution ideas to support those functionsRequired Technical Skills:Must Have:─ Data engineering: building production-grade ETL/ELT pipelines and managing structured datasets.─ Data modeling: translating business needs into analytics-ready models; strong SQL.─ Data architecture: designing end-to-end data flows, standards, and patterns for reliability and scalability.─ GCP: hands-on experience with common services like BigQuery, Cloud Storage (GCS), Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Dataproc (Spark), Cloud Composer (Airflow), Cloud Functions and/or Cloud Run, Cloud Logging/Monitoring, Vertex AI, Secret Manager, IAM.─ Python: strong scripting/software engineering fundamentals (testing, packaging, debugging, maintainable code).─ Proven technical troubleshooting and performance tuning experience─ Experience with integrating Looker, Power BI, Tableau, any other BI toolsGood to have:─ Azure data engineering tools/services (e.g., Fabric, Data Factory, Databricks).─ AWS data engineering tools/services (e.g., Glue, Redshift, EMR, Lambda).─ Familiarity with AI engineering concepts (feature engineering, training/inference data consistency, model monitoring data needs, governance for AI/ML data).─ Exposure or experience supporting AI-driven data and analytics products, such as preparing ML-ready datasets, feature pipelines, or integrating data workflows into model development/serving processes.─ Familiarity with CI/CD and Infrastructure-as-Code practices for data platforms.─ Experience with governance concepts (catalog/lineage, access controls, PII handling)Soft Skills:─ Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with an ability to convey complex concepts clearly and concisely.─ Good at engaging business stakeholders and apt at business engagement and requirement discovery─ Analytical ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks into manageable work products─ Can operate independently or with minimum supervision─ Strong sense of ownership, urgency, and drive─ High level of initiative and self-motivationEducation:─ Bachelor's degree, preferably in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related IT discipline; or equivalent experienceExperience:─ 3–5 years of hands-on experience in data engineering and analytics data delivery.─ Demonstrated experience designing data models and contributing to data architecture for cloud-based platforms.─ Experience supporting production pipelines (monitoring, troubleshooting, SLAs) and working in Agile delivery teams.─ Prior experience partnering with data engineers, AI engineers and DevOps practitioners to operationalize data for model training and analytics products is preferred.Location: HyderabadShift Timing: Shift between 2:00 PM to 11:00 PM ISTAbout DeloitteDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, a UK private company limited by guarantee (“DTTL”), its network ofmember firms, and their related entities. DTTL and each of its member firms are legally separate and independent entities. DTTL (alsoreferred to as “Deloitte Global”) does not provide services to clients. In the United States, Deloitte refers to one or more of the USmember firms of DTTL, their related entities that. operate using the “Deloitte” name in the United States and their respective affiliates.Certain services may not be available to attest clients under the rules and regulations of public accounting. Please seewww.deloitte.com/about to learn more about our global network of member firms.Copyright © 2026 Deloitte Development LLC. All rights reserved.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-SAP PAPM-Analyst, Functional Transformation
description: Functional Transformation Enables finance to drive strategic value through transformation and synchronization of planning, costing, budgeting and forecasting across finance and other functions. Using advanced, scalable data and tech platforms, we also generate actionable insights and analytics, streamline decision making and enable data driven profitable growth.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Business Finance | Profitability, Costing and Allocations team, you will be responsible for: Design accounting data models and rules engines to deliver accurate and accessible financial information. Assess current-state finance data architecture, identify gaps against target-state needs, and support future-state design across data elements such as chart of accounts, profit center, and cost center. Configure and implement SAP PaPM solutions, including calculation rules, allocation rules, and reporting structures based on business requirements. Integrate SAP PaPM with SAP modules and external systems to support data flow, profitability analysis, and performance management reporting. Support testing, documentation, user training, issue resolution, and ongoing maintenance of SAP PaPM solutions. The teamManages risk and opportunities associated with diverse and complex grant programs through end-to-end grants management solutions. Examples of work: Finance Analytics, FP&A & Management Reporting, Profitability, Costing and Allocations.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Technology, or a related discipline; Chartered Accountant (CA) or Certified Public Accountant (CPA) may also be considered 2-3 years of experience in finance transformation, profitability analysis, performance management, or accounting technology implementations Experience with SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Warehouse (BW), SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM), or SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Experience gathering business requirements and translating them into functional specifications and technical designs Experience developing or configuring data models, PaPM functions, interfaces, calculation rules, allocation rules, or custom reports Experience with enterprise resource planning (ERP), Structured Query Language (SQL), or visualization tools Preferred: Experience with finance data architecture, including chart of accounts, profit center, and cost center structures Experience integrating SAP PaPM with other SAP modules or external systems Experience performing unit testing, integration testing, and user acceptance testing Experience creating documentation, training materials, and support artifacts Experience with analytics tools such as SAS, Visual Basic for Applications (VBA), or R Experience supporting multinational or cross-industry client environments

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-DRM & EDMCS-Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationJoin our Finance Transformation practice to help Deloitte client service teams define and execute finance and global business services agendas and strategies. You will work with world-class teams and insights, helping support delivery in challenging environments, market uncertainty, technology development, and regulatory considerations to help unlock value. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology as we collaborate with teams to enable transforming finance.Level: Enterprise Data Management Cloud Services (EDMCS) ConsultantAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for: Support the design, configuration, and enhancement of Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service solutions aligned to client master data needs Gather, analyze, and document business and technical requirements; plan delivery activities; and identify and mitigate delivery risks Work with stakeholders to support data governance processes, metadata structures, validation rules, and property derivations across enterprise data domains Contribute to integration, migration, and automation activities, including imports/exports, Oracle Cloud enterprise performance management connectivity, and EPM Automate or application programming interface-based processes Support client delivery and practice development through solution demonstrations, proof-of-concepts, training support, and coordination with onsite and offshore teams The teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/ChennaiQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology degree, or equivalent, from an accredited university 4-6 years of experience supporting master data management applications and working with enterprise resource planning, enterprise performance management, or business intelligence tools Experience with data governance and master data management standards and practices Experience with cloud software-as-a-service or platform-as-a-service platforms and business workflow processes Experience registering applications, managing node types, administering user access, and supporting governance configuration in Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service Experience with custom validations, property derivations, metadata imports/exports, Oracle Cloud enterprise performance management integration, and automation using EPM Automate or application programming interfaces Experience supporting migration from Data Relationship Management to Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service and from on-premises environments to cloud environments Preferred: Experience supporting Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service implementations Knowledge of metadata management processes across downstream systems, including enterprise resource planning, Enterprise Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service, and Financial Consolidation and Close Cloud Service Experience supporting master data application migration from on-premises environments to cloud environments#FY27_FT_BF

Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for: Support the design, configuration, and enhancement of Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service solutions aligned to client master data needs Gather, analyze, and document business and technical requirements; plan delivery activities; and identify and mitigate delivery risks Work with stakeholders to support data governance processes, metadata structures, validation rules, and property derivations across enterprise data domains Contribute to integration, migration, and automation activities, including imports/exports, Oracle Cloud enterprise performance management connectivity, and EPM Automate or application programming interface-based processes Support client delivery and practice development through solution demonstrations, proof-of-concepts, training support, and coordination with onsite and offshore teams The teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/ChennaiQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology degree, or equivalent, from an accredited university 4-6 years of experience supporting master data management applications and working with enterprise resource planning, enterprise performance management, or business intelligence tools Experience with data governance and master data management standards and practices Experience with cloud software-as-a-service or platform-as-a-service platforms and business workflow processes Experience registering applications, managing node types, administering user access, and supporting governance configuration in Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service Experience with custom validations, property derivations, metadata imports/exports, Oracle Cloud enterprise performance management integration, and automation using EPM Automate or application programming interfaces Experience supporting migration from Data Relationship Management to Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service and from on-premises environments to cloud environments Preferred: Experience supporting Oracle Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service implementations Knowledge of metadata management processes across downstream systems, including enterprise resource planning, Enterprise Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service, and Financial Consolidation and Close Cloud Service Experience supporting master data application migration from on-premises environments to cloud environments#FY27_FT_BF

title: USI-EH-27-Tax-TTC-ETI- L35 - Consultant - Netsuite/Workday/Incor
description: Workday/INFOR/NetSuite - ConsultantWorkday, NetSuite, Zuora and Salesforce are some of the rising SaaS ERP technologies that are revolutionizing how tax is managed and how tax departments around the globe operate. If you are someone who thrives in navigating the growing tax landscape through a technology lens and partnering with passionate professionals to help companies achieve their tax objectives; then we would like to get to know you. Apply now!What you’ll do:As a professional in Deloitte’s Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) team, you will be a part of a team that provides an integrated approach to technology implementations that help tax departments maximize the strategic value to the organization. You will deliver services for companies that are implementing tax solutions related to enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems and tax applications.As a Senior you will contribute to the growth and success of Deloitte Tax LLP in a variety of ways, including:• Client Management: Participate in the day-to-day interactions with client’s project team members and Deloitte project leadership members• Delivery: Deliver components of Workday, INFOR and/or NetSuite, Integration, Supply Chain, HCM or third-party tax software implementations including designing, configuring, testing and training of the solution.• Solutions: With an emphasis on tax processes, identify business requirements, requirements management, functional design, prototyping, process design (including scenario design, flow mapping), testing, training, defining support procedures and supporting implementations.• Cross Functional Teaming: Understand and articulate the broader Tax practice and Deloitte overall. Maintain relationships and serve clients holistically.• People Development: Participate in the development of team members.• Business Development: Participate in and contribute to pursuit teams.QualificationsRequired:• 3 years’ experience in implementation of ERPs or tax software that include but not limited to experience with tax requirements for direct tax such as corporate income tax, operational transfer pricing, state income taxation and indirect tax such as sales & use tax, VAT, GST, property tax, or withholding tax solutions including but not limited to using native Workday, INFOR and/or NetSuite functionality, ONESOURCE Indirect Determination, Vertex, Avalara, SOVOS, Taxware• Bachelor’s degree in accounting, computer science or related field Workday, INFOR, NetSuite, SAP, Oracle, ONESOURCE, Vertex, CPA, Enrolled Agent, or other technology related certification (either in process or able/willing to obtain)• Travel up to 50% (While 50% of travel is a requirement of the role, due to COVID-19, non-essential travel has been suspended until further notice.)Preferred:• Experience with a Big 4 firm, large ERP/consulting organization, or a large IT department of a multinational company with tax related experience• Other leading Cloud based SaaS financial application implementation experience (i.e.: Fusion Intact, PeopleSoft, Oracle, SAP, Lawson)The teamAt Deloitte Tax LLP, our Tax Management Consulting (TMC) practice helps tax departments pursue a streamlined, transparent, and efficient tax function that enhances the core responsibilities of compliance, reporting and planning, while also positioning tax as a strategic business advisor for the digital era. We specialize in tax and can effectively address a corporate tax function’s unique needs, requirements and obligations. As technology specialists, we help clients make appropriate technology choices for both direct and indirect taxes across all business cycles that have a tax impact. Our team, the largest of its type, offers the necessary combination of skills, methodology and practical experience to help clients with a successful ERP implementation.Deloitte TMC professionals are aligned across our global network of member firms to support our clients’ objectives and address their challenges. Our team’s multi-disciplinary approach combines tax technical and technology skillsets, enabling greater impact and efficiency within our client’s organization. TMC’s business services help clients with operating model evaluation, roadmap development for a desired future state, data management solutions, automation opportunities, tax portal, cloud for enterprise systems, agile resourcing models, risk, provision and compliance. Learn more about Deloitte Tax Management Consulting.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help sharpen skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Center.BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.Recruiter tipsWe want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: USI-EH27 - G&P - Pursuits -L60 Senior Manager -Creative Director
description: Firm Enterprise Solutions Senior Manager - DesignDeloitte’s Pursuit Management organization seeks a creative director to lead a team of 70+ India-based creatives responsible for the ideation, execution, and production of high-impact, memorable proposal and sales deliverables. Aligned with the vision and priorities of US leadership, the team combines world-class creativity, business knowledge, and Deloitte’s powerful brand equity to help client teams make an impact with buyers. The ideal candidate finds an opportunity where others do not, thrives in a supportive and diverse team environment, keeps a finger on the pulse of cultural trends and emerging technologies, and applies new ideas that challenge the status quo. Join us and contribute to shaping innovative go-to-market strategies and help Deloitte win more business.Work you’ll doLeadership and team inspiration·       Inspire and guide an India-based creative team (designers, copywriters, videographers, UI/UX specialists) to achieve and align with the priorities of US creative leadership.·       Coach and oversee professional growth for India-based team leaders and members.·       Create a collaborative, empowering environment that delivers creative excellence and attracts, develops, and retains top-tier creative talent.·       Understand the go-to-market strategies for each business and the development and adoption of best practices across businesses.·       Lead the integration and alignment of USI-based professionals across geographies, including the US and Costa Rica.Creativity strategy and persuasive communication·       Set the creative vision and strategy, guiding teams in leveraging advanced art, design, and branding principles to deliver engaging visual stories and proposals.·       Champion the use of “design thinking” methodologies to turn complex business ideas into compelling creative solutions.·       Establish standards for communicating creative visions clearly to diverse audiences (clients, internal stakeholders, etc.).·       Guide teams and professionals to create innovative solutions within the framework of the proposal and other deliverables.Business acumen and innovation·       Demonstrate and cultivate across teams’ full expertise and understanding of the end-to-end proposal process. ·       Align creative solutions with business objectives and client requirements, maintaining a strong brand identity throughout.·       Respond to evolving industry trends, client expectations, and competitive landscape, and recommend new areas for development and training to enhance the skills, knowledge, and capabilities of the creative team.•       Champion the integration of AI-powered and other automation tools to streamline and drive efficiencies in the strategic creative process and deliverable production and scale across the broader pipelineProject management and organizational management·       Provide strategic direction and oversight on creative support for the pursuit pipeline in close collaboration with US leadership.·       Establish frameworks and best practices for resource management, empowering teams to efficiently deliver high-quality outputs.·       Deliver regular utilization and efficiency reports to US and USI leadership.·       Set and uphold standards for accuracy and quality across creative outputs. Required skills·       Leadership skills with the ability to generate and inspire innovation.·       Executive presence, professional client service manner, ability to adapt and take initiative, and interact with all levels of management.·       Strong client relationship skills and ability to establish trust and sell creative concepts.·       Effective negotiation skills and ability to manage conflicting priorities.·       Strong online portfolio showcasing your innovative work across multiple channels.·       Strong verbal and written English communication skills.·       Strong creative network and connections to industry and creative associations.·       Advanced knowledge in MS Office, UI/UX best practices, digital media and video production tools and methodologies, Adobe Creative Cloud, and other relevant tools/platforms.·       Experience with video production and digital asset creation and management.Required qualifications·       Post graduate degree preferred; or equivalent in Fine Arts/ Media/ Visual Communication·       Understanding of Agile methodology and experience in Workfront are preferred·       13-15 years of relevant experience, including at least 3 years of experience as a Creative lead with an agency/ firm with at least 5+ years of experience in sales/business development/proposal environment.Work timing·       2:00 PM–11:00 PM (IST)Location·       Hyderabad

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-SAP PAPM-Senior Consultant , Functional Transformation
description: Finance Transformation Business Finance | Profitability Costing and AllocationsEnables finance to drive strategic value through transformation and synchronization of planning, costing, budgeting and forecasting across finance and other functions. Using advanced, scalable data and tech platforms, we also generate actionable insights and analytics, streamline decision making and enable data driven profitable growth. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-SAP PAPM-Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Functional Transformation Enables finance to drive strategic value through transformation and synchronization of planning, costing, budgeting and forecasting across finance and other functions. Using advanced, scalable data and tech platforms, we also generate actionable insights and analytics, streamline decision making and enable data driven profitable growth.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Business Finance | Profitability, Costing and Allocations team, you will be responsible for: Design accounting data models and rules engines to deliver accurate and accessible financial information. Assess current-state finance data architecture, identify gaps against target-state needs, and support future-state design across data elements such as chart of accounts, profit center, and cost center. Configure and implement SAP PaPM solutions, including calculation rules, allocation rules, and reporting structures based on business requirements. Integrate SAP PaPM with SAP modules and external systems to support data flow, profitability analysis, and performance management reporting. Support testing, documentation, user training, issue resolution, and ongoing maintenance of SAP PaPM solutions. The teamManages risk and opportunities associated with diverse and complex grant programs through end-to-end grants management solutions. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Anaplan-Analyst, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationJoin Deloitte’s Finance Transformation practice to help client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with multidisciplinary teams and market insights to support delivery in environments shaped by market uncertainty, technology change, and regulatory considerations. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology enablement to help clients unlock value and transform finance.Level: Analyst, Functional TransformationAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you'll doAs a Analyst, Functional Transformation on the Business Finance team, you will be responsible for:Lead end-to-end Anaplan model development across requirements gathering, solution design, build, testing, deployment, and Hypercare supportTranslate business requirements into Anaplan model designs, technical user stories, and scalable planning solutionsBuild and enhance lists, data loads, dashboards or New UX pages, and calculations to support planning requirementsCollaborate with business and technical stakeholders to support deliverable quality, risk identification, and issue resolutionConduct User Acceptance Testing and prepare design documents, test documentation, training materials, and administration guidesThe teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired:2.5– 3.5 years of experience in Anaplan model building, data modeling, and data integrationExperience leading Anaplan implementations across requirements gathering, design, development, testing, and deploymentExperience building lists, data loads, dashboards or New UX pages, and calculations in AnaplanExperience translating spreadsheet-based solutions into multidimensional Anaplan modelsExperience working with business users to convert functional requirements into technical user storiesExperience conducting User Acceptance Testing and preparing design, test, training, and administration documentationBachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) or equivalent from an accredited universityCertification:Anaplan Level 1 (required)Anaplan Level 2 (required)Anaplan Way (required)Anaplan Level 3 (required)Preferred:Anaplan Certified Master Anaplanner and/or Solution ArchitectAnaplan Data Orchestrator certificationExperience building Anaplan models for financial planning, workforce planning, or sales and operations planningExperience with Anaplan Connect or similar integration toolsExperience with Agile implementation methodologyExperience supporting data governance, security, and compliance in planning solutions

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate- Wiz.io - Consultant
description: Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design, and technology as we partner with clients to transform finance. Level: Consultant Work you'll do As a Consultant on the Security Platform team, you will be responsible for supporting clients in securing cloud environments using Wiz. Advise clients on the use of Wiz capabilities, including Wiz Compute, Data Security, Threat Detection & Response, Code Scanning, SAAS, and Container Security. Support client transitions to Wiz, including migration, integration, and optimization of security controls and processes. Evaluate cloud services against standards such as CIS, NIST, and GDPR and assess environment coverage within Wiz. Monitor vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and compliance issues and deliver cloud security reports with actionable recommendations. Support policy development, incident response, data protection, access control, resource configuration activities, and documentation of technical issues and resolutions. The team Security Platform teams embed security in all aspects of digital transformation by securing a client’s “technical backbone” while also enabling a secure platform for the cloud environment. Services include security architecture, secure development and deployment, end-to-end cyber cloud capabilities, application security, and security for emerging technologies and connected products. Examples of work include Secure by Design, Cloud Security Orchestration & Automation, Core Infrastructure Security, and Secure Software Enablement. Deloitte Cyber team helps complex organizations more confidently pursue their growth, innovation and performance agendas through proactive management of the associated cyber risks. Our professionals provide advisory and implementation services that integrate risk, regulatory, and technology skills to help clients transform their legacy programs into proactive Secure.Vigilant.Resilient.TM cyber programs. Cloud Infrastructure supports organizations through the complete cycle of migrating business processes to the cloud, with capabilities and solutions focused on development, transformation, and resilience of cloud security. Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / Chennai Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cyber Security, Information Security, Engineering, Information Technology, or another technical field 3+ years of experience in technical consulting, including architecting and designing security solutions 2+ years of experience implementing security posture models using Wiz.io Experience developing code or policy using REGO, Open Policy Agent, Terraform, Python, or CloudFormation Experience with Cloud Security Posture Management, Cloud Workload Protection Platform, and multi-cloud environments across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform Preferred: Certified Cloud Security Professional or Certificate of Cloud Security Knowledge AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals, Google Cloud Digital Leader, or another cloud or security certification#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI- EH27- L45 - Senior Tax services - International Tax
description: Do you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions with an interest in US International Taxation? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join International Tax group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Do you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions with an interest in US International Taxation? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join International Tax group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace.  We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doIncreasingly complex tax decisions can have a significant effect—positive or negative—on the future of our clients’ business. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Finance AI- Analytics and Insights Engineer III
description: Finance TransformationWe are seeking a highly motivated Finance & AI Specialist with 6+ years of experience who brings together deep business finance expertise and hands-on artificial intelligence capabilities. This role sits at the intersection of financial strategy and emerging technology, enabling the organization to unlock new value through intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and AI-driven decision support.The ideal candidate will be equally comfortable building financial models and designing AI pipelines — translating complex financial requirements into scalable, intelligent solutions. You will serve as a bridge between the Finance function and the Data & Technology organization, driving transformation initiatives that improve speed, accuracy, and strategic insight across the business.Work you'll doAs an Analytics and Insights Engineer III on the Finance AI team, you will be responsible for:• Analyze finance and business requirements and translate them into AI-enabled solution designs, functional specifications, and wireframes • Design, develop, and deploy artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions for finance use cases including anomaly detection, cash flow prediction, forecast generation, and expense classification • Build generative artificial intelligence solutions, prompt libraries, natural language processing tools, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and multi-agent workflows to support finance planning, reporting, audit, and decision support • Design and build data pipelines and application programming interface integrations across cloud and data platforms including Amazon Web Services, Databricks, and Snowflake • Establish model governance, explainability, and guardrails; document technical designs and data flows; troubleshoot performance issues; and mentor team members in artificial intelligence tools and practicesThe teamThe Finance AI team helps organizations apply data, automation, and artificial intelligence to improve finance planning, analysis, reporting, and decision support. The team brings together finance, data, and engineering capabilities to develop scalable solutions aligned to business priorities. Team members work closely with stakeholders across Finance and Technology to deliver practical, enterprise-ready outcomes.Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/ChennaiQualificationsRequired:• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, Data Science, or Business Administration • 6+ years of experience building artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions in enterprise environments supporting finance data and processes • Experience supporting finance functions such as financial planning and analysis, controllership, or commercial finance • Experience developing solutions using Python and SQL • Experience with generative artificial intelligence, agentic artificial intelligence, prompt engineering, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines • Experience with cloud or data platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Databricks, or Snowflake • Experience designing or integrating data pipelines and application programming interfacesPreferred:• Experience with FastAPI, Node.js, or React.js • Experience with LangChain or LangGraph • Experience with vector databases • Experience with Amazon Web Services services such as Bedrock, SageMaker, Amazon EC2, or API Gateway • Experience with Databricks or Snowflake in artificial intelligence or machine learning workflows • Experience working in Agile delivery environments#FY27_FT_Business Finance_Finance AI

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-AI+Data Modelling- Analytics and Insights Engineer III
description: Finance TransformationThe Finance Data Modelling Design and Development Specialist is responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing data models and data structures that support analytics, reporting, and AI/ML solutions. This role works closely with architects, data engineers, and business teams to deliver robust, scalable data assets.Work you'll doAs an Analytics and Insights Engineer III on the Finance Analytics team, you will be responsible for: Collaborating with finance stakeholders, analysts, and data architects to translate business requirements into technical data requirements. Designing, building, and optimizing conceptual, logical, and physical data models for enterprise finance data platforms. Developing and maintaining data dictionaries, metadata, data lineage documentation, and technical design artifacts. Supporting data pipelines and ETL/ELT processes, including testing, deployment, and issue resolution across development and production environments. Performing data model validation, quality assurance, and performance tuning to improve scalability, integrity, and analytics outcomes. The teamFinance Analytics helps organizations use data, analytics, and modern data platforms to improve finance insights and decision-making. The team supports initiatives across data modelling, reporting, and AI/ML to help deliver scalable solutions for finance functions. Team members work closely with business, product, and engineering stakeholders to build data assets that enable analysis, planning, and operational improvement.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field. 5+ years of experience in finance analytics, finance transformation, or data modelling within consulting or industry environments. 5+ years of experience designing conceptual, logical, and physical data models for enterprise data platforms. Experience supporting finance processes such as financial planning and analysis, forecasting, reporting, tax, or treasury. Experience with SQL and at least one data modelling tool such as ER/Studio, erwin, or PowerDesigner. Experience with relational, dimensional, and NoSQL data models. Experience with at least one cloud data platform such as Amazon Web Services Redshift, Microsoft Azure Synapse, Google Cloud Platform, Databricks, or Snowflake. Preferred: Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field. Experience with Oracle EPM, Anaplan, or OneStream. Experience with Power BI or Tableau. Experience with API integrations. Experience with Slowly Changing Dimension Type 1, Type 2, and Type 3 strategies. Certification in AI/ML, analytics, Snowflake, Amazon Web Services, or Microsoft Azure.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Anaplan-Manager, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationJoin our Finance Transformation practice to help Deloitte client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with world-class teams and insights, helping support delivery in challenging environments, market uncertainty, technology development, and regulatory considerations to help unlock value. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology as we collaborate with teams to enable transforming finance.Level: Anaplan ManagerAs a Manager at Deloitte Consulting, you will oversee the technical delivery of enterprise-scale software solutions, lead cross-functional and global teams and mentor junior members. You will collaborate to understand functional requirements, support sales and proposal efforts, and drive end-to-end project delivery, including estimation and planning, to ensure successful outcomes.Work you'll doAs a Manager, Functional Transformation on the Business Finance team, you will be responsible for:Lead end-to-end delivery of Anaplan implementations, including solution architecture, estimation, planning, quality management, and deployment.Manage project scope, staffing, timelines, risks, issues, and delivery execution across cross-functional and global teams.Serve as a primary client contact, provide strategic guidance, and align solution delivery with business objectives.Mentor and develop team members, support knowledge sharing, and help build Anaplan delivery capability across the practice.Contribute to practice development through go-to-market support, proposal activity, thought leadership, and capability-building initiatives.The teamBusiness Finance is part of the Finance Transformation portfolio within Deloitte US India Consulting. Our team advises and implements digital finance strategies and technology solutions, helping clients enhance financial planning, analysis, and enterprise performance through a holistic approach from strategy to technology enablement.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired:B. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Profitability & Cost Management-Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance Transformation As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for supporting Oracle EPCM solution delivery across finance transformation engagements. Design and develop Oracle Enterprise Profitability and Cost Management applications based on business and functional requirements. Build allocation rules, custom calculations, and Groovy business rules to support financial performance analysis and cost management objectives. Develop data integration processes using Data Management to load data from Oracle Fusion General Ledger and other Oracle Enterprise Performance Management applications. Design and build customized reports, dashboards, and Excel-based models; perform data validation, reconciliation, and cross-module integration support. Contribute across all project phases from requirements gathering through Hypercare, including end-user training, system performance monitoring, and issue troubleshooting. The teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-DRM & EDMCS-Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationLevel: Enterprise Data Management Cloud Services (EDMCS) Senior ConsultantAs a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Finance Transformation team, you will be responsible for:• Partnering with stakeholders to define and implement strategic enterprise master data management initiatives • Leading the design and development of enterprise-wide master data management applications and solution components • Gathering and analyzing business and technical requirements, translating them into delivery plans, and managing risks across the project lifecycle • Supporting client workshops, requirement gathering sessions, and solution discussions to align business needs with functional and technical design • Contributing to practice development through pursuit support, proof-of-concepts, solution demonstrations, and team training initiativesThe teamJoin our Finance Transformation practice to help Deloitte client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with world-class teams and insights, helping support delivery in challenging environments, market uncertainty, technology development, and regulatory considerations to help unlock value. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology as we collaborate with teams to enable transforming finance.Business Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.Location: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / ChennaiQualificationsRequired:• Bachelor of Engineering (BE), Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), or equivalent degree • 6-10 years of experience leading master data management initiatives using enterprise resource planning (ERP), enterprise performance management (EPM), or business intelligence (BI) platforms • Experience designing end-to-end master data and mapping solutions for ERP, EPM, and non-cloud interfaces • Experience working with cloud-based software as a service (SaaS) and platform as a service (PaaS) platforms • Experience configuring metadata management, imports and exports, custom validations, property logic derivations, and data governance processes • Experience using Oracle Cloud EPM integration tools, EPM Automate, REST application programming interfaces (APIs), and migration utilities • Experience conducting client workshops, gathering requirements, and supporting migrations from Data Relationship Management (DRM) to Enterprise Data Management Cloud Service (EDMCS) and from on-premises environments to cloud environmentsPreferred:• Experience optimizing business workflows and change management processes across finance transformation programs • Experience designing mapping solutions for EPM, ERP, and custom applications • Experience supporting metadata management processes in downstream systems, including ERP, Enterprise Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service (EPBCS), and Financial Consolidation and Close Service (FCCS)#FY27_FT_BF      #FinanceTransformation   #FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-DFO&I- Salesforce CPQ - Consultant, Managed Services
description: CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Consultant, Manages Services or equivalentAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do:Integrate and learn from talented colleagues who specialize in core domains.Adopt a growth mindset and invest in expanding your understanding of Deloitte’s integrated solutions and marketplace offerings.Develop skills within a portfolio representing the unification of diverse, globally recognized brands and businesses—an exciting opportunity for career advancement.Leverage opportunities for career development through exposure to unified, enterprise-level platforms and solutionsCollaborate with cross-functional teams—including architects, developers, QA, and business stakeholders—to deliver holistic solutions.Engage in requirement gathering, solution design, and technical decision-making aligned with client business goals.Support post-deployment activities, including maintenance, enhancements, and client communication.Contribute to innovation and continuous improvement through adoption of best practices and emerging technologies.Conduct testing, validation, and troubleshooting to ensure functionality and resolve issues.Deliver high-quality work, ensuring timely completion of tasks and adherence to requirements.Demonstrate openness and initiative in learning Generative AI (GenAI) technologies, recognizing their importance for innovation and market competitiveness.Strong focus on data-driven decision-making and use of agile methodologiesTake ownership of deliverables and proactively identify opportunities for improvement or innovation.Uphold Deloitte’s values of integrity, client focus, and making an impact that matters.The team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:3- 6 years of  overall IT experience, with strong hands-on experience in Salesforce and Salesforce CPQ.  Strong experience in Salesforce CPQ configuration and implementation/support.Good understanding of the quote-to-cash lifecycle, including products, pricing, quoting, contracts, renewals, and amendments.Experience with product rules, price rules, discount schedules, approvals, quote templates, and subscription management.Good knowledge of the Salesforce platform, including objects, security, reports, dashboards, and Flow.Hands-on experience with Apex, SOQL, Lightning, and integrations using REST/SOAP APIs.Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and communication skills.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Experience with Salesforce Billing / Revenue Cloud.Exposure to ERP integrations such as SAP, Oracle, or NetSuite. Knowledge of Sales Cloud and broader CRM processes.  Familiarity with MuleSoft, Boomi, or other middleware/integration tools. Experience in Agile delivery model, DevOps, and release management.Understanding of tax, invoicing, and revenue processes. Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university   Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI- EH27- CoRe Knowledge Services- Assistant Manager- KX Quals and Clients Publishing- Hyderabad/ Bengaluru
description: Specialist Assistant Manager, Content ManagementDo you like working with people associated with an organization that enables flow of knowledge and expertise to our client service professionals around the world? Then this might be the perfect opportunity for you. The Knowledge Services (KS) Content Services team works closely with global Deloitte practitioners to acquire and publish content to the global knowledge management portal. It includes project summaries, sales material, and client engagement deliverables, among other content. This content is intended to help Deloitte practitioners find relevant content just in time to win new projects and deliver quicker and quality deliverables to their clients. Work you’ll doThe KX Quals & Clients Publishing Assistant Manager is responsible for the day-to-day operation of the content acquisition and publishing processes executed by the team. The role includes leading a team of Analysts and Senior Analysts for content management delivery. The KX Quals & Clients Publishing Assistant Manager closely collaborates with internal KS stakeholders and external stakeholders, like global and member firm knowledge managers for industry sectors and Deloitte businesses, focused on enabling flow of knowledge and expertise to our client service professionals around the globe.Key Responsibilities·   Service Delivery, SLA & Operational Management·         Manage publishing service level expectations and conduct regular audits of current processes and quality.·         Understand service level expectations and enhance scope/depth of services provided·         Manage work allocation, SLA/TAT, stakeholder management, and project management.·         Manage relationships with global counterparts and program leads to understand expectations and align delivery.·         Serve as the point of escalation for aligned customers and stakeholders.·         Manage stakeholder and client expectations while balancing business process requirements.·         Guide the team to deliver excellent customer experience.·         Oversee and ensure team’s adherence to confidentiality standards and risk controls·   Quality, Metrics & Performance Management·         Perform quality audits of work completed by aligned team members.·         Capture and disseminate individual and team weekly metrics reports.·         Analyze team quality metrics and take accountability for implementing efficiencies.·         Develop and present operations scorecards and propose action plans.·   People Leadership, Coaching & Capability Building·         Recruit, mentor, and administratively manage teams, including performance assessments.·         Lead training sessions on process and evaluate the effectiveness of team onboarding and training materials; recommend improvements.·         Coach aligned team members to develop competencies and identify learning needs.·         Performance management of the aligned team members·   Process Improvement and Efficiency·         Solicit and establish new processes to manage ambiguity and streamline implementation.·         Identify process enhancement opportunities to improve efficiency and quality of deliverables.·         Initiate or lead collaboration efforts to develop synergies across Knowledge Services teams.·         Act as a trusted business advisor on content management practices to stakeholders.·         Identify, lead, and enable GenAI-driven efficiency opportunities across team processes and workflows.The teamContent Services team helps Deloitte client service professionals find relevant content just in time to win new projects and deliver quicker and quality deliverables to their clients.
