title: USI-EH27-UK Tax - L25- Tax technology service consultant - Product Support - Hyderabad / Bangalore
description: USI UK Digital Innovation - Tax technology consultant I - Product support Do you have a passion to work for global clients and provide tax compliance support services? Are you ready to take the next step in your career by focusing on providing system support for Global clients of Deloitte? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact on global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is "Yes," come join us! Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited ("Deloitte Tax in India") commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP ("Deloitte Tax") U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn, support and practice taxation, a much sought-after career option. In recent years, member firms, such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, etc. have obtained support in their tax practices through the Deloitte Tax in India. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. Work you’ll do Supporting multiple Tax software products and services throughout Deloitte, underpinning global and local country filing activities. Responsibilities include (but aren’t limited to) initial triage, internal and external user support, administration requests, maintenance and UAT. You will be part of the team that offers essential 1st line support to both internal and external users, ensuring that system updates, issues, admin requests and general support requirements are carried out efficiently and accurately to the highest standard, with onward escalation where appropriate. Key Responsibilities: · Provide system administration support across a number of tax applications and offerings · 1st line support for troubleshooting, assisting users with resolutions and escalation to appropriate global teams · Apply a methodical and logical approach to identifying and solving problems · Be involved in ad-hoc system/project implementation activities as part of a broader team · Be involved with User Acceptance Testing across a range of products/applications A successful candidate should have: · Strong Interpersonal skills · Ability to organize and prioritize workloads, together with the ability to handle deadlines and respond well under pressure · Ability to adhere to standard policies and procedures and recall/apply guidance and updates · Keen interest in problem solving · Ability to understand new applications · Ability to operate as a member of a team and work unsupervised · Good level of education with Math’s and English Language as part of their curriculum · Good IT skills and knowledge of Microsoft applications · Flexible in approach to work and adapt in accordance with business needs · Keen to learn new skills · Needs to be articulate, friendly and confident Qualifications & Skills: · Any graduate - With computers skills as part of their curriculum or experience in a Service Desk environment · 1+ years’ experience supporting MNC clients while working in a corporate environment · Experience in product support · Experience using entire MS office Suite · Good Presentation skills Required Experience: 1 to 4 years Work location: Hyderabad Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST How you’ll grow At Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities—including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world-class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. [1] Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India Benefits At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. [2] Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you. Deloitte’s culture Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. [3] Learn more about Life at Deloitte. Corporate citizenship Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. [4] Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.ReferencesVisible links1. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/inclusion-leadership-development.html2. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html3. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/life-at-deloitte-benefits-and-rewards.html4. http://www2.deloitte.com/ui/en/pages/careers/articles/deloitte-community-involvement.html

title: USI - EH27- EOX - CoAE - L40 - Services Assistant Manager, Business Development and Account Enablement - Hyderabad
description: Deloitte is in search of a dynamic, motivated professional with proven people development skills. You should be able to lead a sub-team in the Center of Account Excellence, supporting the most important clients of Deloitte. Work you'll do As a Services Assistant Manager, Business Development and Account Enablement on the Center of Account Excellence team, you will be responsible for: Leading a pod within the On/Offboarding Delivery Center (ODC) in alignment with the strategic vision of the firm Managing capacity, resourcing, and deployment across the delivery channel to support seamless delivery and service level agreement adherence Driving process efficiency through automation, standardization, and governance across account on/offboarding activities Partnering with account leaders, business leaders, and team members to deliver key activities and new service offerings Hiring, coaching, and developing professionals while supporting performance management, learning, recognition, and career progression The team Center of Account Excellence (CoAE) professionals assist client leaders in strengthening how we serve our most important clients. CoAE professionals execute internal account operations, such that the account leaders can focus on delivering value for our clients. Navigate is the US Member Firm system of record for managing the account on/offboarding processes at US-headquartered ACP clients. A Salesforce-based platform, navigate is a user-centric and customizable solution that will reimagine account on/offboarding by serving as a one-stop-shop for practitioners to complete all essential requirements. The ODC team will be part of the larger Center of Account Excellence (CoAE), within Client Excellence. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: 6-8 years of professional experience 1-2 years of experience leading people Experience leading client service teams Experience managing capacity, resourcing, and deployment for delivery operations Experience driving process standardization, governance, or automation initiatives Experience working with cross-functional stakeholders in a delivery or operations environment Preferred: Master of Business Administration (MBA) and/or master’s degree in a relevant field Project Management Professional (PMP) certification Experience leading a 10-12 member client service team Experience managing multi-location teamsHow you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, worldclass learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India BenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.   Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte. Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI- EH27 - AI&E - Industry Solutions - SM / AVP  -Guidewire
description: As an Associate Vice President / Senior Manager at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for overall technical delivery as part of large-scale software solutions at enterprise level. You will lead functional and technical teams on the project located across shores guiding and mentoring junior team members and collaborating to understand the functional requirements. You will respond to new sales or proposals and support end-to-end delivery of the project along with estimations and planning. You will be responsible for managing the design, development, and deployment of large-scale system implementations at an enterprise level. These applications would provide you an exposure to the most widely used platforms across the Insurance domain like Guidewire and Majesco. You will be responsible for independently managing the team and guiding team members at different levels through their career path, work through technical leads across shores to manage implementation of the functional requirements and implement them on platforms like Guidewire and Majesco. You will own the end-to-end delivery of the project from estimations, planning, and execution. You would also be responsible for managing the status and end to end delivery of the final product. Work you'll do As an Associate Vice President / Senior Manager on the AI & Engineering team, you will be responsible for overall technical delivery across large-scale enterprise software implementations. Manage discussions with business and onshore counterparts and help technical leads define architecture and design using design patterns Manage teams to develop solutions following established technical design, application development standards, and quality processes Manage project execution by defining work-breakdown structure in accordance with the master project plan and tracking progress Lead overall technical delivery, documentation efforts, risk escalation, status reporting, and time-bound delivery as per project plan Guide and mentor junior resources, act as a bridge across teams in the engagement, and respond to proposals with estimations The team AI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These solutions insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transforming mission-critical operations. Join our AI & Engineering team to help in transforming technology platforms, driving innovation, and helping help make a significant impact on our clients' success achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses. Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru/Chennai/Pune/Kolkata Shift Timings: As per business needs Qualifications Required: B.E./B. Tech/MBA degree or equivalent from accredited university 15-20 years of experience in information technology, including Guidewire experience Hands-on technical experience implementing large-scale enterprise custom development projects, including 5-8 years of experience in insurance domain implementations on different platforms 3-4 years of experience leading multi-member teams Experience managing and architecting large-scale enterprise software development projects, including resource and time estimations Experience working with insurance platforms including Guidewire, Majesco, or Duck Creek Ability to travel 40-45%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve. Preferred: Guidewire Ace Certified Experience working on Agile development teams using Scrum or Kanban Experience delivering customer-facing products Experience improving and documenting standard operating procedures Experience running teams across implement and operate engagements Experience driving end-to-end pursuits and managing client expectations #CA-AEN#FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI EH | FY27| Cyber | DT&P |IAM -One Identity Manager - L55
description: CyberDeloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform finance.The TeamDigital Trust & PrivacyThe cyber risk services—IAM practice helps organizations in designing, developing, and implementing industry-leading IAM solutions to protect their information and confidential data, as well as help them build their businesses and supporting technologies to be more secure, vigilant, and resilient. The cyber risk services—IAM team delivers service to clients through following key areas of IAM: Application Onboarding Lifecycle Manager Compliance Manager Password Management Automated Provisioning Roles Management ITSM tools Integration Advanced Authentication Methods Strategy and Road Map One Identity Manager Key Responsibilities Architect, develop, and maintain custom IAM workflows and connectors within One Identity Manager to enable seamless, secure identity lifecycle management. Design and implement intuitive web interfaces using Angular for IAM self-service and administration, promoting user efficiency and automation. Integrate IAM solutions with enterprise systems including Active Directory, Azure AD, ServiceNow, HR systems, and databases via REST APIs and custom connectors. Oversee the complete user lifecycle—managing digital identities, access requests, approvals, provisioning, recertification, and business role assignments. Lead onboarding and access management for applications, security groups, shared mailboxes, distribution groups, file shares, local non-personal accounts (NPAs), and database assets within One Identity Manager. Administer and streamline access to cloud and infrastructure resources—including servers, network components, and Azure assets (PIM roles, RBAC, service principals, app registrations, CAP groups, and Entra account hygiene). Drive implementation and governance of business roles and Segregation of Duties (SoD) across the estate, ensuring compliance with security and audit standards. Collaborate with security architects, IT operations, and business stakeholders to define and deliver IAM strategies that align technology with organizational risk and compliance objectives. Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve complex integration issues and provide subject-matter expertise for IAM best practices and roadmaps.  Required Skills & Qualifications 7 –10+ years of hands-on experience with One Identity Manager (OneIM), including substantial exposure to custom development, configuration, and integration. Expert in Angular (or similar framework) for building responsive and secure web user interfaces tailored for IAM use cases. Deep technical knowledge of Active Directory, Azure (including RBAC, PIM, service principals, app registrations, CAP groups), ServiceNow, database onboarding, and cloud/hybrid IAM architectures. Proven experience developing and deploying custom connectors, workflows, and REST API integrations with third-party enterprise systems. In-depth understanding of the identity lifecycle—onboarding, provisioning, approval flows, recertification, access reviews, and role-based access control. Track record in designing and maintaining secure, scalable IAM solutions tailored for large, distributed enterprises, including cloud and on-premises environments. Familiarity with business role modeling and Segregation of Duties (SoD) controls in IAM implementations. Excellent communication skills, confident in interfacing with technical and non-technical stakeholders across teams. Qualification B.Tech/M.Tech/MS/MBA #Cyber_Digital Trust & Privacy

title: USI - EH27 - CoRe Knowledge Services - Assistant Manager - Reporting & Insights Lead – Hyderabad/ Bengaluru
description: Specialist Assistant Manager, Content Management CoRe Knowledge Services (KS), part of Deloitte’s global shared services organization, serves Deloitte’s member firms worldwide. The individual will support the Businesses & Industries (B&I) and Member Firm Engagement (MFE) teams through a centralized, One Team approach to reporting and analytics. This role is responsible for owning end-to-end metrics reporting across both teams and serving as the single point of contact for standard and custom reporting needs. The individual in this role will serve as a liaison across all Businesses & Industries (B&I) and Member Firm Engagement (MFE) Knowledge Leads to streamline reporting, improve consistency, and enhance the quality and usability of metrics-based insights. Work you'll do As a Specialist Assistant Manager, Content Management on the CoRe Knowledge Services team, you will be responsible for: Manage standard and custom reporting requests for Businesses & Industries Knowledge Leads and Member Firm Engagement teams. Produce recurring and ad hoc reports, translate data into stakeholder-ready insights, and support reporting-based recommendations. Align with Knowledge Leads and stakeholders on reporting requirements, priorities, and outcomes across B&I and MFE. Establish and maintain reporting governance, including intake processes, prioritization, documentation, and turnaround expectations. Validate metrics data, resolve reporting anomalies with the Metrics team, and improve reporting efficiency through standardization and automation. The team CoRe Knowledge Services (KS), part of Deloitte’s global shared services organization, serves Deloitte’s member firms worldwide. The Member Firm Engagement team strives to establish Knowledge Services across the CoRe and Non-CoRe Member Firms and demonstrate the value of Deloitte’s proprietary knowledge platform, Knowledge Exchange (KX), and related offerings globally. The B&I team delivers similar work from a Businesses and Industries perspective. Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Analytics, Statistics, Data Science, Information Systems, Knowledge Management, Economics, Finance, or Library and Information Science Advanced Microsoft Excel skills, including pivot tables, charting, trend analysis, and report development Experience creating reports and dashboards using Tableau or similar data visualization tools Experience developing stakeholder-ready presentations using Microsoft PowerPoint Experience producing recurring and ad hoc reporting and analytics deliverables Experience documenting reporting definitions, business rules, and process guidance Experience working with SharePoint, databases, repositories, or knowledge management platforms Preferred: Master’s degree in Business Administration, Analytics, Data Science, Information Management, or Knowledge Management Certification in Tableau, Power BI, Microsoft Excel, or similar reporting and analytics tools Experience with reporting automation tools Experience supporting leadership presentations with data-driven storyboards and visuals Experience working with content types such as profiles, qualifications, and documents Experience supporting Knowledge Services, Businesses & Industries, or Member Firm Engagement environments
qualifications: Specialist Assistant Manager, Content Management CoRe Knowledge Services (KS), part of Deloitte’s global shared services organization, serves Deloitte’s member firms worldwide. The individual will support the Businesses & Industries (B&I) and Member Firm Engagement (MFE) teams through a centralized, One Team approach to reporting and analytics. This role is responsible for owning end-to-end metrics reporting across both teams and serving as the single point of contact for standard and custom reporting needs. The individual in this role will serve as a liaison across all Businesses & Industries (B&I) and Member Firm Engagement (MFE) Knowledge Leads to streamline reporting, improve consistency, and enhance the quality and usability of metrics-based insights. Align with Knowledge Leads and stakeholders on reporting requirements, priorities, and outcomes across B&I and MFE. Establish and maintain reporting governance, including intake processes, prioritization, documentation, and turnaround expectations. Validate metrics data, resolve reporting anomalies with the Metrics team, and improve reporting efficiency through standardization and automation. title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-DFO&I- Salesforce CPQ - Senior Consultant, Managed Services
description: CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position Summary Level: Senior Consultant or equivalent As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions.  Work you’ll do:Integrate and learn from talented colleagues who specialize in core domainAdopt a growth mindset and invest in expanding your understanding of Deloitte’s integrated solutions and marketplace offeringDevelop skills within a portfolio representing the unification of diverse, globally recognized brands and businesses—an exciting opportunity for career advancement.Leverage opportunities for career development through exposure to unified, enterprise-level platforms and solutions.Collaborate with cross-functional teams—including architects, developers, QA, and business stakeholders—to deliver holistic solutions.Engage in requirement gathering, solution design, and technical decision-making aligned with client business goals.Support post-deployment activities, including maintenance, enhancements, and client communicationContribute to innovation and continuous improvement through adoption of best practices and emerging technologies.Conduct testing, validation, and troubleshooting to ensure functionality and resolve issues.Deliver high-quality work, ensuring timely completion of tasks and adherence to requirements.Demonstrate openness and initiative in learning Generative AI (GenAI) technologies, recognizing their importance for innovation and market competitiveness.Strong focus on data-driven decision-making and use of agile methodologies.Foster an inclusive and collaborative environment, respecting diverse perspectives and encouraging knowledge sharing.Take ownership of deliverables and proactively identify opportunities for improvement or innovation.Provide mentorship, coaching, and knowledge sharing within the team to support the growth and development of others.Promote design principles, technology trends, and coding standards to improve team capability and ensure technical excellence.Uphold Deloitte’s values of integrity, client focus, and making an impact that matters. The team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:6 - 9 years of  overall IT experience, with strong hands-on experience in Salesforce and Salesforce CPQ.  Strong experience in Salesforce CPQ configuration and implementation/support.Good understanding of the quote-to-cash lifecycle, including products, pricing, quoting, contracts, renewals, and amendments.Experience with product rules, price rules, discount schedules, approvals, quote templates, and subscription management.Good knowledge of the Salesforce platform, including objects, security, reports, dashboards, and Flow.Hands-on experience with Apex, SOQL, Lightning, and integrations using REST/SOAP APIs.Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and communication skills.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Experience with Salesforce Billing / Revenue Cloud.Exposure to ERP integrations such as SAP, Oracle, or NetSuite. Knowledge of Sales Cloud and broader CRM processes.  Familiarity with MuleSoft, Boomi, or other middleware/integration tools. Experience in Agile delivery model, DevOps, and release management.Understanding of tax, invoicing, and revenue processes. Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate- SOC L3 - Senior Consultant - FTH - HYD
description: As a SOC Senior Consultant - FTH, you will help strengthen cyber incident detection, response, and threat intelligence capabilities for complex enterprise environments. You will work with cross-functional teams to monitor and investigate security events, coordinate response activities, and support continuous improvement of incident response processes. This role requires hands-on experience in security operations, threat analysis, and incident handling, along with the ability to operate effectively in a fast-paced environment.Work you'll doAs a SOC Senior Consultant - FTH on the Detect & Respond team, you will be responsible for: Monitor, triage, and respond to cybersecurity alerts, security incidents, and threat intelligence indicators across enterprise environments Coordinate incident investigation, containment, and response activities with first responders, operations teams, managed security services, and business stakeholders Collect, review, and integrate commercial and open-source threat intelligence feeds with security monitoring and security information and event management (SIEM) platforms Develop incident documentation, analysis reports, findings summaries, and recommendations for process and control improvements Support threat hunting activities and maintain incident response program documentation, including runbooks and ticketing records The teamDeloitte’s Detect & Respond (D&R) aims to combine sophisticated technologies and human intelligence to help the clients monitor, detect, investigate, and respond to known and unknown attacks. We help our clients to be secure, vigilant, and resilient in the face of an ever-increasing array of cyber threats and vulnerabilities. The Detect and Respond team delivers service to clients through following key areas:Threat detection and responseAttack surface managementThreat IntelligenceThreat HuntingData ProtectionLocation: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree or 4 years of equivalent experience in cybersecurity, security operations, incident response, or threat intelligence 7+ years of experience in security operations, threat intelligence, and incident response Experience with the MITRE ATT&CK framework and threat actor attack pattern analysis Experience operating security tools including security information and event management (SIEM), firewall, intrusion detection systems (IDS), intrusion prevention systems (IPS), malware detection, data loss prevention, and identity and access management Experience investigating and responding to cybersecurity alerts and security incident reports in an enterprise environment Experience maintaining incident response documentation, including incident response runbooks Ability to participate in an on-call rotation for incident response Preferred: Experience integrating commercial and open-source threat intelligence feeds with security monitoring platforms Experience coordinating incident response bridges across technical and business teams Experience developing incident analysis reports, findings summaries, and remediation recommendations for management Experience with threat hunting in an enterprise or managed security services environment Experience working with global delivery teams#Cyber_Cyber Operate

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-FT-BF-Anaplan-Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: Finance TransformationJoin Deloitte’s Finance Transformation practice to help client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with multidisciplinary teams and market insights to support delivery in environments shaped by market uncertainty, technology change, and regulatory considerations. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology enablement to help clients unlock value and transform finance.Level: Consultant, Functional TransformationAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Business Finance team, you will be responsible for:Lead end-to-end Anaplan model development across requirements gathering, solution design, build, testing, deployment, and Hypercare supportTranslate business requirements into Anaplan model designs, technical user stories, and scalable planning solutionsBuild and enhance lists, data loads, dashboards or New UX pages, and calculations to support planning requirementsCollaborate with business and technical stakeholders to support deliverable quality, risk identification, and issue resolutionConduct User Acceptance Testing and prepare design documents, test documentation, training materials, and administration guidesThe teamBusiness Finance, part of our Finance Transformation portfolio, delivers solution-as-a-service offerings focused on digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, and enterprise performance technologies. We take a holistic approach, integrating strategy development, process design, and technology enablement to help clients overcome challenges and achieve sustained business success. Our team partners with organizations to drive profitable growth, manage costs strategically, and navigate financial risks. We are seeking a highly motivated individual with strong analytical skills and business acumen to join us in delivering innovative solutions and supporting clients in their transformation journey.QualificationsRequired:3–7 years of experience in Anaplan model building, data modeling, and data integrationExperience leading Anaplan implementations across requirements gathering, design, development, testing, and deploymentExperience building lists, data loads, dashboards or New UX pages, and calculations in AnaplanExperience translating spreadsheet-based solutions into multidimensional Anaplan modelsExperience working with business users to convert functional requirements into technical user storiesExperience conducting User Acceptance Testing and preparing design, test, training, and administration documentationBachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) or equivalent from an accredited universityCertification:Anaplan Level 1 (required)Anaplan Level 2 (required)Anaplan Way (required)Anaplan Level 3 (required)Preferred:Anaplan Certified Master Anaplanner and/or Solution ArchitectAnaplan Data Orchestrator certificationExperience building Anaplan models for financial planning, workforce planning, or sales and operations planningExperience with Anaplan Connect or similar integration toolsExperience with Agile implementation methodologyExperience supporting data governance, security, and compliance in planning solutionsLocation: Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / Chennai#FY27_FT_BF    #FY27ReferralCampaign   #FinanceTransformation

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-S&S-Salesforce Architect -  Associate Business Transformation Architect
description: CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position SummaryLevel: Associate Business Transformation Architect or equivalentAs a Associate Business Transformation Architect  at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions.Work you’ll do:Consistently showcases deep technology stack / functional acumen combined with industry/leading practice knowledge relevant to project requirements - is the go to personDisplays detailed understanding of tools and accelerators and is able to adapt/advise on which tools can be a best fit for a project, delivery innovation and drives efficiencyThe team:Sales & Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e, Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis.Qualifications:Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:A minimum of 6-9 years of experience lead the end-to-end technical architecture and design of Salesforce solutions, ensuring alignment with enterprise standards and best practicesMinimum 2 years of hands-on experience architecting Salesforce implementations.Mastery of Salesforce platform development and architecture, with proficiency in Apex, LWC, Flows, Integration APIs, and web servicesHands-on experience on Salesforce Apex Programming Design PatternsHands on experience on Salesforce Integration Design PatternsStrong understanding of Salesforce security, sharing rules, and best practicesExperience with data integration, migration, and deployment strategiesFamiliarity with multiple implementation standards and methodologiesCertified Salesforce Platform Developer and at least two additional Salesforce certifications (e.g., Application Architect, System Architect, Marketing Cloud Consultant)Experience with source control systems (e.g., Git) and Agile delivery in CI/CD environmentsKnowledge about CI/CD tools such as Copado would be a valuable additionExcellent cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management skillsStrong problem-solving, analytical, and documentation skillsHashtags/Keywords: Salesforce, Integration, Design patterns, Data Integration, Data Migration, Architecture, Experience Cloud, Salesforce Governance, Salesforce Design, Experience Cloud, Salesforce Security, Salesforce SharingEducation:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university   Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai.S&S Hashtag- #S&S2027

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-HCI-EMS- Managed Services Engineer II-Apache Cassandra
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, driving innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.Position SummaryLevel: ConsultantAs an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.Work you’ll doConsultant DataStax Cassandra Database Administrator (DBA) is primarily responsible for the maintenance, optimization, and administration of existing Cassandra/DataStax Enterprise (DSE) clusters, collaborating closely with development teams on data modeling and performance. The role demands strong troubleshooting skills and the ability to work independently with general supervision.Apply industry knowledge to requirements gathering and analysis, ensuring alignment with sector needs. Demonstrate expertise across the entire software development lifecycle, from design and coding to deployment and defect resolution, collaborating with stakeholders for effective delivery. Conduct peer and team reviews to maintain quality standards. Actively engage in Agile practices, including sprint planning, retrospectives, and effort estimation. Build and share business process knowledge, supporting project knowledge management and team training. Proactively recommend process improvements, track efficiency gains, and contribute to automation and innovation, all aimed at enhancing project outcomes and delivering greater value to clients.The teamThe DataStax Cassandra administrator prole involves setting up the cluster, optimizing read and write performance, and copying data from other file systems. Use technical knowledge to identify areas to improve. Provide flexible solutions to complex business problems using our technology practices. Collaborate closely with developers to implement requirements and provide necessary guidance. Support database backup and restore, including handling critical database scenarios.At Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure we deliver solutions spanning Hybrid Cloud, Advanced Connectivity, AI Data Centers, High-Performance Computing, and AI Infrastructure to help clients achieve their desired outcomes. Our offerings include engineered transformation services for hybrid cloud infrastructure and platforms, prioritizing resiliency, optimization, and extensive automation. We integrate advanced connectivity with AI infrastructure and enterprise networks to boost operational efficiency and enable real-time data processing. Additionally, we provide comprehensive management of all facets of operations for hybrid cloud infrastructure and field operations.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:• 3 - 6 years of hands-on experience in DataStax Casandra database administration• Administer and support DataStax Cassandra environments across non-production and production, ensuring availability, performance, and security.• Perform day-to-day operational tasks: monitoring/alerting review, incident triage, and routine maintenance.• Configure and maintain clusters (node provisioning/decommissioning, repairs, compaction, backup/restore procedures) in line with change management processes.• Support performance and stability troubleshooting (latency, timeouts, GC pressure, disk utilization, hotspotting); perform root-cause analysis and document fixes.• Assist with capacity planning (storage growth, throughput, node sizing) based on usage trends and agreed targets.• Support upgrades and patching (Cassandra/DataStax distribution and related components) with validation and rollback planning.• Implement and maintain security controls (authentication/authorization, encryption, key management—as applicable) aligned to enterprise standards.• Partner with application and platform teams on data model and query pattern reviews to reduce operational risk and improve performance.• Maintain operational documentation (runbooks, standards, procedures) and participate in on-call/after-hours support as required.The DataStax administrator role involves setting up the cluster, optimization of the read and write data, copying data from other file systems Use technical knowledge to identify areas to improve. Provide flexible solutions to complex business problems using our technology practices. Collaborate closely with developers to implement requirements and provide necessary guidance. Database backup and restore. Handling missing critical DB scenario.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:• Experience with any one of the following databases is required: Netezza, PostgreSQL, Informix, Mainframe, SQL Server, Oracle, Cosmos DB, IBM Db2 (UDB), or an Enterprise Data Warehouse.Education• BE/ B.Tech/M.C.A./ M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited universityLocation• Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/ChennaiShift Timings• Rotational 24*7 support#FY27ReferralCampaign #AIE2027

title: USI - FY27 - Cyber Enterprise Security - ZScaler - Senior Consultant
description: CyberDeloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat landscape. Through powerful insights and managed services that simplify complexity, we enable businesses to operate with resilience, grow with confidence, and proactively manage to secure achievements.Position SummaryLevel: Senior ConsultantWork you’ll do:We are seeking an experienced Zscaler Architect / Senior Engineer to lead and support the implementation, configuration, and migration of Zscaler Internet Access (ZIA) and Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) solutions in enterprise environments. This role will help design and deliver Zero Trust access models, modernize remote access, and support migration from legacy VPN and proxy technologies. The ideal candidate brings strong hands-on Zscaler delivery experience, solid network security fundamentals, and the ability to work across security, network, IAM, and endpoint teams.Roles and Responsibilities Lead and support implementation, configuration, and migration of Zscaler ZIA and ZPA solutions. Assess current-state network and security architecture and design target-state Zero Trust access models. Plan and execute migration from traditional VPN, proxy, and remote access solutions to Zscaler. Configure and manage security policies, URL filtering, SSL inspection, authentication, forwarding methods, and access controls in ZIA. Configure application segmentation, connector deployment, access policies, and user-to-app connectivity in ZPA. Integrate Zscaler with enterprise identity and security tools such as Azure AD / Entra ID, Okta, SAML, SCIM, SIEM, EDR, and CASB platforms. Troubleshoot user connectivity, performance, and policy issues across ZIA/ZPA deployments. Support pilot, rollout, cutover, and post-migration hypercare activities. Create technical documentation including architecture diagrams, runbooks, migration plans, and operational handover materials. Collaborate with network, security, endpoint, and IAM teams to ensure smooth deployment and adoption. The Team:Enterprise Security teams embed security in all aspects of digital transformation by securing a client’s “technical backbone” while also enabling secure digital transformation. Services include security architecture, secure development and deployment, end-to-end cyber cloud capabilities, application security, and security for emerging technologies and connected products. Examples of work include Secure by Design, Cloud Security Orchestration & Automation, Core Infrastructure Security, and Secure Software Enablement.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: 5+ years of hands-on experience in Zscaler, network security, cloud security, or enterprise security architecture Proven experience implementing and migrating Zscaler ZIA and ZPA in enterprise environments. Strong understanding of Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA), secure web gateways, and remote access transformation. Good understanding of routing and switching technologies. Experience with proxy technologies, VPN replacement strategies, DNS, TCP/IP, routing, firewall policies, and authentication protocols. Hands-on experience with user migration, app onboarding, policy tuning, and troubleshooting in Zscaler environments. Experience integrating Zscaler with identity providers and enterprise security ecosystems. Ability to translate business and security requirements into scalable technical designs. Strong documentation, stakeholder communication, and problem-solving skills. Good to Have: Experience with Zscaler Digital Experience (ZDX) for digital experience monitoring and user troubleshooting. Experience with Zscaler Client Connector deployment and endpoint integration. Exposure to cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP. Experience in large-scale enterprise transformation or network security modernization programs. Education:·       Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Cybersecurity, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.#Cyber_Enterprise

Create technical documentation including architecture diagrams, runbooks, migration plans, and operational handover materials. Collaborate with network, security, endpoint, and IAM teams to ensure smooth deployment and adoption. The Team:Enterprise Security teams embed security in all aspects of digital transformation by securing a client’s “technical backbone” while also enabling secure digital transformation. Services include security architecture, secure development and deployment, end-to-end cyber cloud capabilities, application security, and security for emerging technologies and connected products. Examples of work include Secure by Design, Cloud Security Orchestration & Automation, Core Infrastructure Security, and Secure Software Enablement.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: 5+ years of hands-on experience in Zscaler, network security, cloud security, or enterprise security architecture Proven experience implementing and migrating Zscaler ZIA and ZPA in enterprise environments. Strong understanding of Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA), secure web gateways, and remote access transformation. Good understanding of routing and switching technologies. Experience with proxy technologies, VPN replacement strategies, DNS, TCP/IP, routing, firewall policies, and authentication protocols. Hands-on experience with user migration, app onboarding, policy tuning, and troubleshooting in Zscaler environments. Experience integrating Zscaler with identity providers and enterprise security ecosystems. Ability to translate business and security requirements into scalable technical designs. Strong documentation, stakeholder communication, and problem-solving skills. Good to Have: Experience with Zscaler Digital Experience (ZDX) for digital experience monitoring and user troubleshooting. Experience with Zscaler Client Connector deployment and endpoint integration. Exposure to cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP. Experience in large-scale enterprise transformation or network security modernization programs. Education:·       Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Cybersecurity, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.#Cyber_Enterprise

title: USI-EH27-TIS – Digital & Analytics - Skills Transformation (Solutions Workstream) - Specialist Manager
description: The USI D&A Skills Manager leads USI D&A delivery across next phase implementation and Wave 1 sustainment for the Skills landscape, ensuring alignment to program priorities, disciplined execution, and a mature support model. This role is critical to the effective delivery, evolution, and sustainment of the organization’s Skills landscape by: leading the Skills D&A operations team and owning the sustainment support model; partnering with Deloitte Consulting Services, DT, and program leadership to align and prioritize wave and sustainment work (including vendor interactions and SOW/MSA delivery); identifying and escalating risks across technology, scope, resources, and timeline; and providing advisory support as the program transitions to a post-Wave 2 sustainment model. Work you'll do As a Specialist Manager, Technical Project and Program Management on the TIS – Talent Innovation & Solution team, you will be responsible for leading implementation and sustainment activities across the Skills landscape. Lead the Skills D&A operations team to execute implementation and sustainment activities and meet support objectives. Own sustainment reporting for the Skills landscape, including monthly reporting for SkillsIQ and the Skills Management Tool. Oversee vendor interactions and service delivery to help ensure issues are addressed in line with service level expectations and signed statements of work. Partner with DT, Deloitte Consulting Services, and program leadership to align priorities across wave delivery, build, test, cutover, and sustainment planning. Provide advisory support for the post-Wave 2 sustainment model and escalate risks across technology, scope, resources, and timeline. The team TIS – Talent Innovation & Solution Digital Platform & Services within TIS - Digital & Analytics is the HR services center for the U.S. organization across all regions. The Digital Platform & Services team follows a standard approach on developing business-aligned solutions that provide an enhanced employee experience through innovative solutions which are efficient and effective. Our goal is to deliver high-quality service through world class technology solutions, strategic reporting, data visualization and analytics Location: HyderabadExperience - 10years+ Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: Experience leading cross-functional delivery teams across multiple workstreams Experience managing program governance, prioritization, and risk escalation Experience managing vendor delivery, statements of work, and operational support activities Experience partnering with business, technology, and program leadership stakeholders Experience preparing written and verbal updates for leadership audiences Preferred: Experience supporting HR technology, talent, or skills platform initiatives Experience with implementation planning across build, test, cutover, and sustainment activities Experience with operational reporting, analytics, or dashboarding

title: USI-EH27-DTTL-DT GDAS-[SWIFT]- Assistant Manager - SAP SD- Hyderabad
description: As a Product Management Specialist II, you will support and enhance Deloitte’s SAP Sales and Distribution (SAP SD) capabilities by translating business requirements into scalable system solutions. In this role, you will work across configuration, functional design, issue resolution, and process improvement activities that support the order-to-cash lifecycle. The ideal candidate brings hands-on SAP SD experience in SAP S/4HANA environments and the ability to work across business and technical teams.Work you'll doAs a Product Management Specialist II on the SAP SD team, you will be responsible for… Gathering business requirements and translating end-user needs into functional specifications and SAP SD solutions Configuring SAP SD capabilities in SAP S/4HANA to support pricing, order-to-cash, and related business processes Collaborating with technical teams to deliver enhancements, third-party integrations, and interface solutions Diagnosing production issues, performing root cause analysis, and implementing solutions to reduce repeat incidents Identifying opportunities to improve business processes, system performance, and operational efficiency The teamAt Deloitte, we’re all about collaboration. And nowhere is this more apparent than among our 2,000-strong internal services team. With our combined specialist skills, we provide all the essential support and advice our client-facing colleagues need, right across the firm. This enables them to focus all of their efforts on delivering the best service possible to their clients. Covering seven distinct areas; Human Resources, Clients & Industries, Finance & Legal, Practice Support Services, Quality & Risk Services, IT Services, and Workplace Services & Real Estate, together we live, breathe and deliver the Deloitte experience.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology 3–6 years of experience in SAP Sales and Distribution (SAP SD) implementation, rollout, enhancement, or support in an enterprise environment Experience configuring SAP SD pricing and order-to-cash processes in SAP S/4HANA Experience writing functional specifications and working with technical teams on custom enhancements Experience integrating SAP SD with Finance (FI), Materials Management (MM), or Project Systems (PS) Experience with BRF+, Intermediate Documents (IDocs), and third-party interfaces Preferred: Experience supporting production issue resolution and root cause analysis Experience working directly with business stakeholders to gather requirements and recommend solution designs Experience with SAP change management processes Experience identifying process and system improvement opportunities in order-to-cash workflows

title: USI-EH-FY27-Enabling Areas-GFS -R&A-Operations-Services Specialist-Senior Analyst
description: Services Specialist-Data Preparation and Reporting-OperationsThe team GFS is continuing the rollout of finance services across the Deloitte Member Firm network. This role is part of the Reporting & Analysis (“R&A”). R&A supports member firm clients with all aspects of management reporting and analysis. R&A is made up of analytical, financial, and reporting experts that align reporting with the strategic priorities of our businesses, enabling areas/enterprise solutions and business leaders. The team is responsible for designing and driving the future of management reporting for all levels of firm leadership. With a focus on innovation, we continuously seek ways to enhance and optimize existing deliverables and create new reporting solutions. We are also uniquely positioned to identify and implement leading practices across clients. This management role sits on our Operations team, coordinating across teams to manage several shared services and processes and driving end-to-end solutions and analysis that provide our clients and leaders with the consumable information and insight they need to drive better business decisions and address challenges.Work you’ll do as a Senior Analyst within GFS R&A Operations Reporting & Analysis: Create/maintain complex financial reports and dashboards to meet internal client business needs Maintain deliverable documentation and continuous improvement Extract data from different sources for various reporting and analysis purposes Provide internal clients with timely and accurate ad-hoc reports and analysis Independently carry out analysis, manage queries and communicate solutions to stakeholders Service Delivery and Project Management: Provide exceptional client service by responding with a sense of urgency, practicality, accountability and integrity Maintain quality and accuracy standards for all assigned work Keep up to date with current business models and processes of the organization Continually look for ways to improve reporting processes and enhance overall client experience Complete duties assigned from time to time Proactively participate in special projects assigned by leadership People and Relationship Management: Successfully manage client relations and develop trust-based relationships with our internal clients Identify learning opportunities and participate in training Provide guidance and training to less experienced team members Support a collaborative and innovative culture QualificationsEducation/Experience Requirements: Post-graduation or Bachelor’s degree in Finance or related subject 4 – 6 years of experience in business planning and analysis/operations, preferably in MNC or global organization High performing individual with demonstrated problem-solving skills and ability to work on complex reporting solutions Capability and Skills Requirements: Ability to research and analyze data from internal and external sources Very good understanding of financial and reporting concepts and operations metrics/key performance indicators (KPIs) used by professional services firms Possess strong communication skills with proficiency in English, both oral and written, and ability to clearly articulate ideas and independently present concepts convincingly to a wide range of audiences Effective problem-solving skills Self-motivated, with strong time management skills and ability to prioritize and execute tasks efficiently without continual supervision Ability to work within a virtual team in a dynamic, cross-functional environment Technology or Other Requirements: Advanced level of expertise in MS Excel Proficient level of expertise in MS PowerPoint, with skills to create executive level presentations Ability to effectively use other commonly used software such as MS Word and MS Outlook in completion of work Knowledge of financial systems (HANA/AO, SAP) and ServiceNow is helpful Experience with Tableau or other BI analysis software (e.g., Power BI, Web Intelligence, etc.) is helpful Shift Timings : 2:00PM - 11:00PMWork Location : Hyderabad

title: USI - EH27 - Tax - GESTC - Analytics (AI Engineer with Python + AWS) - L45 - Senior Consultant - Hyderabad
description: Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) As an AI Engineer in the Analytics/AI team, you will design, build, and operate scalable AI and GenAI solutions that power intelligent analytics and data-driven decision-making platforms. You will work closely with product owners, data engineers, and business stakeholders to develop production-grade AI applications, including large language model (LLM) based systems, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and intelligent automation solutions. This role requires strong hands-on engineering skills, practical AI/ML and GenAI knowledge, and the ability to independently drive complex initiatives from design through deployment in a cloud-native environment. Work you'll do As a Senior, Tax Technology Services on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) Analytics/AI team, you will be responsible for: Designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end artificial intelligence and generative artificial intelligence solutions from experimentation through production deployment Developing retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, model inference workflows, and application programming interfaces using Python and FastAPI Integrating structured and unstructured data sources using SQL, cloud services, and data processing tools to support scalable analytics solutions Deploying and operating workloads in Amazon Web Services, including services such as Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3), Lambda, DynamoDB, and Bedrock Supporting legacy analytics and extract, transform, load solutions and contributing to migration efforts to the Amazon Web Services stack Mentoring junior team members and contributing to technical design, engineering standards, and delivery quality The team The Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) Analytics/AI team develops technology-enabled solutions that help support tax transformation and innovation. The team works across analytics, engineering, and business stakeholders to build scalable platforms, modernize existing capabilities, and apply artificial intelligence solutions to business needs. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: 5-8 years of experience in artificial intelligence, machine learning, or software engineering Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or another technical field Experience developing applications in Python, including application programming interfaces, testing, debugging, and automation Experience using SQL with structured and unstructured datasets Experience building generative artificial intelligence or large language model solutions, including prompt engineering, embeddings, retrieval-augmented generation, and vector databases 2+ Years Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, Docker, and continuous integration/continuous deployment pipelines 2+ Years Experience using Amazon Web Services services such as Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3), Lambda, DynamoDB, Bedrock, and Boto3. Preferred: Experience building artificial intelligence application user interfaces using Streamlit, Gradio, or React Experience with orchestration and stateful artificial intelligence workflows Experience with container orchestration or managed cloud environments Experience working on enterprise-scale artificial intelligence platforms or analytics products Experience with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Experience using Keras, scikit-learn, XGBoost, or Natural Language Toolkit (NLTK) #CA-GSD #CA-HPN

If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) As an AI Engineer in the Analytics/AI team, you will design, build, and operate scalable AI and GenAI solutions that power intelligent analytics and data-driven decision-making platforms. You will work closely with product owners, data engineers, and business stakeholders to develop production-grade AI applications, including large language model (LLM) based systems, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and intelligent automation solutions. This role requires strong hands-on engineering skills, practical AI/ML and GenAI knowledge, and the ability to independently drive complex initiatives from design through deployment in a cloud-native environment. Work you'll do As a Senior, Tax Technology Services on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) Analytics/AI team, you will be responsible for: Designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end artificial intelligence and generative artificial intelligence solutions from experimentation through production deployment Developing retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, model inference workflows, and application programming interfaces using Python and FastAPI Integrating structured and unstructured data sources using SQL, cloud services, and data processing tools to support scalable analytics solutions Deploying and operating workloads in Amazon Web Services, including services such as Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3), Lambda, DynamoDB, and Bedrock Supporting legacy analytics and extract, transform, load solutions and contributing to migration efforts to the Amazon Web Services stack Mentoring junior team members and contributing to technical design, engineering standards, and delivery quality The team The Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) Analytics/AI team develops technology-enabled solutions that help support tax transformation and innovation. The team works across analytics, engineering, and business stakeholders to build scalable platforms, modernize existing capabilities, and apply artificial intelligence solutions to business needs. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: 5-8 years of experience in artificial intelligence, machine learning, or software engineering Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or another technical field Experience developing applications in Python, including application programming interfaces, testing, debugging, and automation Experience using SQL with structured and unstructured datasets Experience building generative artificial intelligence or large language model solutions, including prompt engineering, embeddings, retrieval-augmented generation, and vector databases 2+ Years Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, Docker, and continuous integration/continuous deployment pipelines 2+ Years Experience using Amazon Web Services services such as Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3), Lambda, DynamoDB, Bedrock, and Boto3. Preferred: Experience building artificial intelligence application user interfaces using Streamlit, Gradio, or React Experience with orchestration and stateful artificial intelligence workflows Experience with container orchestration or managed cloud environments Experience working on enterprise-scale artificial intelligence platforms or analytics products Experience with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Experience using Keras, scikit-learn, XGBoost, or Natural Language Toolkit (NLTK) #CA-GSD #CA-HPN

description: Do you enjoy working in a fast-changing global environment with evolving business models? If you answered "Yes" to this question, join the Global Trade Advisory within the Indirect Tax group.Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through the USI Tax teams.Do you enjoy working in a fast-changing global environment with evolving business models? Since then, nearly all the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through the USI Tax teams.Deloitte Tax is leading its clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace, offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to comply with the reporting requirements, uncover insights and deploy smarter approaches for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work You'll DoGlobal Trade Management (GTM) specializes in technology-enabled methods and best practices for global trade programs. These programs help address international and local requirements. We also assist in embedding international trade controls into daily business operations.Responsibilities: -Collaborate with engagement leaders and stakeholders to gather and document detailed business requirements for GTM projectsHelp translate business requirements into functional and technical specifications for development and configuration in GTM modules (Trade master data, Restricted Party Screening, Customs Management, Trade Agreements, License Management, and Global Trade Visibility).Coordinate with project teams, and stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of project milestones.Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation within Oracle GTM  insights.Implement and configure the software to replicate the required business processes and analytical/reporting needs.Support in developing training materials and conducting training sessions for end-users and engagement teamsCollaborate with cross-functional teams, including development, infrastructure, and business teams, to ensure seamless service delivery and support.You will contribute to the development and growth of the Oracle GTM practice.Work Location: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Chennai, and PuneTime: 11 am – 8 pm ISTThe TeamThe Global Trade Advisory (GTA) practice includes Global Trade Management technology specialists, customs brokers, auditors, and trade management professionals. These professionals help importers and exporters achieve worldwide compliance. The GTA practice assists Deloitte Tax in helping it’s clients find efficiencies and advantages in their global supply chain. You will be based in India and support Deloitte TaxQualifications & Experience Required:University degree (bachelor’s or above) in the below or related areas of studies: engineering /STEM, information management, information systems, computer science, business (international relations, finance).Minimum 3 years of experience in Oracle GTM project implementation, and have knowledge of the Oracle GTM Solution, in the following domains, Trade Master Data, Restricted Party Screening, Customs Management, Trade Agreements, License Management, and Global Trade Visibility.Experience in integrating GTM with Oracle SCM modules and external systems..Strong technical skills in Oracle GTM configuration, integration (REST/SOAP APIs, Oracle Integration Cloud), and data migration.Proficiency in SQL, PL/SQL, and scripting for data manipulation and reporting is an added skill.Good analytical and modelling skills.Team player with strong written and verbal communication skillsPreferred Qualifications & Experience Required:•Oracle GTM or Oracle Cloud SCM certification.•Software aptitude in Microsoft PowerPoint, Project, Access, Excel, and/or Visio•Experience presenting to leaders/ decision makers•Knowledge of export regulations including ITAR/EAR•Demonstrated interest in international trade or international business•Strong research, writing, verbal communication, and project management skills•Ability to bring 'out of the box' insights  aligned to leading practices and differentiated business outcome•Understanding of end-to-end processes and attention to detailed design.•Strong team and organizational skills, ability to self-manage time and tasks•Ability to manage engagement and cross functional team expectations#TAXGTS
