title: USI-EH27-Tax-Business Tax Services-L-55-Tax Manager
description: U.S. Business Tax Services: Tax ManagerTax Manager – US Corporate Tax, Operating Partnerships, Private Equity, Investment Management, Real Estate, Fund of Funds, Insurance, Regulated Investment CompanyWork You’ll DoCorporate Tax Team - Opportunity to work with US based clients of Deloitte Tax to provide tax compliance services, including income and several other types of tax return preparation, and computations. Focus on providing business tax return compliance (including projections, and tax accounting for U.S. federal, state, and international tax matters) and related advisory services.Mutual Fund Tax Team - practice perform detail-level reviews of tax research, regulated investment company (RIC) tax work papers, financial statement provisions and related tax disclosures and federal and relevant state returns, excise calculations, and RIC compliance tests. In addition, they perform tax planning and supervise tax consultants. They also attend required Deloitte Tax LLP and sector-specific training.Hedge Fund Tax Team - Hedge Fund Tax practice perform detail-level review of partnership work papers, allocations, and tax returns, as well as prepare materials and research for consulting projects related to tax planning opportunities. Tax Seniors, coordinate and communicate with the client contacts to gather information to complete the tax returns. They also train, mentor and supervise new and experienced-level staff and attend required Deloitte Tax LLP and sector-specific training.Do you have a passion to work for U.S. based clients of Deloitte Tax and help transform their current tax practice to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career, and find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfil your potential, and have a significant impact on global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join the Business Tax Services group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S.), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.The TeamAccelerating globalization, growing regulatory and business complexity and the evolution of tax technology is creating ever-increasing expectations for tax executives. At Deloitte, we are leading clients through change, uncovering insights and providing strategic value to organizations. Our approach combines insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help serve our clients with distinction. You will be based in India and are part of the US team serving our U.S. based clients.Work Location: Hyderabad/Gurugram/Pune/Bangalore/Chennai/Kolkata/MumbaiShift Timings: 7 AM to 4 PM | 11 AM to 8 PM | 2 PM to 11 PMQualifications:5+ years of experience in US Federal Tax - Corporate, Partnership, Private Wealth, Trust, Investment Management - Hedge Funds, Private Equity, Mutual Funds, Regulated Investment Companies - Forms 1120, 1065Enrolled Agent or other appropriate certification (or in the process of pursuing)Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or another business-related fieldPrior Big 4 experience a plus or equivalent experienceKnowledge of fund accounting and general ledger accounting a plusStrong communication, interpersonal, and organizational skillsStrong analytical and communication skills to be able to articulate conclusions, planning opportunities, and risks identified through the research projects.Experience with managing projects including scheduling, budgeting, client correspondence and billing, excellent technology (i.e., Microsoft Excel and compliance software), research and writing skills.A preparer tax identification number (PTIN) is required for tax returns. If you do not have a PTIN or if your PTIN is expired, you are requested to complete the new or renewal application process (as applicable) before joining Deloitte.#CA-AG#CA-SN#CA-HPN

title: USI FY27 | Cyber Operate- SOAR + Anthropic - Senior Consultant
description: Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat design and technology as we partner with clients to transform their security posture. As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions. Work you'll do As a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Serving as a primary point of contact for client stakeholders and supporting security automation strategy and value realization Designing, developing, and managing SOAR playbooks for triage, enrichment, investigation, containment, escalation, and remediation Leading integrations across security platforms, including security information and event management (SIEM), endpoint detection and response (EDR), identity and access management (IAM), threat intelligence, ticketing, firewall, email, cloud, and endpoint security tools Building and optimizing AI-augmented SOAR workflows, including alert triage, contextual enrichment, incident summarization, escalation logic, and governed decisioning Defining automation metrics, dashboards, technical documentation, and workflow improvements to enhance reliability, scalability, and security operations maturity The team Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes managing the identity lifecycle, security operations, threat intelligence, application security, business transformation, and ensuring continuous compliance. Services include Cyber-as-a-Service, Managed Application Security, and Managed Extended Detect & Respond (MXDR). Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Gurugram/Kolkata Shift Timings: 2:00 PM to 11:00 PM IST Qualifications Required: 6+ years of experience in cybersecurity, SOAR engineering, security automation, or security operations Experience with SOAR platforms such as Cortex XSOAR, Splunk SOAR, Swimlane, IBM Resilient, or Tines Experience with security operations center processes, security information and event management (SIEM) workflows, and incident response lifecycle activities Experience integrating application programming interfaces (APIs), webhooks, and third-party security technologies into automated workflows Experience with Python, PowerShell, Bash, JSON, REST APIs, or similar scripting and automation technologies Experience designing AI-augmented SOAR workflows that include large language model (LLM)-based reasoning, prompt engineering, output validation, and human-in-the-loop decisioning Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cyber Security, Information Security, Engineering, or Information Technology Preferred: Experience with multi-cloud security environments across Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Familiarity with MITRE ATT&CK, detection engineering, and incident response practices Experience with information technology service management (ITSM) or case management tools such as ServiceNow or Jira Relevant certifications in cybersecurity, cloud security, or SOAR or SIEM platforms Experience with AI-assisted playbook generation, machine learning-based alert triage, or automated incident summarization in enterprise SOAR platforms Experience architecting Claude-based or equivalent agentic security operations center capabilities, including tool use, Model Context Protocol (MCP), extended reasoning, or structured outputs#Cyber_Cyber Operate

You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions. Work you'll do As a Senior Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Serving as a primary point of contact for client stakeholders and supporting security automation strategy and value realization Designing, developing, and managing SOAR playbooks for triage, enrichment, investigation, containment, escalation, and remediation Leading integrations across security platforms, including security information and event management (SIEM), endpoint detection and response (EDR), identity and access management (IAM), threat intelligence, ticketing, firewall, email, cloud, and endpoint security tools Building and optimizing AI-augmented SOAR workflows, including alert triage, contextual enrichment, incident summarization, escalation logic, and governed decisioning Defining automation metrics, dashboards, technical documentation, and workflow improvements to enhance reliability, scalability, and security operations maturity The team Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes managing the identity lifecycle, security operations, threat intelligence, application security, business transformation, and ensuring continuous compliance. Services include Cyber-as-a-Service, Managed Application Security, and Managed Extended Detect & Respond (MXDR). Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Gurugram/Kolkata Shift Timings: 2:00 PM to 11:00 PM IST Qualifications Required: 6+ years of experience in cybersecurity, SOAR engineering, security automation, or security operations Experience with SOAR platforms such as Cortex XSOAR, Splunk SOAR, Swimlane, IBM Resilient, or Tines Experience with security operations center processes, security information and event management (SIEM) workflows, and incident response lifecycle activities Experience integrating application programming interfaces (APIs), webhooks, and third-party security technologies into automated workflows Experience with Python, PowerShell, Bash, JSON, REST APIs, or similar scripting and automation technologies Experience designing AI-augmented SOAR workflows that include large language model (LLM)-based reasoning, prompt engineering, output validation, and human-in-the-loop decisioning Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cyber Security, Information Security, Engineering, or Information Technology Preferred: Experience with multi-cloud security environments across Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Familiarity with MITRE ATT&CK, detection engineering, and incident response practices Experience with information technology service management (ITSM) or case management tools such as ServiceNow or Jira Relevant certifications in cybersecurity, cloud security, or SOAR or SIEM platforms Experience with AI-assisted playbook generation, machine learning-based alert triage, or automated incident summarization in enterprise SOAR platforms Experience architecting Claude-based or equivalent agentic security operations center capabilities, including tool use, Model Context Protocol (MCP), extended reasoning, or structured outputs#Cyber_Cyber Operate

description: Deloitte Cyber understands the unique challenges and opportunities businesses face in cybersecurity. Join our team to deliver powerful insights to help our clients navigate the ever-changing threat landscape and technology transformation as we partner with clients to strengthen their security posture. You will work with security operations teams to automate workflows, improve incident response processes, and enhance operational efficiency through platform integrations and playbook development. This role offers the opportunity to contribute to AI-enabled security automation capabilities that help organizations scale and mature their cyber operations. Work you'll do As a Consultant on the Cyber Operate team, you will be responsible for: Designing, developing, and maintaining SOAR playbooks for alert triage, investigation, enrichment, and response activities Integrating SOAR platforms with security and enterprise tools, including security information and event management (SIEM), endpoint detection and response (EDR), threat intelligence, ticketing, email, identity and access management (IAM), firewall, and cloud security platforms Collaborating with security operations center analysts, incident responders, and engineering teams to identify automation opportunities and improve response workflows Troubleshooting and enhancing playbooks, connectors, integrations, dashboards, reports, and operational metrics to improve reliability, performance, and automation outcomes Supporting AI-enabled SOAR use cases, including AI-assisted playbook development, alert triage, incident summarization, and decision support within governed workflows The team Cyber Operate teams manage clients' critical cyber assets either as a fully managed service or in partnership with clients. They deliver skilled talent, cutting-edge technologies, and robust processes to operate client cyber capabilities. This includes managing the identity lifecycle, security operations, threat intelligence, application security, business transformation, and ensuring continuous compliance. Services include Cyber-as-a-Service, Managed Application Security, and Managed Extended Detect & Respond (MXDR). title: USI FY27 | Cyber - Strategy and Transformation - Senior Consultant-GRC Compliance - FTH
description: Senior Consultant - FTH supports governance, risk, and compliance activities by helping organizations strengthen controls, manage regulatory requirements, and improve risk visibility across business processes. This role involves working with cross-functional stakeholders to assess compliance frameworks, support remediation efforts, and contribute to operational improvements. The role is suited for candidates who can manage multiple deliverables, analyze risk and control environments, and support project objectives in a structured setting.Work you'll doAs a Senior Consultant - FTH on the Governance, Risk, and Compliance team, you will be responsible for: Support governance, risk, and compliance assessments across processes, systems, and control environments Analyze policies, procedures, and control documentation to identify gaps, exceptions, and remediation needs Prepare project deliverables, status updates, risk summaries, and compliance documentation for stakeholder review Coordinate with business, technology, and control owners to track issues, action plans, and closure activities Contribute to process improvement initiatives that strengthen compliance monitoring, reporting, and operational effectiveness The teamThe Governance, Risk, and Compliance team helps organizations manage risk, strengthen internal controls, and respond to regulatory and operational requirements. The team works across business and technology functions to support compliance programs, risk assessments, and control transformation initiatives. Team members collaborate on structured, issue-driven work that improves transparency, accountability, and process effectiveness.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree 5+ years of experience in governance, risk, compliance, internal controls, audit, or regulatory compliance Experience documenting processes, risks, controls, and remediation actions Experience preparing reports, status updates, and compliance documentation for stakeholder review Experience working with Microsoft Excel, Microsoft PowerPoint, and Microsoft Word Experience coordinating with business, technology, or control stakeholders across multiple workstreams Preferred: Experience supporting risk and control assessments in a consulting or professional services environment Experience with governance, risk, and compliance tools or issue-tracking platforms Experience with control testing, issue management, or remediation tracking Experience working on projects involving regulatory compliance or internal policy adherence Master’s degree#Cyber Strategy & Transformation

title: FY27 USI Audit Services | EH | L25 - Assistant, Valuation and Analytics Advisory
description: Assistant, Valuation and Analytics AdvisoryJoin Deloitte’s Audit & Assurance Valuation and Analytics team to support audit objectives through financial instrument pricing, valuation analysis, and data analytics. In this role, you will work with market data, valuation tools, and audit teams across industries to help assess complex instruments and document technical analyses. This opportunity offers exposure to valuation methodologies, structured products, and cross-functional collaboration in a dynamic professional environment.Work you'll doAs an Assistant, Valuation and Analytics Advisory in the Valuation and Analytics team, you will be responsible for:Serve as a team member for Valuation & Analytics  practice. The work will focus on independent pricing of financial instruments, building and executing data analytics to support audit objectives, using vendor data and tools such as Capital IQ, Refinitive Eikon, Markit, Superderivatives, FinMechanics etc.Serve as a team member on engagements where responsibilities include detailed execution of valuation and modeling projects and documentation of modeling methodologies and results.Preparing audit documentation of valuations.Ability to collaborate with audit teams across companies of all sizes and across multiple industries.Handling price challenges from the audit team and ability to explain difficult financial modeling/valuation concepts to diverse audiences and to experts at various clientsResponsible for building and managing relationships and communications with audit team members.Location: Bangalore & GurugramShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMNight shifts may be needed during January and February.Qualifications•             Financial Engineering/ Quantitative Finance/ BE/ BTech/ MBA(Finance)/ StatisticsRequired·       Strong undergraduates with engineering/ mathematics and statistics background and/or relevant work experience in financial services and capital markets would be considered. Additionally candidates with background in probability and statistics with CFA/ FRM/PRM would be preferred.·       Background in financial derivatives, structured products and energy and commodities  including detailed knowledge of valuation model and techniques is a plus.·       Experience with handelling large data set for Interest rates, Fx, Credit and Equity from different market vendors is a plus.·       Strong analytical and computer skills including experience with quantitative analysis technical tools and techniques such as Refinitive, Markit, Capital IQ, Bloomberg, Monte-Carlo Simulation tools such as Crystal Ball and @Risk, FinCAD, Numerix, Savysoft TOPS, Principia, Super Derivatives, are a plus.·       Background in mathematical finance at the level of a Master's level degree in Mathematical Finance, Mathematics of Finance, Financial Engineering or Quantitative Finance is a strong plus.·       Experience with programming laguages including SAS, Python and R is highly desired.·       Familiarity with financial markets, financial instrument valuation (including derivatives and structured products), trading, deal structuring or risk management is desired.·       Experience with Asset Liability Management (ALM) or Counterparty Valuation Adjustment (CVA) is a plus.·       Experience with SPAN/clearing/margin models is a plus.·       Personal characteristics should include: presentation, consulting, project management, client, and training / mentoring skills; strong presence, good communication and interpersonal skills; conceptual and quantitative depth in valuation methodologies and concepts and underlying markets and models. ·       Ability to explain difficult financial modeling/valuation concepts to diverse audiences and to experts at various clients.·       Related consulting experience is a plus.

The work will focus on independent pricing of financial instruments, building and executing data analytics to support audit objectives, using vendor data and tools such as Capital IQ, Refinitive Eikon, Markit, Superderivatives, FinMechanics etc.Serve as a team member on engagements where responsibilities include detailed execution of valuation and modeling projects and documentation of modeling methodologies and results.Preparing audit documentation of valuations.Ability to collaborate with audit teams across companies of all sizes and across multiple industries.Handling price challenges from the audit team and ability to explain difficult financial modeling/valuation concepts to diverse audiences and to experts at various clientsResponsible for building and managing relationships and communications with audit team members.Location: Bangalore & GurugramShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMNight shifts may be needed during January and February.Qualifications•             Financial Engineering/ Quantitative Finance/ BE/ BTech/ MBA(Finance)/ StatisticsRequired·       Strong undergraduates with engineering/ mathematics and statistics background and/or relevant work experience in financial services and capital markets would be considered. Additionally candidates with background in probability and statistics with CFA/ FRM/PRM would be preferred.·       Background in financial derivatives, structured products and energy and commodities  including detailed knowledge of valuation model and techniques is a plus.·       Experience with handelling large data set for Interest rates, Fx, Credit and Equity from different market vendors is a plus.·       Strong analytical and computer skills including experience with quantitative analysis technical tools and techniques such as Refinitive, Markit, Capital IQ, Bloomberg, Monte-Carlo Simulation tools such as Crystal Ball and @Risk, FinCAD, Numerix, Savysoft TOPS, Principia, Super Derivatives, are a plus.·       Background in mathematical finance at the level of a Master's level degree in Mathematical Finance, Mathematics of Finance, Financial Engineering or Quantitative Finance is a strong plus.·       Experience with programming laguages including SAS, Python and R is highly desired.·       Familiarity with financial markets, financial instrument valuation (including derivatives and structured products), trading, deal structuring or risk management is desired.·       Experience with Asset Liability Management (ALM) or Counterparty Valuation Adjustment (CVA) is a plus.·       Experience with SPAN/clearing/margin models is a plus.·       Personal characteristics should include: presentation, consulting, project management, client, and training / mentoring skills; strong presence, good communication and interpersonal skills; conceptual and quantitative depth in valuation methodologies and concepts and underlying markets and models. ·       Ability to explain difficult financial modeling/valuation concepts to diverse audiences and to experts at various clients.·       Related consulting experience is a plus.

title: USI - EH27 - CoRe DDAI - KX Experience Analyst - Hyderabad
description: Associate, ProductionDo you have an eye for detail? Does technology platform management interest you? Then this may be the perfect role for you as the KX Platforms team is looking for people who can help manage internal knowledge sharing platforms and search solutions, understanding its lifecycle and contribute to the platform roadmap to continually improve platform experience.Work you'll doAs an Associate, Production on the KX Platforms and Search team, you will be responsible for supporting product enhancement, testing, issue resolution, and stakeholder coordination for knowledge sharing platforms and search solutions. Support product release activities by documenting test cases, executing test scenarios, and validating expected results. Partner with product owners, product leads, and technology teams to understand enhancement requirements and support delivery activities. Conduct smoke testing and issue validation, report defects, and track updates through resolution. Gather and synthesize end-user feedback to support product recommendations and continuous platform improvement. Participate in Agile-based release processes, stakeholder meetings, automation efforts, and knowledge transfer activities. The teamThe KX Platforms and Search team is a part of Digital Data Analytics and Innovation team within CoRe that focuses on delivering a futuristic and unified experience by providing constant innovation and enhancements to knowledge sharing platforms features, interface, and architecture. The team also optimizes the content on Internal knowledge sharing tools and improve its visibility, making sure that the knowledge management platforms are abreast of the constant evolution in KM technologies and are continually enhanced per practitioners’ needs.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: 1+ years of experience in product support, platform operations, quality assurance, content management, knowledge management, or website maintenance Experience supporting test case creation, test execution, smoke testing, or user acceptance testing activities Experience working with Agile or Scrum delivery methodology Experience with Microsoft PowerPoint, Word, Excel, and Outlook Experience with SharePoint Online, HTML, or internal portal maintenance Experience coordinating with product, technology, and business stakeholders Exposure to knowledge management tools, content management tools, or search platforms Preferred: Experience in a professional services organization Exposure to SPFx, jQuery, Python, React JS, CSS, Bootstrap, or similar UI frameworks Exposure to Adobe XD, Figma, or other interface design tools Knowledge of internet research tools, online information databases, and search engines Exposure to Generative Artificial Intelligence, prompt engineering, natural language processing, or machine learning Experience creating process documentation or training materials

title: USI FY27 Audit Services |EH| L45 - Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation
description: USI Audit & Assurance – Cloud Strategy & Implementation – Senior Consultant – NetSuite FunctionalAre you a detail-oriented, inquisitive individual who enjoys coming up with innovative solutions?  We are in the process of expanding Deloitte’s Cloud Strategy & Implementation practice. We are seeking professionals who want to build off their existing ERP knowledge and use such knowledge on exciting advisory projects that add great value to our clients within their finance and accounting departments.  From technical accounting issues to new standard implementations, and transaction support, the leaders of our practice will help you in expanding your experience base to further develop your career.   At Deloitte, we provide services using an approach designed to provide the flexibility to serve the unique circumstances and complexities of our clients.  You’ll gain exposure to a variety of industries, business models and financial accounting areas, helping your career growth and professional development.Responsibilities :As a Cloud Strategy & Implementation NetSuite consultant, you will implement and deploy NetSuite solutions:·       Working within an engagement team, a NetSuite senior consultant is responsible for identifying business requirements, requirements management, functional design, prototyping, process design, testing, training, and supporting implementations.·       Implement and deploy NetSuite solutions accommodating unique industry, business, and management processes, regulatory requirements and other business requirements.·       Conduct business process mapping and requirements gathering sessions with clients to determine configuration requirements both on-site and remote.·       Prepare Business Requirements and Technical Scoping Documents resulting from the above noted mapping sessions to provide proposed solutions for the requirements for client approval.·       Create functional requirements as an input to application design.·       Configure NetSuite to meet business requirements.·       Drive test planning, execution, and optimization support·       Troubleshoot issues that arise during configuration sessions.·       Provide on-going post implementation support to optimize user adoption and NetSuite configuration.The TeamOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer comprehensive well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Skill required ·       6+ years of strong NetSuite end to end implementation experience.·       Full life cycle NetSuite implementation experience including Design, Build, Test, Deploy, Support phases.·       Ability to manage teams and stakeholders in global locations.·       High level understanding of NetSuite integrations and customizations.·       ERP data migration and cutover experience·       Strong interpersonal and communication skills·       Strong organizational, project management, and time management skills·       Strong in managing client and team interactions and communicate with technical and non-technical audiences.·       Strong problem solving and troubleshooting skills with the ability to exercise mature judgment.·       Strong team management skillset.Educational qualification·       MBA, CA, Masters in Accounting or Finance, B.Tech.·       Should have NetSuite ERP certificate.Location·       Bengaluru & Hyderabad#CA-SP

title: USI- EH27- CoRe Knowledge Services- Analyst - KX Quals and Clients Publishing- Hyderabad
description: Associate, Content ManagementDo you have an eye for detail and a flair for English language? Then this may be the perfect opportunity for you, as the KX Quals team is looking for highly motivated individuals in the field of content curation and publishing. We provide high quality project summaries to the Deloitte member firms, help them to win new business.Work you'll doAs an Associate, Content Management on the KX Quals team, you will be responsible for supporting content curation and publishing activities that help Deloitte practitioners access high-quality credential and knowledge content. Publish project summaries and write-ups to the global knowledge management portal in accordance with established guidelines and quality standards. Review proposal documents, annual reports, and similar business materials to extract, summarize, and structure content for publishing. Curate, organize, and tag content to improve content retrieval and usability within the knowledge management portal. Collaborate with Deloitte practitioners across levels to support targeted content acquisition for recent wins and key projects. Track quality, turnaround time, and process benchmarks; provide reporting support to team leadership. Identify opportunities to improve or automate team processes and support communications that showcase team capabilities and impact stories. The teamThis team is involved in processes that uphold client confidentiality and Intellectual Property guidelines for all content on KX Quals Portal (KX Quals). Among other responsibilities, the team is responsible for searching, curating, and maintaining a learning base to provide a seamless environment for real-time access to knowledge/content via global platform to facilitate quick solutions for client needs. The team is also responsible for collecting, managing, and publishing content on a knowledge sharing platform to safeguard confidentiality of clients.The KX Quals team works closely with global Deloitte practitioners to acquire and publish summaries of key project wins. These projects include the details of the work performed for clients by Deloitte. This content is referenced as credentials, which will help Deloitte practitioners increase speed to market and win new projects.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree in English, Mass Communication, Humanities, or Library Sciences 0-2 years of experience in content writing, content curation, content publishing, research support, or knowledge management Experience using Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, and Excel Experience reviewing and summarizing information from proposals, annual reports, or similar business documents Experience publishing, editing, or curating business content Experience working in a professional services, knowledge services, or shared services environment Ability to work with content management processes and publishing guidelines Preferred: MBA or postgraduate degree Experience with advanced Microsoft Excel functions and pivot tables Experience with Excel macros, SharePoint, or basic analytics tools Experience conducting secondary research Experience working with stakeholders across levels in a corporate environment Foundational proficiency in GenAI tools and prompt engineering for content management or publishing

title: USI-EH27-G&P-USI Digital- L25 - Services Associate, Integration and Development - Hyderabad
description: Do you thrive on developing creative and innovative insights to solve complex challenges? Want to work on next-generation, cutting-edge products and services that deliver outstanding value and that are global in vision and scope? If yes, we need your expertise!Work you'll do As a Services Associate, Integration and Development on the USI Digital team, you will be responsible for delivering business solutions to internal stakeholders through helpdesk tickets, mini-implementation projects, and initiatives aimed at enhancing productivity and innovation. Manage helpdesk tickets and deliver resolutions aligned with quality standards and service level agreements. Create reports in Adobe Workfront based on stakeholder requirements and customize the Workfront instance, including custom forms, layout templates, access levels, and user management. Support implementation activities by managing project tasks, documenting meeting notes, setting up project plans in Workfront, and collaborating with team members. Plan and conduct training sessions on tool navigation and respond to stakeholder questions through tickets and meetings. Perform data governance activities, collaborate with teams within USI Digital and CMG in a consultative role, and support team workload during high-volume periods.The team About USI Digital team USI Digital team offers innovative solutions that enable CMG to execute with agility, drive closed-looped marketing, and achieve operational excellence by optimizing data, tools, people, and processes. Partners with various CMG channels to deliver data-driven insights in the form of dashboards and reports that help make informed decisions. Provides end-to-end support around database management, reporting, and maintenance activities. Proactively identifies opportunities for automation and reporting.Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PM Qualifications Required: 1-3 years of experience working in Adobe Workfront. Bachelor of Technology or Bachelor of Engineering. Experience creating reports in Adobe Workfront based on stakeholder requirements. Experience customizing Adobe Workfront, including custom forms, layout templates, access levels, and user management. Experience translating business requirements into technical requirements. Experience working in Agile methodologies. Preferred: MBA. Experience managing helpdesk tickets aligned with quality standards and service level agreements. Experience planning and conducting tool training sessions. Experience supporting implementation projects in Adobe Workfront. Experience working with internal stakeholders across cross-functional teams.How you’ll growAt Deloitte, we’ve invested a great deal to create a rich environment in which our professionals can grow. We want all our people to develop in their own way, playing to their own strengths as they hone their leadership skills. And, as a part of our efforts, we provide our professionals with a variety of learning and networking opportunities— including exposure to leaders, sponsors, coaches, and challenging assignments—to help accelerate their careers along the way. No two people learn in exactly the same way. So, we provide a range of resources including live classrooms, team-based learning, and eLearning. DU: The Leadership Center in India, our state-of-the-art, world class learning Center in the Hyderabad offices is an extension of the Deloitte University (DU) in Westlake, Texas, and represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to our people’s growth and development. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in IndiaBenefitsAt Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you. Deloitte’s cultureOur positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture that is inclusive, invites authenticity, leverages our diversity, and where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives.  Learn more about Life at Deloitte.Corporate citizenshipDeloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people and our communities.  We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities.  Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E - AVP - Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
description: As an Associate Vice President, Engineering Managed Services at Deloitte Consulting, you will play the role of strategic architect who creates and(or) reviews enterprise grade architectures and also provides best practices for technical delivery for complex, enterprise-solutions. You will lead and guide multidisciplinary, global teams and serve as a senior mentor to managers and junior staff. You will partner closely with clients and internal stakeholders to align solution strategies with business goals, contribute to sales and proposal development, and ensure rigorous management of end-to-end project delivery, including scoping, estimation, and executive reporting for successful project outcomes. Work you'll do As an Associate Vice President, Engineering Managed Services on the AI & Engineering team, you will be responsible for leading hybrid cloud infrastructure strategy, solution design, and delivery for large-scale enterprise environments. Develop and execute hybrid cloud infrastructure strategies aligned to business priorities, market trends, and client transformation goals Lead the design, implementation, and scaling of infrastructure managed services, including automation and generative artificial intelligence-enabled capabilities Build client relationships, identify business opportunities, support go-to-market efforts, and contribute to commercial growth Lead large, cross-functional teams across architecture, engineering, operations, and service delivery to execute complex programs Establish governance, security, compliance, and risk management practices across hybrid and multi-cloud environments The team AI & Data offers a full spectrum of solutions for designing, developing, and operating cutting-edge Data and AI platforms, products, insights, and services. Our offering helps clients innovate, and enhance their data, AI, and analytics capabilities, ensuring they can mature and scale effectively. AI & Data professionals will work with our clients to: Design and modernize large-scale data and analytics platforms including data management, governance and the integration of structured and unstructured data to generate insights leveraging cloud, edge and AI/ML technologies, platforms and methodologies for storage, processing Leverage automation, cognitive and AI based solutions to manage data, predict scenarios and prescribe actions Drive operational efficiency by managing and upgrading their data ecosystems and application platforms, utilizing analytics expertise and providing As-a-Service models to ensure continuous insights and enhancements. Location: Pune / Hyderabad Shift Timings: As per business needs Qualifications Required: 18+ years of experience in information technology infrastructure, including 8+ years in leadership roles focused on hybrid cloud, managed services, or cloud platform engineering Experience selling, designing, and scaling infrastructure managed services for enterprise clients Experience with hybrid cloud architectures across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, or Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Experience with automation frameworks, service desk implementation, AIOps, and end user compute environments Experience leading large, cross-functional teams across infrastructure transformation or cloud services programs Experience managing security, compliance, and regulatory requirements in hybrid or multi-cloud environments Ability to travel 40-50%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve. Preferred: Experience integrating generative artificial intelligence capabilities into infrastructure operations or managed services environments Experience developing go-to-market strategies and supporting sales pursuits for infrastructure or cloud-led transformation programs Experience advising senior client stakeholders on infrastructure modernization and operating model transformation Experience driving digital transformation and workforce development initiatives Experience delivering infrastructure solutions for enterprise data center and cloud transformation programs #CA-AEN#FY27ReferralCampaign

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-IS-Senior Consultant,Technical Transformation-IFS EAM Techno Functional
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, drive innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals, reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businessesLevel: Senior Consultant , Techno Functional As a Senior Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale solutions that support client transformation goals. You will work across the full project lifecycle, from estimation and planning through execution and delivery, partnering with cross-functional global teams to translate functional requirements into scalable technical outcomes. In this role, you will also guide junior team members, manage delivery priorities, and help drive high-quality results within established timelines.Work you’ll do:As a Senior Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will be responsible for: Design and configure IFS Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) modules to support asset management, maintenance, and operational workflows Lead discussions with business and functional stakeholders to define requirements, assess integration impacts, and resolve design issues Develop and deploy solutions aligned with technical architecture, integration standards, and quality processes Create and maintain technical design guides, templates, and standards while reviewing deliverables and providing guidance to team members Support Agile delivery activities, manage status reporting, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and identify automation opportunities for routine development or operational tasksThe team:You will play a key role in developing verticalized solutions tailored to the unique needs of each client’s sector, transforming how organizations sell products, deliver services, drive growth, and sustain mission-critical operations. By leveraging your business expertise and advanced technology, you will help ensure every solution is seamlessly integrated with Industry Advantage and aligned with sector-specific requirements. With your focus on innovation and measurable value, you will empower clients to achieve strategic objectives, enhance operational efficiency, and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving marketplace by addressing core business challenges and opportunities across industries.QualificationsRequired6-9 years of experience in IFS EAM Modules: Strong understanding of asset management, maintenance planning, work orders, and inventory management within IFS ERP with Power, Utilities and Renewables Industry.Business Process Expertise: Ability to map business processes and align them with IFS EAM functionalities.Hands-on Configuration Experience: Proven experience configuring and optimizing IFS EAM solutions.Strong Data Migration Skills: Understanding of data extraction, cleansing, and migration methodologies.Experience in End-to-End Implementation: Hands-on involvement in IFS EAM implementation cycles, including requirements gathering, UAT, and go-live support.Stakeholder Management: Ability to work with clients, internal teams, and cross-functional departments to ensure seamless implementation. Excellent Documentation Skills: Proficiency in creating functional requirement documents (FRDs), user manuals, and process flow diagrams.Bachelor of Engineering (BE), Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Master of Computer Applications (MCA), Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degreePreferred:Power, Utilities and Renewables Industry knowledge and experience Experience preparing technical architecture and solution design documentation Experience facilitating Agile ceremonies and managing delivery status reporting Experience reviewing deliverables and providing technical guidance to team members Experience collaborating with onsite clients, analysts, and cross-functional delivery teamsLocation: ·       Bengaluru/Hyderabad#Industrysolutions#FY27ReferralCampaign#AIE2027

title: USI- EH-27- Tax - L45- Multistate Tax services- Senior, Tax Services - Passthrough -
description: Deloitte Tax Services is seeking a Senior to support multistate tax compliance and related delivery activities across a nationally managed service offering. In this role, you will work with engagement teams and compliance center resources to help deliver timely, accurate tax compliance services for clients. The role offers exposure to large-scale delivery models, multijurisdictional compliance work, and collaboration across Deloitte’s US and USI teams.Work You'll Do –  As a tax compliance specialist in our Multistate Investment Management practice, you will collaborate daily as part of high-performing teams, work deeply in our tax compliance process, use cutting edge technology tools to meet our client’s compliance needs accurately and efficiently, and consult with other team members.  Daily tasks may include preparing tax returns across a broad range of clients and jurisdictions, researching tax regulations, understanding the applicable tax implications for specific clients and making recommendations based on your findings.  You will commonly work with multiple clients at the same time, providing you exposure to a variety of organizations and a stronger understanding of applicable tax implications for different clients. Performing a detailed technical review of partnership and corporate state tax returns and work papers with attention to multistate tax issues such as apportionment, state modifications, nexus, unitary filings, and flow-through taxation. Coordinating with an in-house tax preparation team within Deloitte and with the clients’ tax department. Performing detailed review of estimated payment and withholding calculations and related filings. Researching state tax legislation and assisting with impact on compliance. Assisting with various tax consulting projects including research and writing projects related to tax planning, restructuring, due diligence, audit defense, and accounting for income taxes. Assisting with engagement workflow management and supervising tax consultants and interns on assigned engagements. The Team: Multistate State is a rapidly expanding service offering at Deloitte. The offering is built on a scale that includes a highly-leveraged and nationally managed compliance center in our U.S. India (USI) offices, with the project oversight management based in the U.S. offices, primarily Chicago. Deloitte is currently in the process of aggressively increasing its market share in this service offering.Work Location: Hyderabad, Gurugram, Chennai, Bangalore, Kolkata, Pune, MumbaiShift Time – 11am – 8pm ISTQualifications - Required: Full time Masters degree from reputed University 4 -8 years’ experience in state and local partnership and corporate taxes (Operating Partnerships, Partnership Structures, state schedule K-1's, private equity, real estate) Excellent presentation and communication skills Supervisory experience Enrolled Agent Certification for Managers A preparer tax identification number (PTIN) is required for tax returns. If you do not have a PTIN or if your PTIN is expired, you are requested to complete the new or renewal application process (as applicable) before joining Deloitte.

title: USI - EH27 - L45 - Senior, Tax Services-Global Trade Service (GTS) - Technical
description: Do you have a passion to support Deloitte Tax in helping global clients transform their Global Trade solution? Are you a team player with a practical, business-oriented mindset? Do you enjoy working in an ever-changing global environment with fast-moving markets and evolving business models? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join us in the International Tax group.We are a recognized leader in solving some of the complex business problems for our clients, differentiated by our ability to execute on the insights we provide. Our multi-disciplinary competencies allow us to address CXO issues from several angles.Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through USI Tax practice. USI Tax offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a sought-after career option.Deloitte Tax is leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace by offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to their clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work You'll Do - Intro: Our team specializes in effective technology-enabled methodologies and providing leading practices for global trade programs that address both international and local requirements, as well as embed international trade controls into day-to-day business operations.Work You'll Do -: • Collaborate with clients and stakeholders to gather and document detailed business requirements for GTS projects. • In your role, you will lead and/or facilitate business process definition and modeling. • Translate business requirements into functional and technical specifications for development and configuration. • Coordinate with project teams, clients, and stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of project milestones. • Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation within SAP GTS solutions. • You will guide a team to implement and configure the software to replicate the required business processes and analytical/reporting needs. • Develop training materials and conduct training sessions for end-users and client teams. • Ensure that SAP GTS solutions comply with relevant regulations, standards, and organizational policies. • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including development, infrastructure, and business teams, to ensure seamless service delivery and support. • You will contribute to the development and growth of the SAP GTS practice globally.The Team: The GTA practice is composed of operations specialists, Global Trade Management technology specialists, customs brokers, auditors, and trade management professionals who help importers and exporters achieve worldwide compliance and realize efficiencies and advantages in their global supply chain. You will be based in India and support Deloitte Tax to serve clients with international operations and supports their global trade compliance requirements.Location: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Chennai, Kolkata, PuneShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualifications - Required: • Bachelor / Master degree in relation to Engineering, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business or similar • Minimum 5 years of experience in SAP GTS project implementation, and thus have significant knowledge of the SAP GTS Solution, in one of the following domains: Compliance Management, Customs Management, Trade Preference • Good understanding of supply chain management processes • Ability to travel up to 0-10%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve • Experience in other SAP modules than SAP GTS is an asset • Technical knowledge (e.g. ABAP, SAP PI) is an asset • Good analytical and modeling skills • Team player with strong communication skills • Strong written and verbal communication in English • Ability to perform job responsibilities within a hybrid work model that requires professionals to co-locate in person 2-3 days per weekQualifications - Preferred: • Education with SAP focus (S/4 or ECC Sales and Distribution, Order to Cash, Procure to Pay, Material Master, Transportation Management) • Software aptitude in PowerPoint, MS Project, Access, Excel, and/or Visio • Experience presenting to clients or other decision makers • Knowledge of export regulations including ITAR/EAR • Demonstrated interest in international trade or international business • Strong research, writing, verbal communication, and project management skills • Ability to bring out-of-the-box solution design aligned to leading practices and differentiated business outcome • Understanding of end-to-end processes and attention to detailed design • Strong team and organizational skills, ability to self-manage time and tasks • Ability to manage client and cross functional team expectations#TAXGTS

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-FT-FinOps-CON-Implementation Specialist
description: Finance TransformationJoin our Finance Transformation practice to help Deloitte client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with world-class teams and insights, helping support delivery in challenging environments, market uncertainty, technology development, and regulatory considerations to help unlock value. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology as we collaborate with teams to enable transforming finance. Position SummaryImplementation Specialist – Business AnalystJoin our rapidly growing team as an Implementation Consultant focused on deploying proprietary software products for clients in the Financial Services industry, including Banking and Investment Management. In this role, you will work directly with clients and internal teams to deliver technology solutions that streamline operations, enhance analytics, and support complex financial processes. You will play a key part in requirements gathering, system configuration, and the successful adoption of our software platforms, helping clients transform their business through technology.Work you’ll doAs a Business Analyst/Consultant, you will work on client teams supporting our technology platforms - including onboarding new client implementations, performing data analytics, and expanding existing business features and functionality to meet client needs. You will be working with other analystsHelping clients streamline operations, automate tasks, and improve processes in their finance, accounting, portfolio monitoring and operations functionsConduct data analysis and implement client financial models leveraging industry leading and Deloitte proprietary technology.Facilitating use of technology-based tools or methodologies to review, design and/or implement products and servicesGathering and analyzing client requirements, and configuring products and implementation to meet those requirementsConducting User Acceptance Testing of system enhancements and new applications, including initial root cause analysis of failuresPreparing and presenting complex written and verbal materials such as reports, findings, and systems trainingThe desired candidate is a team player who is passionate about learning and working with technology, finance, and alternative investments. The candidate will be detail oriented, possess strong listening, verbal/written communication skills, and able to collaborate well with others.Qualifications:Must have skills/Project Experience/Certifications:A minimum of 3-5 years of experience in the banking, investment management or financial services marketplaceAdvanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (proficiency with Lookups, Pivot Tables, and Array operations at a minimum) and other data analysis toolsExcellent communication and interpersonal skillsAbility to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environmentGood to have skills/Project Experience/Certifications:The desired candidate is a team player who is passionate about learning and working with technology, finance, and alternative investments. The candidate will be detail oriented, possess strong listening, verbal/written communication skills, and able to collaborate well with othersEducation·       Bachelor's (or higher) degree in Accounting, Finance, Management Information Systems, or related field (or foreign equivalent)Location·       Hyderabad, Pune, BengaluruShift/Work Timings·       The role requires flexibility to work in various shift timings, including night shifts, as per business needs.

title: USI - EH27 - L35 Tax Consultant II -Global Trade Service (GTS) - Technical
description: Do you have a passion to support Deloitte Tax in helping global clients transform their Global Trade solution? Are you a team player with a practical, business-oriented mindset? Do you enjoy working in an ever-changing global environment with fast-moving markets and evolving business models? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join us in the International Tax group.We are a recognized leader in solving some of the complex business problems for our clients, differentiated by our ability to execute on the insights we provide. Our multi-disciplinary competencies allow us to address CXO issues from several angles.Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through USI Tax practice. USI Tax offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a sought-after career option.Deloitte Tax is leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace by offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to their clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work You'll Do - Intro: Our team specializes in effective technology-enabled methodologies and providing leading practices for global trade programs that address both international and local requirements, as well as embed international trade controls into day-to-day business operations.Work You'll Do -: •As a developer specializing in ABAP for SAP HANA, you will be responsible for analyzing, designing, implementing, and deploying SAP solutions to meet specific business objectives.•Your role involves aligning S/4HANA technologies and associated tools and frameworks with the overall business strategy.•You will collaborate with onshore teams or directly with clients to ensure project alignment and success.•Part of your duties includes reviewing code written by other programmers to ensure quality and adherence to standards.•You will engage in requirement gathering to understand and document business needs.•Addressing and fixing bugs will be a critical part of your responsibilities to maintain system integrity.•You will conduct testing to ensure the solutions meet the required specifications and perform as expected.•Documenting and implementing software systems will be essential to ensure proper usage and maintenance of the solutions developed.•Align S/4HANA technologies and related tools with the business strategy.•Gather and document requirements to understand business needs.•Conduct thorough testing to verify that solutions meet specifications and perform correctly.The Team: The GTA practice is composed of operations specialists, Global Trade Management technology specialists, customs brokers, auditors, and trade management professionals who help importers and exporters achieve worldwide compliance and realize efficiencies and advantages in their global supply chain. You will be based in India and support Deloitte Tax to serve clients with international operations and supports their global trade compliance requirements.Location: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Chennai, Kolkata, PuneShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualifications - Required: •You have a university degree (bachelors or above) in these or related areas of studies: engineering  or STEM, information management, information systems, computer science, business (international relations, finance)• Minimum of 3 years of working experience in implementing/Supporting SAP GTS projects.• The Candidate must have a basic knowledge of SAP GTS  functionalities of Compliance, Customs, Trade Preference, and Intrastat reporting.• Must have the ability to work independently and provide guidance/mentorship to junior team members.• Must be highly organized and results oriented with strong verbal and written communication skills.• Effective Critical thinking skills with an initiative-taking approach to identify and resolve issues.• Ability to thrive in managing multiple simultaneous projects with accurate maintenance of documentation on support procedures, incident reports etc.• Should have adequate experience in integration of cross functional modules like SD, MM, TM, WM and third party tools.•Strong written and verbal communication in English • Work experience with JIRA, ServiceNow, HP ALM is added value.Qualifications - Preferred: •Education with SAP focus (any of the following): S/4 or ECC Sales and Distribution, Order to Cash, Procure to Pay, Material Master, Transportation Management•Software aptitude in PowerPoint, MS Project, Access, Excel, and/or Visio•Experience presenting to clients or other decision makers•Knowledge of export regulations including ITAR/EAR•Demonstrated interest in international trade or international business•Strong research, writing, verbal communication, and project management skills•Ability to bring 'out of the box' solution design that is aligned to leading practices and differentiated business outcome•Understanding of end-to-end processes and attention to detailed design.•Strong team and organizational skills, ability to self-manage time and tasks•Ability to manage client and cross functional team expectations#TAXGTS

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-FT-FinOps-SCON-Implementation Specialist
description: Finance Operate – Implementation Specialist – Senior Consultant Role Description Join our rapidly growing team as an Implementation Senior Consultant focused on deploying proprietary software products for clients in the Financial Services industry, including Banking and Investment Management. In this role, you will work directly with clients and internal teams to deliver technology solutions that streamline operations, enhance analytics, and support complex financial processes. You will play a key part in requirements gathering, system configuration, and the successful adoption of our software platforms, helping clients transform their business through technology. Work you’ll do As a Senior Consultant, you will work on client teams supporting our technology platforms - including onboarding new client implementations, performing data analytics, and expanding existing business features and functionality to meet client needs. You will be working with other analysts and developers to identify and address technical and non-technical issues. Key Responsibilities: • Helping clients streamline operations, automate tasks, and improve processes in their finance, accounting, portfolio monitoring and operations functions • Conduct data analysis and implement client financial models leveraging industry leading and Deloitte proprietary technology. • Facilitating use of technology-based tools or methodologies to review, design and/or implement products and services • Gathering and analyzing client requirements, and configuring products and implementation to meet those requirements • Conducting User Acceptance Testing of system enhancements and new applications, including initial root cause analysis of failures • Preparing and presenting complex written and verbal materials such as reports, findings, and systems training • The desired candidate is a team player who is passionate about learning and working with technology, finance, and alternative investments. The candidate will be detail oriented, possess strong listening, verbal/written communication skills, and able to collaborate well with others. Qualifications: • Bachelor's (or higher) degree in Accounting, Finance, Management Information Systems, or related field (or foreign equivalent) • A minimum of 5-8 years of experience in the banking, investment management or financial services marketplace • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (proficiency with Lookups, Pivot Tables, and Array operations at a minimum) and other data analysis tools • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills • Ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment Preferred Skills • Experience in Fund Finance (Subscription, NAV and Hybrid facilities) and/or Asset Backed Finance is preferred • Understanding of database systems and financial technologies • Understanding of alternative investment vehicles • Experience improving business processes and modeling/translate financial concepts • SQL, and/or Oracle and additional knowledge of other programming languages (e.g. Python or R) is a plus

title: USI-EH27-Tax-Belgium-Accounting & Reporting-L45 - Senior-Hyderabad
description: Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. All Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) US service lines have Deloitte Tax in India professionals aligned with US counterparts to deliver tax services to clients. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn and support U.S. and other countries (such as Australia, Belgium, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, United Kingdom) taxation practice, a popular career option. We are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. Work you'll do As a Senior, Tax Services on the Belgium Accounting & Tax Reporting team, you will be responsible for supporting client accounting, reporting, and compliance activities in a fast-changing regulatory environment. Manage a portfolio of clients and support financial administration activities. Review journal entries and analyze accounting data to support accuracy and compliance. Maintain and reconcile general ledger accounts on a periodic basis. Lead month-end and year-end close activities, including preparation and finalization of annual accounts. Prepare and review financial statements and corporate income tax computations. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to resolve accounting discrepancies and improve processes. The team Our multidisciplinary team in Belgium supports Small & Medium Enterprises (SME) clients with their day-to-day business, accounting, and tax reporting needs. As part of an integrated, multidisciplinary model, we work closely with our Belgium colleagues to deliver high-quality support that goes beyond compliance and creates tangible value for the client’s business. With deliverables closely aligned to client priorities, our work often contributes to meaningful business decisions and outcomes. Join our team and you will learn about financial processes and how to apply them in practice, develop your task management and technical skills. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: 4+ years of experience in Record to Report (R2R) processes, preferably supporting SME client. Strong experience in general ledger accounting, journal entry review and analysis, and month-end and year-end closing activities. Understanding of how financial reporting drives business insights and supports better decision-making. Experience with Belgian accounting and reporting requirements is preferred, but not mandatory. Exposure to Luxembourg GAAP or French GAAP is preferred, but not mandatory. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with high attention to detail and a critical mindset for self-review. Ability to manage multiple priorities, adapt to change, and work effectively in a dynamic environment. Good communication and stakeholder management skills. Bachelor’s or master’s degree in economics, accountancy, or another finance-related discipline. Fluency in English; French and Dutch language skills are optional but beneficial.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting Services-FT-FinOps-CON-Treasury
description: Finance TransformationJoin our Finance Transformation practice to help Deloitte client service teams define and execute Finance and Global Business Services agendas and strategies. You will work with world-class teams and insights, helping support delivery in challenging environments, market uncertainty, technology development, and regulatory considerations to help unlock value. Your work may span strategy, operations, process design, and technology as we collaborate with teams to enable transforming finance. Position SummaryLevel: Senior ConsultantWork you’ll do:Provide expert support for SAP modules, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and financial reporting Issue Resolution: Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues related to SAP, collaborating with internal teams and external stakeholders. System Maintenance: Perform routine maintenance tasks, such as system configuration, testing, and documentation. Process Improvement: Identify opportunities for process improvements and implement changes to enhance efficiency and productivity. Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including development, testing, and project managementReviewing Daily ticket monitoring and working with relevant stakeholders for analysis and closureReviewing SLAs for the tickets and prioritize based on severityThe Team:Controllership & Treasury Transformation (C&TT) is one of the offerings within the Finance Transformation portfolio of Deloitte US India Consulting. This Offering advises, implements, and delivers solution as-a-service relating to digital finance strategies, financial planning and analysis, enterprise performance strategies and technologies solutions. By taking a holistic view of these key business areas from strategy development through process design and technology enablement, we help our clients navigate their challenges while continuing to succeed in their business.Qualifications:Must have SkillsMinimum of 5-8 years of experience in SAP Finance or TRM (preferably S4HANA) Minimum of 2 SAP TRM implementations/support, including hands-on design and configuration SAP trained Engineer, CA, B. Com, M. Com, MBA, PMP, CPA, CTP, FRM or CFA SAP Treasury Module Experience (SAP Transaction Manager, Cash Management, Credit Risk Analyzer, Market Analyzer, Payment Medium Workbench etc.) Corporate treasury domain knowledge Excellent verbal and written communication Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Big 4 experiencesClient facing experience SAP FICO experience SAP S/4 HANA experience in Cash management and Bank account management Experience in SAP Hedge management ·       B. Tech/M. Tech Education: Location:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/ KolkataShift Timings: ·       11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM IST as per business requirements
