title: USI - EH27 - L45  Senior, Tax Services -Global Trade Service (GTS)
description: Do you have a passion to support Deloitte Tax in helping global clients transform their Global Trade solution? Are you a team player with a practical, business-oriented mindset? Do you enjoy working in an ever-changing global environment with fast-moving markets and evolving business models? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join us in the International Tax group.We are a recognized leader in solving some of the complex business problems for our clients, differentiated by our ability to execute on the insights we provide. Our multi-disciplinary competencies allow us to address CXO issues from several angles.Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through USI Tax practice. USI Tax offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a sought-after career option.Deloitte Tax is leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace by offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to their clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work You'll Do - Intro: Our team specializes in effective technology-enabled methodologies and providing leading practices for global trade programs that address both international and local requirements, as well as embed international trade controls into day-to-day business operations.Work You'll Do -: •Collaborate with clients and stakeholders to gather and document detailed business requirements for GTS projects.•In your role, you will lead and/or facilitate business process definition and modeling•Translate business requirements into functional and technical specifications for development and configuration.•Coordinate with project teams, clients, and stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of project milestones.•Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation within SAP GTS solutions.•You will guide a team to implement and configure the software to replicate the required business processes and analytical/reporting needs.•Develop training materials and conduct training sessions for end-users and client teams•Ensure that SAP GTS solutions comply with relevant regulations, standards, and organizational policies.•Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including development, infrastructure, and business teams, to ensure seamless service delivery and support.•You will contribute to the development and growth of the SAP GTS practice globally.The Team: The GTA practice is composed of operations specialists, Global Trade Management technology specialists, customs brokers, auditors, and trade management professionals who help importers and exporters achieve worldwide compliance and realize efficiencies and advantages in their global supply chain. You will be based in India and support Deloitte Tax to serve clients with international operations and supports their global trade compliance requirements.Location: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Chennai, Kolkata, PuneShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualifications - Required: • Bachelor / Master degree in relation to Engineering, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business or similar •  Minimum 5 years of experience in SAP GTS project implementation, and thus have significant knowledge of the       SAP GTS Solution, in one of the following domains:                        - Compliance Management                         - Customs Management                         -Trade Preference•You have a good understanding of the supply chain management processes.•Ability to travel up to 0-10%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve•Experience in other SAP modules than SAP GTS is an asset.•Technical knowledge (e.g. ABAP, SAP PI…) is an asset•You have good analytical and modeling skills.•You are a team player with strong communication skills.•Strong written and verbal communication in EnglishQualifications - Preferred: •Education with SAP focus (any of the following): S/4 or ECC Sales and Distribution, Order to Cash, Procure to Pay, Material Master, Transportation Management•Software aptitude in PowerPoint, MS Project, Access, Excel, and/or Visio•Experience presenting to clients or other decision makers•Knowledge of export regulations including ITAR/EAR•Demonstrated interest in international trade or international business•Strong research, writing, verbal communication, and project management skills•Ability to bring 'out of the box' solution design that is aligned to leading practices and differentiated business outcome•Understanding of end-to-end processes and attention to detailed design.•Strong team and organizational skills, ability to self-manage time and tasks•Ability to manage client and cross functional team expectations #TAXGTS

title: USI-EH27-G&P-BM&C-L40 - Specialist Assistant Manager-Creative Digital Production-Hyderabad
description: Specialist Assistant Manager, Content ManagementDeloitte’s full-service Marketing Excellence (ME) organization is seeking collaborative creatives, skilful strategists, and marketing masterminds to lead our businesses in exciting new directions. At Deloitte, we combine world-class creativity and business knowledge, insightful strategic thinking, and Deloitte’s powerful brand equity to create undeniable impact. If you find opportunity where others don’t, thrive in a supportive and diverse team environment, keep your finger on the pulse of cultural trends and the latest technology, and apply new ideas to challenge the status quo, then we want your talents in our mix. Together we’ll discover new ways to transform out-of-the-box concepts into work that feels like marketing magic.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Assistant Manager, Content Management on the Marketing Excellence team, you will be responsible for:Designing, building, and managing web pages, landing pages, registration forms, and email templates aligned with campaign goals and brand standardsCreating, editing, scheduling, and publishing content across website, email, social media, and other digital channels to support business prioritiesExecuting and optimizing email campaigns using marketing automation platforms, including audience journey mapping, A/B testing, and dynamic content personalizationCollaborating with marketers, MarTech leads, developers, and external vendors to improve user experience, reporting, personalization, and campaign executionLeading quality assurance reviews, monitoring campaign performance, and supporting team delivery through Agile ways of working, stakeholder coordination, and people managementThe teamDigital Marketers are part of the Marketing Excellence team, focused on driving Deloitte's success through impactful email marketing, dynamic social media strategies, and precise website publishing. Differentiate Deloitte’s brand, advance business priorities, and create memorable client experiences. The innovative solutions and seamless omni-channel integration enhance client engagement, foster strong relationships, and contribute significantly to Deloitte's growth.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired:Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field6-9 years of experience in content authoring, publishing, email campaign management, lead generation, or digital marketing operationsExperience using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Eloqua, Sprinklr, or similar digital publishing and marketing platformsExperience creating HTML, HTML5, and CSS-based email templates, landing pages, or registration formsExperience executing email campaigns using marketing automation tools such as Eloqua, Marketo, or HubSpotExperience working in Agile environments, including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectivesExperience leading quality assurance reviews and reviewing deliverables before deploymentPreferred:Experience with JavaScriptExperience planning or supporting programmatic display advertising campaignsExperience managing team performance, stakeholder engagement, or training and developmentExperience working in an agency marketing environmentExperience identifying process improvement opportunities, reducing production time, and supporting scalability

title: USI - EH27 - L35  Tax Consultant II -Global Trade Service (GTS)
description: Do you have a passion to support Deloitte Tax in helping global clients transform their Global Trade solution? Are you a team player with a practical, business-oriented mindset? Do you enjoy working in an ever-changing global environment with fast-moving markets and evolving business models? If the answer to all the above is “Yes,” come join us in the International Tax group.We are a recognized leader in solving some of the complex business problems for our clients, differentiated by our ability to execute on the insights we provide. Our multi-disciplinary competencies allow us to address CXO issues from several angles.Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“USI Tax”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through USI Tax practice. USI Tax offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a sought-after career option.Deloitte Tax is leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace by offering a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to their clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work You'll Do - Intro: Our team specializes in effective technology-enabled methodologies and providing leading practices for global trade programs that address both international and local requirements, as well as embed international trade controls into day-to-day business operations.Work You'll Do -: •Collaborate with clients and stakeholders to gather and document detailed business requirements for GTS projects.•In your role, you will lead and/or facilitate business process definition and modeling•Translate business requirements into functional and technical specifications for development and configuration.•Coordinate with project teams, clients, and stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of project milestones.•Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation within SAP GTS solutions.•You will guide a team to implement and configure the software to replicate the required business processes and analytical/reporting needs.•Develop training materials and conduct training sessions for end-users and client teams•Ensure that SAP GTS solutions comply with relevant regulations, standards, and organizational policies.•Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including development, infrastructure, and business teams, to ensure seamless service delivery and support.•You will contribute to the development and growth of the SAP GTS practice globally.The Team: The GTA practice is composed of operations specialists, Global Trade Management technology specialists, customs brokers, auditors, and trade management professionals who help importers and exporters achieve worldwide compliance and realize efficiencies and advantages in their global supply chain. You will be based in India and support Deloitte Tax to serve clients with international operations and supports their global trade compliance requirements.Location: Mumbai, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Chennai, Kolkata, Pune, MumbaiShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualifications - Required: • Bachelor / Master degree in relation to Engineering, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business or similar •  Minimum 5 years of experience in SAP GTS project implementation, and thus have significant knowledge of the       SAP GTS Solution, in one of the following domains:                        - Compliance Management                         - Customs Management                         -Trade Preference•You have a good understanding of the supply chain management processes.•Ability to travel up to 0-10%, on average, based on the work you do and the clients and industries/sectors you serve•Experience in other SAP modules than SAP GTS is an asset.•Technical knowledge (e.g. ABAP, SAP PI…) is an asset•You have good analytical and modeling skills.•You are a team player with strong communication skills.•Strong written and verbal communication in EnglishQualifications - Preferred: •Education with SAP focus (any of the following): S/4 or ECC Sales and Distribution, Order to Cash, Procure to Pay, Material Master, Transportation Management•Software aptitude in PowerPoint, MS Project, Access, Excel, and/or Visio•Experience presenting to clients or other decision makers•Knowledge of export regulations including ITAR/EAR•Demonstrated interest in international trade or international business•Strong research, writing, verbal communication, and project management skills•Ability to bring 'out of the box' solution design that is aligned to leading practices and differentiated business outcome•Understanding of end-to-end processes and attention to detailed design.•Strong team and organizational skills, ability to self-manage time and tasks•Ability to manage client and cross functional team expectations TAXGTS

title: USI- EH-27- Tax - L45- Multistate Tax services- Senior, Tax Services - Corporate-
description: Deloitte Tax Services is seeking a Senior to support multistate tax compliance and related delivery activities across a nationally managed service offering. In this role, you will work with engagement teams and compliance center resources to help deliver timely, accurate tax compliance services for clients. The role offers exposure to large-scale delivery models, multijurisdictional compliance work, and collaboration across Deloitte’s US and USI teams.Work You'll Do –  As a tax compliance specialist in our Multistate Investment Management practice, you will collaborate daily as part of high-performing teams, work deeply in our tax compliance process, use cutting edge technology tools to meet our client’s compliance needs accurately and efficiently, and consult with other team members.  Daily tasks may include preparing tax returns across a broad range of clients and jurisdictions, researching tax regulations, understanding the applicable tax implications for specific clients and making recommendations based on your findings.  You will commonly work with multiple clients at the same time, providing you exposure to a variety of organizations and a stronger understanding of applicable tax implications for different clients. Performing a detailed technical review of partnership and corporate state tax returns and work papers with attention to multistate tax issues such as apportionment, state modifications, nexus, unitary filings, and flow-through taxation.Coordinating with an in-house tax preparation team within Deloitte and with the clients’ tax department.Performing detailed review of estimated payment and extensions calculations and related filings.Researching state tax legislation and assisting with impact on compliance.Assisting with various tax consulting projects including research and writing projects related to tax planning, restructuring, due diligence, audit defense, and accounting for income taxes. The Team: Multistate State is a rapidly expanding service offering at Deloitte. The offering is built on a scale that includes a highly-leveraged and nationally managed compliance center in our U.S. India (USI) offices, with the project oversight management based in the U.S. offices, primarily Chicago. Deloitte is currently in the process of aggressively increasing its market share in this service offering.Work Location: Hyderabad, Gurugram, Chennai, Bangalore, Kolkata, Pune, MumbaiShift Time – 11am – 8pm ISTQualifications - Required:Full time Masters degree from reputed University4 - 8 years’ experience in state and local partnership and corporate taxesExcellent presentation and communication skillsSupervisory experienceEnrolled Agent Certification for ManagerA preparer tax identification number (PTIN) is required for tax returns. If you do not have a PTIN or if your PTIN is expired, you are requested to complete the new or renewal application process (as applicable) before joining Deloitte.

title: USI-EH27-G&P-BM&C-L50 - Specialist Manager, Data Management-Alumni Relations-Hyderabad
description: Specialist Manager, Data ManagementAre you up to the challenge of being a trusted business advisor with an opportunity to influence business strategy at one of the world’s leading professional services firms? Does it excite you to work on and support complex initiatives? Join our team to deliver strategic and tactical guidance to senior leadership in support of alumni development and to build eminence among Deloitte’s alumni community across the U.S. and India. In this role, you will help strengthen alumni engagement, scale campaign management, and drive insights that inform decision-making and measurable outcomes.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Manager, Data Management on the U.S. India, Growth & Purpose team, you will be responsible for:Supporting alumni strengthening initiatives aligned to the alumni engagement and development strategyLeading stakeholder and cross-functional discussions to identify needs and guide insight-driven workServing as a subject matter expert on CRM and alumni databases, including automation and process enhancementsPartnering with leaders to define campaign objectives, key performance indicators, and campaign plans across events, webinars, newsletters, and thought leadershipDriving data management, reporting improvement, campaign analysis, and alumni lifecycle insights for U.S. leadership and internal clientsThe teamU.S. India, Growth & Purpose drive the marketing programs, initiatives, and priority client-facing programs in the U.S. regions. India G&P is focused on quality and operational excellence and supports marketing processes, services, and deliverables in the United States. title: USI-EH27-DTTL-GSIC-Senior Analyst - Insights Solutions Specialist
description: Senior Analyst - Insights Solutions Specialist- Global Strategic Insights CenterAre you passionate about uncovering data driven business insights and market intelligence? Do you excel at analyzing the intricate relationships between business economics, industry dynamics, and the macroeconomic environment? If so, CoRe Global Strategic Insights Center has an exciting opportunity for you. As a Quantitative Insights Analyst, you will be part of a team that develops, writes, and presents comprehensive market intelligence, empowering Deloitte’s global leaders with strategic insights and actionable strategies.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Standardized Strategic Support Services on the CoRe Global Strategic Insights Center team, you will be responsible for: Translating business questions into analytical approaches, hypotheses, and measurable success metrics. Designing, building, testing, and maintaining secure, tech-enabled insights solutions that improve research processes, knowledge retrieval, and insights synthesis. Developing and implementing generative AI workflows, including large language model applications, retrieval-augmented generation patterns, agent orchestration, and evaluation controls. Building and maintaining Python-based components, data pipelines, dashboards, and workflow assets that support high-quality, scalable insights delivery. Collaborating with business stakeholders and research practitioners to align requirements, document assumptions, and deliver clear, decision-oriented outputs. The teamCoRe Global Strategic Insights Center provides research and program management solutions to global Deloitte Member Firms in support of pursuit, business development, practice development, and client engagements. The team uses exclusive sources, specialized research skills, and industry expertise to develop insightful research reports, delivering significant value to customers across Deloitte’s global network. Learn more about Deloitte.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: MBA from a recognized business school or a master’s degree in data science, business analytics, or artificial intelligence. 4-6 years of experience building Power BI, artificial intelligence/machine learning, and generative artificial intelligence solutions in an enterprise environment. Experience using Python for data processing, automation, application programming interfaces, or workflow development. Experience designing or delivering generative artificial intelligence applications using large language models. Experience with retrieval-augmented generation, knowledge retrieval, prompt orchestration, or agent-based workflows. Experience with research or insights workflows, including secondary research, qualitative analysis, or storyboarding. Preferred: Experience working in a professional services environment. Experience creating executive and operational dashboards. Experience establishing evaluation, monitoring, or quality controls for generative artificial intelligence solutions. Experience using version control or reproducible development workflows. Experience creating technical documentation, usage standards, or enablement materials. Experience mentoring junior team members.#ESG-CORE27#CAL-AS2

title: USI- EH27 -L L55 MTS - Manager –AI & Data Solutions Engineer  - Hyderabad
description: Do you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join MTS group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.At Deloitte, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and add greater impact to clients by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.Work you’ll doTax Technology professionals at Deloitte combine insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally. We are looking for driven individuals having a passion for technology - whether its programming applications, automation or datacenter operational excellence. If you like to figure out how to make the new technologies work in a corporate environment, then our teams might be a fit for you.Key Responsibilities·       Architect, develop, and implement AI and data-driven solutions using Azure OpenAI, with a focus on prompt engineering and optimization.·       Write robust, efficient Python code for data processing, model integration, and workflow automation. Leverage Power Platform tools to automate business processes where needed.·       Design, maintain, and query databases (SQL and/or NoSQL) for high performance, reliability, and scalability.·       Translate business requirements into technical solutions. Apply strong business acumen to ensure delivered solutions drive measurable business value.·       Work closely with stakeholders, product managers, and other engineers to gather requirements, prioritize features, and ensure successful project delivery.·       Identify challenges proactively and develop innovative technical solutions to complex business problems.·       Present technical concepts to non-technical audiences. Document solutions, write technical reports, and provide training/support as required.Qualifications & Experience  6+ years professional experience in software/data engineering or related roles.  Minimum 3 years in Azure OpenAI, prompt engineering, and LLM solutions. Strong proficiency in Python programming. Expertise in SQL databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, etc.) and/or NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB, etc.).Practical experience with Microsoft Power Platform (Power BI, Power Automate, Power Apps).·       Proven ability to solve complex problems using both technical and analytical skills.·       Excellent teamwork, interpersonal, and communication skills.The Team The MDT group is focused on delivering differentiated service offerings through the use of new technologies such as Data Wrangling, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence (BI), Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Optical Character Recognition (OCR), and Machine Learning. This group enables the Multi-state Tax Services (MTS) practice to drive profitability and growth, through application of emerging and existing technologies and enhanced utilization of Tax tools and software. We support MTS teams by assessing and addressing their data and technology challenges on client engagements, internal processes and data intensive projects to help achieve efficiencies, win clients and create differentiated services. With the exponential growth of accessible data, there is an increasing need to bring data and technology capabilities to help address client needs and support Deloitte MTS engagements and solutions.Work Location: #TechnologyFY26

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-IS-Consultant , Technical Transformation-IFS EAM Technical
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, drive innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals, reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businessesPosition SummaryLevel: ConsultantAs a Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will contribute to enterprise asset management transformation initiatives by supporting analysis, design, development, and implementation activities. You will work with cross-functional stakeholders to deliver quality work products, support technical problem-solving, and help drive project outcomes within established timelines. In this role, you may also support junior team members and collaborate with onsite and offshore teams to translate functional needs into technical solutions.Work you’ll do: As a Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will be responsible for: Gather and analyze business and functional requirements aligned to industry and sector-specific needs Contribute across the software development lifecycle, including technical design, development, deployment, testing, and defect resolution Perform peer reviews and support quality assurance activities to maintain delivery standards Participate in Agile ceremonies, including sprint planning, retrospectives, and effort estimation Build and share business process knowledge, identify improvement opportunities, and support automation and innovation initiativesThe team: You will play a key role in developing verticalized solutions tailored to the unique needs of each client’s sector, transforming how organizations sell products, deliver services, drive growth, and sustain mission-critical operations. By leveraging your business expertise and advanced technology, you will help ensure every solution is seamlessly integrated with Industry Advantage and aligned with sector-specific requirements. With your focus on innovation and measurable value, you will empower clients to achieve strategic objectives, enhance operational efficiency, and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving marketplace by addressing core business challenges and opportunities across industries.QualificationsRequired3-6 years of experience in enterprise asset management (EAM) implementation and consulting Experience with Structured Query Language (SQL), Procedural Language/Structured Query Language (PL/SQL), and IFS development tools Experience building or supporting application programming interface (API)-based integrations, middleware solutions, and third-party system connectors Experience developing custom reports, modifying workflows, and supporting system enhancements Experience troubleshooting system issues, improving database performance, and optimizing application behavior Experience with IFS Data Model, IFS Aurena, and IFS Application Server.Security & Compliance Awareness: Understanding of data security best practices, system access controls, and regulatory compliance.Technical Documentation Proficiency: Ability to create technical design documents (TDDs), coding guidelines, and system architecture diagrams Bachelor of Engineering (BE), Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Master of Computer Applications (MCA), Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degreePreferred:Power, Utilities and Renewables Industry knowledge and experienceLocation:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Chennai#Industrysolutions#FY27ReferralCampaign#AIE2027

title: USI - EH27 - Tax - GESTC - GA BISO (Cyber Security) - L35 - Consultant - Hyderabad
description: This is an experienced security compliance position in the Global Advantage Business Information Security Office (GA BISO) reporting to GA BISO team Senior leaders.Professionals on this team play a critical role in ensuring that all security, regulatory and firm mandated protocols are adhered for our products. The team oversees external auditor SOC 2 compliance, internal security audits, CISO/Tax BISO security and data protection initiatives, responds to security requests for client proposals/verifications for RFP's/on-site visits etc. The team also independently verify adherence with both firm and client development, security and regulatory standards.You will build a high-level knowledge of the GES suite of web-based tools (Global Advantage) and lead a portfolio of projects managed by the GA BISO team.This is an opportunity to progress your security career within a varied and challenging environment covering global standards in data privacy, legislation, IT security, and software development.Work you'll doAs a Consultant, Tax Technology Services on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) team, you will be responsible for: Researching security-related inquiries using Structured Query Language (SQL) and Amazon Web Services (AWS) database queries Supporting entitlement reviews and database account management activities, including work in SailPoint Managing assigned work across multiple GA BISO streams, including routine monthly and quarterly activities and strategic projects Monitoring compliance with security controls and processes, including SOC 2 Type 2 and ISO 27001 requirements Leading projects, tracking and resolving issues, implementing security controls, and training GESTC professionals on compliance responsibilities The teamDeloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India.We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology 3+ years of technology work experience Experience in cyber security, quality and risk management, or production support Experience running queries in Structured Query Language (SQL) and/or Amazon Web Services (AWS) cloud-native databases Experience supporting entitlement reviews, security controls, audits, or compliance processes Experience working with teams across India, the United Kingdom, and the United States Preferred: Experience with budgeting, including Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud Experience with SailPoint Experience with entitlement reviews or access management automation Experience using Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) Experience with NoSQL and cloud database queries#CA-GSD #CA-HPN

title: USI EH | FY27 | Cyber| Digital Trust & Privacy | IAM-One Identity Manager - Manager - L55
description: Position Title - IAM - One Identity Manager - ManagerDeloitte Cyber helps organizations address cybersecurity risk through identity-focused solutions that support security, governance, and operational efficiency. In this role, you will design, implement, and enhance One Identity Manager solutions for complex enterprise environments. The role is suited for professionals with experience in identity lifecycle management, system integration, and access governance.Work you'll doAs a Manager - OIM on the Digital Trust & Privacy team, you will be responsible for… Designing, developing, and maintaining One Identity Manager configurations, workflows, and connectors Building Angular-based interfaces for identity self-service and administrative functions Integrating One Identity Manager with Active Directory, Azure, ServiceNow, human resources systems, and databases through Representational State Transfer (REST) application programming interfaces and custom connectors Supporting identity lifecycle activities, including onboarding, provisioning, approvals, recertification, access reviews, and role assignments Implementing and supporting access governance capabilities, including business roles, segregation of duties controls, and application onboarding The teamDigital Trust & PrivacyThe cyber risk services—IAM practice helps organizations in designing, developing, and implementing industry-leading IAM solutions to protect their information and confidential data, as well as help them build their businesses and supporting technologies to be more secure, vigilant, and resilient. The cyber risk services—IAM team delivers service to clients through following key areas of IAM: Application Onboarding Lifecycle Manager Compliance Manager Password Management Automated Provisioning Roles Management ITSM tools Integration Advanced Authentication Methods Strategy and Road Map One Identity Manager Location: Hyd/Blr/Chn/PunShift Timings: General Shift, ISTQualificationsRequired: 8+ years of experience with One Identity Manager, including configuration, customization, and integration Experience developing custom workflows, connectors, or application programming interface integrations in One Identity Manager Experience building web interfaces using Angular Experience integrating identity and access management platforms with Active Directory, Azure, ServiceNow, human resources systems, or databases Experience supporting identity lifecycle processes, including onboarding, provisioning, approvals, recertification, and access reviews Experience with role-based access control, business role modeling, or segregation of duties controls Bachelor of Technology, Master of Technology, Master of Science, or Master of Business Administration Preferred: Experience in cloud or hybrid identity and access management environments Experience with Azure role-based access control, privileged identity management, service principals, or app registrations Experience integrating with ServiceNow or information technology service management tools Experience onboarding applications, shared mailboxes, distribution groups, file shares, local non-personal accounts, or database assets into identity platforms#Cyber_Digital Trust & Privacy

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-S&T-M&A-Consultant-FDD
description: Mergers & Acquisitions - ConsultantMergers & Acquisitions (M&A) as the name suggests is intriguing and complex. It calls for a business mindset to understand the rationale behind the transactions and ability and willingness to dive deeper into industry issues and bring greater insights for our clients. We are looking for a person who is passionate about M&A and willing to serve challenging client needs and ensuring the client demands are met.Work you’ll doPreparation of workbook / Databook to be used for financial due diligence engagements:·       Analyze financial data from statements, trial balances, and supporting schedules for accuracy and insight·       Prepare and organize Excel databooks, including charts and graphs, from both hard copy and online data sources·       Review due diligence reports for inconsistencies within the reports and against financial workbooks·       Support Deloitte teams before deals by conducting company profiling, identifying potential buyers, and tracking industry events·       Identify unusual financial trends or variances and develop targeted questions for management insight·       Collect, validate, and consolidate data to strengthen financial analysis and reporting·       Contribute to detailed due diligence reports to support robust deal analysis·       Coordinate communications with clients and collaborate with onshore US teams for seamless project execution·       Enhance reporting and insights through expert use of analytics and data visualization tools (Alteryx, Tableau)The teamMergers & Acquisitions Transaction Services team provides support for Financial due diligence (‘FDD’) services to the Client, both Private Equity clients as well as Strategic Investors, which entails comprehensive financial review of the target with the goal of providing a complete picture of its financial position and sustainable cash flows, highlighting the value and risks of a transaction, and identifying issues for reflection in SPA and completion accounts.Required:·       CA/CPA/MBA Regular (Finance) with 2 to 3 years’ relevant experience in financial analysis and interpretation preferably with experience of working in M&A transactions·       Having basic to advanced knowledge of MS Excel, with basic knowledge of preparing templates, graphs, charts, etc., from information provided in hard copies and downloaded from data sites ·       Have an eye for detail ·       Analyze financial data sourced from financial statements and supporting schedules ·       Be able to add industry specific key performance indicators (KPI’s) ·       Reconcile databook with source information, before sending to the onsite team ·       Be able to do basic secondary research to understand the target better ·       Work within the set timelines and communicate deviations/updates to Project Lead and/or Onsite users ·       Willingness to help other team members once own work is completed.

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-S&S -Agentforce- Life Sciences- Analyst, Technical Transformation
description: CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.Position SummaryLevel: Analyst Technical Transformation or equivalentAs an experienced Analyst at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering highquality work products within due timelines. Work you’ll do:Delivers consistently with quality deliverables within designated timelines and minimal supportOwns up deliverables and can deliver with support and Overcomes gaps (timelines/quality) with coachingConsistently displays a positive attitude towards learning and adapts to changes in requirements and expectations with minimal guidanceThe team:Our Sales & Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e, Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis.QualificationsMust Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: 2 - 3 years of hands-on experience in JAVA/J2EE development.Hands on in integration and web servicesStrong in OOPs conceptsString knowledge and experience with Spring frameworkString knowledge and experience with JPA/HibernateString knowledge and experience in Spring boot and Microservices architecture.Should be able to perform independent code reviews and execute unit tests on modules developed by self and other junior team members on the project.Technical Skills (Knowledge/Experience): (Include tools, methodologies, processes)Should be strong in OOPS concepts, Core Java, Collections.Should have experience in any of the frameworks likestruts/Spring/Hibernate/Swing etcExperience in any Database Concept (SQL / Oracle etc.)Experience in Webservices/ SOAExcellent communication skillsShould have very good technical problem solving skills.Should be able to assess the impacts on technical design because of the changes in functional requirements.Should be flexible to quickly learn & work on new technologies.Nice to have AJAX.Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university.Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai/Kolkata.#S&S2027

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-S&S-Oracle CX Lead Business Transformation Architect
description: #S&S2027CustomerThe Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Lead Business Transformation ArchitectAs a Lead Business Transformation Architect/ Specialist Master at Deloitte Consulting, you will oversee the technical delivery of enterprise-scale software solutions, lead cross-functional and global teams and mentor junior members. You will collaborate to understand functional requirements, support sales and proposal efforts, and drive end-to-end project delivery, including estimation and planning, to ensure successful outcomesWork you’ll do:Own Oracle CX solution architecture across the Lead-to-Cash journey: define integration model between Sales, CPQ, Order Management, and Financials; resolve cross-module architectural conflicts; maintain architecture decision log Architect Oracle CDM strategy: design enterprise customer data model, define account & contact hierarchy governance, implement party merge and deduplication frameworks, establish golden record policies, and align CDM structure across CX Sales and ERP pillars Lead Oracle CPQ architecture for complex product and pricing environments: configuration models, constraint rule frameworks, multi-tier pricing waterfalls, and approval matrices at production scale Design OIC integration architectures using canonical data models: integration pattern selection, error handling, idempotency controls, environment governance, and quarterly update resilience Architect Oracle AI enablement with data readiness validation: Sales AI opportunity scoring, Oracle Digital Assistant deployments, Fusion Analytics KPI workbooks, and OCI Generative AI integration evaluation Lead multi-workstream delivery Programs: own the delivery plan, manage onshore and offshore teams of 4–10, track dependencies, and report Program status to steering committees Manage VP-level client stakeholder relationships independently: lead architecture review boards, present solution designs, facilitate UAT governance, manage escalations Define and enforce configuration governance: review and approve solution designs produced by Specialist Seniors, maintain architecture standards, assess customization vs. Oracle-native trade-offs Own quarterly Oracle release management: release note assessment, regression test governance, customization inventory maintenance, and Oracle Support escalation management Contribute to Oracle CX business development: author solution architecture sections of RFP responses, present at proposal orals, co-develop industry solution plays with Specialist Leaders Mentor Specialist Seniors: structured design reviews, deliberate stretch assignments, and module ownership developmentThe team: Step into our Sales & Service team, where technology powers business impact and innovation drives everything we do. As a global, dynamic group, we deliver seamless, end-to-end solutions—advising on strategy, implementing advanced CRM or back-office platforms, and enabling continuous business improvement. Here, you’ll collaborate with passionate, creative minds to transform sales models, elevate service excellence, and optimize customer operations. If you’re ready to grow your expertise, make bold ideas real, and help redefine the customer experience for leading organizations, this is your next big move. Join us and shape the future of sales and service! Qualifications Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:9–12 years of enterprise technology consulting experience, with 6+ years focused on Oracle CX Cloud implementations Led at least two full-cycle Oracle CX implementations as the architect of record — from discovery through go-live — with direct accountability for solution design across at least three modules Oracle CDM architecture experience: enterprise customer data model design, account & contact hierarchy governance, party merge and deduplication framework design, data quality rule configuration, and cross-pillar master data alignment Oracle CPQ Cloud architecture experience: configuration model design, constraint rule authoring, pricing waterfall definition, and approval workflow configuration in production environments Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) architecture experience: canonical data model design, integration pattern selection, error handling architecture, and multi-environment governance Functional fluency across commercial operations: territory management, quota setting, incentive compensation mechanics, partner deal registration, and revenue forecasting Experience designing and activating Oracle Fusion Data Intelligence or Oracle Analytics Cloud solutions for CX: pre-built workbooks, augmented datasets, executive dashboards Demonstrated track record leading multi-workstream Oracle CX Programs ($2M–$5M TCV) with onshore and offshore delivery teams Proven ability to manage VP-level stakeholder relationships independently: architecture review boards, steering committee presentations, escalation management Working knowledge of Oracle Cloud licensing: ULA structures, module tiering, user license types, and architecture implications of licensing decisions Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Active Oracle certifications: Oracle CX Sales Implementation Professional Oracle CPQ Cloud Implementation Professional Oracle Fusion Service Implementation Professional Oracle Fusion Field Service Implementation Professional Oracle CPQ experience in high-volume B2B environments requiring deliberate architectural mitigation for configuration performance or pricing scale Oracle CX Sales experience in implementing L2C projects involving account, opportunity management along territory and other key Sales capabilities Oracle CDM experience in a multi-org or global deployment: cross-business-unit data governance, master hierarchy alignment across Oracle Fusion pillars, data stewardship operating model design Exposure to Oracle Eloqua or Responsys: lead scoring model design, nurture Program architecture, CRM bi-directional sync governance Experience with Oracle Field Service: workforce management configuration, routing algorithm tuning, mobile app deployment Familiarity with Oracle Digital Assistant: intent model design, entity extraction, channel integration, and live agent handoff Experience leading a CRM displacement Program (Salesforce, SAP CRM, or Microsoft Dynamics to Oracle CX), including migration strategy and business case development Industry depth in Manufacturing, Life Sciences, or Financial Services Prior consulting experience at a Big 4 or Tier 1 Oracle partner Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-Digital Foundry-Veeva CRM-Consultant, Managed Services
description: #DFO&I2027 Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Consultant, Managed ServicesA skilled Veeva CRM Consultant with experience in designing, configuring, and supporting Veeva CRM solutions for life sciences organizations. The candidate should have strong knowledge of Veeva CRM, Salesforce platform fundamentals, pharmaceutical commercial processes, and stakeholder management. This role will support business teams in improving CRM effectiveness, sales operations, and customer engagement capabilities. Work you’ll do: Gather and analyse business requirements related to Veeva CRM processes Configure and support Veeva CRM functionalities including call reporting, account management, territory alignment, and CLM Work with business stakeholders, product owners, and technical teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions Support integrations between Veeva CRM and upstream/downstream systems Participate in defect resolution, testing, deployment, and post-production support Prepare functional specifications, process documentation, and training materials Ensure solutions align with life sciences compliance and regulatory requirements Support enhancements, releases, and continuous improvement initiatives The team:Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Qualifications Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Hands-on experience with Veeva CRM platform administration covering: MyInsights dashboard configuration and KPI design. CLM (Closed Loop Marketing) content deployment and management. Approved Email configuration and template management. Sample management, order management, and field inventory workflows. Veeva CRM Events Management — event creation, approval, and lifecycle management. Advanced knowledge of commercial Life Sciences business processes and the ability to translate them into scalable Veeva CRM solutions, including field force effectiveness, territory management, HCP/HCO engagement tracking, and multi-channel commercial operations Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Experience in life sciences/pharmaceutical domain Exposure to Veeva Vault or related Veeva ecosystem tools Knowledge of integrations, data migration, and release management Experience working in Agile delivery environments Veeva CRM certification Salesforce certification Experience with commercial operations or field force enablement initiatives Education:Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Life Sciences, Business, or related fieldLocation: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-Digital Foundry-GCP GKE-Senior Consultant, Managed Services
description: #DFO&I2027Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Senior Consultant As an experienced Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do: Lead the development lifecycle, from planning and design to implementation, testing, and deployment. Design and operate GKE clusters (Standard and Autopilot) supporting multi-tenant client workloads. Implement workload isolation, namespace strategies, network policies, and quota / priority class governance. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Cloud Build, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) and GitOps flows (ArgoCD, Flux). Develop and maintain Helm charts, Kustomize overlays, and Terraform infrastructure-as-code. Configure GKE networking: VPC-native clusters, private clusters, ingress/egress controls, Cloud Load Balancing, Anthos Service Mesh or Istio. Implement security best practices: Workload Identity, Binary Authorization, Policy Controller, secret management (Cloud KMS, Secret Manager, External Secrets), CIS benchmarks. Stand up observability: Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Trace, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana. Drive FinOps on GKE — right-sizing, Autopilot vs Standard trade-offs, spot/preemptible workloads, Kubecost or native cost reporting. Participate in on-call rotation, incident response, RCA, and capacity planning. The team: Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions - from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations - enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Qualifications Must Have Skills / Project Experience / Certifications: 6+ years of hands-on experience. 6+ years operating Kubernetes in production; 4+ years specifically on GKE. Strong Linux, container, and networking fundamentals (Docker, OCI, CNI). Production experience with Terraform and Helm; proficiency in Go, Python, or Bash. Hands-on with GitOps tooling — ArgoCD or Flux. Solid grasp of GCP IAM, Workload Identity, Cloud KMS, VPC networking. CI/CD pipelines and progressive delivery patterns (canary, blue/green, feature flags). Observability stacks: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Cloud Operations suite. GCP Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer, CKA, or CKAD certification preferred. Good to have Skills / Project Experience / Certifications: Anthos / Anthos Service Mesh experience. Service mesh fluency: Istio, Cilium, Linkerd. FinOps on Kubernetes (Kubecost, GKE cost allocation, sustained-use and committed-use discounts). Experience running ML / AI workloads on GKE (training, model serving, GPU / TPU node pools, KServe, Ray). Multi-cloud or hybrid Kubernetes exposure. Prior Operate / managed services delivery experience Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai
qualifications: #DFO&I2027Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. Position Summary Level: Senior Consultant As an experienced Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do: Lead the development lifecycle, from planning and design to implementation, testing, and deployment. Design and operate GKE clusters (Standard and Autopilot) supporting multi-tenant client workloads. Implement workload isolation, namespace strategies, network policies, and quota / priority class governance. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Cloud Build, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) and GitOps flows (ArgoCD, Flux). Develop and maintain Helm charts, Kustomize overlays, and Terraform infrastructure-as-code. Configure GKE networking: VPC-native clusters, private clusters, ingress/egress controls, Cloud Load Balancing, Anthos Service Mesh or Istio. Implement security best practices: Workload Identity, Binary Authorization, Policy Controller, secret management (Cloud KMS, Secret Manager, External Secrets), CIS benchmarks. Stand up observability: Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Trace, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana. Drive FinOps on GKE — right-sizing, Autopilot vs Standard trade-offs, spot/preemptible workloads, Kubecost or native cost reporting. Participate in on-call rotation, incident response, RCA, and capacity planning. Hands-on with GitOps tooling — ArgoCD or Flux. Solid grasp of GCP IAM, Workload Identity, Cloud KMS, VPC networking. CI/CD pipelines and progressive delivery patterns (canary, blue/green, feature flags). Observability stacks: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Cloud Operations suite. GCP Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer, CKA, or CKAD certification preferred. Good to have Skills / Project Experience / Certifications: Anthos / Anthos Service Mesh experience. Service mesh fluency: Istio, Cilium, Linkerd. FinOps on Kubernetes (Kubecost, GKE cost allocation, sustained-use and committed-use discounts). Experience running ML / AI workloads on GKE (training, model serving, GPU / TPU node pools, KServe, Ray). Multi-cloud or hybrid Kubernetes exposure. Prior Operate / managed services delivery experience Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-S&S-Oracle CX  Associate Business Transformation Architect
description: #S&S2027Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Associate Business Transformation ArchitectAs an Associate Business Transformation Architect/ Specialist Senior at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions.Work you’ll do:Configure Oracle Sales for client opportunity lifecycle: stage definitions, territory & quota logic, forecast categories, incentive compensation plan structures, and PRM workflows Build Oracle CPQ configuration models: product hierarchies, constraint rules, multi-tier pricing waterfalls, discount approval matrices, and proposal generation templates Build and test OIC integrations: adapter configuration, data mapping, error handling, and integration environment governance under architecture direction Design and implement Oracle CDM structures: account & contact hierarchy, party merge and deduplication rules, data quality policies, golden record configuration, and cross-module customer data governance Enable Oracle AI features with data readiness validation: opportunity scoring, next-best-action, and Fusion Analytics workbook activation Support quarterly Oracle release cycles: review release notes, execute regression tests in sandbox, maintain customization inventory for assigned environments Produce and maintain delivery documentation: solution design documents, configuration workbooks, data mapping specs, test scripts, and training materials Facilitate requirements workshops and UAT with business process owners at director level and belowThe team: Step into our Sales & Service team, where technology powers business impact and innovation drives everything we do. As a global, dynamic group, we deliver seamless, end-to-end solutions—advising on strategy, implementing advanced CRM or back-office platforms, and enabling continuous business improvement. Here, you’ll collaborate with passionate, creative minds to transform sales models, elevate service excellence, and optimize customer operations. If you’re ready to grow your expertise, make bold ideas real, and help redefine the customer experience for leading organizations, this is your next big move. Join us and shape the future of sales and service! Qualifications Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:6–9 years of enterprise technology consulting or Oracle CX implementation experience 4+ years of hands-on Oracle CX Cloud delivery across Sales, CPQ modules Hands-on configuration experience in at least two Oracle CX modules, with direct responsibility for build, test, and go-live on a production engagement Oracle CPQ Cloud experience: product model configuration, constraint rule authoring, pricing structure definition, and approval workflow build Oracle CDM experience: customer data model design, account & contact hierarchy configuration, party merge rules, deduplication policies, and data quality governance Working knowledge of Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC): adapter setup, data mapping, error handling, and basic integration pattern selection Functional fluency in at least one commercial domain: sales pipeline management, territory & quota, incentive compensation, case management, or field service dispatch Experience with Oracle Fusion Data Intelligence or Oracle Analytics Cloud: activating workbooks, building dashboards, defining operational KPIs Track record delivering Oracle CX workstreams within multi-stream programs, managing personal scope and milestone commitments Experience engaging director-level client stakeholders: leading workshops, presenting configuration designs, facilitating UAT Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experienceGood to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:Active Oracle certifications: Oracle CX Sales Implementation Professional Oracle CPQ Cloud Implementation Professional Oracle CPQ experience in high-volume B2B environments with complex pricing structures or large product catalogs Oracle CX Sales experience with preferably PRM experience and overall L2C process knowledge Oracle CDM experience in a multi-org or multi-country deployment: master data governance across business units, cross-pillar customer hierarchy alignment (CX, ERP, HCM) Exposure to Oracle Eloqua or Responsys: lead scoring configuration, nurture program setup, CRM bi-directional sync Experience participating in a CRM displacement program (Salesforce, SAP CRM, or Microsoft Dynamics to Oracle CX)Education:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI - EH27 - Tax - GESTC - .Net API Integration + Gen AI - L25 - BTA - Hyderabad
description: Design and develop scalable, high-quality, and high-performance integrations using Microsoft and AWS native technology. You will work with a team of analysts, developers, and tax consultants to build high performing user-friendly systems & applications. The incumbent needs to have a high level of attention to detail, ability to execute and deliver high quality project deliverables on budget and on time, and multi-task in a dynamic environment. Incumbent should be able to function effectively in a team environment. You will also be responsible for certain delegation activities and help the team with day to day workload. Work you'll do As a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) team, you will be responsible for: Designing, developing, and debugging applications in C# .NET and integration solutions Writing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, triggers, and other SQL scripts for data extraction and manipulation Creating Boomi processes for application programming interfaces (APIs), data exchange automation, and system integrations Developing and supporting API endpoints using tools such as Visual Studio or Boomi Following project and coding standards, implementing process improvements, and escalating complex issues as needed The team Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India. We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment. We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC). Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor of Technology or Bachelor of Science in Computer Science 2-4 years of experience in software development lifecycle activities, including analysis, design, and development of .NET applications or systems Experience with C# and ActiveX Data Objects .NET (ADO.NET) Experience creating Boomi processes for integrations Experience working with JavaScript Object Notation (JSON), Extensible Markup Language (XML), and XML Schema Definition (XSD) Experience developing or consuming web services and representational state transfer (REST) APIs Experience with artificial intelligence tools or large language model (LLM) use cases in application development Preferred: Experience supporting Global Mobility or tax technology processes Experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS)#CA-GSD #CA-HPN

title: USI-EH-FY27-Consulting Services-EP-EERPS-MSDynamics-Technical
description: MS Dynamics365 TechnicalDeloitte USI Consulting Services is looking for experienced Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations Technical Consultants with proven hands-on expertise in at least one full ERP implementation project.SummaryAs a Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (F&O) Technical practitioner at Deloitte USI Consulting Services, you will design, build, and deploy enterprise-scale D365 F&O technical solutions spanning across custom development, integrations, data migrations, and reporting collaborating with cross-functional and global teams to translate client functional and technical requirements into robust, scalable, and high-quality deliverables. You will independently manage your technical workstream responsibilities while guiding and mentoring junior team members, bringing structure and expertise to every stage of the engagement. Your role spans the full project lifecycle  from estimation and planning through build, testing, cutover, and post go-live support ensuring high-quality and timely delivery of solutions that meet client needs and project delivery standards.Work you'll doYou will lead technical integrations, reports, data migrations, and system extensions analyzing client needs and designing, building, configuring, testing, and supporting Microsoft Dynamics Finance & Operations solutions. You will manage activities across the full engagement, from requirements gathering through post go-live support, overseeing testing, deployment, and status reporting while establishing best practices that drive quality and reuse. You will proactively collaborate with project teammates, contribute innovative solutions, debug and troubleshooting technical issues, and manage client and stakeholder expectations to ensure successful and on-time project delivery.Qualifications Section4+ years of consulting or relevant industry experience in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations  (F&O) technical roles.Demonstrated proficiency in Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O technical tools and capabilities, including SSRS, X++, C#, Business Event Framework, Web Services, Logic Apps, Azure Data Lake, Power Platform, Data Management Framework (DMF), Workflows, Reporting, Integration patterns such as file based, dual-write, virtual entities, & OData, to design, build, test, and deploy technical solutions.Hands-on experience in at least one end-to-end Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations ERP implementation project in a technical role. Multiple full life cycle implementations are preferred and expected for more experienced candidates.Proficient with integration tools and data entities, with the ability to translate functional and integration requirements into robust, scalable technical designs. Understanding of batch processing and experience in developing enhancements.Experience in leading design discussions and owning solutioning using Microsoft Dynamics 365 tools. Understanding of Microsoft Lifecycle Services (LCS) for environment management, Azure DevOps for source control, build pipelines, CI/CD automation and familiarity with the cloud environments.Understanding of Security Architecture including roles, duties, privileges, and permission sets. Ability to design and implement custom security roles is an added advantage.Create and maintain technical design documents in line with delivery standards. Conduct unit testing, support test cycles and address technical defects.Experience with data migrations and ETL processes is preferred and would be an added advantage.Coordinate with Client IT and boundary systems for end-to-end testing and cutover activities.Capable of working independently, managing multiple tasks and priorities simultaneously. Mentor junior consultants and review their technical deliverables.Strong communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.Excellent problem-solving, troubleshooting, and analytical skills with mature judgement.Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:  Hands-on or experience with Copilot Agents and AI-driven extensions within the Microsoft ecosystem.Experience working with Dataverse for data modeling, integration, and extending Microsoft Dynamics 365 solutions.
