title: USI-EH27-TAX-GESTC-L25-BTA-Business Analyst with SQL-Hyderabad
description: We are seeking a Tax Consultant I to join Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited’s Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC). In this role, you will support global mobility technology solutions that help enable business growth and deliver efficient, technology-enabled services. The role is well suited for a professional with experience in application support, software development life cycle activities, requirements documentation, and testing. You will work closely with business and technology stakeholders to help improve system performance, user experience, and operational effectiveness.Work you'll doAs a Tax Consultant I on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) team, you will be responsible for: Participating in requirements gathering sessions with business stakeholders and end users to document requirements for data capture, functionality, reporting, analysis, and training Translating business requirements into system updates by evaluating functionality, assessing impacts to existing releases, and supporting change implementation Identifying, documenting, and tracking system defects, gaps, and enhancement opportunities, and recommending solution options Supporting process mapping, workflow documentation, and the creation of frequently asked questions and online help materials Assisting with system integration testing and user acceptance testing, including development of positive and negative test scenarios and resolution of issues through a ticketing or call tracking process The teamDeloitte Tax in India supports the tax transformation taking place across the marketplace by combining technology capabilities with tax technical knowledge to deliver integrated solutions. Within this environment, the Global Employer Services practice helps organizations respond to a complex global talent landscape, evolving compliance requirements, and changing workforce models.The Global Employer Services Technology team is a global organization that develops and supports technology-enabled solutions for mobility, reward, and compliance services. The team offers the opportunity to work on innovative products and contribute to scalable solutions that support client and business needs.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor of Engineering (BE) or Bachelor of Technology (BTech) 1-2 years of experience supporting applications or systems Experience with software development life cycle activities, including requirements gathering, documentation, testing, and support Experience with system integration testing and user acceptance testing, including test scenario and test case development Advanced proficiency in Structured Query Language (SQL) Experience working with web services, Representational State Transfer (REST) application programming interfaces, SOAP UI, and service call error troubleshooting Proficiency in Microsoft Excel Preferred: SDLC certification Experience with process mapping and workflow documentation Experience documenting knowledge articles, FAQs, or online help content Experience managing and resolving issues through a call tracking or ticketing system Experience with PL/SQL#CA-GSD #CA-HPN#TechnologyFY26

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-HCI-Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II-Physical & Spatial AI
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.  Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, drive innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.Level: - Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer IIAs a Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II at Deloitte Consulting, you should have a strong product implementation mindset and hands-on experience helping clients apply digital twin and spatial technologies to real-world operational environments. The ideal candidate has worked across OT-heavy environments such as data centers, sports venues, and consumer/retail operations, and can help translate business and operational needs into scalable architecture, platform, and transformation solutions. Client experience aligned to NVIDIA and/or Google Cloud Platform/ AWS stacks, with exposure to either OT transformation design or hands-on technical solution architecture is ideal. You will work within multidisciplinary, global teams and support junior practitioners while working directly with clients and internal stakeholders to help translate business goals into technically grounded solution approaches. You will support sales and proposal efforts and contribute to day-to-day delivery across the project lifecycle – work planning, scoping, estimation support, and status reporting – to drive successful outcomes.Work you’ll do: As a Senior Consultant/ Consultant at Deloitte, you are expected to bring solid hands-on expertise in Physical and Spatial AI, support the definition of business or technology architecture, contribute to delivery planning for large-scale projects, help with solution design and implementation, track team progress, and ensure quality of your work products. The role also includes mentoring junior team members, sales support, and contribution to market eminence. You will participate in discussions with business and functional analysts to understand requirements and assess integration impacts on business architecture. Support the preparation of technical architecture and design, clarify requirements, and help resolve ambiguities. Develop solutions in line with established technical designs, integration standards, and quality processes. Apply and help maintain technical design and development guides, templates, and standards. Facilitate daily scrum meetings, track deliverables, and prepare weekly status reports for leadership review. Support detailed deliverable reviews and provide technical guidance to junior team members. Collaborate with onsite clients, coordinators, analysts, and cross-functional teams. Support clients on leading practices in digital twin, spatial AI, OT modernization, edge-to-cloud integration, and physical environment transformation Help translate business and operational priorities into transformation roadmaps and technical strategies Help guide clients on platform choices and ecosystem decisions aligned to NVIDIA and/or GCP-based architectures including the role of edge, data, AI, and simulation platforms in enterprise transformation Contribute to architecting client solutions focused on digital twins, spatial intelligence, simulation, and OT transformation Help clients define future-state capability stacks aligned to NVIDIA and GCP/AWS ecosystems, including edge compute, AI model services, simulation platforms, vision services, data platforms, and enterprise integration layers Support the definition of technical architectures for environments requiring coordination across sensing, telemetry, OT systems, edge infrastructure, AI/ML services, spatial context, and enterprise applications ·       Implement integration of physical/spatial AI capabilities into operational workflows, including OT systems, IoT platforms, facilities systems, robotics-related ecosystems, and enterprise platforms·       Contribute to differentiated points of view, offerings, demos, and proposal content that position Deloitte as a preferred transformation partner·       Support the development of Deloitte’s market-facing capabilities focused on digital twins, OT transformation, and spatial/physical AI use cases across priority sectors The team:  At Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure, we deliver solutions spanning Hybrid Cloud, Advanced Connectivity, AI Data Centers, High-Performance Computing, and AI Infrastructure to help clients achieve their desired outcomes. Our offerings include engineered transformation services for hybrid cloud infrastructure and platforms, prioritizing resiliency, optimization, and extensive automation. We integrate Advanced Connectivity, with AI Infrastructure and AI to boost operational efficiency and enable real-time data processing, crucial for critical low-latency enterprise operational technology (OT) applications. Additionally, we provide comprehensive management of all facets of operations for hybrid cloud infrastructure and field operations.Location: Hyderabad/BengaluruShift Timings: As per Business RequirementQualificationsRequired: 3-8 years of relevant experience in consulting, industry, or a combination of both Hands-on experience with NVIDIA Isaac Sim, Nucleus and Isaac Replicator for programmatic synthetic data generation at scale. Solid understanding of 3D perception models – point-cloud networks, depth models, spatial transformers and their role in embodied AI pipelines. Proficiency in USD scene composition layers, references, variants and architecting digital twin scenes with live telemetry integration. Experience evaluating, finetuning and integrating VLA foundation models (OpenVLA-OFT, GR00T, RDT-1B) benchmarking policies on structured task suites in simulation. Ability to author Omniverse Kit extensions in Python/C++ for custom sensors, simulation behaviors, or non-standard action spaces. Working knowledge of Isaac ROS 2 for sensor simulation, topic bridging, and integration with policy inference nodes. Familiarity with Cosmos / NVIDIA foundation models for world modelling and scene generation as part of the simulation stack. ·       BE/B. Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc. (CS)/ M. Tech degree or equivalent from accredited university   Preferred: Experience with 3D scene reconstruction techniques like NeRF, Gaussian Splatting, or photogrammetry – for enriching simulation asset libraries. Exposure to edge-optimized inference for 3D perception like TensorRT graph optimization, int8/fp16 quantisation, and custom CUDA kernels for point-cloud operations. Knowledge of sim-to-real transfer methodology – fidelity metrics, distribution shift analysis, dataset augmentation strategies, and transfer learning experiments. Understanding of motion planning and trajectory optimization for robotic manipulation –experience with planners such as MoveIt 2, MPPI, or CuRobo, and the ability to validate planned trajectories inside Isaac Sim before real-world execution. Exposure to imitation learning and behavior cloning pipelines – collecting and curating teleoperation demonstrations, training policies with ACT or Diffusion Policy, and assessing policy generalization on out-of-distribution spatial scenarios in sim. #FY27ReferralCampaign#AIE2027

Solid understanding of 3D perception models – point-cloud networks, depth models, spatial transformers and their role in embodied AI pipelines. Proficiency in USD scene composition layers, references, variants and architecting digital twin scenes with live telemetry integration. Experience evaluating, finetuning and integrating VLA foundation models (OpenVLA-OFT, GR00T, RDT-1B) benchmarking policies on structured task suites in simulation. Ability to author Omniverse Kit extensions in Python/C++ for custom sensors, simulation behaviors, or non-standard action spaces. Working knowledge of Isaac ROS 2 for sensor simulation, topic bridging, and integration with policy inference nodes. Familiarity with Cosmos / NVIDIA foundation models for world modelling and scene generation as part of the simulation stack. ·       BE/B. Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc. (CS)/ M. Tech degree or equivalent from accredited university   Preferred: Experience with 3D scene reconstruction techniques like NeRF, Gaussian Splatting, or photogrammetry – for enriching simulation asset libraries. Exposure to edge-optimized inference for 3D perception like TensorRT graph optimization, int8/fp16 quantisation, and custom CUDA kernels for point-cloud operations. Knowledge of sim-to-real transfer methodology – fidelity metrics, distribution shift analysis, dataset augmentation strategies, and transfer learning experiments. Understanding of motion planning and trajectory optimization for robotic manipulation –experience with planners such as MoveIt 2, MPPI, or CuRobo, and the ability to validate planned trajectories inside Isaac Sim before real-world execution. Exposure to imitation learning and behavior cloning pipelines – collecting and curating teleoperation demonstrations, training policies with ACT or Diffusion Policy, and assessing policy generalization on out-of-distribution spatial scenarios in sim. #FY27ReferralCampaign#AIE2027

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-Customer-Digital Foundry-GCP GKE-Consultant, Managed Services
description: #DFO&I2027Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Consultant, Managed Services As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements. Work you’ll do: Design and operate GKE clusters (Standard and Autopilot) supporting multi-tenant client workloads. Implement workload isolation, namespace strategies, network policies, and quota / priority class governance. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Cloud Build, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) and GitOps flows (ArgoCD, Flux). Develop and maintain Helm charts, Kustomize overlays, and Terraform infrastructure-as-code. Configure GKE networking: VPC-native clusters, private clusters, ingress/egress controls, Cloud Load Balancing, Anthos Service Mesh or Istio. Implement security best practices: Workload Identity, Binary Authorization, Policy Controller, secret management (Cloud KMS, Secret Manager, External Secrets), CIS benchmarks. Stand up observability: Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Trace, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana. Drive FinOps on GKE — right-sizing, Autopilot vs Standard trade-offs, spot/preemptible workloads, Kubecost or native cost reporting. Participate in on-call rotation, incident response, RCA, and capacity planning. The Team: Our Digital Foundry Operate & Innovations (DFO&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end-to-end solutions - from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations - enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Qualifications Must Have Skills / Project Experience / Certifications: 3 - 6 years of hands-on experience. 4+ years operating Kubernetes in production; 2+ years specifically on GKE. Strong Linux, container, and networking fundamentals (Docker, OCI, CNI). Production experience with Terraform and Helm; proficiency in Go, Python, or Bash. Hands-on with GitOps tooling — ArgoCD or Flux. Solid grasp of GCP IAM, Workload Identity, Cloud KMS, VPC networking. CI/CD pipelines and progressive delivery patterns (canary, blue/green, feature flags). Observability stacks: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Cloud Operations suite. GCP Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer, CKA, or CKAD certification preferred. Good to have Skills / Project Experience / Certifications: Anthos / Anthos Service Mesh experience. Service mesh fluency: Istio, Cilium, Linkerd. FinOps on Kubernetes (Kubecost, GKE cost allocation, sustained-use and committed-use discounts). Experience running ML / AI workloads on GKE (training, model serving, GPU / TPU node pools, KServe, Ray). Multi-cloud or hybrid Kubernetes exposure. Prior Operate / managed services delivery experience Education: BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university Location: Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-Consulting-AI&E-HCI-Lead Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II-Physical & Spatial AI Architect
description: Artificial Intelligence & EngineeringAI & Engineering leverages cutting-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission-critical operations.  Join our AI & Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, drive innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.Level: Lead Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II As a Lead Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II at Deloitte Consulting, you will help clients apply physical AI and spatial technologies to operational environments such as data centers, sports venues, and consumer or retail settings. You will translate business and operational needs into scalable architecture, platform, and transformation solutions across NVIDIA, Google Cloud Platform, and Amazon Web Services ecosystems. This role combines client-facing solution design, delivery leadership, and hands-on technical direction across the project lifecycle. You will also support proposal efforts, guide multidisciplinary teams, and help deliver measurable outcomes for complex transformation programs.Work you'll doAs a Lead Cloud Integrated Infrastructure Engineer II on the Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure team, you will be responsible for… Leading end-to-end physical AI delivery, from synthetic data generation and simulation-based policy training through hardware commissioning and production deployment. Partnering with sales and customer success teams to scope engagements, lead technical discovery workshops, and develop reference architectures and proof-of-concept deliverables. Driving platform selection decisions across simulation, perception, robot orchestration, and edge compute, including documenting trade-offs and presenting recommendations to senior stakeholders. Connecting spatial engineering and physical AI engineering efforts to align simulation outputs, autonomy development, and deployed system performance. Building reusable architecture patterns, blueprints, and best practices across NVIDIA Omniverse, Isaac, Metropolis, and partner ecosystems. The teamDeloitte’s AI & Engineering practice helps clients build, deploy, and operate integrated solutions across software, data, artificial intelligence, networks, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. Within Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure, the team delivers solutions spanning hybrid cloud, advanced connectivity, AI data centers, high-performance computing, and AI infrastructure to help clients achieve targeted business outcomes. The practice focuses on resiliency, optimization, automation, and operational performance across infrastructure platforms and field operations. Team members work across engineering, connectivity, and AI-enabled infrastructure to support real-time processing and critical operational technology environments.Location: Hyderabad/BengaluruShift Timings: As per Business RequirementsQualificationsRequired: 8-12+ years of experience in consulting, industry, or a combination of both. Experience aligned to NVIDIA and/or Google Cloud Platform or Amazon Web Services ecosystems for physical AI and spatial AI, including technologies such as Omniverse, Cosmos, Isaac, Metropolis, Jetson, Orin, NeMo, Groot, Google Distributed Cloud Edge, Anthos, Vertex AI, TensorFlow, Immersive Stream, Earth Engine, Gemini, Agent Builder, Amazon Outposts, Elastic Kubernetes Service, SageMaker, AppStream, and Bedrock. Experience leading end-to-end physical AI delivery, including simulation-based training, synthetic data generation, hardware integration, and production deployment on robot platforms. Experience with NeRFStudio and 3D Gaussian Splatting, including capture and processing of real-world scans and maintenance of Universal Scene Description export pipelines in Nucleus. Experience architecting and training 3D perception models, including point-cloud networks, spatial transformers, and implicit neural representations. Experience with motion planning tools such as MoveIt 2, CuRobo, and Isaac Manipulator. Experience with simultaneous localization and mapping tools such as ORB-SLAM3, LIO-SAM, or RTAB-Map. Preferred: Consulting experience in client-facing strategy, architecture, or transformation delivery roles. Experience in data center, sports venue, consumer, or retail environments. Experience with hardware calibration, including intrinsic and extrinsic camera calibration, LiDAR-camera extrinsic estimation, and sensor noise characterization. Experience with hand-eye calibration, including calibration rig setup, integration into ROS 2 TF trees, and end-effector accuracy validation. Experience with sim-to-real transfer methods, including fidelity gap metrics, distribution shift analysis, domain randomization, and transfer learning. Experience optimizing edge inference for 3D perception using TensorRT, INT8 or FP16 quantization, and CUDA kernels on Jetson hardware.#FY27ReferralCampaign#AIE2027

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering - ERM - Engineering Manager - Manager
description: The Engineering Manager is an integral part of the technical application development team and primarily responsible for building and delivering the enterprise IT solutions. This position provides opportunity to lead and manage projects and programs for internal IT organization. Engineering manager is a hands-on technical manager managing significant strategic and technical aspect of projects and programs, including communications with Leadership, leading multifunctional teams, quality, and adherence to Deloitte standards. Work you'll do As an Engineering Manager on the Delivery, Methods & Tools team, you will be responsible for… Lead application development efforts for enterprise IT solutions built on Microsoft technologies Drive Agile delivery activities, including requirement planning, application design, and technical execution across cross-functional teams Direct technical tasks for the team, resolve technical issues, and conduct code reviews to support delivery quality Partner with the Engagement Manager to support the team, projects, and products across the portfolio Collaborate with onshore and offshore team members to implement development and application support strategies aligned to Deloitte standards The team At Deloitte, Shared Services center improves overall efficiency and control while giving every business unit access to the company’s best and brightest resources. It is also lets business units focus on what really matters – satisfying customers and developing new products and services to sustain competitive advantage. A shared services center is a simple concept but making it work is anything but easy. It involves consolidating and standardizing a wildly diverse collection of systems, processes, and functions. And if requires a high degree of cooperation among business units that generally are not accustomed to working together – with people who do not necessarily want to change. USI shared services team provides a wide array of services to the U.S. and it is constantly evaluating and expanding its portfolio. The shared services team provides call center support, Document Services support, financial processing and analysis support, Record management support, Ethics and compliance support and admin assistant support. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Electronics; Master of Computer Applications; or Master of Science in Computer Science 10+ years of experience in information technology application development, support, or maintenance activities 4+ years of experience in technical team management Experience supporting at least 2 full software development life cycles Hands-on experience with ASP.NET, C#, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React or Angular, SQL Server, and Microsoft Azure Preferred: 2+ years of experience in Agile / Scrum methodology Experience supporting client-facing work and onshore-offshore delivery models Experience working in global environments across multiple development sites and time zones

Work you'll do As an Engineering Manager on the Delivery, Methods & Tools team, you will be responsible for… Lead application development efforts for enterprise IT solutions built on Microsoft technologies Drive Agile delivery activities, including requirement planning, application design, and technical execution across cross-functional teams Direct technical tasks for the team, resolve technical issues, and conduct code reviews to support delivery quality Partner with the Engagement Manager to support the team, projects, and products across the portfolio Collaborate with onshore and offshore team members to implement development and application support strategies aligned to Deloitte standards The team At Deloitte, Shared Services center improves overall efficiency and control while giving every business unit access to the company’s best and brightest resources. It is also lets business units focus on what really matters – satisfying customers and developing new products and services to sustain competitive advantage. A shared services center is a simple concept but making it work is anything but easy. It involves consolidating and standardizing a wildly diverse collection of systems, processes, and functions. And if requires a high degree of cooperation among business units that generally are not accustomed to working together – with people who do not necessarily want to change. USI shared services team provides a wide array of services to the U.S. and it is constantly evaluating and expanding its portfolio. The shared services team provides call center support, Document Services support, financial processing and analysis support, Record management support, Ethics and compliance support and admin assistant support. Location: Hyderabad Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM Qualifications Required: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Electronics; Master of Computer Applications; or Master of Science in Computer Science 10+ years of experience in information technology application development, support, or maintenance activities 4+ years of experience in technical team management Experience supporting at least 2 full software development life cycles Hands-on experience with ASP.NET, C#, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React or Angular, SQL Server, and Microsoft Azure Preferred: 2+ years of experience in Agile / Scrum methodology Experience supporting client-facing work and onshore-offshore delivery models Experience working in global environments across multiple development sites and time zones

title: USI-  EH27 - Consulting - Customer - S&S - PriceFX - Consultant, Technical Transformation
description: #S&S2027Customer The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence. Position Summary Level: Consultant, Technical TransformationWe are seeking a Consultant with experience in pricing transformation and Pricefx to support the design and delivery of pricing strategy, pricing technology, and commercial excellence solutions for clients. This role sits within the Sales & Service offering and supports Customer OP engagements focused on improving pricing effectiveness, margin performance, and sales execution. The Consultant will work with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into Pricefx-enabled solutions and support implementation, testing, and client adoption. Work you’ll do: Support Pricefx implementations including requirements gathering, solution design, configuration, testing, and deployment Work with client stakeholders to assess current pricing processes, pain points, and improvement opportunities Translate business requirements into functional specifications and user stories for pricing tools and workflows Assist in configuring Pricefx modules such as pricing logic, workflows, approvals, rebate management, analytics, and dashboards Conduct data analysis to support pricing strategy, segmentation, discount optimization, and margin improvement initiatives Support integration discussions across ERP, CRM, CPQ, and downstream pricing/reporting systems Develop test scripts, support SIT/UAT, and manage defect tracking and resolution Prepare client-ready deliverables including process maps, requirements documents, training materials, and status updates Support change management, end-user training, and business adoption activities Contribute to practice development through asset creation, internal knowledge sharing, and pursuit support The Team: Step into our Sales & Service team, where technology powers business impact and innovation drives everything we do. As a global, dynamic group, we deliver seamless, end-to-end solutions—advising on strategy, implementing advanced CRM or back-office platforms, and enabling continuous business improvement. Here, you’ll collaborate with passionate, creative minds to transform sales models, elevate service excellence, and optimize customer operations. If you’re ready to grow your expertise, make bold ideas real, and help redefine the customer experience for leading organizations, this is your next big move. Join us and shape the future of sales and service. Qualifications Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Bachelor’s degree in business, engineering, economics, information systems, or related field 2+ years of consulting and/or industry experience in pricing, commercial excellence, revenue management, or sales transformation Hands-on experience with Pricefx in implementation, configuration, or business process design Understanding of pricing processes including price setting, discounting, approvals, rebates, and margin analysis Experience working with large datasets and translating insights into business recommendations Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills Ability to work in a team-based, client-facing environment and manage multiple workstreams Willingness to travel based on client and business needs  Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications: Experience with B2B pricing transformation programs Familiarity with ERP/CRM platforms such as SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, or Microsoft Dynamics Exposure to pricing analytics, CPQ, quote-to-cash, or commercial operations processes Experience in Agile delivery environments Advanced Excel, PowerPoint, and requirements documentation skills Prior experience in consulting, especially in customer, sales, or service transformation programsEducation:BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited universityLocation:Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

title: USI-EH27-G&P-BM&C-L40 - Specialist Assistant Manager, Marketing Performance Analytics (AEP)-Hyderabad
description: Specialist Assistant Manager, Marketing Performance AnalyticsDrive customer journey measurement and optimization for Deloitte’s Brand, Marketing & Communications organization. In this role, you will translate stakeholder needs into analytics, platform, and activation capabilities across Adobe Customer Journey Analytics and Adobe Experience Platform. You will work across marketing, product, and technology teams to identify journey insights, define technical requirements, and turn data into measurable business value. This is an opportunity for a data-driven professional who thrives in a matrixed environment and enjoys connecting analytics, experimentation, and execution to improve customer experience and performance outcomes.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Assistant Manager, Marketing Performance Analytics on the Technology, Performance & Enablement team, you will be responsible for leading customer journey analytics and optimization initiatives across Adobe Customer Journey Analytics and Adobe Experience Platform.Partner with marketing, global product, and technology teams to intake demand, refine problem statements, define scope, and support execution within an Agile frameworkDefine and monitor customer journey performance indicators, identify friction points, and translate insights into prioritized optimization opportunities across channels and touchpointsSupport delivery of Adobe Experience Platform use cases, including journey measurement, audience segmentation, activation, and data governance enhancementsCreate user stories, acceptance criteria, and technical requirements for platform and journey enhancements while managing backlog hygiene, dependencies, and release readinessPresent performance findings and recommendations to technical and non-technical stakeholders and manage project trackers, expectations, and delivery timelinesThe teamDeloitte’s Brand, Marketing & Communications (BM&C) organization seeks innovative creatives, strategic marketers, and collaborative leaders to drive business growth and digital transformation. Join a team that blends creativity, business acumen, strategic thinking, and Deloitte’s strong brand equity to deliver impactful marketing solutions. Thrive in a diverse, supportive environment where you leverage cultural trends, emerging technologies, and bold ideas to challenge the status quo. title: USI-EH27-Tax-Global Employer Services- Process Technology- Gen AI-L35-TC II-Hyderabad,Kolkata,Gurugram, Bengaluru
description: Join Deloitte Tax in India’s Global Employer Services (GES) – Process Technology Team as a Tax Consultant II supporting tax technology transformation. In this role, you will work with product engineering teams and business leaders to design and improve technology-enabled processes and products that enhance the digital experience for clients and customers. You will help shape modern generative AI solutions, support product design efforts, and contribute to scalable delivery aligned to evolving business needs.Work you'll doAs a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Services – Process Technology Team, you will be responsible for: Design and develop agentic AI and generative AI solutions with a strong focus on Python-based engineering and modern implementation patterns Partner with developers, project managers, and business stakeholders to build persona-based experiences and workflows aligned to business outcomes Define adoption goals, track usage and impact metrics, and refine solutions based on feedback to improve operational efficiency Maintain technical documentation, including architecture materials, prompts or agents, evaluation results, and runbooks, while providing status updates across concurrent projects Collaborate with stakeholders and GES leadership to prioritize the GenAI roadmap, manage trade-offs, and support delivery against business objectives The teamDeloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India.We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary/niche technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services – Process Technology Team!Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PMQualificationsRequired: 3-6 years of experience in Python software engineering, including application programming interfaces, testing, and packaging Experience building large language model applications using agent frameworks, prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation, embeddings, vector stores, guardrails, or evaluations Experience integrating AI solutions with enterprise systems using application programming interfaces and secure implementation patterns Experience defining and tracking usage, cycle-time, accuracy, or quality metrics for digital or AI solutions Experience preparing technical documentation, including architecture materials, evaluation results, or runbooks Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology Preferred: Experience with GenAI-based document processing or optical character recognition workflows, such as Azure Document Intelligence Experience operationalizing AI applications, including monitoring, prompt or agent regression testing, and human-in-the-loop review Experience applying data privacy or security considerations to enterprise GenAI implementations Degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Analytics, or Engineering, or industry-recognized professional certification.#CA-GSD #CA-HPN

title: USI | EH27 | G&D Advisors - Tax | Specialist Executive Manager - Hyderabad
description: Executive Manager, Growth and Development, USI TaxThe chief purpose of Growth & Development at Deloitte is to grow leaders for the future, build world-class capabilities for maximum client impact, and consistently deliver an exceptional development experience to our people.Learning is at the core of Deloitte’s culture. We emphasize a holistic approach to development that is not just about education, but also self-awareness, exposure to real-world problems, and connections to people. We position our professionals to help tackle some of the most complex issues in business, our communities, and society at large.Deloitte’s Growth & Development (G&D) function delivers outcome-focused, human-centered, efficient, and innovative learning, development, and growth solutions designed to help our professionals best perform at every stage of their career. We emphasize our strong culture of learning and the growth mindset of our professionals and offer holistic and continuous learning that is not just about education but also self-awareness, exposure to real-world problems, and connections to people. We strive to position our people to help tackle some of the most complex issues in business, our communities and society at large.Work you'll doAs a Specialist Executive Manager, Talent Development on the USI Tax Growth and Development team, you will be responsible for: Leading the planning and execution of learning programs across multiple career levels Partnering with business leaders, Talent stakeholders, and US-based counterparts to align development priorities with business goals Designing, curating, and advising on technology-enabled learning solutions using adult learning and human-centered design principles Using program data and reporting to evaluate effectiveness, improve engagement, and inform decisions Managing learning operations, including budget planning, forecasting, and coordination with internal learning teams The teamThe USI Tax Growth and Development team helps build capabilities and learning experiences that support professionals across their careers. The team works closely with business leaders, Talent teams, and learning organizations to deliver scalable development solutions aligned to business priorities. This team plays a key role in translating workforce needs into practical learning strategies and programs.Location: HyderabadShift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PMQualificationsRequired: Bachelor’s degree 10+ years of experience in learning and development Experience leading learning program planning and delivery across multiple career levels Experience partnering with business leaders and Talent stakeholders on development strategy Experience using data, reporting, or program metrics to evaluate learning effectiveness and inform decisions Experience designing, curating, or managing technology-enabled learning solutions Experience managing budgets, forecasts, or operational planning for learning programs Preferred: Experience in content design and curation Experience leading teams Experience using a consultative approach with business stakeholders or clients

title: USI - EH27 - Product Engineering - Engineering Leader - VP
description: Engineering LeaderRole Overview: As a Engineering Leader, you will help shape and communicate a strategic vision for modern software engineering. You will provide hands-on leadership across multiple high-impact products, ensuring our solutions are innovative, effective, and aligned with business goals.  You will contribute to and execute a forward-looking technology roadmap, driving simplification, scalability, and efficiency. Leveraging your deep expertise in software engineering—including application and data integration, modern frameworks, and diverse technologies—you will guide teams in delivering robust, high-quality solutions.  As a role model and mentor, you will foster a culture of technical excellence, continuous learning, and collaboration. Your ability to inspire and develop engineering talent, while partnering with cross-functional teams, will be essential to our ongoing success and the value we deliver to Deloitte’s business.Key Responsibilities:Strategic Vision and Alignment: Contribute to defining, communicating, and continuously refining a compelling engineering vision that translates business objectives into actionable strategies. Ensure engineering teams are aligned and engaged, collaborating closely with product, experience, delivery, infrastructure, and security teams. Leverage technical artifacts and feedback loops to illustrate and evolve the vision.Advocacy and Technology Roadmap: Champion the integrated engineering strategy and technology roadmap, ensuring organizational awareness of objectives, KPIs, maturity, and compliance. Promote a culture of reuse, quality, and speed to maximize outcomes. Actively engage and energize teams around the engineering vision and its alignment with business and technology goals.Craft Mastery and Objectives Realization: Drive achievement of engineering KPIs, including system performance, scalability, security, and maintainability. Maintain and evolve engineering dashboards (planning, code quality, CI/CD, performance, security, operations). Contribute hands-on to design and code, mentor engineers, and resolve technical challenges. Inspire teams to adopt new technologies and best practices, fostering a passion for engineering excellence.Capability Evolution and Development: Being an engineering expert, mentor and develop full-stack engineering talent in modern practices such as frontend, microservices, cloud-native design, AI/ML/GenAI, data engineering, DevSecOps, and advanced deployment techniques like, Blue-Green, Canary to minimize down-time, enabling A/B testing approaches. Lead by example through thought leadership—speaking at conferences, publishing, R&D, or collaborating with academia. Cultivate a growth mindset and modern engineering behaviors across the team.Iterative Value Delivery: Embrace an iterative and incremental product development, favoring action, prioritizing rapid learning, and adaptation over extensive upfront planning. Apply leaning-forward approach and empirical methods to navigate complexity, ensuring each iteration delivers value and aligns with customer and business needs.Customer-Centric Problem Solving: Maintain a relentless focus on solving the most critical customer challenges. Align technical solutions with business outcomes, minimize unnecessary complexity, and drive teams toward high performance through continuous learning and collaborative execution.Tech/Quality Risk Management: Establish and evolve engineering standards, coding practices, and quality benchmarks to ensure robust, secure, and scalable solutions. Proactively identify and mitigate technical risks, ensuring operational excellence and resilience.Influential Communication: Influence, persuade, and drive decision-making processes. Communicate effectively in both written and verbal forms. Craft clear, structured arguments and technical trade-offs, supported by evidence.Organizational Engagement and Collaboration: Engage stakeholders at all levels of the organization, from team members to middle management to executives. Build collaborative and constructive relationships, co-creating and driving momentum and value across multiple organizational levels.The team: US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting-edge internal and go-to-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.Key Qualifications:A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Enterprise experience is the most relevant factor.Excellent software engineering and product architecture/design foundation with deep understanding of Business Context Diagrams (BCD), sequence/activity/state/ER/DFD diagrams, OOP/OOD, data structures, algorithms, code instrumentation, and messaging patterns (e.g., routing, transformation, construction, channel, endpoint, adapter, sequencing).18+ years of proven experience with programming languages, technologies, and frameworks such as Python, C#, Java, Node.js, Golang, .NET Core, XML/JSON, REST/SOAP/GraphQL, SQL/NoSQL, SSO/MFA, and unit testing frameworks.10+ years of hands-on experience with cloud-native integration services on one or more hyper-scalers like Azure, AWS, GCP (e.g., API Gateways, Message Brokers, Queuing Services, Workflow Automation & Orchestration, ETL/ELT, Event Streaming, Real-Time Data Processing, Service Mesh).7+ years of experience with defining and driving engineering KPIs, implementing engineering maturity models, and driving continuous improvement.5+ years of experience with AI/ML; experience with the latest GenAI models is preferred.Deep understanding of methodologies and tools such as XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, CAST, etc., to deliver high-quality products rapidly.Proven ability to drive adoption of modern engineering practices at scale, including cross-functional collaboration.Proven track record of leading, mentoring, and developing diverse engineering teams, fostering a culture of innovation, inclusion, and continuous learning.Strong understanding of security, privacy, and compliance requirements in enterprise software engineering.Demonstrated experience aligning engineering initiatives with business and customer value, delivering measurable outcomes in agile environments.Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.How You will Grow: At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.
